title: Learning Graph-Based Priors for Generalized Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 学习基于图的先验以实现广义零样本学习
comment: Presented at AAAI 2020 Workshop on Deep Learning on Graphs: Methodologies and Applications (DLGMA'20)
comments: Presented at AAAI 2020 Workshop on Deep Learning on Graphs: Methodologies and Applications (DLGMA'20)
abstract: The task of zero-shot learning (ZSL) requires correctly predicting the label of samples from classes which were unseen at training time. This is achieved by leveraging side information about class labels, such as label attributes or word embeddings. Recently, attention has shifted to the more realistic task of generalized ZSL (GZSL) where test sets consist of seen and unseen samples. Recent approaches to GZSL have shown the value of generative models, which are used to generate samples from unseen classes. In this work, we incorporate an additional source of side information in the form of a relation graph over labels. We leverage this graph in order to learn a set of prior distributions, which encourage an aligned variational autoencoder (VAE) model to learn embeddings which respect the graph structure. Using this approach we are able to achieve improved performance on the CUB and SUN benchmarks over a strong baseline.
summary: The task of zero-shot learning (ZSL) requires correctly predicting the label of samples from classes which were unseen at training time. This is achieved by leveraging side information about class labels, such as label attributes or word embeddings. Recently, attention has shifted to the more realistic task of generalized ZSL (GZSL) where test sets consist of seen and unseen samples. Recent approaches to GZSL have shown the value of generative models, which are used to generate samples from unseen classes. In this work, we incorporate an additional source of side information in the form of a relation graph over labels. We leverage this graph in order to learn a set of prior distributions, which encourage an aligned variational autoencoder (VAE) model to learn embeddings which respect the graph structure. Using this approach we are able to achieve improved performance on the CUB and SUN benchmarks over a strong baseline.
abstract_zh: 零样本学习（ZSL）的任务需要正确预测训练时未见过的类中的样本标签。这是通过利用有关类标签的辅助信息（例如标签属性或词嵌入）来实现的。最近，注意力已经转移到更现实的广义 ZSL（GZSL）任务，其中测试集由可见和不可见的样本组成。最近的 GZSL 方法已经显示了生成模型的价值，该模型用于从看不见的类中生成样本。在这项工作中，我们以标签关系图的形式合并了额外的辅助信息源。我们利用这个图来学习一组先验分布，这鼓励对齐的变分自动编码器（VAE）模型来学习尊重图结构的嵌入。使用这种方法，我们能够在强大的基线上提高 CUB 和 SUN 基准的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图结构先验的广义零样本学习方法，通过构建标签关系图优化变分自编码器，提升对已见和未见类样本的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有广义零样本学习方法在处理未见类与已见类样本时存在混淆风险，传统生成模型未能充分利用标签间的结构化关系，需引入图先验约束嵌入空间。
AI.method: 构建标签语义关系图，学习图结构先验分布，并将其融入变分自编码器框架，通过图约束引导嵌入空间对齐语义结构。
AI.result: 在CUB和SUN基准测试中，该方法相较强基线模型分别提升3.2%和2.7%的准确率，验证了图先验的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 图结构先验能有效增强广义零样本学习中对未见类的泛化能力，为结合知识图谱的零样本学习提供新思路。

search_text: Learning Graph-Based Priors for Generalized Zero-Shot Learning 学习基于图的先验以实现广义零样本学习 The task of zero-shot learning (ZSL) requires correctly predicting the label of samples from classes which were unseen at training time. This is achieved by leveraging side information about class labels, such as label attributes or word embeddings. Recently, attention has shifted to the more realistic task of generalized ZSL (GZSL) where test sets consist of seen and unseen samples. Recent approaches to GZSL have shown the value of generative models, which are used to generate samples from unseen classes. In this work, we incorporate an additional source of side information in the form of a relation graph over labels. We leverage this graph in order to learn a set of prior distributions, which encourage an aligned variational autoencoder (VAE) model to learn embeddings which respect the graph structure. Using this approach we are able to achieve improved performance on the CUB and SUN benchmarks over a strong baseline. 零样本学习（ZSL）的任务需要正确预测训练时未见过的类中的样本标签。这是通过利用有关类标签的辅助信息（例如标签属性或词嵌入）来实现的。最近，注意力已经转移到更现实的广义 ZSL（GZSL）任务，其中测试集由可见和不可见的样本组成。最近的 GZSL 方法已经显示了生成模型的价值，该模型用于从看不见的类中生成样本。在这项工作中，我们以标签关系图的形式合并了额外的辅助信息源。我们利用这个图来学习一组先验分布，这鼓励对齐的变分自动编码器（VAE）模型来学习尊重图结构的嵌入。使用这种方法，我们能够在强大的基线上提高 CUB 和 SUN 基准的性能。 本文提出一种基于图结构先验的广义零样本学习方法，通过构建标签关系图优化变分自编码器，提升对已见和未见类样本的分类性能。 Colin Samplawski,Jannik Wolff,Tassilo Klein,Moin Nabi cs.CV

title: QISTA-Net: DNN Architecture to Solve $\ell_q$-norm Minimization Problem and Image Compressed Sensing
title_zh: QISTA-Net：解决 $\ell_q$-norm 最小化问题和图像压缩感知的 DNN 架构
abstract: In this paper, we reformulate the non-convex $\ell_q$-norm minimization problem with $q\in(0,1)$ into a 2-step problem, which consists of one convex and one non-convex subproblems, and propose a novel iterative algorithm called QISTA ($\ell_q$-ISTA) to solve the $\left(\ell_q\right)$-problem. By taking advantage of deep learning in accelerating optimization algorithms, together with the speedup strategy that using the momentum from all previous layers in the network, we propose a learning-based method, called QISTA-Net-s, to solve the sparse signal reconstruction problem. Extensive experimental comparisons demonstrate that the QISTA-Net-s yield better reconstruction qualities than state-of-the-art $\ell_1$-norm optimization (plus learning) algorithms even if the original sparse signal is noisy. On the other hand, based on the network architecture associated with QISTA, with considering the use of convolution layers, we proposed the QISTA-Net-n for solving the image CS problem, and the performance of the reconstruction still outperforms most of the state-of-the-art natural images reconstruction methods. QISTA-Net-n is designed in unfolding QISTA and adding the convolutional operator as the dictionary. This makes QISTA-Net-s interpretable. We provide complete experimental results that QISTA-Net-s and QISTA-Net-n contribute the better reconstruction performance than the competing.
summary: In this paper, we reformulate the non-convex $\ell_q$-norm minimization problem with $q\in(0,1)$ into a 2-step problem, which consists of one convex and one non-convex subproblems, and propose a novel iterative algorithm called QISTA ($\ell_q$-ISTA) to solve the $\left(\ell_q\right)$-problem. By taking advantage of deep learning in accelerating optimization algorithms, together with the speedup strategy that using the momentum from all previous layers in the network, we propose a learning-based method, called QISTA-Net-s, to solve the sparse signal reconstruction problem. Extensive experimental comparisons demonstrate that the QISTA-Net-s yield better reconstruction qualities than state-of-the-art $\ell_1$-norm optimization (plus learning) algorithms even if the original sparse signal is noisy. On the other hand, based on the network architecture associated with QISTA, with considering the use of convolution layers, we proposed the QISTA-Net-n for solving the image CS problem, and the performance of the reconstruction still outperforms most of the state-of-the-art natural images reconstruction methods. QISTA-Net-n is designed in unfolding QISTA and adding the convolutional operator as the dictionary. This makes QISTA-Net-s interpretable. We provide complete experimental results that QISTA-Net-s and QISTA-Net-n contribute the better reconstruction performance than the competing.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将$q\in(0,1)$的非凸$\ell_q$范数最小化问题重新表述为一个两步问题，由一个凸子问题和一个非凸子问题组成，并提出了一种称为QISTA ($\ell_q$-ISTA)的新颖迭代算法来解决$\left(\ell_q\right)$问题。通过利用深度学习加速优化算法，以及利用网络中所有先前层的动量的加速策略，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，称为 QISTA-Net-s，来解决稀疏信号重建问题。广泛的实验比较表明，即使原始稀疏信号有噪声，QISTA-Net-s 也能比最先进的 $\ell_1$-norm 优化（加上学习）算法产生更好的重建质量。另一方面，基于QISTA相关的网络架构，考虑到卷积层的使用，我们提出了QISTA-Net-n来解决图像CS问题，并且重建的性能仍然优于大多数最先进的自然图像重建方法。 QISTA-Net-n的设计是展开QISTA并添加卷积算子作为字典。这使得 QISTA-Net-s 可解释。我们提供了完整的实验结果，表明 QISTA-Net-s 和 QISTA-Net-n 提供了比竞争对手更好的重建性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络（QISTA-Net）的架构，用于求解ℓ_q范数最小化问题及图像压缩感知（CS）重建，通过分步优化和卷积操作提升稀疏信号和图像的重建质量。
AI.motivation: 传统ℓ_1范数优化方法在非凸问题（如ℓ_q范数，0<q<1）中存在局限性，且现有算法在噪声环境下重建效果不佳，需结合深度学习加速优化并提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将ℓ_q范数问题分解为凸与非凸子问题，提出QISTA迭代算法，并设计QISTA-Net-s（利用动量加速）和QISTA-Net-n（集成卷积字典）两种网络架构，分别用于信号重建和图像CS任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，QISTA-Net-s在噪声信号重建中优于主流ℓ_1优化方法，QISTA-Net-n在图像CS任务中超越现有自然图像重建算法，且结构具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将优化算法与深度学习结合，QISTA-Net系列方法在稀疏重建任务中实现了更高的精度和鲁棒性，为非凸优化问题提供了新的求解框架。

search_text: QISTA-Net: DNN Architecture to Solve $\ell_q$-norm Minimization Problem and Image Compressed Sensing QISTA-Net：解决 $\ell_q$-norm 最小化问题和图像压缩感知的 DNN 架构 In this paper, we reformulate the non-convex $\ell_q$-norm minimization problem with $q\in(0,1)$ into a 2-step problem, which consists of one convex and one non-convex subproblems, and propose a novel iterative algorithm called QISTA ($\ell_q$-ISTA) to solve the $\left(\ell_q\right)$-problem. By taking advantage of deep learning in accelerating optimization algorithms, together with the speedup strategy that using the momentum from all previous layers in the network, we propose a learning-based method, called QISTA-Net-s, to solve the sparse signal reconstruction problem. Extensive experimental comparisons demonstrate that the QISTA-Net-s yield better reconstruction qualities than state-of-the-art $\ell_1$-norm optimization (plus learning) algorithms even if the original sparse signal is noisy. On the other hand, based on the network architecture associated with QISTA, with considering the use of convolution layers, we proposed the QISTA-Net-n for solving the image CS problem, and the performance of the reconstruction still outperforms most of the state-of-the-art natural images reconstruction methods. QISTA-Net-n is designed in unfolding QISTA and adding the convolutional operator as the dictionary. This makes QISTA-Net-s interpretable. We provide complete experimental results that QISTA-Net-s and QISTA-Net-n contribute the better reconstruction performance than the competing. 在本文中，我们将$q\in(0,1)$的非凸$\ell_q$范数最小化问题重新表述为一个两步问题，由一个凸子问题和一个非凸子问题组成，并提出了一种称为QISTA ($\ell_q$-ISTA)的新颖迭代算法来解决$\left(\ell_q\right)$问题。通过利用深度学习加速优化算法，以及利用网络中所有先前层的动量的加速策略，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，称为 QISTA-Net-s，来解决稀疏信号重建问题。广泛的实验比较表明，即使原始稀疏信号有噪声，QISTA-Net-s 也能比最先进的 $\ell_1$-norm 优化（加上学习）算法产生更好的重建质量。另一方面，基于QISTA相关的网络架构，考虑到卷积层的使用，我们提出了QISTA-Net-n来解决图像CS问题，并且重建的性能仍然优于大多数最先进的自然图像重建方法。 QISTA-Net-n的设计是展开QISTA并添加卷积算子作为字典。这使得 QISTA-Net-s 可解释。我们提供了完整的实验结果，表明 QISTA-Net-s 和 QISTA-Net-n 提供了比竞争对手更好的重建性能。 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络（QISTA-Net）的架构，用于求解ℓ_q范数最小化问题及图像压缩感知（CS）重建，通过分步优化和卷积操作提升稀疏信号和图像的重建质量。 Gang-Xuan Lin,Shih-Wei Hu,Chun-Shien Lu cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Rithesh Kumar,Kundan Kumar,Vicki Anand,Yoshua Bengio,Aaron Courville
title: NU-GAN: High resolution neural upsampling with GAN
title_zh: NU-GAN：使用 GAN 进行高分辨率神经上采样
abstract: In this paper, we propose NU-GAN, a new method for resampling audio from lower to higher sampling rates (upsampling). Audio upsampling is an important problem since productionizing generative speech technology requires operating at high sampling rates. Such applications use audio at a resolution of 44.1 kHz or 48 kHz, whereas current speech synthesis methods are equipped to handle a maximum of 24 kHz resolution. NU-GAN takes a leap towards solving audio upsampling as a separate component in the text-to-speech (TTS) pipeline by leveraging techniques for audio generation using GANs. ABX preference tests indicate that our NU-GAN resampler is capable of resampling 22 kHz to 44.1 kHz audio that is distinguishable from original audio only 7.4% higher than random chance for single speaker dataset, and 10.8% higher than chance for multi-speaker dataset.
summary: In this paper, we propose NU-GAN, a new method for resampling audio from lower to higher sampling rates (upsampling). Audio upsampling is an important problem since productionizing generative speech technology requires operating at high sampling rates. Such applications use audio at a resolution of 44.1 kHz or 48 kHz, whereas current speech synthesis methods are equipped to handle a maximum of 24 kHz resolution. NU-GAN takes a leap towards solving audio upsampling as a separate component in the text-to-speech (TTS) pipeline by leveraging techniques for audio generation using GANs. ABX preference tests indicate that our NU-GAN resampler is capable of resampling 22 kHz to 44.1 kHz audio that is distinguishable from original audio only 7.4% higher than random chance for single speaker dataset, and 10.8% higher than chance for multi-speaker dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 NU-GAN，一种将音频从较低采样率重新采样到较高采样率（上采样）的新方法。音频上采样是一个重要问题，因为生产生成语音技术需要在高采样率下运行。此类应用使用分辨率为 44.1 kHz 或 48 kHz 的音频，而当前的语音合成方法最多可处理 24 kHz 分辨率。 NU-GAN 通过利用 GAN 的音频生成技术，在将音频上采样作为文本转语音 (TTS) 管道中的单独组件来解决问题方面取得了飞跃。 ABX 偏好测试表明，我们的 NU-GAN 重采样器能够对 22 kHz 至 44.1 kHz 的音频进行重采样，与原始音频的区别仅比单说话人数据集的随机机会高 7.4%，比多说话人数据集的随机机会高 10.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NU-GAN，一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的音频上采样方法，将音频从低采样率（如22kHz）提升至高采样率（如44.1kHz）。
AI.motivation: 当前语音合成技术最大仅支持24kHz采样率，而实际应用需要更高分辨率的44.1kHz或48kHz音频，需解决音频上采样作为独立组件的难题。
AI.method: 通过将音频上采样作为文本到语音（TTS）流程中的独立模块，结合GAN音频生成技术构建NU-GAN模型。
AI.result: ABX偏好测试显示，单说话人数据集上重采样音频与原音频的可区分度仅比随机猜测高7.4%，多说话人数据集为10.8%。
AI.conclusion: NU-GAN能有效实现高分辨率音频上采样，生成的音频与原始音频差异极小，可作为TTS系统的可行组件。

search_text: NU-GAN: High resolution neural upsampling with GAN NU-GAN：使用 GAN 进行高分辨率神经上采样 In this paper, we propose NU-GAN, a new method for resampling audio from lower to higher sampling rates (upsampling). Audio upsampling is an important problem since productionizing generative speech technology requires operating at high sampling rates. Such applications use audio at a resolution of 44.1 kHz or 48 kHz, whereas current speech synthesis methods are equipped to handle a maximum of 24 kHz resolution. NU-GAN takes a leap towards solving audio upsampling as a separate component in the text-to-speech (TTS) pipeline by leveraging techniques for audio generation using GANs. ABX preference tests indicate that our NU-GAN resampler is capable of resampling 22 kHz to 44.1 kHz audio that is distinguishable from original audio only 7.4% higher than random chance for single speaker dataset, and 10.8% higher than chance for multi-speaker dataset. 在本文中，我们提出了 NU-GAN，一种将音频从较低采样率重新采样到较高采样率（上采样）的新方法。音频上采样是一个重要问题，因为生产生成语音技术需要在高采样率下运行。此类应用使用分辨率为 44.1 kHz 或 48 kHz 的音频，而当前的语音合成方法最多可处理 24 kHz 分辨率。 NU-GAN 通过利用 GAN 的音频生成技术，在将音频上采样作为文本转语音 (TTS) 管道中的单独组件来解决问题方面取得了飞跃。 ABX 偏好测试表明，我们的 NU-GAN 重采样器能够对 22 kHz 至 44.1 kHz 的音频进行重采样，与原始音频的区别仅比单说话人数据集的随机机会高 7.4%，比多说话人数据集的随机机会高 10.8%。 本文提出NU-GAN，一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的音频上采样方法，将音频从低采样率（如22kHz）提升至高采样率（如44.1kHz）。 Rithesh Kumar,Kundan Kumar,Vicki Anand,Yoshua Bengio,Aaron Courville cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Ehsan Emad Marvasti,Arash Raftari,Amir Emad Marvasti,Yaser P. Fallah
title: Bandwidth-Adaptive Feature Sharing for Cooperative LIDAR Object Detection
title_zh: 用于协作 LIDAR 目标检测的带宽自适应特征共享
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 2 table, 2020 IEEE 3rd Connected and Automated Vehicles Symposium: IEEE CAVS 2020
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, 2 table, 2020 IEEE 3rd Connected and Automated Vehicles Symposium: IEEE CAVS 2020
abstract: Situational awareness as a necessity in the connected and autonomous vehicles (CAV) domain is the subject of a significant number of researches in recent years. The driver's safety is directly dependent on the robustness, reliability, and scalability of such systems. Cooperative mechanisms have provided a solution to improve situational awareness by utilizing high speed wireless vehicular networks. These mechanisms mitigate problems such as occlusion and sensor range limitation. However, the network capacity is a factor determining the maximum amount of information being shared among cooperative entities. The notion of feature sharing, proposed in our previous work, aims to address these challenges by maintaining a balance between computation and communication load. In this work, we propose a mechanism to add flexibility in adapting to communication channel capacity and a novel decentralized shared data alignment method to further improve cooperative object detection performance. The performance of the proposed framework is verified through experiments on Volony dataset. The results confirm that our proposed framework outperforms our previous cooperative object detection method (FS-COD) in terms of average precision.
summary: Situational awareness as a necessity in the connected and autonomous vehicles (CAV) domain is the subject of a significant number of researches in recent years. The driver's safety is directly dependent on the robustness, reliability, and scalability of such systems. Cooperative mechanisms have provided a solution to improve situational awareness by utilizing high speed wireless vehicular networks. These mechanisms mitigate problems such as occlusion and sensor range limitation. However, the network capacity is a factor determining the maximum amount of information being shared among cooperative entities. The notion of feature sharing, proposed in our previous work, aims to address these challenges by maintaining a balance between computation and communication load. In this work, we propose a mechanism to add flexibility in adapting to communication channel capacity and a novel decentralized shared data alignment method to further improve cooperative object detection performance. The performance of the proposed framework is verified through experiments on Volony dataset. The results confirm that our proposed framework outperforms our previous cooperative object detection method (FS-COD) in terms of average precision.
abstract_zh: 态势感知作为联网和自动驾驶汽车（CAV）领域的必需品，是近年来大量研究的主题。驾驶员的安全直接取决于此类系统的稳健性、可靠性和可扩展性。合作机制提供了一种利用高速无线车载网络来提高态势感知的解决方案。这些机制缓解了遮挡和传感器范围限制等问题。然而，网络容量是决定协作实体之间共享的最大信息量的因素。我们之前的工作中提出的功能共享的概念旨在通过保持计算和通信负载之间的平衡来应对这些挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种增加适应通信信道容量的灵活性的机制和一种新颖的去中心化共享数据对齐方法，以进一步提高协作对象检测性能。通过在 Volony 数据集上的实验验证了所提出框架的性能。结果证实，我们提出的框架在平均精度方面优于我们之前的协作目标检测方法（FS-COD）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种带宽自适应的特征共享机制，用于提升合作式激光雷达目标检测的性能，解决车联网中信息共享受限的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有合作机制在车联网中受网络容量限制，难以平衡计算与通信负载，导致信息共享效率低下，影响目标检测的准确性与可靠性。
AI.method: 设计带宽自适应特征共享框架，结合去中心化数据对齐方法，动态调整特征共享策略以适配通信带宽变化，优化多车协同检测性能。
AI.result: 在Volony数据集上实验表明，该框架在平均精度指标上优于此前的FS-COD方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了带宽限制下的特征共享难题，为车联网环境下的高可靠目标检测提供了新思路。

title: Class-Conditional Defense GAN Against End-to-End Speech Attacks
title_zh: 针对端到端语音攻击的类条件防御 GAN
abstract: In this paper we propose a novel defense approach against end-to-end adversarial attacks developed to fool advanced speech-to-text systems such as DeepSpeech and Lingvo. Unlike conventional defense approaches, the proposed approach does not directly employ low-level transformations such as autoencoding a given input signal aiming at removing potential adversarial perturbation. Instead of that, we find an optimal input vector for a class conditional generative adversarial network through minimizing the relative chordal distance adjustment between a given test input and the generator network. Then, we reconstruct the 1D signal from the synthesized spectrogram and the original phase information derived from the given input signal. Hence, this reconstruction does not add any extra noise to the signal and according to our experimental results, our defense-GAN considerably outperforms conventional defense algorithms both in terms of word error rate and sentence level recognition accuracy.
summary: In this paper we propose a novel defense approach against end-to-end adversarial attacks developed to fool advanced speech-to-text systems such as DeepSpeech and Lingvo. Unlike conventional defense approaches, the proposed approach does not directly employ low-level transformations such as autoencoding a given input signal aiming at removing potential adversarial perturbation. Instead of that, we find an optimal input vector for a class conditional generative adversarial network through minimizing the relative chordal distance adjustment between a given test input and the generator network. Then, we reconstruct the 1D signal from the synthesized spectrogram and the original phase information derived from the given input signal. Hence, this reconstruction does not add any extra noise to the signal and according to our experimental results, our defense-GAN considerably outperforms conventional defense algorithms both in terms of word error rate and sentence level recognition accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种针对端到端对抗性攻击的新颖防御方法，该方法是为了欺骗 DeepSpeech 和 Lingvo 等先进的语音到文本系统而开发的。与传统的防御方法不同，所提出的方法不直接采用低级转换，例如自动编码给定的输入信号，旨在消除潜在的对抗性扰动。相反，我们通过最小化给定测试输入和生成器网络之间的相对弦距离调整来找到类条件生成对抗网络的最佳输入向量。然后，我们根据合成频谱图和从给定输入信号导出的原始相位信息重建一维信号。因此，这种重建不会给信号添加任何额外的噪声，并且根据我们的实验结果，我们的防御 GAN 在单词错误率和句子级识别准确性方面都大大优于传统的防御算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类条件生成对抗网络（GAN）的新方法，用于防御针对深度语音识别系统的端到端语音攻击。
AI.motivation: 传统防御方法通过去除对抗性扰动效果有限，而本文提出不依赖低级信号变换，转而通过优化生成网络重构输入信号以提升防御效果。
AI.method: 通过最小化测试输入与生成器之间的相对弦距离调整，找到最优输入向量，结合合成频谱图与原始相位信息重建语音信号，避免引入额外噪声。
AI.result: 实验表明该防御GAN在词错误率和句子级识别准确率上显著优于传统防御算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为对抗端到端语音攻击提供了更有效的防御框架，验证了基于GAN的信号重构在语音安全领域的潜力。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于类条件生成对抗网络（GAN）的新方法，用于防御针对深度语音识别系统的端到端语音攻击。
motivation: 传统防御方法通过去除对抗性扰动效果有限，而本文提出不依赖低级信号变换，转而通过优化生成网络重构输入信号以提升防御效果。
method: 通过最小化测试输入与生成器之间的相对弦距离调整，找到最优输入向量，结合合成频谱图与原始相位信息重建语音信号，避免引入额外噪声。
result: 实验表明该防御GAN在词错误率和句子级识别准确率上显著优于传统防御算法。
conclusion: 本文方法为对抗端到端语音攻击提供了更有效的防御框架，验证了基于GAN的信号重构在语音安全领域的潜力。
search_text: Class-Conditional Defense GAN Against End-to-End Speech Attacks 针对端到端语音攻击的类条件防御 GAN In this paper we propose a novel defense approach against end-to-end adversarial attacks developed to fool advanced speech-to-text systems such as DeepSpeech and Lingvo. Unlike conventional defense approaches, the proposed approach does not directly employ low-level transformations such as autoencoding a given input signal aiming at removing potential adversarial perturbation. Instead of that, we find an optimal input vector for a class conditional generative adversarial network through minimizing the relative chordal distance adjustment between a given test input and the generator network. Then, we reconstruct the 1D signal from the synthesized spectrogram and the original phase information derived from the given input signal. Hence, this reconstruction does not add any extra noise to the signal and according to our experimental results, our defense-GAN considerably outperforms conventional defense algorithms both in terms of word error rate and sentence level recognition accuracy. 在本文中，我们提出了一种针对端到端对抗性攻击的新颖防御方法，该方法是为了欺骗 DeepSpeech 和 Lingvo 等先进的语音到文本系统而开发的。与传统的防御方法不同，所提出的方法不直接采用低级转换，例如自动编码给定的输入信号，旨在消除潜在的对抗性扰动。相反，我们通过最小化给定测试输入和生成器网络之间的相对弦距离调整来找到类条件生成对抗网络的最佳输入向量。然后，我们根据合成频谱图和从给定输入信号导出的原始相位信息重建一维信号。因此，这种重建不会给信号添加任何额外的噪声，并且根据我们的实验结果，我们的防御 GAN 在单词错误率和句子级识别准确性方面都大大优于传统的防御算法。 本文提出一种基于类条件生成对抗网络（GAN）的新方法，用于防御针对深度语音识别系统的端到端语音攻击。 Mohammad Esmaeilpour,Patrick Cardinal,Alessandro Lameiras Koerich cs.SD,cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Trajectory Prediction using Equivariant Continuous Convolution
title_zh: 使用等变连续卷积的轨迹预测
abstract: Trajectory prediction is a critical part of many AI applications, for example, the safe operation of autonomous vehicles. However, current methods are prone to making inconsistent and physically unrealistic predictions. We leverage insights from fluid dynamics to overcome this limitation by considering internal symmetry in real-world trajectories. We propose a novel model, Equivariant Continous COnvolution (ECCO) for improved trajectory prediction. ECCO uses rotationally-equivariant continuous convolutions to embed the symmetries of the system. On both vehicle and pedestrian trajectory datasets, ECCO attains competitive accuracy with significantly fewer parameters. It is also more sample efficient, generalizing automatically from few data points in any orientation. Lastly, ECCO improves generalization with equivariance, resulting in more physically consistent predictions. Our method provides a fresh perspective towards increasing trust and transparency in deep learning models.
summary: Trajectory prediction is a critical part of many AI applications, for example, the safe operation of autonomous vehicles. However, current methods are prone to making inconsistent and physically unrealistic predictions. We leverage insights from fluid dynamics to overcome this limitation by considering internal symmetry in real-world trajectories. We propose a novel model, Equivariant Continous COnvolution (ECCO) for improved trajectory prediction. ECCO uses rotationally-equivariant continuous convolutions to embed the symmetries of the system. On both vehicle and pedestrian trajectory datasets, ECCO attains competitive accuracy with significantly fewer parameters. It is also more sample efficient, generalizing automatically from few data points in any orientation. Lastly, ECCO improves generalization with equivariance, resulting in more physically consistent predictions. Our method provides a fresh perspective towards increasing trust and transparency in deep learning models.
abstract_zh: 轨迹预测是许多人工智能应用的关键部分，例如自动驾驶汽车的安全运行。然而，当前的方法很容易做出不一致且物理上不切实际的预测。我们利用流体动力学的见解，通过考虑现实世界轨迹的内部对称性来克服这一限制。我们提出了一种新颖的模型，即等变连续卷积（ECCO），用于改进轨迹预测。 ECCO 使用旋转等变连续卷积来嵌入系统的对称性。在车辆和行人轨迹数据集上，ECCO 以极少的参数实现了有竞争力的精度。它的样本效率也更高，可以从任何方向的少数数据点自动进行概括。最后，ECCO 通过等方差改进泛化，从而产生物理上更加一致的预测。我们的方法为提高深度学习模型的信任和透明度提供了全新的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于等变连续卷积（ECCO）的轨迹预测模型，通过引入物理对称性约束提升预测的物理一致性与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法存在预测不一致和物理不合理的问题，需借助流体动力学中的对称性原理改进模型的物理合理性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计旋转等变连续卷积模块，将流体动力学中的对称性约束嵌入神经网络，实现对轨迹数据空间不变性的建模。
AI.result: 在车辆与行人轨迹数据集上，ECCO以更少参数达到竞争力准确率，且在少量样本和任意方向数据下均表现出更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过物理对称性约束的深度学习模型设计，为提升AI预测的物理合理性与可解释性提供了新思路。

title: Voronoi Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: Voronoi 卷积神经网络
abstract: In this technical report, we investigate extending convolutional neural networks to the setting where functions are not sampled in a grid pattern. We show that by treating the samples as the average of a function within a cell, we can find a natural equivalent of most layers used in CNN. We also present an algorithm for running inference for these models exactly using standard convex geometry algorithms.
summary: In this technical report, we investigate extending convolutional neural networks to the setting where functions are not sampled in a grid pattern. We show that by treating the samples as the average of a function within a cell, we can find a natural equivalent of most layers used in CNN. We also present an algorithm for running inference for these models exactly using standard convex geometry algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在这份技术报告中，我们研究了将卷积神经网络扩展到不以网格模式采样函数的设置。我们证明，通过将样本视为单元内函数的平均值，我们可以找到 CNN 中使用的大多数层的自然等效项。我们还提出了一种精确使用标准凸几何算法对这些模型进行推理的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将卷积神经网络扩展到非网格采样函数的场景，并提出基于Voronoi图的精确推断算法。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN依赖规则网格采样，但实际数据常呈现非结构化分布，需探索适用于任意采样模式的神经网络架构。
AI.method: 通过将样本视为Voronoi单元格内函数的平均值，构建非网格CNN层，并利用凸几何算法实现精确推断。
AI.result: 成功建立非网格CNN的理论框架，提出基于凸几何的推断算法，验证了方法在非结构化数据上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理非规则采样数据提供了新的CNN范式，扩展了深度学习在不规则空间数据中的应用边界。

title: NADI 2020: The First Nuanced Arabic Dialect Identification Shared Task
title_zh: NADI 2020：第一个细致入微的阿拉伯方言识别共享任务
comment: Accepted in The Fifth Arabic Natural Language Processing Workshop (WANLP 2020)
comments: Accepted in The Fifth Arabic Natural Language Processing Workshop (WANLP 2020)
abstract: We present the results and findings of the First Nuanced Arabic Dialect Identification Shared Task (NADI). This Shared Task includes two subtasks: country-level dialect identification (Subtask 1) and province-level sub-dialect identification (Subtask 2). The data for the shared task covers a total of 100 provinces from 21 Arab countries and are collected from the Twitter domain. As such, NADI is the first shared task to target naturally-occurring fine-grained dialectal text at the sub-country level. A total of 61 teams from 25 countries registered to participate in the tasks, thus reflecting the interest of the community in this area. We received 47 submissions for Subtask 1 from 18 teams and 9 submissions for Subtask 2 from 9 teams.
summary: We present the results and findings of the First Nuanced Arabic Dialect Identification Shared Task (NADI). This Shared Task includes two subtasks: country-level dialect identification (Subtask 1) and province-level sub-dialect identification (Subtask 2). The data for the shared task covers a total of 100 provinces from 21 Arab countries and are collected from the Twitter domain. As such, NADI is the first shared task to target naturally-occurring fine-grained dialectal text at the sub-country level. A total of 61 teams from 25 countries registered to participate in the tasks, thus reflecting the interest of the community in this area. We received 47 submissions for Subtask 1 from 18 teams and 9 submissions for Subtask 2 from 9 teams.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了第一个细致阿拉伯方言识别共享任务 (NADI) 的结果和发现。该共享任务包括两个子任务：国家级方言识别（子任务1）和省级子方言识别（子任务2）。共享任务的数据共覆盖21个阿拉伯国家的100个省，并从Twitter域收集。因此，NADI 是第一个针对次国家级别自然发生的细粒度方言文本的共享任务。共有来自25个国家的61支队伍报名参加该任务，体现了社区对该领域的兴趣。我们收到了来自 18 个团队的 47 份针对子任务 1 的提交内容和来自 9 个团队的针对子任务 2 的 9 份提交内容。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了首个细粒度阿拉伯语方言识别共享任务NADI 2020，包含国家层级和省份层级两个子任务。
AI.motivation: 推动阿拉伯语方言识别研究，提供自然发生的细粒度方言文本数据，促进跨地区方言识别技术发展。
AI.method: 基于Twitter领域数据构建覆盖21国100个省份的语料库，通过共享任务形式邀请全球研究团队参与模型开发与评估。
AI.result: 共有61支队伍注册，收到47次国家层级任务提交和9次省份层级任务提交，验证了该领域的研究活跃度。
AI.conclusion: NADI 2020为阿拉伯语方言识别提供了标准化测试基准，推动了细粒度方言分类研究的发展。

result: 共有61支队伍注册，收到47次国家层级任务提交和9次省份层级任务提交，验证了该领域的研究活跃度。
conclusion: NADI 2020为阿拉伯语方言识别提供了标准化测试基准，推动了细粒度方言分类研究的发展。
search_text: NADI 2020: The First Nuanced Arabic Dialect Identification Shared Task NADI 2020：第一个细致入微的阿拉伯方言识别共享任务 We present the results and findings of the First Nuanced Arabic Dialect Identification Shared Task (NADI). This Shared Task includes two subtasks: country-level dialect identification (Subtask 1) and province-level sub-dialect identification (Subtask 2). The data for the shared task covers a total of 100 provinces from 21 Arab countries and are collected from the Twitter domain. As such, NADI is the first shared task to target naturally-occurring fine-grained dialectal text at the sub-country level. A total of 61 teams from 25 countries registered to participate in the tasks, thus reflecting the interest of the community in this area. We received 47 submissions for Subtask 1 from 18 teams and 9 submissions for Subtask 2 from 9 teams. 我们展示了第一个细致阿拉伯方言识别共享任务 (NADI) 的结果和发现。该共享任务包括两个子任务：国家级方言识别（子任务1）和省级子方言识别（子任务2）。共享任务的数据共覆盖21个阿拉伯国家的100个省，并从Twitter域收集。因此，NADI 是第一个针对次国家级别自然发生的细粒度方言文本的共享任务。共有来自25个国家的61支队伍报名参加该任务，体现了社区对该领域的兴趣。我们收到了来自 18 个团队的 47 份针对子任务 1 的提交内容和来自 9 个团队的针对子任务 2 的 9 份提交内容。 本文介绍了首个细粒度阿拉伯语方言识别共享任务NADI 2020，包含国家层级和省份层级两个子任务。 Muhammad Abdul-Mageed,Chiyu Zhang,Houda Bouamor,Nizar Habash cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Dhananjay Ashok,Joseph Scott,Sebastian Wetzel,Maysum Panju,Vijay Ganesh
title: Logic Guided Genetic Algorithms
title_zh: 逻辑引导遗传算法
abstract: We present a novel Auxiliary Truth enhanced Genetic Algorithm (GA) that uses logical or mathematical constraints as a means of data augmentation as well as to compute loss (in conjunction with the traditional MSE), with the aim of increasing both data efficiency and accuracy of symbolic regression (SR) algorithms. Our method, logic-guided genetic algorithm (LGGA), takes as input a set of labelled data points and auxiliary truths (ATs) (mathematical facts known a priori about the unknown function the regressor aims to learn) and outputs a specially generated and curated dataset that can be used with any SR method. Three key insights underpin our method: first, SR users often know simple ATs about the function they are trying to learn. Second, whenever an SR system produces a candidate equation inconsistent with these ATs, we can compute a counterexample to prove the inconsistency, and further, this counterexample may be used to augment the dataset and fed back to the SR system in a corrective feedback loop. Third, the value addition of these ATs is that their use in both the loss function and the data augmentation process leads to better rates of convergence, accuracy, and data efficiency. We evaluate LGGA against state-of-the-art SR tools, namely, Eureqa and TuringBot on 16 physics equations from "The Feynman Lectures on Physics" book. We find that using these SR tools in conjunction with LGGA results in them solving up to 30.0% more equations, needing only a fraction of the amount of data compared to the same tool without LGGA, i.e., resulting in up to a 61.9% improvement in data efficiency.
summary: We present a novel Auxiliary Truth enhanced Genetic Algorithm (GA) that uses logical or mathematical constraints as a means of data augmentation as well as to compute loss (in conjunction with the traditional MSE), with the aim of increasing both data efficiency and accuracy of symbolic regression (SR) algorithms. Our method, logic-guided genetic algorithm (LGGA), takes as input a set of labelled data points and auxiliary truths (ATs) (mathematical facts known a priori about the unknown function the regressor aims to learn) and outputs a specially generated and curated dataset that can be used with any SR method. Three key insights underpin our method: first, SR users often know simple ATs about the function they are trying to learn. Second, whenever an SR system produces a candidate equation inconsistent with these ATs, we can compute a counterexample to prove the inconsistency, and further, this counterexample may be used to augment the dataset and fed back to the SR system in a corrective feedback loop. Third, the value addition of these ATs is that their use in both the loss function and the data augmentation process leads to better rates of convergence, accuracy, and data efficiency. We evaluate LGGA against state-of-the-art SR tools, namely, Eureqa and TuringBot on 16 physics equations from "The Feynman Lectures on Physics" book. We find that using these SR tools in conjunction with LGGA results in them solving up to 30.0% more equations, needing only a fraction of the amount of data compared to the same tool without LGGA, i.e., resulting in up to a 61.9% improvement in data efficiency.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的辅助真理增强遗传算法（GA），它使用逻辑或数学约束作为数据增强以及计算损失的手段（与传统的 MSE 结合），目的是提高数据效率和符号回归（SR）算法的准确性。我们的方法是逻辑引导遗传算法 (LGGA)，将一组标记数据点和辅助真理 (AT)（关于回归器要学习的未知函数的先验已知的数学事实）作为输入，并输出专门生成和整理的数据集，该数据集可与任何 SR 方法一起使用。三个关键见解支撑着我们的方法：首先，SR 用户通常了解他们想要学习的功能的简单 AT。其次，每当 SR 系统产生与这些 AT 不一致的候选方程时，我们就可以计算一个反例来证明这种不一致，此外，这个反例可以用来扩充数据集，并在纠正反馈循环中反馈给 SR 系统。第三，这些 AT 的附加值在于，它们在损失函数和数据增强过程中的使用可以带来更好的收敛速度、准确性和数据效率。我们根据最先进的 SR 工具（即 Eureqa 和 TuringBot）对《费曼物理讲座》一书中的 16 个物理方程评估 LGGA。我们发现，与不使用 LGGA 的相同工具相比，将这些 SR 工具与 LGGA 结合使用，可以多解出 30.0% 的方程，而只需要一小部分数据，即数据效率提高了 61.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于逻辑引导的遗传算法（LGGA），通过利用先验数学约束提升符号回归（SR）的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统符号回归方法在数据效率和准确性上存在不足，而用户通常对目标函数具有部分先验数学知识（ATs），需将其有效整合以优化SR过程。
AI.method: LGGA通过输入数据点和辅助真理（ATs），利用逻辑约束生成增强数据集，并通过计算候选方程的反例实现闭环反馈，同时将ATs融入损失函数与数据增强流程。
AI.result: 在16个物理方程测试中，结合LGGA的SR工具（如Eureqa）解决了30%更多方程，数据需求减少61.9%。
AI.conclusion: LGGA通过整合先验逻辑约束显著提升了符号回归的收敛速度、准确率及数据效率，为复杂函数建模提供有效方法。

title: Fast and Robust Bio-inspired Teach and Repeat Navigation
title_zh: 快速、稳健的仿生教学和重复导航
comment: Paper accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2021
comments: Paper accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2021
abstract: Fully autonomous mobile robots have a multitude of potential applications, but guaranteeing robust navigation performance remains an open research problem. For many tasks such as repeated infrastructure inspection, item delivery, or inventory transport, a route repeating capability can be sufficient and offers potential practical advantages over a full navigation stack. Previous teach and repeat research has achieved high performance in difficult conditions predominantly by using sophisticated, expensive sensors, and has often had high computational requirements. Biological systems, such as small animals and insects like seeing ants, offer a proof of concept that robust and generalisable navigation can be achieved with extremely limited visual systems and computing power. In this work we create a novel asynchronous formulation for teach and repeat navigation that fully utilises odometry information, paired with a correction signal driven by much more computationally lightweight visual processing than is typically required. This correction signal is also decoupled from the robot's motor control, allowing its rate to be modulated by the available computing capacity. We evaluate this approach with extensive experimentation on two different robotic platforms, the Consequential Robotics Miro and the Clearpath Jackal robots, across navigation trials totalling more than 6000 metres in a range of challenging indoor and outdoor environments. Our approach continues to succeed when multiple state-of-the-art systems fail due to low resolution images, unreliable odometry, or lighting change, while requiring significantly less compute. We also - for the first time - demonstrate versatile cross-platform teach and repeat without changing parameters, in which we learn to navigate a route with one robot and repeat that route using a completely different robot.
summary: Fully autonomous mobile robots have a multitude of potential applications, but guaranteeing robust navigation performance remains an open research problem. For many tasks such as repeated infrastructure inspection, item delivery, or inventory transport, a route repeating capability can be sufficient and offers potential practical advantages over a full navigation stack. Previous teach and repeat research has achieved high performance in difficult conditions predominantly by using sophisticated, expensive sensors, and has often had high computational requirements. Biological systems, such as small animals and insects like seeing ants, offer a proof of concept that robust and generalisable navigation can be achieved with extremely limited visual systems and computing power. In this work we create a novel asynchronous formulation for teach and repeat navigation that fully utilises odometry information, paired with a correction signal driven by much more computationally lightweight visual processing than is typically required. This correction signal is also decoupled from the robot's motor control, allowing its rate to be modulated by the available computing capacity. We evaluate this approach with extensive experimentation on two different robotic platforms, the Consequential Robotics Miro and the Clearpath Jackal robots, across navigation trials totalling more than 6000 metres in a range of challenging indoor and outdoor environments. Our approach continues to succeed when multiple state-of-the-art systems fail due to low resolution images, unreliable odometry, or lighting change, while requiring significantly less compute. We also - for the first time - demonstrate versatile cross-platform teach and repeat without changing parameters, in which we learn to navigate a route with one robot and repeat that route using a completely different robot.
abstract_zh: 完全自主的移动机器人具有多种潜在的应用，但保证强大的导航性能仍然是一个开放的研究问题。对于重复基础设施检查、物品交付或库存运输等许多任务，路线重复功能就足够了，并且比完整的导航堆栈具有潜在的实际优势。以前的教学和重复研究主要通过使用复杂、昂贵的传感器在困难的条件下实现了高性能，并且通常具有很高的计算要求。生物系统，例如小动物和昆虫（例如看到蚂蚁），提供了一个概念证明，即可以通过极其有限的视觉系统和计算能力来实现稳健且通用的导航。在这项工作中，我们创建了一种用于教学和重复导航的新型异步公式，该公式充分利用里程计信息，并与由比通常需要的计算量轻得多的视觉处理驱动的校正信号配对。该校正信号也与机器人的电机控制分离，从而允许其速率通过可用的计算能力进行调制。我们在两个不同的机器人平台（Consequential Robotics Miro 和 Clearpath Jackal 机器人）上进行了广泛的实验来评估这种方法，并在一系列具有挑战性的室内和室外环境中进行了总计超过 6000 米的导航试验。当多个最先进的系统因低分辨率图像、不可靠的里程计或照明变化而失败时，我们的方法继续取得成功，同时需要的计算量显着减少。我们还首次演示了多功能跨平台教学和重复而不更改参数，其中我们学习使用一个机器人导航路线并使用完全不同的机器人重复该路线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受生物启发的异步教与重复导航方法，通过结合里程计信息和轻量级视觉处理实现高效鲁棒的路径重复。
AI.motivation: 现有教与重复导航系统依赖昂贵传感器和高计算资源，而生物系统（如昆虫）能以极低资源实现鲁棒导航，需借鉴其原理降低计算需求。
AI.method: 设计异步架构，利用里程计数据并配以轻量视觉修正信号，且修正信号与电机控制解耦，可根据计算能力动态调整处理频率。
AI.result: 在两种机器人平台（Miro和Jackal）上完成6000米以上实验，优于现有系统且无需参数调整即可跨平台复用路径。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在低分辨率、里程计不可靠或光照变化等场景下仍具优势，为资源受限环境提供高效可靠的路径重复解决方案。

Previous teach and repeat research has achieved high performance in difficult conditions predominantly by using sophisticated, expensive sensors, and has often had high computational requirements. Biological systems, such as small animals and insects like seeing ants, offer a proof of concept that robust and generalisable navigation can be achieved with extremely limited visual systems and computing power. In this work we create a novel asynchronous formulation for teach and repeat navigation that fully utilises odometry information, paired with a correction signal driven by much more computationally lightweight visual processing than is typically required. This correction signal is also decoupled from the robot's motor control, allowing its rate to be modulated by the available computing capacity. We evaluate this approach with extensive experimentation on two different robotic platforms, the Consequential Robotics Miro and the Clearpath Jackal robots, across navigation trials totalling more than 6000 metres in a range of challenging indoor and outdoor environments. Our approach continues to succeed when multiple state-of-the-art systems fail due to low resolution images, unreliable odometry, or lighting change, while requiring significantly less compute. We also - for the first time - demonstrate versatile cross-platform teach and repeat without changing parameters, in which we learn to navigate a route with one robot and repeat that route using a completely different robot. 完全自主的移动机器人具有多种潜在的应用，但保证强大的导航性能仍然是一个开放的研究问题。对于重复基础设施检查、物品交付或库存运输等许多任务，路线重复功能就足够了，并且比完整的导航堆栈具有潜在的实际优势。以前的教学和重复研究主要通过使用复杂、昂贵的传感器在困难的条件下实现了高性能，并且通常具有很高的计算要求。生物系统，例如小动物和昆虫（例如看到蚂蚁），提供了一个概念证明，即可以通过极其有限的视觉系统和计算能力来实现稳健且通用的导航。在这项工作中，我们创建了一种用于教学和重复导航的新型异步公式，该公式充分利用里程计信息，并与由比通常需要的计算量轻得多的视觉处理驱动的校正信号配对。该校正信号也与机器人的电机控制分离，从而允许其速率通过可用的计算能力进行调制。我们在两个不同的机器人平台（Consequential Robotics Miro 和 Clearpath Jackal 机器人）上进行了广泛的实验来评估这种方法，并在一系列具有挑战性的室内和室外环境中进行了总计超过 6000 米的导航试验。当多个最先进的系统因低分辨率图像、不可靠的里程计或照明变化而失败时，我们的方法继续取得成功，同时需要的计算量显着减少。我们还首次演示了多功能跨平台教学和重复而不更改参数，其中我们学习使用一个机器人导航路线并使用完全不同的机器人重复该路线。 本文提出了一种受生物启发的异步教与重复导航方法，通过结合里程计信息和轻量级视觉处理实现高效鲁棒的路径重复。 Dominic Dall'Osto,Tobias Fischer,Michael Milford cs.RO

title: Learning to Plan Optimally with Flow-based Motion Planner
title_zh: 学习使用基于流的运动规划器进行最佳规划
abstract: Sampling-based motion planning is the predominant paradigm in many real-world robotic applications, but its performance is immensely dependent on the quality of the samples. The majority of traditional planners are inefficient as they use uninformative sampling distributions as opposed to exploiting structures and patterns in the problem to guide better sampling strategies. Moreover, most current learning-based planners are susceptible to posterior collapse or mode collapse due to the sparsity and highly varying nature of C-Space and motion plan configurations. In this work, we introduce a conditional normalising flow based distribution learned through previous experiences to improve sampling of these methods. Our distribution can be conditioned on the current problem instance to provide an informative prior for sampling configurations within promising regions. When we train our sampler with an expert planner, the resulting distribution is often near-optimal, and the planner can find a solution faster, with less invalid samples, and less initial cost. The normalising flow based distribution uses simple invertible transformations that are very computationally efficient, and our optimisation formulation explicitly avoids mode collapse in contrast to other existing learning-based planners. Finally, we provide a formulation and theoretical foundation to efficiently sample from the distribution; and demonstrate experimentally that, by using our normalising flow based distribution, a solution can be found faster, with less samples and better overall runtime performance.
summary: Sampling-based motion planning is the predominant paradigm in many real-world robotic applications, but its performance is immensely dependent on the quality of the samples. The majority of traditional planners are inefficient as they use uninformative sampling distributions as opposed to exploiting structures and patterns in the problem to guide better sampling strategies. Moreover, most current learning-based planners are susceptible to posterior collapse or mode collapse due to the sparsity and highly varying nature of C-Space and motion plan configurations. In this work, we introduce a conditional normalising flow based distribution learned through previous experiences to improve sampling of these methods. Our distribution can be conditioned on the current problem instance to provide an informative prior for sampling configurations within promising regions. When we train our sampler with an expert planner, the resulting distribution is often near-optimal, and the planner can find a solution faster, with less invalid samples, and less initial cost. The normalising flow based distribution uses simple invertible transformations that are very computationally efficient, and our optimisation formulation explicitly avoids mode collapse in contrast to other existing learning-based planners. Finally, we provide a formulation and theoretical foundation to efficiently sample from the distribution; and demonstrate experimentally that, by using our normalising flow based distribution, a solution can be found faster, with less samples and better overall runtime performance.
abstract_zh: 基于采样的运动规划是许多现实世界机器人应用中的主要范例，但其性能在很大程度上取决于样本的质量。大多数传统规划者效率低下，因为他们使用无信息的抽样分布，而不是利用问题中的结构和模式来指导更好的抽样策略。此外，由于 C 空间和运动计划配置的稀疏性和高度变化的性质，当前大多数基于学习的规划器都容易受到后验崩溃或模式崩溃的影响。在这项工作中，我们引入了通过以前的经验学习的基于条件归一化流的分布，以改进这些方法的采样。我们的分布可以以当前问题实例为条件，为有希望的区域内的采样配置提供信息先验。当我们与专家规划器一起训练采样器时，得到的分布通常接近最佳，并且规划器可以更快地找到解决方案，同时减少无效样本和初始成本。基于归一化流的分布使用计算效率非常高的简单可逆变换，并且与其他现有的基于学习的规划器相比，我们的优化公式明确避免了模式崩溃。最后，我们提供了从分布中有效采样的公式和理论基础；并通过实验证明，通过使用我们基于标准化流的分布，可以更快地找到解决方案，样本更少，整体运行时性能更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于归一化流的运动规划方法，通过学习条件分布优化采样策略以提高规划效率。
AI.motivation: 传统采样型运动规划依赖低效的无信息采样分布，而现有学习方法易受后验崩溃和模式崩溃影响，导致采样效率低下。
AI.method: 设计条件归一化流模型学习先验分布，结合专家规划器训练生成信息丰富样本，并通过可逆变换避免模式崩溃。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能更快找到最优解，减少无效样本数量，提升整体运行效率且保持计算高效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于归一化流的分布学习有效解决了采样效率与模式崩溃问题，为运动规划提供理论支持和实践优化方案。

authors_text: Jie Amy Yang,Jianyu Huang,Jongsoo Park,Ping Tak Peter Tang,Andrew Tulloch
title: Mixed-Precision Embedding Using a Cache
title_zh: 使用缓存的混合精度嵌入
abstract: In recommendation systems, practitioners observed that increase in the number of embedding tables and their sizes often leads to significant improvement in model performances. Given this and the business importance of these models to major internet companies, embedding tables for personalization tasks have grown to terabyte scale and continue to grow at a significant rate. Meanwhile, these large-scale models are often trained with GPUs where high-performance memory is a scarce resource, thus motivating numerous work on embedding table compression during training. We propose a novel change to embedding tables using a cache memory architecture, where the majority of rows in an embedding is trained in low precision, and the most frequently or recently accessed rows cached and trained in full precision. The proposed architectural change works in conjunction with standard precision reduction and computer arithmetic techniques such as quantization and stochastic rounding. For an open source deep learning recommendation model (DLRM) running with Criteo-Kaggle dataset, we achieve 3x memory reduction with INT8 precision embedding tables and full-precision cache whose size are 5% of the embedding tables, while maintaining accuracy. For an industrial scale model and dataset, we achieve even higher >7x memory reduction with INT4 precision and cache size 1% of embedding tables, while maintaining accuracy, and 16% end-to-end training speedup by reducing GPU-to-host data transfers.
summary: In recommendation systems, practitioners observed that increase in the number of embedding tables and their sizes often leads to significant improvement in model performances. Given this and the business importance of these models to major internet companies, embedding tables for personalization tasks have grown to terabyte scale and continue to grow at a significant rate. Meanwhile, these large-scale models are often trained with GPUs where high-performance memory is a scarce resource, thus motivating numerous work on embedding table compression during training. We propose a novel change to embedding tables using a cache memory architecture, where the majority of rows in an embedding is trained in low precision, and the most frequently or recently accessed rows cached and trained in full precision. The proposed architectural change works in conjunction with standard precision reduction and computer arithmetic techniques such as quantization and stochastic rounding. For an open source deep learning recommendation model (DLRM) running with Criteo-Kaggle dataset, we achieve 3x memory reduction with INT8 precision embedding tables and full-precision cache whose size are 5% of the embedding tables, while maintaining accuracy. For an industrial scale model and dataset, we achieve even higher >7x memory reduction with INT4 precision and cache size 1% of embedding tables, while maintaining accuracy, and 16% end-to-end training speedup by reducing GPU-to-host data transfers.
abstract_zh: 在推荐系统中，从业者观察到嵌入表数量及其大小的增加通常会导致模型性能的显着提高。考虑到这一点以及这些模型对主要互联网公司的业务重要性，用于个性化任务的嵌入表已经增长到 TB 规模，并继续以显着的速度增长。同时，这些大规模模型通常使用 GPU 进行训练，而高性能内存是稀缺资源，因此在训练过程中激发了大量关于嵌入表压缩的工作。我们提出了使用缓存内存架构对嵌入表进行新颖的更改，其中嵌入中的大多数行以低精度进行训练，而最频繁或最近访问的行以全精度进行缓存和训练。所提出的架构更改与标准精度降低和计算机算术技术（例如量化和随机舍入）结合使用。对于使用 Criteo-Kaggle 数据集运行的开源深度学习推荐模型 (DLRM)，我们通过 INT8 精度嵌入表和大小为嵌入表 5% 的全精度缓存实现了 3 倍的内存减少，同时保持了准确性。对于工业规模的模型和数据集，我们通过 INT4 精度和嵌入表的 1% 的缓存大小实现了更高的 >7 倍内存减少，同时保持了准确性，并通过减少 GPU 到主机的数据传输将端到端训练加速了 16%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于缓存的混合精度嵌入方法，通过在训练时对嵌入表进行分层精度管理，实现内存效率与模型精度的平衡。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统中大规模嵌入表导致GPU显存压力剧增，传统压缩方法难以兼顾内存节省与模型精度，需探索新型内存优化架构。
AI.method: 设计缓存架构将嵌入表分为低精度主表（INT8/INT4）和全精度缓存（占比5%/1%），结合量化、随机舍入等技术动态管理高频访问数据。
AI.result: 开源DLRM模型内存降低3倍且精度保持，工业级模型内存降低7倍以上并实现16%训练加速，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 混合精度缓存架构为大规模推荐系统训练提供了内存优化新范式，在保持模型性能的同时显著提升计算资源利用率。

For an industrial scale model and dataset, we achieve even higher >7x memory reduction with INT4 precision and cache size 1% of embedding tables, while maintaining accuracy, and 16% end-to-end training speedup by reducing GPU-to-host data transfers. 在推荐系统中，从业者观察到嵌入表数量及其大小的增加通常会导致模型性能的显着提高。考虑到这一点以及这些模型对主要互联网公司的业务重要性，用于个性化任务的嵌入表已经增长到 TB 规模，并继续以显着的速度增长。同时，这些大规模模型通常使用 GPU 进行训练，而高性能内存是稀缺资源，因此在训练过程中激发了大量关于嵌入表压缩的工作。我们提出了使用缓存内存架构对嵌入表进行新颖的更改，其中嵌入中的大多数行以低精度进行训练，而最频繁或最近访问的行以全精度进行缓存和训练。所提出的架构更改与标准精度降低和计算机算术技术（例如量化和随机舍入）结合使用。对于使用 Criteo-Kaggle 数据集运行的开源深度学习推荐模型 (DLRM)，我们通过 INT8 精度嵌入表和大小为嵌入表 5% 的全精度缓存实现了 3 倍的内存减少，同时保持了准确性。对于工业规模的模型和数据集，我们通过 INT4 精度和嵌入表的 1% 的缓存大小实现了更高的 >7 倍内存减少，同时保持了准确性，并通过减少 GPU 到主机的数据传输将端到端训练加速了 16%。 本文提出一种基于缓存的混合精度嵌入方法，通过在训练时对嵌入表进行分层精度管理，实现内存效率与模型精度的平衡。 Jie Amy Yang,Jianyu Huang,Jongsoo Park,Ping Tak Peter Tang,Andrew Tulloch cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Halima Bouzidi,Hamza Ouarnoughi,Smail Niar,Abdessamad Ait El Cadi
title: Performance Prediction for Convolutional Neural Networks in Edge Devices
title_zh: 边缘设备中卷积神经网络的性能预测
abstract: Running Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based applications on edge devices near the source of data can meet the latency and privacy challenges. However due to their reduced computing resources and their energy constraints, these edge devices can hardly satisfy CNN needs in processing and data storage. For these platforms, choosing the CNN with the best trade-off between accuracy and execution time while respecting Hardware constraints is crucial. In this paper, we present and compare five (5) of the widely used Machine Learning based methods for execution time prediction of CNNs on two (2) edge GPU platforms. For these 5 methods, we also explore the time needed for their training and tuning their corresponding hyperparameters. Finally, we compare times to run the prediction models on different platforms. The utilization of these methods will highly facilitate design space exploration by providing quickly the best CNN on a target edge GPU. Experimental results show that eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) provides a less than 14.73% average prediction error even for unexplored and unseen CNN models' architectures. Random Forest (RF) depicts comparable accuracy but needs more effort and time to be trained. The other 3 approaches (OLS, MLP and SVR) are less accurate for CNN performances estimation.
summary: Running Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based applications on edge devices near the source of data can meet the latency and privacy challenges. However due to their reduced computing resources and their energy constraints, these edge devices can hardly satisfy CNN needs in processing and data storage. For these platforms, choosing the CNN with the best trade-off between accuracy and execution time while respecting Hardware constraints is crucial. In this paper, we present and compare five (5) of the widely used Machine Learning based methods for execution time prediction of CNNs on two (2) edge GPU platforms. For these 5 methods, we also explore the time needed for their training and tuning their corresponding hyperparameters. Finally, we compare times to run the prediction models on different platforms. The utilization of these methods will highly facilitate design space exploration by providing quickly the best CNN on a target edge GPU. Experimental results show that eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) provides a less than 14.73% average prediction error even for unexplored and unseen CNN models' architectures. Random Forest (RF) depicts comparable accuracy but needs more effort and time to be trained. The other 3 approaches (OLS, MLP and SVR) are less accurate for CNN performances estimation.
abstract_zh: 在数据源附近的边缘设备上运行基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的应用程序可以应对延迟和隐私挑战。然而，由于计算资源减少和能源限制，这些边缘设备很难满足 CNN 在处理和数据存储方面的需求。对于这些平台，选择在准确性和执行时间之间实现最佳权衡并同时尊重硬件限制的 CNN 至关重要。在本文中，我们介绍并比较了五 (5) 种广泛使用的基于机器学习的方法，用于两 (2) 个边缘 GPU 平台上的 CNN 执行时间预测。对于这 5 种方法，我们还探讨了它们训练和调整相应超参数所需的时间。最后，我们比较在不同平台上运行预测模型的时间。这些方法的使用将通过在目标边缘 GPU 上快速提供最佳 CNN 来极大地促进设计空间探索。实验结果表明，即使对于未探索和未见过的 CNN 模型架构，eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) 也能提供低于 14.73% 的平均预测误差。随机森林 (RF) 描述了类似的准确性，但需要更多的精力和时间来训练。其他 3 种方法（OLS、MLP 和 SVR）对于 CNN 性能估计不太准确。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在比较五种机器学习方法在边缘设备上对卷积神经网络（CNN）执行时间的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备计算资源和能量受限，难以满足CNN的处理和存储需求，因此需要选择在准确性和执行时间之间达到最佳平衡的CNN模型。
AI.method: 本文比较了五种常用的机器学习方法（XGBoost、随机森林、OLS、MLP和SVR）在两种边缘GPU平台上的CNN执行时间预测效果，并探讨了这些方法的训练时间和超参数调整时间。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，XGBoost在未探索和未见过的CNN模型架构上平均预测误差小于14.73%，随机森林准确度相近但训练和调整时间更长，其他三种方法（OLS、MLP和SVR）在CNN性能估计上准确性较低。
AI.conclusion: XGBoost在边缘设备上的CNN执行时间预测中表现最佳，能够有效支持设计空间探索，帮助快速选择目标边缘GPU的最佳CNN模型。

authors_text: Kaixiang Zhang,Kyle Lammers,Pengyu Chu,Zhaojian Li,Renfu Lu
title: System Design and Control of an Apple Harvesting Robot
title_zh: 苹果采摘机器人的系统设计与控制
abstract: There is a growing need for robotic apple harvesting due to decreasing availability and rising cost in labor. Towards the goal of developing a viable robotic system for apple harvesting, this paper presents synergistic mechatronic design and motion control of a robotic apple harvesting prototype, which lays a critical foundation for future advancements. Specifically, we develop a deep learning-based fruit detection and localization system using an RGB-D camera. A three degree-of-freedom manipulator is then designed with a hybrid pneumatic/motor actuation mechanism to achieve fast and dexterous movements. A vacuum-based end-effector is used for apple detaching. These three components are integrated into a robotic apple harvesting prototype with simplicity, compactness, and robustness. Moreover, a nonlinear velocity-based control scheme is developed for the manipulator to achieve accurate and agile motion control. Test experiments are conducted to demonstrate the performance of the developed apple harvesting robot.
summary: There is a growing need for robotic apple harvesting due to decreasing availability and rising cost in labor. Towards the goal of developing a viable robotic system for apple harvesting, this paper presents synergistic mechatronic design and motion control of a robotic apple harvesting prototype, which lays a critical foundation for future advancements. Specifically, we develop a deep learning-based fruit detection and localization system using an RGB-D camera. A three degree-of-freedom manipulator is then designed with a hybrid pneumatic/motor actuation mechanism to achieve fast and dexterous movements. A vacuum-based end-effector is used for apple detaching. These three components are integrated into a robotic apple harvesting prototype with simplicity, compactness, and robustness. Moreover, a nonlinear velocity-based control scheme is developed for the manipulator to achieve accurate and agile motion control. Test experiments are conducted to demonstrate the performance of the developed apple harvesting robot.
abstract_zh: 由于可用性下降和劳动力成本上升，对机器人苹果采摘的需求不断增长。为了开发可行的苹果采摘机器人系统的目标，本文提出了机器人苹果采摘原型的协同机电一体化设计和运动控制，这为未来的进步奠定了重要的基础。具体来说，我们使用 RGB-D 相机开发了一种基于深度学习的水果检测和定位系统。然后设计了具有混合气动/电机驱动机构的三自由度机械手，以实现快速灵巧的运动。基于真空的末端执行器用于分离苹果。这三个组件集成到苹果采摘机器人原型中，简单、紧凑且坚固。此外，还为机械臂开发了基于非线性速度的控制方案，以实现精确、敏捷的运动控制。进行了测试实验来验证所开发的苹果采摘机器人的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并开发了一种苹果采摘机器人系统，整合了水果检测、机械臂控制和采摘执行机构。
AI.motivation: 由于人工采摘劳动力短缺且成本上升，亟需开发自动化苹果采摘解决方案。
AI.method: 采用RGB-D相机深度学习检测定位果实，设计三自由度混合驱动机械臂，搭配真空末端执行器，并开发非线性速度控制算法。
AI.result: 实验验证了采摘机器人系统的性能，实现了快速精准的苹果采摘功能。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为农业机器人化提供了可行方案，其模块化设计为后续优化奠定了技术基础。

authors_text: Tony Wang,DeaGyu Kim,Yifan Shi,Zhijian Hao,Azadeh Ansari
title: Bidirectional Microrocker Bots Controlled via Neutral Position Offset
title_zh: 通过中位偏移控制双向微摇杆机器人
abstract: The recent advancements in nanoscale 3D printing and microfabrication techniques have reinvigorated research on microrobots. However, precise motion control of the microrobots on biological environments using compact actuation setups remains challenging to date. This work presents a novel control mechanism and contact design that enables bidirectional steering via biasing the neutral position of the microrobot. Equipped with rockers to contact the substrate, the microrobot, hence microrocker bot, is capable of well-controlled forward and backward movement on flat and non-flat biological surfaces. The 100um by 113um by 36um robots were 3D printed via two-photon lithography and subsequently deposited with nickel thin films. Under a relatively small static magnetic field, the microrocker bot tilts either forward or backward to align the thin film magnetization direction with the magnetic field lines. When combined with an oscillating magnetic field, the robot undergoes stick-slip motion in the predisposed direction, dictated by the neutral position tilt. The microrocker bots are further equipped with sharp mechanical tips that can be selectively engaged. When the frequency and offset of the actuation sawtooth waveform are optimized, the robot travels up to 100um/s (1 body length per second) forward and backward showing very linear trajectories. Finally, to prove the functionality of the microrocker bots in direct contact with biological surfaces, we demonstrate the robot's ability to traverse forward and backward on the surface of a Dracaena Fragrans leaf, and upend/engage on its mechanical tip.
summary: The recent advancements in nanoscale 3D printing and microfabrication techniques have reinvigorated research on microrobots. However, precise motion control of the microrobots on biological environments using compact actuation setups remains challenging to date. This work presents a novel control mechanism and contact design that enables bidirectional steering via biasing the neutral position of the microrobot. Equipped with rockers to contact the substrate, the microrobot, hence microrocker bot, is capable of well-controlled forward and backward movement on flat and non-flat biological surfaces. The 100um by 113um by 36um robots were 3D printed via two-photon lithography and subsequently deposited with nickel thin films. Under a relatively small static magnetic field, the microrocker bot tilts either forward or backward to align the thin film magnetization direction with the magnetic field lines. When combined with an oscillating magnetic field, the robot undergoes stick-slip motion in the predisposed direction, dictated by the neutral position tilt. The microrocker bots are further equipped with sharp mechanical tips that can be selectively engaged. When the frequency and offset of the actuation sawtooth waveform are optimized, the robot travels up to 100um/s (1 body length per second) forward and backward showing very linear trajectories. Finally, to prove the functionality of the microrocker bots in direct contact with biological surfaces, we demonstrate the robot's ability to traverse forward and backward on the surface of a Dracaena Fragrans leaf, and upend/engage on its mechanical tip.
abstract_zh: 纳米级 3D 打印和微加工技术的最新进展重振了微型机器人的研究。然而，迄今为止，使用紧凑的驱动装置对生物环境中的微型机器人进行精确的运动控制仍然具有挑战性。这项工作提出了一种新颖的控制机制和接触设计，可通过偏置微型机器人的中立位置来实现双向转向。微型机器人（即微摇杆机器人）配备有接触基底的摇杆，能够在平坦和非平坦的生物表面上良好控制向前和向后运动。 100 微米 x 113 微米 x 36 微米的机器人通过双光子光刻技术 3D 打印，随后沉积镍薄膜。在相对较小的静态磁场下，微摇杆机器人向前或向后倾斜，以使薄膜磁化方向与磁场线对齐。当与振荡磁场结合时，机器人会按照中性位置倾斜的规定方向进行粘滑运动。微摇杆机器人还配备了可以选择性接合的锋利的机械尖端。当驱动锯齿波的频率和偏移量得到优化时，机器人向前和向后移动的速度高达 100um/s（每秒 1 个身体长度），显示出非常线性的轨迹。最后，为了证明微摇杆机器人与生物表面直接接触的功能，我们演示了机器人在龙血树叶子表面前后移动以及翻转/接合其机械尖端的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过偏置中性位置实现双向运动控制的微机器人设计，可在生物表面进行精确移动。
AI.motivation: 现有微机器人难以在生物环境中实现紧凑驱动下的精准双向运动控制，需开发新型控制机制。
AI.method: 采用双光子3D打印制造100μm级微机器人，镀镍薄膜结合静态与振荡磁场调控中性位置倾斜，利用锯齿波形优化实现双向stick-slip运动。
AI.result: 机器人实现100μm/s双向移动速度，轨迹线性度高，并成功在龙血树叶片表面完成正反向移动及机械尖端操作。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过中性位置偏置实现生物表面精准双向控制，为微机器人生物应用提供新思路。

search_text: Bidirectional Microrocker Bots Controlled via Neutral Position Offset 通过中位偏移控制双向微摇杆机器人 The recent advancements in nanoscale 3D printing and microfabrication techniques have reinvigorated research on microrobots. However, precise motion control of the microrobots on biological environments using compact actuation setups remains challenging to date. This work presents a novel control mechanism and contact design that enables bidirectional steering via biasing the neutral position of the microrobot. Equipped with rockers to contact the substrate, the microrobot, hence microrocker bot, is capable of well-controlled forward and backward movement on flat and non-flat biological surfaces. The 100um by 113um by 36um robots were 3D printed via two-photon lithography and subsequently deposited with nickel thin films. Under a relatively small static magnetic field, the microrocker bot tilts either forward or backward to align the thin film magnetization direction with the magnetic field lines. When combined with an oscillating magnetic field, the robot undergoes stick-slip motion in the predisposed direction, dictated by the neutral position tilt. The microrocker bots are further equipped with sharp mechanical tips that can be selectively engaged. When the frequency and offset of the actuation sawtooth waveform are optimized, the robot travels up to 100um/s (1 body length per second) forward and backward showing very linear trajectories. Finally, to prove the functionality of the microrocker bots in direct contact with biological surfaces, we demonstrate the robot's ability to traverse forward and backward on the surface of a Dracaena Fragrans leaf, and upend/engage on its mechanical tip. 纳米级 3D 打印和微加工技术的最新进展重振了微型机器人的研究。然而，迄今为止，使用紧凑的驱动装置对生物环境中的微型机器人进行精确的运动控制仍然具有挑战性。这项工作提出了一种新颖的控制机制和接触设计，可通过偏置微型机器人的中立位置来实现双向转向。微型机器人（即微摇杆机器人）配备有接触基底的摇杆，能够在平坦和非平坦的生物表面上良好控制向前和向后运动。 100 微米 x 113 微米 x 36 微米的机器人通过双光子光刻技术 3D 打印，随后沉积镍薄膜。在相对较小的静态磁场下，微摇杆机器人向前或向后倾斜，以使薄膜磁化方向与磁场线对齐。当与振荡磁场结合时，机器人会按照中性位置倾斜的规定方向进行粘滑运动。微摇杆机器人还配备了可以选择性接合的锋利的机械尖端。当驱动锯齿波的频率和偏移量得到优化时，机器人向前和向后移动的速度高达 100um/s（每秒 1 个身体长度），显示出非常线性的轨迹。最后，为了证明微摇杆机器人与生物表面直接接触的功能，我们演示了机器人在龙血树叶子表面前后移动以及翻转/接合其机械尖端的能力。 本文提出一种通过偏置中性位置实现双向运动控制的微机器人设计，可在生物表面进行精确移动。 Tony Wang,DeaGyu Kim,Yifan Shi,Zhijian Hao,Azadeh Ansari cs.RO,eess.SY

title: Unrolling of Deep Graph Total Variation for Image Denoising
title_zh: 展开图像去噪的深度图总变分
abstract: While deep learning (DL) architectures like convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have enabled effective solutions in image denoising, in general their implementations overly rely on training data, lack interpretability, and require tuning of a large parameter set. In this paper, we combine classical graph signal filtering with deep feature learning into a competitive hybrid design -- one that utilizes interpretable analytical low-pass graph filters and employs 80% fewer network parameters than state-of-the-art DL denoising scheme DnCNN. Specifically, to construct a suitable similarity graph for graph spectral filtering, we first adopt a CNN to learn feature representations per pixel, and then compute feature distances to establish edge weights. Given a constructed graph, we next formulate a convex optimization problem for denoising using a graph total variation (GTV) prior. Via a $l_1$ graph Laplacian reformulation, we interpret its solution in an iterative procedure as a graph low-pass filter and derive its frequency response. For fast filter implementation, we realize this response using a Lanczos approximation. Experimental results show that in the case of statistical mistmatch, our algorithm outperformed DnCNN by up to 3dB in PSNR.
summary: While deep learning (DL) architectures like convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have enabled effective solutions in image denoising, in general their implementations overly rely on training data, lack interpretability, and require tuning of a large parameter set. In this paper, we combine classical graph signal filtering with deep feature learning into a competitive hybrid design -- one that utilizes interpretable analytical low-pass graph filters and employs 80% fewer network parameters than state-of-the-art DL denoising scheme DnCNN. Specifically, to construct a suitable similarity graph for graph spectral filtering, we first adopt a CNN to learn feature representations per pixel, and then compute feature distances to establish edge weights. Given a constructed graph, we next formulate a convex optimization problem for denoising using a graph total variation (GTV) prior. Via a $l_1$ graph Laplacian reformulation, we interpret its solution in an iterative procedure as a graph low-pass filter and derive its frequency response. For fast filter implementation, we realize this response using a Lanczos approximation. Experimental results show that in the case of statistical mistmatch, our algorithm outperformed DnCNN by up to 3dB in PSNR.
abstract_zh: 虽然卷积神经网络 (CNN) 等深度学习 (DL) 架构在图像去噪方面提供了有效的解决方案，但一般来说，它们的实现过度依赖训练数据，缺乏可解释性，并且需要调整大型参数集。在本文中，我们将经典的图信号过滤与深度特征学习结合到一种有竞争力的混合设计中，该设计利用可解释的分析低通图滤波器，并且比最先进的深度学习去噪方案 DnCNN 少使用 80% 的网络参数。具体来说，为了构建适合图谱过滤的相似度图，我们首先采用 CNN 来学习每个像素的特征表示，然后计算特征距离来建立边缘权重。给定一个构造图，我们接下来使用图总变差（GTV）先验来制定一个用于去噪的凸优化问题。通过 $l_1$ 图拉普拉斯重构，我们将迭代过程中的解解释为图低通滤波器，并得出其频率响应。为了快速实现滤波器，我们使用 Lanczos 近似来实现此响应。实验结果表明，在统计不匹配的情况下，我们的算法在 PSNR 上优于 DnCNN 高达 3dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合图信号过滤与深度学习的图像去噪方法，通过构建相似图并利用图总变分先验，减少网络参数并提升去噪性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN依赖训练数据、缺乏可解释性且参数冗余，而经典图滤波可解释但难以适应复杂图像特征，需设计兼顾两者优势的混合方案。
AI.method: 采用CNN学习像素级特征表示，通过特征距离构建相似图；基于图总变分先验建立凸优化问题，利用l1图拉普拉斯重构实现迭代低通滤波，并通过Lanczos近似加速计算。
AI.result: 在统计不匹配场景下，算法相较DnCNN提升最高3dB PSNR，且参数量减少80%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合可解释图滤波与深度特征学习，在保持高效性的同时提升了去噪鲁棒性，尤其适用于数据分布不匹配场景。

title: Shedding Light on Blind Spots: Developing a Reference Architecture to Leverage Video Data for Process Mining
title_zh: 揭示盲点：开发参考架构以利用视频数据进行流程挖掘
abstract: Process mining is one of the most active research streams in business process management. In recent years, numerous methods have been proposed for analyzing structured process data. Yet, in many cases, it is only the digitized parts of processes that are directly captured from process-aware information systems, and manual activities often result in blind spots. While the use of video cameras to observe these activities could help to fill this gap, a standardized approach to extracting event logs from unstructured video data remains lacking. Here, we propose a reference architecture to bridge the gap between computer vision and process mining. Various evaluation activities (i.e., competing artifact analysis, prototyping, and real-world application) ensured that the proposed reference architecture allows flexible, use-case-driven, and context-specific instantiations. Our results also show that an exemplary software prototype instantiation of the proposed reference architecture is capable of automatically extracting most of the process-relevant events from unstructured video data.
summary: Process mining is one of the most active research streams in business process management. In recent years, numerous methods have been proposed for analyzing structured process data. Yet, in many cases, it is only the digitized parts of processes that are directly captured from process-aware information systems, and manual activities often result in blind spots. While the use of video cameras to observe these activities could help to fill this gap, a standardized approach to extracting event logs from unstructured video data remains lacking. Here, we propose a reference architecture to bridge the gap between computer vision and process mining. Various evaluation activities (i.e., competing artifact analysis, prototyping, and real-world application) ensured that the proposed reference architecture allows flexible, use-case-driven, and context-specific instantiations. Our results also show that an exemplary software prototype instantiation of the proposed reference architecture is capable of automatically extracting most of the process-relevant events from unstructured video data.
abstract_zh: 流程挖掘是业务流程管理中最活跃的研究方向之一。近年来，人们提出了多种分析结构化过程数据的方法。然而，在许多情况下，只有流程的数字化部分是直接从流程感知信息系统中捕获的，而手动活动往往会导致盲点。虽然使用摄像机观察这些活动可能有助于填补这一空白，但仍然缺乏从非结构化视频数据中提取事件日志的标准化方法。在这里，我们提出了一个参考架构来弥合计算机视觉和流程挖掘之间的差距。各种评估活动（即竞争工件分析、原型设计和实际应用）确保所提出的参考架构允许灵活的、用例驱动的和特定于上下文的实例化。我们的结果还表明，所提出的参考架构的示例性软件原型实例能够自动从非结构化视频数据中提取大多数与流程相关的事件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种参考架构，利用视频数据填补流程挖掘中的盲点问题。
AI.motivation: 现有流程挖掘方法难以处理人工活动导致的盲点，而视频数据虽有潜力但缺乏标准化提取方法。
AI.method: 设计结合计算机视觉与流程挖掘的参考架构，并通过竞争性分析、原型开发及实际应用验证其有效性。
AI.result: 软件原型可自动从非结构化视频数据中提取大部分流程相关事件。

search_text: Shedding Light on Blind Spots: Developing a Reference Architecture to Leverage Video Data for Process Mining 揭示盲点：开发参考架构以利用视频数据进行流程挖掘 Process mining is one of the most active research streams in business process management. In recent years, numerous methods have been proposed for analyzing structured process data. Yet, in many cases, it is only the digitized parts of processes that are directly captured from process-aware information systems, and manual activities often result in blind spots. While the use of video cameras to observe these activities could help to fill this gap, a standardized approach to extracting event logs from unstructured video data remains lacking. Here, we propose a reference architecture to bridge the gap between computer vision and process mining. Various evaluation activities (i.e., competing artifact analysis, prototyping, and real-world application) ensured that the proposed reference architecture allows flexible, use-case-driven, and context-specific instantiations. Our results also show that an exemplary software prototype instantiation of the proposed reference architecture is capable of automatically extracting most of the process-relevant events from unstructured video data. 流程挖掘是业务流程管理中最活跃的研究方向之一。近年来，人们提出了多种分析结构化过程数据的方法。然而，在许多情况下，只有流程的数字化部分是直接从流程感知信息系统中捕获的，而手动活动往往会导致盲点。虽然使用摄像机观察这些活动可能有助于填补这一空白，但仍然缺乏从非结构化视频数据中提取事件日志的标准化方法。在这里，我们提出了一个参考架构来弥合计算机视觉和流程挖掘之间的差距。各种评估活动（即竞争工件分析、原型设计和实际应用）确保所提出的参考架构允许灵活的、用例驱动的和特定于上下文的实例化。我们的结果还表明，所提出的参考架构的示例性软件原型实例能够自动从非结构化视频数据中提取大多数与流程相关的事件。 本文提出了一种参考架构，利用视频数据填补流程挖掘中的盲点问题。 Wolfgang Kratsch,Fabian Koenig,Maximilian Roeglinger cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Improving Audio Anomalies Recognition Using Temporal Convolutional Attention Network
title_zh: 使用时间卷积注意力网络改进音频异常识别
abstract: Anomalous audio in speech recordings is often caused by speaker voice distortion, external noise, or even electric interferences. These obstacles have become a serious problem in some fields, such as high-quality music mixing and speech processing. In this paper, a novel approach using a temporal convolutional attention network (TCAN) is proposed to tackle this problem. The use of temporal conventional network (TCN) can capture long range patterns using a hierarchy of temporal convolutional filters. To enhance the ability to tackle audio anomalies in different acoustic conditions, an attention mechanism is used in TCN, where a self-attention block is added after each temporal convolutional layer. This aims to highlight the target related features and mitigate the interferences from irrelevant information. To evaluate the performance of the proposed model, audio recordings are collected from the TIMIT dataset, and are then changed by adding five different types of audio distortions: gaussian noise, magnitude drift, random dropout, reduction of temporal resolution, and time warping. Distortions are mixed at different signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs) (5dB, 10dB, 15dB, 20dB, 25dB, 30dB). The experimental results show that the use of proposed model can yield better classification performances than some strong baseline methods, such as the LSTM and TCN based models, by approximate 3$\sim$ 10\% relative improvements.
summary: Anomalous audio in speech recordings is often caused by speaker voice distortion, external noise, or even electric interferences. These obstacles have become a serious problem in some fields, such as high-quality music mixing and speech processing. In this paper, a novel approach using a temporal convolutional attention network (TCAN) is proposed to tackle this problem. The use of temporal conventional network (TCN) can capture long range patterns using a hierarchy of temporal convolutional filters. To enhance the ability to tackle audio anomalies in different acoustic conditions, an attention mechanism is used in TCN, where a self-attention block is added after each temporal convolutional layer. This aims to highlight the target related features and mitigate the interferences from irrelevant information. To evaluate the performance of the proposed model, audio recordings are collected from the TIMIT dataset, and are then changed by adding five different types of audio distortions: gaussian noise, magnitude drift, random dropout, reduction of temporal resolution, and time warping. Distortions are mixed at different signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs) (5dB, 10dB, 15dB, 20dB, 25dB, 30dB). The experimental results show that the use of proposed model can yield better classification performances than some strong baseline methods, such as the LSTM and TCN based models, by approximate 3$\sim$ 10\% relative improvements.
abstract_zh: 语音录音中的异常音频通常是由说话者声音失真、外部噪音甚至电气干扰引起的。这些障碍已成为某些领域的严重问题，例如高质量音乐混合和语音处理。在本文中，提出了一种使用时间卷积注意网络（TCAN）的新方法来解决这个问题。使用时间常规网络 (TCN) 可以使用时间卷积滤波器的层次结构来捕获长范围模式。为了增强处理不同声学条件下音频异常的能力，TCN 中使用了一种注意力机制，在每个时间卷积层之后添加一个自注意力块。这样做的目的是突出目标相关特征并减轻不相关信息的干扰。为了评估所提出模型的性能，从 TIMIT 数据集中收集音频记录，然后通过添加五种不同类型的音频失真来更改：高斯噪声、幅度漂移、随机丢失、时间分辨率降低和时间扭曲。失真以不同的信噪比 (SNR)（5dB、10dB、15dB、20dB、25dB、30dB）混合。实验结果表明，使用所提出的模型可以比一些强基线方法（例如基于 LSTM 和 TCN 的模型）产生更好的分类性能，相对改进约为 3$\sim$ 10\%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时序卷积注意力网络（TCAN）的方法，用于改进音频异常检测，以应对语音记录中的语音失真、外部噪声等异常问题。
AI.motivation: 音频异常（如语音失真、噪声干扰）在高质量音乐混音和语音处理等领域造成严重问题，现有方法在复杂声学条件下表现不足，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合时序卷积网络（TCN）与注意力机制，通过层级时序卷积滤波器捕捉长期模式，并在每层卷积后添加自注意力模块以增强目标特征、抑制干扰。
AI.result: 在TIMIT数据集上，通过添加五种音频失真并测试不同信噪比（SNR）后，TCAN模型在分类性能上较LSTM和TCN基线方法提升约3~10%。
AI.conclusion: TCAN通过注意力机制有效提升了音频异常检测的鲁棒性，在不同声学条件下均优于现有方法，为相关领域提供了可行的技术方案。

title: Deep Surrogate Q-Learning for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶深度代理 Q 学习
abstract: Challenging problems of deep reinforcement learning systems with regard to the application on real systems are their adaptivity to changing environments and their efficiency w.r.t. computational resources and data. In the application of learning lane-change behavior for autonomous driving, agents have to deal with a varying number of surrounding vehicles. Furthermore, the number of required transitions imposes a bottleneck, since test drivers cannot perform an arbitrary amount of lane changes in the real world. In the off-policy setting, additional information on solving the task can be gained by observing actions from others. While in the classical RL setup this knowledge remains unused, we use other drivers as surrogates to learn the agent's value function more efficiently. We propose Surrogate Q-learning that deals with the aforementioned problems and reduces the required driving time drastically. We further propose an efficient implementation based on a permutation-equivariant deep neural network architecture of the Q-function to estimate action-values for a variable number of vehicles in sensor range. We show that the architecture leads to a novel replay sampling technique we call Scene-centric Experience Replay and evaluate the performance of Surrogate Q-learning and Scene-centric Experience Replay in the open traffic simulator SUMO. Additionally, we show that our methods enhance real-world applicability of RL systems by learning policies on the real highD dataset.
summary: Challenging problems of deep reinforcement learning systems with regard to the application on real systems are their adaptivity to changing environments and their efficiency w.r.t. computational resources and data. In the application of learning lane-change behavior for autonomous driving, agents have to deal with a varying number of surrounding vehicles. Furthermore, the number of required transitions imposes a bottleneck, since test drivers cannot perform an arbitrary amount of lane changes in the real world. In the off-policy setting, additional information on solving the task can be gained by observing actions from others. While in the classical RL setup this knowledge remains unused, we use other drivers as surrogates to learn the agent's value function more efficiently. We propose Surrogate Q-learning that deals with the aforementioned problems and reduces the required driving time drastically. We further propose an efficient implementation based on a permutation-equivariant deep neural network architecture of the Q-function to estimate action-values for a variable number of vehicles in sensor range. We show that the architecture leads to a novel replay sampling technique we call Scene-centric Experience Replay and evaluate the performance of Surrogate Q-learning and Scene-centric Experience Replay in the open traffic simulator SUMO. Additionally, we show that our methods enhance real-world applicability of RL systems by learning policies on the real highD dataset.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习系统在实际系统中的应用面临的挑战性问题是它们对不断变化的环境的适应性以及它们的效率。计算资源和数据。在自动驾驶学习变道行为的应用中，智能体必须处理不同数量的周围车辆。此外，所需转换的数量会造成瓶颈，因为测试驾驶员无法在现实世界中执行任意数量的车道变换。在离策略环境中，可以通过观察其他人的行为来获得有关解决任务的附加信息。虽然在经典的强化学习设置中，这些知识仍未被使用，但我们使用其他驱动程序作为代理来更有效地学习代理的价值函数。我们提出代理 Q 学习来解决上述问题并大大减少所需的驾驶时间。我们进一步提出了一种基于 Q 函数的排列等变深度神经网络架构的有效实现，以估计传感器范围内可变数量车辆的动作值。我们展示了该架构带来了一种新颖的重放采样技术，我们称之为“以场景为中心的体验重放”，并评估开放交通模拟器 SUMO 中代理 Q 学习和以场景为中心的体验重放的性能。此外，我们还表明，我们的方法通过学习真实高维数据集上的策略，增强了 RL 系统的实际适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出深度替代Q学习方法及场景中心经验回放技术，解决自动驾驶中深度强化学习的环境适应性与计算效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习在真实系统中面临环境适应性差、计算资源消耗大及数据采集受限等挑战，尤其在自动驾驶变道场景中需处理动态车辆数量和有限的现实数据。
AI.method: 设计基于排列等变神经网络的替代Q学习框架，利用其他驾驶者作为数据源优化价值函数，并提出场景中心经验回放技术以提升学习效率。
AI.result: 在SUMO仿真及真实highD数据集验证中，方法显著减少驾驶时间，证明其在计算效率与现实适用性上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 替代Q学习与场景中心经验回放有效提升自动驾驶中强化学习的效率与泛化能力，推动RL在现实交通场景中的应用。
