tldr: 本文提出深度替代Q学习方法及场景中心经验回放技术，解决自动驾驶中深度强化学习的环境适应性与计算效率问题。
motivation: 传统深度强化学习在真实系统中面临环境适应性差、计算资源消耗大及数据采集受限等挑战，尤其在自动驾驶变道场景中需处理动态车辆数量和有限的现实数据。
method: 设计基于排列等变神经网络的替代Q学习框架，利用其他驾驶者作为数据源优化价值函数，并提出场景中心经验回放技术以提升学习效率。
result: 在SUMO仿真及真实highD数据集验证中，方法显著减少驾驶时间，证明其在计算效率与现实适用性上的优势。
conclusion: 替代Q学习与场景中心经验回放有效提升自动驾驶中强化学习的效率与泛化能力，推动RL在现实交通场景中的应用。
search_text: Deep Surrogate Q-Learning for Autonomous Driving 自动驾驶深度代理 Q 学习 Challenging problems of deep reinforcement learning systems with regard to the application on real systems are their adaptivity to changing environments and their efficiency w.r.t. computational resources and data. In the application of learning lane-change behavior for autonomous driving, agents have to deal with a varying number of surrounding vehicles. Furthermore, the number of required transitions imposes a bottleneck, since test drivers cannot perform an arbitrary amount of lane changes in the real world. In the off-policy setting, additional information on solving the task can be gained by observing actions from others. While in the classical RL setup this knowledge remains unused, we use other drivers as surrogates to learn the agent's value function more efficiently. We propose Surrogate Q-learning that deals with the aforementioned problems and reduces the required driving time drastically. We further propose an efficient implementation based on a permutation-equivariant deep neural network architecture of the Q-function to estimate action-values for a variable number of vehicles in sensor range. We show that the architecture leads to a novel replay sampling technique we call Scene-centric Experience Replay and evaluate the performance of Surrogate Q-learning and Scene-centric Experience Replay in the open traffic simulator SUMO. Additionally, we show that our methods enhance real-world applicability of RL systems by learning policies on the real highD dataset. 深度强化学习系统在实际系统中的应用面临的挑战性问题是它们对不断变化的环境的适应性以及它们的效率。计算资源和数据。在自动驾驶学习变道行为的应用中，智能体必须处理不同数量的周围车辆。此外，所需转换的数量会造成瓶颈，因为测试驾驶员无法在现实世界中执行任意数量的车道变换。在离策略环境中，可以通过观察其他人的行为来获得有关解决任务的附加信息。虽然在经典的强化学习设置中，这些知识仍未被使用，但我们使用其他驱动程序作为代理来更有效地学习代理的价值函数。我们提出代理 Q 学习来解决上述问题并大大减少所需的驾驶时间。我们进一步提出了一种基于 Q 函数的排列等变深度神经网络架构的有效实现，以估计传感器范围内可变数量车辆的动作值。我们展示了该架构带来了一种新颖的重放采样技术，我们称之为“以场景为中心的体验重放”，并评估开放交通模拟器 SUMO 中代理 Q 学习和以场景为中心的体验重放的性能。此外，我们还表明，我们的方法通过学习真实高维数据集上的策略，增强了 RL 系统的实际适用性。 本文提出深度替代Q学习方法及场景中心经验回放技术，解决自动驾驶中深度强化学习的环境适应性与计算效率问题。 Maria Kalweit,Gabriel Kalweit,Moritz Werling,Joschka Boedecker cs.LG,cs.RO

title: The Need for Standardized Explainability
title_zh: 标准化可解释性的需要
comment: Accepted in 2nd ICML 2020 Workshop on Human in the Loop Learning
comments: Accepted in 2nd ICML 2020 Workshop on Human in the Loop Learning
abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) is paramount in industry-grade AI; however existing methods fail to address this necessity, in part due to a lack of standardisation of explainability methods. The purpose of this paper is to offer a perspective on the current state of the area of explainability, and to provide novel definitions for Explainability and Interpretability to begin standardising this area of research. To do so, we provide an overview of the literature on explainability, and of the existing methods that are already implemented. Finally, we offer a tentative taxonomy of the different explainability methods, opening the door to future research.
summary: Explainable AI (XAI) is paramount in industry-grade AI; however existing methods fail to address this necessity, in part due to a lack of standardisation of explainability methods. The purpose of this paper is to offer a perspective on the current state of the area of explainability, and to provide novel definitions for Explainability and Interpretability to begin standardising this area of research. To do so, we provide an overview of the literature on explainability, and of the existing methods that are already implemented. Finally, we offer a tentative taxonomy of the different explainability methods, opening the door to future research.
abstract_zh: 可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 在工业级人工智能中至关重要；然而，现有方法未能解决这种必要性，部分原因是缺乏可解释性方法的标准化。本文的目的是提供一个关于可解释性领域现状的视角，并为可解释性和可解释性提供新颖的定义，以开始规范该研究领域。为此，我们概述了有关可解释性的文献以及已实施的现有方法。最后，我们提供了不同可解释性方法的初步分类，为未来的研究打开了大门。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨可解释性领域现状，提出新的定义并建立分类以推动可解释性研究的标准化。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释AI方法因缺乏统一标准而无法满足工业需求，亟需通过标准化提升研究与应用的一致性。
AI.method: 通过文献综述梳理现有可解释性方法，提出新的可解释性与可解释性定义，并构建初步分类框架。
AI.result: 明确了可解释性与可解释性的区分，提供了方法分类框架，为后续标准化研究奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 标准化是推动可解释性研究的关键，未来需进一步完善分类体系与定义共识。

authors_text: Roger Alexander Müller,Jonathan Laflamme-Janssen,Jaime Camacaro,Carolina Bessega
title: Learning second order coupled differential equations that are subject to non-conservative forces
title_zh: 学习受非保守力影响的二阶耦合微分方程
abstract: In this article we address the question whether it is possible to learn the differential equations describing the physical properties of a dynamical system, subject to non-conservative forces, from observations of its realspace trajectory(ies) only. We introduce a network that incorporates a difference approximation for the second order derivative in terms of residual connections between convolutional blocks, whose shared weights represent the coefficients of a second order ordinary differential equation. We further combine this solver-like architecture with a convolutional network, capable of learning the relation between trajectories of coupled oscillators and therefore allows us to make a stable forecast even if the system is only partially observed. We optimize this map together with the solver network, while sharing their weights, to form a powerful framework capable of learning the complex physical properties of a dissipative dynamical system.
summary: In this article we address the question whether it is possible to learn the differential equations describing the physical properties of a dynamical system, subject to non-conservative forces, from observations of its realspace trajectory(ies) only. We introduce a network that incorporates a difference approximation for the second order derivative in terms of residual connections between convolutional blocks, whose shared weights represent the coefficients of a second order ordinary differential equation. We further combine this solver-like architecture with a convolutional network, capable of learning the relation between trajectories of coupled oscillators and therefore allows us to make a stable forecast even if the system is only partially observed. We optimize this map together with the solver network, while sharing their weights, to form a powerful framework capable of learning the complex physical properties of a dissipative dynamical system.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了是否有可能仅通过对其真实空间轨迹的观察来学习描述受非保守力影响的动力系统物理特性的微分方程。我们引入了一种网络，该网络在卷积块之间的残差连接方面结合了二阶导数的差分近似，其共享权重表示二阶常微分方程的系数。我们进一步将这种类似求解器的架构与卷积网络相结合，能够学习耦合振荡器轨迹之间的关系，因此即使系统仅被部分观察，我们也能够做出稳定的预测。我们与求解器网络一起优化该图，同时共享它们的权重，以形成一个强大的框架，能够学习耗散动力系统的复杂物理特性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在仅从动力系统的轨迹观测中学习受非保守力作用的二阶耦合微分方程，以捕捉其物理特性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理非保守力和部分观测数据时存在局限，需开发新方法以从轨迹数据中直接学习微分方程。
AI.method: 设计包含残差连接的卷积网络近似二阶导数，并结合求解器架构与卷积网络，共享权重优化以学习微分方程。
AI.result: 该框架能有效学习复杂物理特性，并在部分观测下实现稳定预测。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为从轨迹数据中学习非保守动力系统的微分方程提供了有效框架，具备实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Barbara Barros Carlos,Tommaso Sartor,Andrea Zanelli,Gianluca Frison,Wolfram Burgard,Moritz Diehl,Giuseppe Oriolo
title: An Efficient Real-Time NMPC for Quadrotor Position Control under Communication Time-Delay
title_zh: 通信时滞下四旋翼飞行器位置控制的高效实时 NMPC
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at the 16th International Conference on Control, Automation, Robotics and Vision (ICARCV), Shenzhen, China, December 13-15, 2020, IEEE
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication at the 16th International Conference on Control, Automation, Robotics and Vision (ICARCV), Shenzhen, China, December 13-15, 2020, IEEE
abstract: The advances in computer processor technology have enabled the application of nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) to agile systems, such as quadrotors. These systems are characterized by their underactuation, nonlinearities, bounded inputs, and time-delays. Classical control solutions fall short in overcoming these difficulties and fully exploiting the capabilities offered by such platforms. This paper presents the design and implementation of an efficient position controller for quadrotors based on real-time NMPC with time-delay compensation and bounds enforcement on the actuators. To deal with the limited computational resources onboard, an offboard control architecture is proposed. It is implemented using the high-performance software package acados, which solves optimal control problems and implements a real-time iteration (RTI) variant of a sequential quadratic programming (SQP) scheme with Gauss-Newton Hessian approximation. The quadratic subproblems (QP) in the SQP scheme are solved with HPIPM, an interior-point method solver, built on top of the linear algebra library BLASFEO, finely tuned for multiple CPU architectures. Solution times are further reduced by reformulating the QPs using the efficient partial condensing algorithm implemented in HPIPM. We demonstrate the capabilities of our architecture using the Crazyflie 2.1 nano-quadrotor.
summary: The advances in computer processor technology have enabled the application of nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) to agile systems, such as quadrotors. These systems are characterized by their underactuation, nonlinearities, bounded inputs, and time-delays. Classical control solutions fall short in overcoming these difficulties and fully exploiting the capabilities offered by such platforms. This paper presents the design and implementation of an efficient position controller for quadrotors based on real-time NMPC with time-delay compensation and bounds enforcement on the actuators. To deal with the limited computational resources onboard, an offboard control architecture is proposed. It is implemented using the high-performance software package acados, which solves optimal control problems and implements a real-time iteration (RTI) variant of a sequential quadratic programming (SQP) scheme with Gauss-Newton Hessian approximation. The quadratic subproblems (QP) in the SQP scheme are solved with HPIPM, an interior-point method solver, built on top of the linear algebra library BLASFEO, finely tuned for multiple CPU architectures. Solution times are further reduced by reformulating the QPs using the efficient partial condensing algorithm implemented in HPIPM. We demonstrate the capabilities of our architecture using the Crazyflie 2.1 nano-quadrotor.
abstract_zh: 计算机处理器技术的进步使得非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）能够应用于敏捷系统，例如四旋翼飞行器。这些系统的特点是欠驱动、非线性、有界输入和时滞。经典控制解决方案无法克服这些困难并充分利用此类平台提供的功能。本文介绍了一种基于实时 NMPC 的高效四旋翼位置控制器的设计和实现，具有时滞补偿和执行器边界强制。为了处理机上有限的计算资源，提出了一种机外控制架构。它是使用高性能软件包 acados 实现的，它解决了最优控制问题，并利用高斯-牛顿 Hessian 近似实现了顺序二次规划 (SQP) 方案的实时迭代 (RTI) 变体。 SQP 方案中的二次子问题 (QP) 使用 HPIPM 求解，HPIPM 是一种内点法求解器，构建于线性代数库 BLASFEO 之上，针对多种 CPU 架构进行了微调。通过使用 HPIPM 中实现的高效部分压缩算法重新制定 QP，可以进一步缩短求解时间。我们使用 Crazyflie 2.1 纳米四旋翼飞行器展示了我们架构的功能。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一种基于实时NMPC的四旋翼飞行器位置控制器，解决通信时延和执行器约束问题。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法难以应对四旋翼的非线性、欠驱动特性及通信时延，而NMPC能更充分挖掘系统潜力但受限于计算资源。
AI.method: 采用离线控制架构，结合acados求解器与HPIPM的高效QP求解算法，并通过部分凝聚算法优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在Crazyflie 2.1四旋翼平台上验证了该架构的实时性与控制性能，有效应对通信时延与执行器约束。
AI.conclusion: 所提架构成功平衡了计算资源限制与控制精度需求，为四旋翼实时NMPC控制提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一种基于实时NMPC的四旋翼飞行器位置控制器，解决通信时延和执行器约束问题。

search_text: An Efficient Real-Time NMPC for Quadrotor Position Control under Communication Time-Delay 通信时滞下四旋翼飞行器位置控制的高效实时 NMPC The advances in computer processor technology have enabled the application of nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) to agile systems, such as quadrotors. These systems are characterized by their underactuation, nonlinearities, bounded inputs, and time-delays. Classical control solutions fall short in overcoming these difficulties and fully exploiting the capabilities offered by such platforms. This paper presents the design and implementation of an efficient position controller for quadrotors based on real-time NMPC with time-delay compensation and bounds enforcement on the actuators. To deal with the limited computational resources onboard, an offboard control architecture is proposed. It is implemented using the high-performance software package acados, which solves optimal control problems and implements a real-time iteration (RTI) variant of a sequential quadratic programming (SQP) scheme with Gauss-Newton Hessian approximation. The quadratic subproblems (QP) in the SQP scheme are solved with HPIPM, an interior-point method solver, built on top of the linear algebra library BLASFEO, finely tuned for multiple CPU architectures. Solution times are further reduced by reformulating the QPs using the efficient partial condensing algorithm implemented in HPIPM. We demonstrate the capabilities of our architecture using the Crazyflie 2.1 nano-quadrotor. 计算机处理器技术的进步使得非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）能够应用于敏捷系统，例如四旋翼飞行器。这些系统的特点是欠驱动、非线性、有界输入和时滞。经典控制解决方案无法克服这些困难并充分利用此类平台提供的功能。本文介绍了一种基于实时 NMPC 的高效四旋翼位置控制器的设计和实现，具有时滞补偿和执行器边界强制。为了处理机上有限的计算资源，提出了一种机外控制架构。它是使用高性能软件包 acados 实现的，它解决了最优控制问题，并利用高斯-牛顿 Hessian 近似实现了顺序二次规划 (SQP) 方案的实时迭代 (RTI) 变体。 SQP 方案中的二次子问题 (QP) 使用 HPIPM 求解，HPIPM 是一种内点法求解器，构建于线性代数库 BLASFEO 之上，针对多种 CPU 架构进行了微调。通过使用 HPIPM 中实现的高效部分压缩算法重新制定 QP，可以进一步缩短求解时间。我们使用 Crazyflie 2.1 纳米四旋翼飞行器展示了我们架构的功能。 本文设计并实现了一种基于实时NMPC的四旋翼飞行器位置控制器，解决通信时延和执行器约束问题。 Barbara Barros Carlos,Tommaso Sartor,Andrea Zanelli,Gianluca Frison,Wolfram Burgard,Moritz Diehl,Giuseppe Oriolo cs.RO,eess.SY,math.OC

title: The IDLAB VoxSRC-20 Submission: Large Margin Fine-Tuning and Quality-Aware Score Calibration in DNN Based Speaker Verification
title_zh: IDLAB VoxSRC-20 提交内容：基于 DNN 的说话人验证中的大裕度微调和质量感知分数校准
abstract: In this paper we propose and analyse a large margin fine-tuning strategy and a quality-aware score calibration in text-independent speaker verification. Large margin fine-tuning is a secondary training stage for DNN based speaker verification systems trained with margin-based loss functions. It enables the network to create more robust speaker embeddings by enabling the use of longer training utterances in combination with a more aggressive margin penalty. Score calibration is a common practice in speaker verification systems to map output scores to well-calibrated log-likelihood-ratios, which can be converted to interpretable probabilities. By including quality features in the calibration system, the decision thresholds of the evaluation metrics become quality-dependent and more consistent across varying trial conditions. Applying both enhancements on the ECAPA-TDNN architecture leads to state-of-the-art results on all publicly available VoxCeleb1 test sets and contributed to our winning submissions in the supervised verification tracks of the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2020.
summary: In this paper we propose and analyse a large margin fine-tuning strategy and a quality-aware score calibration in text-independent speaker verification. Large margin fine-tuning is a secondary training stage for DNN based speaker verification systems trained with margin-based loss functions. It enables the network to create more robust speaker embeddings by enabling the use of longer training utterances in combination with a more aggressive margin penalty. Score calibration is a common practice in speaker verification systems to map output scores to well-calibrated log-likelihood-ratios, which can be converted to interpretable probabilities. By including quality features in the calibration system, the decision thresholds of the evaluation metrics become quality-dependent and more consistent across varying trial conditions. Applying both enhancements on the ECAPA-TDNN architecture leads to state-of-the-art results on all publicly available VoxCeleb1 test sets and contributed to our winning submissions in the supervised verification tracks of the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2020.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出并分析了文本无关说话人验证中的大裕度微调策略和质量感知分数校准。大余量微调是基于 DNN 的说话人验证系统的二次训练阶段，该系统使用基于余量的损失函数进行训练。它使网络能够通过使用更长的训练话语和更激进的边际惩罚来创建更强大的说话人嵌入。分数校准是说话人验证系统中的常见做法，用于将输出分数映射到经过良好校准的对数似然比，该对数似然比可以转换为可解释的概率。通过在校准系统中包含质量特征，评估指标的决策阈值变得与质量相关，并且在不同的试验条件下更加一致。在 ECAPA-TDNN 架构上应用这两项增强功能，可以在所有公开可用的 VoxCeleb1 测试集上获得最先进的结果，并有助于我们在 2020 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛的监督验证轨道中获胜。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的说话人验证系统的大型边距微调策略和质量感知得分校准方法，以提升文本无关说话人验证的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的DNN说话人验证系统在面对不同长度的训练语音和多变的测试条件时，存在嵌入鲁棒性不足和得分校准不一致的问题，需进一步优化模型训练和得分映射机制。
AI.method: 提出两阶段改进方法：1) 大型边距微调（利用更长训练语音和激进边距惩罚增强嵌入鲁棒性）；2) 质量感知得分校准（引入质量特征使得分阈值适应不同测试条件）。基于ECAPA-TDNN架构实现。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb1公开测试集上达到SOTA性能，并在VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2020监督验证赛道中取得冠军。
AI.conclusion: 大型边距微调与质量感知校准的结合有效提升了说话人验证系统的鲁棒性和跨条件一致性，为实际应用提供了可靠的技术方案。

title: On Adaptive Distance Estimation
title_zh: 关于自适应距离估计
comment: Minor correction in proof of Lemma B.6
comments: Minor correction in proof of Lemma B.6
abstract: We provide a static data structure for distance estimation which supports {\it adaptive} queries. Concretely, given a dataset $X = \{x_i\}_{i = 1}^n$ of $n$ points in $\mathbb{R}^d$ and $0 < p \leq 2$, we construct a randomized data structure with low memory consumption and query time which, when later given any query point $q \in \mathbb{R}^d$, outputs a $(1+ε)$-approximation of $\lVert q - x_i \rVert_p$ with high probability for all $i\in[n]$. The main novelty is our data structure's correctness guarantee holds even when the sequence of queries can be chosen adaptively: an adversary is allowed to choose the $j$th query point $q_j$ in a way that depends on the answers reported by the data structure for $q_1,\ldots,q_{j-1}$. Previous randomized Monte Carlo methods do not provide error guarantees in the setting of adaptively chosen queries. Our memory consumption is $\tilde O((n+d)d/ε^2)$, slightly more than the $O(nd)$ required to store $X$ in memory explicitly, but with the benefit that our time to answer queries is only $\tilde O(ε^{-2}(n + d))$, much faster than the naive $Θ(nd)$ time obtained from a linear scan in the case of $n$ and $d$ very large. Here $\tilde O$ hides $\log(nd/ε)$ factors. We discuss applications to nearest neighbor search and nonparametric estimation. Our method is simple and likely to be applicable to other domains: we describe a generic approach for transforming randomized Monte Carlo data structures which do not support adaptive queries to ones that do, and show that for the problem at hand, it can be applied to standard nonadaptive solutions to $\ell_p$ norm estimation with negligible overhead in query time and a factor $d$ overhead in memory.
summary: We provide a static data structure for distance estimation which supports {\it adaptive} queries. Concretely, given a dataset $X = \{x_i\}_{i = 1}^n$ of $n$ points in $\mathbb{R}^d$ and $0 < p \leq 2$, we construct a randomized data structure with low memory consumption and query time which, when later given any query point $q \in \mathbb{R}^d$, outputs a $(1+ε)$-approximation of $\lVert q - x_i \rVert_p$ with high probability for all $i\in[n]$. The main novelty is our data structure's correctness guarantee holds even when the sequence of queries can be chosen adaptively: an adversary is allowed to choose the $j$th query point $q_j$ in a way that depends on the answers reported by the data structure for $q_1,\ldots,q_{j-1}$. Previous randomized Monte Carlo methods do not provide error guarantees in the setting of adaptively chosen queries. Our memory consumption is $\tilde O((n+d)d/ε^2)$, slightly more than the $O(nd)$ required to store $X$ in memory explicitly, but with the benefit that our time to answer queries is only $\tilde O(ε^{-2}(n + d))$, much faster than the naive $Θ(nd)$ time obtained from a linear scan in the case of $n$ and $d$ very large. Here $\tilde O$ hides $\log(nd/ε)$ factors. We discuss applications to nearest neighbor search and nonparametric estimation. Our method is simple and likely to be applicable to other domains: we describe a generic approach for transforming randomized Monte Carlo data structures which do not support adaptive queries to ones that do, and show that for the problem at hand, it can be applied to standard nonadaptive solutions to $\ell_p$ norm estimation with negligible overhead in query time and a factor $d$ overhead in memory.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了一个用于距离估计的静态数据结构，它支持{\it自适应}查询。具体来说，给定数据集 $X = \{x_i\}_{i = 1}^n$，其中 $n$ 点在 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 和 $0 < p \leq 2$ 中，我们构造一个具有低内存消耗和查询时间的随机数据结构，当稍后给定任何查询点 $q \in \mathbb{R}^d$ 时，输出 $\lVert q 的 $(1+ε)$ 近似值 - x_i \rVert_p$ 对于所有 $i\in[n]$ 的概率很高。主要的新颖之处在于，即使可以自适应选择查询序列，我们的数据结构的正确性保证仍然成立：允许对手以取决于数据结构报告的 $q_1,\ldots,q_{j-1}$ 答案的方式选择第 $j$ 个查询点 $q_j$。以前的随机蒙特卡罗方法在自适应选择查询的设置中不提供错误保证。我们的内存消耗是 $\tilde O((n+d)d/ε^2)$，略高于在内存中显式存储 $X$ 所需的 $O(nd)$，但好处是我们回答查询的时间仅为 $\tilde O(ε^{-2}(n + d))$，比在 $n$ 和 $d$ 非常大的情况下从线性扫描获得的朴素 $θ(nd)$ 时间快得多。这里$\tilde O$隐藏了$\log(nd/ε)$因子。我们讨论最近邻搜索和非参数估计的应用。我们的方法很简单，并且可能适用于其他领域：我们描述了一种通用方法，用于将不支持自适应查询的随机蒙特卡罗数据结构转换为支持自适应查询的数据结构，并表明，对于当前的问题，它可以应用于 $\ell_p$ 范数估计的标准非自适应解决方案，查询时间的开销和内存中的 $d$ 开销可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种支持自适应查询的静态数据结构，用于在高维空间中高效估计点集到查询点的L_p距离。
AI.motivation: 传统随机化方法在处理自适应查询时无法保证误差，而线性扫描方法在大数据集下效率低下，需设计更高效且支持自适应查询的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建随机化数据结构，通过引入误差容忍机制和分层采样策略，将非自适应的L_p范数估计方法转化为支持自适应查询的结构，同时控制内存和时间复杂度。
AI.result: 实现内存消耗为~O((n+d)d/ε²)、查询时间为~O(ε⁻²(n+d))的方案，在保证高概率(1+ε)近似精度的同时，显著优于线性扫描的Θ(nd)时间复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为近邻搜索等应用提供了新工具，且其通用转换框架可扩展至其他领域，仅需付出线性内存开销的d倍代价。

ai_content.method: 构建随机化数据结构，通过引入误差容忍机制和分层采样策略，将非自适应的L_p范数估计方法转化为支持自适应查询的结构，同时控制内存和时间复杂度。
ai_content.result: 实现内存消耗为~O((n+d)d/ε²)、查询时间为~O(ε⁻²(n+d))的方案，在保证高概率(1+ε)近似精度的同时，显著优于线性扫描的Θ(nd)时间复杂度。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为近邻搜索等应用提供了新工具，且其通用转换框架可扩展至其他领域，仅需付出线性内存开销的d倍代价。

search_text: On Adaptive Distance Estimation 关于自适应距离估计 We provide a static data structure for distance estimation which supports {\it adaptive} queries. Concretely, given a dataset $X = \{x_i\}_{i = 1}^n$ of $n$ points in $\mathbb{R}^d$ and $0 < p \leq 2$, we construct a randomized data structure with low memory consumption and query time which, when later given any query point $q \in \mathbb{R}^d$, outputs a $(1+ε)$-approximation of $\lVert q - x_i \rVert_p$ with high probability for all $i\in[n]$. The main novelty is our data structure's correctness guarantee holds even when the sequence of queries can be chosen adaptively: an adversary is allowed to choose the $j$th query point $q_j$ in a way that depends on the answers reported by the data structure for $q_1,\ldots,q_{j-1}$. Previous randomized Monte Carlo methods do not provide error guarantees in the setting of adaptively chosen queries. Our memory consumption is $\tilde O((n+d)d/ε^2)$, slightly more than the $O(nd)$ required to store $X$ in memory explicitly, but with the benefit that our time to answer queries is only $\tilde O(ε^{-2}(n + d))$, much faster than the naive $Θ(nd)$ time obtained from a linear scan in the case of $n$ and $d$ very large. Here $\tilde O$ hides $\log(nd/ε)$ factors. We discuss applications to nearest neighbor search and nonparametric estimation. Our method is simple and likely to be applicable to other domains: we describe a generic approach for transforming randomized Monte Carlo data structures which do not support adaptive queries to ones that do, and show that for the problem at hand, it can be applied to standard nonadaptive solutions to $\ell_p$ norm estimation with negligible overhead in query time and a factor $d$ overhead in memory. 我们提供了一个用于距离估计的静态数据结构，它支持{\it自适应}查询。具体来说，给定数据集 $X = \{x_i\}_{i = 1}^n$，其中 $n$ 点在 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 和 $0 < p \leq 2$ 中，我们构造一个具有低内存消耗和查询时间的随机数据结构，当稍后给定任何查询点 $q \in \mathbb{R}^d$ 时，输出 $\lVert q 的 $(1+ε)$ 近似值 - x_i \rVert_p$ 对于所有 $i\in[n]$ 的概率很高。主要的新颖之处在于，即使可以自适应选择查询序列，我们的数据结构的正确性保证仍然成立：允许对手以取决于数据结构报告的 $q_1,\ldots,q_{j-1}$ 答案的方式选择第 $j$ 个查询点 $q_j$。以前的随机蒙特卡罗方法在自适应选择查询的设置中不提供错误保证。我们的内存消耗是 $\tilde O((n+d)d/ε^2)$，略高于在内存中显式存储 $X$ 所需的 $O(nd)$，但好处是我们回答查询的时间仅为 $\tilde O(ε^{-2}(n + d))$，比在 $n$ 和 $d$ 非常大的情况下从线性扫描获得的朴素 $θ(nd)$ 时间快得多。这里$\tilde O$隐藏了$\log(nd/ε)$因子。我们讨论最近邻搜索和非参数估计的应用。我们的方法很简单，并且可能适用于其他领域：我们描述了一种通用方法，用于将不支持自适应查询的随机蒙特卡罗数据结构转换为支持自适应查询的数据结构，并表明，对于当前的问题，它可以应用于 $\ell_p$ 范数估计的标准非自适应解决方案，查询时间的开销和内存中的 $d$ 开销可以忽略不计。 本文提出了一种支持自适应查询的静态数据结构，用于在高维空间中高效估计点集到查询点的L_p距离。 Yeshwanth Cherapanamjeri,Jelani Nelson cs.DS

authors_text: Joonho Lee,Jemin Hwangbo,Lorenz Wellhausen,Vladlen Koltun,Marco Hutter
title: Learning Quadrupedal Locomotion over Challenging Terrain
title_zh: 学习在具有挑战性的地形上的四足运动
abstract: Some of the most challenging environments on our planet are accessible to quadrupedal animals but remain out of reach for autonomous machines. Legged locomotion can dramatically expand the operational domains of robotics. However, conventional controllers for legged locomotion are based on elaborate state machines that explicitly trigger the execution of motion primitives and reflexes. These designs have escalated in complexity while falling short of the generality and robustness of animal locomotion. Here we present a radically robust controller for legged locomotion in challenging natural environments. We present a novel solution to incorporating proprioceptive feedback in locomotion control and demonstrate remarkable zero-shot generalization from simulation to natural environments. The controller is trained by reinforcement learning in simulation. It is based on a neural network that acts on a stream of proprioceptive signals. The trained controller has taken two generations of quadrupedal ANYmal robots to a variety of natural environments that are beyond the reach of prior published work in legged locomotion. The controller retains its robustness under conditions that have never been encountered during training: deformable terrain such as mud and snow, dynamic footholds such as rubble, and overground impediments such as thick vegetation and gushing water. The presented work opens new frontiers for robotics and indicates that radical robustness in natural environments can be achieved by training in much simpler domains.
summary: Some of the most challenging environments on our planet are accessible to quadrupedal animals but remain out of reach for autonomous machines. Legged locomotion can dramatically expand the operational domains of robotics. However, conventional controllers for legged locomotion are based on elaborate state machines that explicitly trigger the execution of motion primitives and reflexes. These designs have escalated in complexity while falling short of the generality and robustness of animal locomotion. Here we present a radically robust controller for legged locomotion in challenging natural environments. We present a novel solution to incorporating proprioceptive feedback in locomotion control and demonstrate remarkable zero-shot generalization from simulation to natural environments. The controller is trained by reinforcement learning in simulation. It is based on a neural network that acts on a stream of proprioceptive signals. The trained controller has taken two generations of quadrupedal ANYmal robots to a variety of natural environments that are beyond the reach of prior published work in legged locomotion. The controller retains its robustness under conditions that have never been encountered during training: deformable terrain such as mud and snow, dynamic footholds such as rubble, and overground impediments such as thick vegetation and gushing water. The presented work opens new frontiers for robotics and indicates that radical robustness in natural environments can be achieved by training in much simpler domains.
abstract_zh: 我们星球上一些最具挑战性的环境对于四足动物来说是可以进入的，但对于自主机器来说仍然遥不可及。腿式运动可以极大地扩展机器人的操作领域。然而，用于腿式运动的传统控制器基于复杂的状态机，这些状态机显式地触发运动基元和反射的执行。这些设计的复杂性不断增加，但缺乏动物运动的通用性和鲁棒性。在这里，我们提出了一种极其强大的控制器，用于在具有挑战性的自然环境中进行腿式运动。我们提出了一种新颖的解决方案，将本体感觉反馈纳入运动控制中，并展示了从模拟到自然环境的出色的零样本泛化。控制器通过模拟强化学习进行训练。它基于作用于本体感受信号流的神经网络。经过训练的控制器已经将两代四足 ANYmal 机器人带到了各种自然环境中，这些环境超出了先前发表的腿式运动工作的范围。控制器在训练期间从未遇到过的条件下保持其鲁棒性：泥和雪等可变形地形、瓦砾等动态立足点以及茂密植被和涌水等地上障碍物。所提出的工作为机器人技术开辟了新的领域，并表明通过在更简单的领域进行训练可以实现自然环境中的根本鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的四足机器人控制器，使其能在复杂自然环境中实现稳健移动。
AI.motivation: 传统腿部控制器复杂且缺乏动物般的通用性与鲁棒性，而四足动物能适应各种极端环境，需开发更稳健的机器人控制方案。
AI.method: 通过模拟训练强化学习神经网络，利用本体感觉反馈流控制四足机器人，实现从模拟到真实环境的零样本泛化。
AI.result: 控制器成功应用于两代ANYmal机器人，在泥泞、积雪、碎石等未训练过的复杂地形中保持稳定移动能力。
AI.conclusion: 在简单领域训练的控制器可实现复杂环境的鲁棒性，为机器人技术开辟新方向。

title: Neural Star Domain as Primitive Representation
title_zh: 作为原始表示的神经星域
comment: 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Vancouver, Canada
comments: 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Vancouver, Canada
abstract: Reconstructing 3D objects from 2D images is a fundamental task in computer vision. Accurate structured reconstruction by parsimonious and semantic primitive representation further broadens its application. When reconstructing a target shape with multiple primitives, it is preferable that one can instantly access the union of basic properties of the shape such as collective volume and surface, treating the primitives as if they are one single shape. This becomes possible by primitive representation with unified implicit and explicit representations. However, primitive representations in current approaches do not satisfy all of the above requirements at the same time. To solve this problem, we propose a novel primitive representation named neural star domain (NSD) that learns primitive shapes in the star domain. We show that NSD is a universal approximator of the star domain and is not only parsimonious and semantic but also an implicit and explicit shape representation. We demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing methods in image reconstruction tasks, semantic capabilities, and speed and quality of sampling high-resolution meshes.
summary: Reconstructing 3D objects from 2D images is a fundamental task in computer vision. Accurate structured reconstruction by parsimonious and semantic primitive representation further broadens its application. When reconstructing a target shape with multiple primitives, it is preferable that one can instantly access the union of basic properties of the shape such as collective volume and surface, treating the primitives as if they are one single shape. This becomes possible by primitive representation with unified implicit and explicit representations. However, primitive representations in current approaches do not satisfy all of the above requirements at the same time. To solve this problem, we propose a novel primitive representation named neural star domain (NSD) that learns primitive shapes in the star domain. We show that NSD is a universal approximator of the star domain and is not only parsimonious and semantic but also an implicit and explicit shape representation. We demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing methods in image reconstruction tasks, semantic capabilities, and speed and quality of sampling high-resolution meshes.
abstract_zh: 从 2D 图像重建 3D 对象是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务。通过简洁和语义的原始表示进行精确的结构化重建进一步拓宽了其应用范围。当用多个基元重建目标形状时，最好能够立即访问形状的基本属性（例如集体体积和表面）的并集，将基元视为单个形状。通过具有统一的隐式和显式表示的原始表示，这变得可能。然而，当前方法中的原始表示不能同时满足上述所有要求。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为神经星域（NSD）的新颖的原始表示，它可以学习星域中的原始形状。我们证明 NSD 是星域的通用逼近器，不仅是简约的和语义的，而且是隐式和显式的形状表示。我们证明，我们的方法在图像重建任务、语义能力以及高分辨率网格采样的速度和质量方面优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为神经星域（NSD）的新颖原始表示方法，用于从2D图像重建3D物体，实现高效且语义化的结构化重建。
AI.motivation: 现有原始表示方法无法同时满足统一隐式/显式表示、高效采样及语义解析的需求，需开发更优的通用表示框架。
AI.method: 设计神经星域（NSD）模型，通过学习星域形状实现隐式与显式表示的统一，利用神经网络逼近星域并生成高分辨率网格。
AI.result: 在图像重建任务中优于现有方法，提升语义解析能力，并加快高分辨率网格采样的速度与质量。
AI.conclusion: NSD通过统一隐式/显式表示和高效采样，为3D重建提供了更优的原始表示方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为神经星域（NSD）的新颖原始表示方法，用于从2D图像重建3D物体，实现高效且语义化的结构化重建。
motivation: 现有原始表示方法无法同时满足统一隐式/显式表示、高效采样及语义解析的需求，需开发更优的通用表示框架。
method: 设计神经星域（NSD）模型，通过学习星域形状实现隐式与显式表示的统一，利用神经网络逼近星域并生成高分辨率网格。
result: 在图像重建任务中优于现有方法，提升语义解析能力，并加快高分辨率网格采样的速度与质量。
conclusion: NSD通过统一隐式/显式表示和高效采样，为3D重建提供了更优的原始表示方案。
search_text: Neural Star Domain as Primitive Representation 作为原始表示的神经星域 Reconstructing 3D objects from 2D images is a fundamental task in computer vision. Accurate structured reconstruction by parsimonious and semantic primitive representation further broadens its application. When reconstructing a target shape with multiple primitives, it is preferable that one can instantly access the union of basic properties of the shape such as collective volume and surface, treating the primitives as if they are one single shape. This becomes possible by primitive representation with unified implicit and explicit representations. However, primitive representations in current approaches do not satisfy all of the above requirements at the same time. To solve this problem, we propose a novel primitive representation named neural star domain (NSD) that learns primitive shapes in the star domain. We show that NSD is a universal approximator of the star domain and is not only parsimonious and semantic but also an implicit and explicit shape representation. We demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing methods in image reconstruction tasks, semantic capabilities, and speed and quality of sampling high-resolution meshes. 从 2D 图像重建 3D 对象是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务。通过简洁和语义的原始表示进行精确的结构化重建进一步拓宽了其应用范围。当用多个基元重建目标形状时，最好能够立即访问形状的基本属性（例如集体体积和表面）的并集，将基元视为单个形状。通过具有统一的隐式和显式表示的原始表示，这变得可能。然而，当前方法中的原始表示不能同时满足上述所有要求。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为神经星域（NSD）的新颖的原始表示，它可以学习星域中的原始形状。我们证明 NSD 是星域的通用逼近器，不仅是简约的和语义的，而且是隐式和显式的形状表示。我们证明，我们的方法在图像重建任务、语义能力以及高分辨率网格采样的速度和质量方面优于现有方法。 本文提出一种名为神经星域（NSD）的新颖原始表示方法，用于从2D图像重建3D物体，实现高效且语义化的结构化重建。 Yuki Kawana,Yusuke Mukuta,Tatsuya Harada cs.CV

authors_text: Tianze Shi,Chen Zhao,Jordan Boyd-Graber,Hal Daumé III,Lillian Lee
title: On the Potential of Lexico-logical Alignments for Semantic Parsing to SQL Queries
title_zh: 关于 SQL 查询语义解析的词汇逻辑对齐的潜力
abstract: Large-scale semantic parsing datasets annotated with logical forms have enabled major advances in supervised approaches. But can richer supervision help even more? To explore the utility of fine-grained, lexical-level supervision, we introduce Squall, a dataset that enriches 11,276 WikiTableQuestions English-language questions with manually created SQL equivalents plus alignments between SQL and question fragments. Our annotation enables new training possibilities for encoder-decoder models, including approaches from machine translation previously precluded by the absence of alignments. We propose and test two methods: (1) supervised attention; (2) adopting an auxiliary objective of disambiguating references in the input queries to table columns. In 5-fold cross validation, these strategies improve over strong baselines by 4.4% execution accuracy. Oracle experiments suggest that annotated alignments can support further accuracy gains of up to 23.9%.
summary: Large-scale semantic parsing datasets annotated with logical forms have enabled major advances in supervised approaches. But can richer supervision help even more? To explore the utility of fine-grained, lexical-level supervision, we introduce Squall, a dataset that enriches 11,276 WikiTableQuestions English-language questions with manually created SQL equivalents plus alignments between SQL and question fragments. Our annotation enables new training possibilities for encoder-decoder models, including approaches from machine translation previously precluded by the absence of alignments. We propose and test two methods: (1) supervised attention; (2) adopting an auxiliary objective of disambiguating references in the input queries to table columns. In 5-fold cross validation, these strategies improve over strong baselines by 4.4% execution accuracy. Oracle experiments suggest that annotated alignments can support further accuracy gains of up to 23.9%.
abstract_zh: 用逻辑形式注释的大规模语义解析数据集使监督方法取得了重大进展。但更丰富的监管能带来更多帮助吗？为了探索细粒度、词汇级监督的实用性，我们引入了 Squall，这是一个数据集，它通过手动创建的 SQL 等效项以及 SQL 和问题片段之间的对齐来丰富 11,276 个 WikiTableQuestions 英语问题。我们的注释为编码器-解码器模型提供了新的训练可能性，包括以前因缺乏对齐而无法使用的机器翻译方法。我们提出并测试了两种方法：（1）监督注意力； (2) 采用消除输入查询中对表列的引用的歧义的辅助目标。在 5 倍交叉验证中，这些策略的执行准确度比强基线提高了 4.4%。 Oracle 实验表明，带注释的比对可以支持进一步提高高达 23.9% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 研究利用词汇逻辑对齐提升语义解析到SQL查询的性能
AI.motivation: 现有语义解析数据集的监督信息有限，通过引入细粒度词汇级对齐可能进一步提升模型性能
AI.method: 提出监督注意力机制及输入查询列引用消歧的辅助目标，用于训练编码器-解码器模型
AI.result: 5折交叉验证中，方法比强基线提升4.4%执行准确率，Oracle实验显示对齐标注可再提升23.9%
AI.conclusion: 词汇逻辑对齐能有效提升语义解析性能，未来可探索更充分利用对齐信息的方法

authors_text: Kevin Green,Yesh Godse,Jeremy Dao,Ross L. Hatton,Alan Fern,Jonathan Hurst
title: Learning Spring Mass Locomotion: Guiding Policies with a Reduced-Order Model
title_zh: 学习春季大规模运动：使用降阶模型指导策略
comment: 7 pages, 8 figures. Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) with ICRA 2021 presentation option. Video supplement: https://youtu.be/80oJeaAd8CE Code: https://github.com/osudrl/ASLIP-RL
comments: 7 pages, 8 figures. Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) with ICRA 2021 presentation option. Video supplement: https://youtu.be/80oJeaAd8CE Code: https://github.com/osudrl/ASLIP-RL
abstract: In this paper, we describe an approach to achieve dynamic legged locomotion on physical robots which combines existing methods for control with reinforcement learning. Specifically, our goal is a control hierarchy in which highest-level behaviors are planned through reduced-order models, which describe the fundamental physics of legged locomotion, and lower level controllers utilize a learned policy that can bridge the gap between the idealized, simple model and the complex, full order robot. The high-level planner can use a model of the environment and be task specific, while the low-level learned controller can execute a wide range of motions so that it applies to many different tasks. In this letter we describe this learned dynamic walking controller and show that a range of walking motions from reduced-order models can be used as the command and primary training signal for learned policies. The resulting policies do not attempt to naively track the motion (as a traditional trajectory tracking controller would) but instead balance immediate motion tracking with long term stability. The resulting controller is demonstrated on a human scale, unconstrained, untethered bipedal robot at speeds up to 1.2 m/s. This letter builds the foundation of a generic, dynamic learned walking controller that can be applied to many different tasks.
summary: In this paper, we describe an approach to achieve dynamic legged locomotion on physical robots which combines existing methods for control with reinforcement learning. Specifically, our goal is a control hierarchy in which highest-level behaviors are planned through reduced-order models, which describe the fundamental physics of legged locomotion, and lower level controllers utilize a learned policy that can bridge the gap between the idealized, simple model and the complex, full order robot. The high-level planner can use a model of the environment and be task specific, while the low-level learned controller can execute a wide range of motions so that it applies to many different tasks. In this letter we describe this learned dynamic walking controller and show that a range of walking motions from reduced-order models can be used as the command and primary training signal for learned policies. The resulting policies do not attempt to naively track the motion (as a traditional trajectory tracking controller would) but instead balance immediate motion tracking with long term stability. The resulting controller is demonstrated on a human scale, unconstrained, untethered bipedal robot at speeds up to 1.2 m/s. This letter builds the foundation of a generic, dynamic learned walking controller that can be applied to many different tasks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了一种在物理机器人上实现动态腿部运动的方法，该方法将现有的控制方法与强化学习相结合。具体来说，我们的目标是建立一个控制层次结构，其中通过降阶模型规划最高级别的行为，降阶模型描述了腿式运动的基本物理原理，而较低级别的控制器利用学习策略来弥合理想化的简单模型和复杂的全阶机器人之间的差距。高层规划器可以使用环境模型并针对特定任务，而低层学习控制器可以执行广泛的运动，从而适用于许多不同的任务。在这封信中，我们描述了这种学习动态步行控制器，并表明降阶模型中的一系列步行运动可以用作学习策略的命令和主要训练信号。由此产生的策略不会尝试天真地跟踪运动（如传统的轨迹跟踪控制器那样），而是平衡即时运动跟踪与长期稳定性。由此产生的控制器在人体规模、不受约束、不受束缚的双足机器人上进行了演示，速度高达 1.2 m/s。这封信构建了通用的动态学习步行控制器的基础，该控制器可应用于许多不同的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合简化模型与强化学习的控制分层架构，实现物理机器人动态腿部运动控制。
AI.motivation: 传统轨迹跟踪控制器难以平衡复杂机器人系统的即时运动跟踪与长期稳定性，需探索更适应动态环境的控制方法。
AI.method: 构建双层控制架构：高层基于简化物理模型规划任务特定行为，底层通过强化学习策略桥接模型与实际机器人差异，以运动命令和稳定性为目标进行训练。
AI.result: 在1.2m/s速度下成功验证了该控制器在无约束双足机器人上的动态行走能力，策略能有效平衡即时跟踪与长期稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为通用动态行走控制器设计提供了基础，通过模型引导学习策略可适配多种任务场景。

authors_text: Shannon M. Danforth,Patrick D. Holmes,Ram Vasudevan
title: Trip Recovery in Lower-Limb Prostheses using Reachable Sets of Predicted Human Motion
title_zh: 使用可到达的预测人体运动组实现下肢假肢的行程恢复
abstract: People with lower-limb loss, the majority of which use passive prostheses, exhibit a high incidence of falls each year. Powered lower-limb prostheses have the potential to reduce fall rates by actively helping the user recover from a stumble, but the unpredictability of the human response makes it difficult to design controllers that ensure a successful recovery. This paper presents a method called TRIP-RTD (Trip Recovery in Prostheses via Reachability-based Trajectory Design) for online trajectory planning in a knee prosthesis during and after a stumble that can accommodate a set of possible predictions of human behavior. Using this predicted set of human behavior, the proposed method computes a parameterized reachable set of trajectories for the human-prosthesis system. To ensure safety at run-time, TRIP-RTD selects a trajectory for the prosthesis that guarantees that all possible states of the human-prosthesis system at touchdown arrive in the basin of attraction of the nominal behavior of the system. In simulated stumble experiments where a nominal phase-based controller was unable to help the system recover, TRIP-RTD produced trajectories in under 101 ms that led to successful recoveries for all feasible solutions found.
summary: People with lower-limb loss, the majority of which use passive prostheses, exhibit a high incidence of falls each year. Powered lower-limb prostheses have the potential to reduce fall rates by actively helping the user recover from a stumble, but the unpredictability of the human response makes it difficult to design controllers that ensure a successful recovery. This paper presents a method called TRIP-RTD (Trip Recovery in Prostheses via Reachability-based Trajectory Design) for online trajectory planning in a knee prosthesis during and after a stumble that can accommodate a set of possible predictions of human behavior. Using this predicted set of human behavior, the proposed method computes a parameterized reachable set of trajectories for the human-prosthesis system. To ensure safety at run-time, TRIP-RTD selects a trajectory for the prosthesis that guarantees that all possible states of the human-prosthesis system at touchdown arrive in the basin of attraction of the nominal behavior of the system. In simulated stumble experiments where a nominal phase-based controller was unable to help the system recover, TRIP-RTD produced trajectories in under 101 ms that led to successful recoveries for all feasible solutions found.
abstract_zh: 下肢丧失的人（其中大多数使用被动假肢）每年的跌倒发生率很高。动力下肢假肢有可能通过主动帮助用户从绊倒中恢复来降低跌倒率，但人类反应的不可预测性使得设计确保成功恢复的控制器变得困难。本文提出了一种称为 TRIP-RTD（通过基于可达性的轨迹设计的假体行程恢复）的方法，用于在跌倒期间和之后对膝关节假体进行在线轨迹规划，该方法可以适应一组可能的人类行为预测。使用这组预测的人类行为，所提出的方法计算人体假肢系统的参数化可达轨迹集。为了确保运行时的安全，TRIP-RTD 为假肢选择一条轨迹，以保证着陆时人体假肢系统的所有可能状态都到达系统标称行为的吸引力盆地。在模拟故障实验中，标称基于相位的控制器无法帮助系统恢复，TRIP-RTD 在 101 毫秒内生成轨迹，从而成功恢复找到的所有可行解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可达集的轨迹设计方法TRIP-RTD，用于假肢膝关节在绊倒时的在线轨迹规划，通过预测人类运动的可能行为集实现安全恢复。
AI.motivation: 被动假肢用户跌倒率高，而现有主动假肢控制器难以应对人类运动的不可预测性，需设计能适应多种可能行为的控制方法以提高绊倒恢复成功率。
AI.method: 通过预测人类行为的可能集合，计算人-假肢系统的参数化可达轨迹集，实时选择确保所有可能状态落入系统名义行为吸引域的轨迹参数。
AI.result: 在模拟实验中，当传统相位控制器失效时，TRIP-RTD在101毫秒内生成轨迹使所有可行解成功恢复，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TRIP-RTD方法通过考虑人类运动的不确定性，为假肢提供了安全可靠的绊倒恢复控制框架，显著提升了主动假肢的实用性。

search_text: Trip Recovery in Lower-Limb Prostheses using Reachable Sets of Predicted Human Motion 使用可到达的预测人体运动组实现下肢假肢的行程恢复 People with lower-limb loss, the majority of which use passive prostheses, exhibit a high incidence of falls each year. Powered lower-limb prostheses have the potential to reduce fall rates by actively helping the user recover from a stumble, but the unpredictability of the human response makes it difficult to design controllers that ensure a successful recovery. This paper presents a method called TRIP-RTD (Trip Recovery in Prostheses via Reachability-based Trajectory Design) for online trajectory planning in a knee prosthesis during and after a stumble that can accommodate a set of possible predictions of human behavior. Using this predicted set of human behavior, the proposed method computes a parameterized reachable set of trajectories for the human-prosthesis system. To ensure safety at run-time, TRIP-RTD selects a trajectory for the prosthesis that guarantees that all possible states of the human-prosthesis system at touchdown arrive in the basin of attraction of the nominal behavior of the system. In simulated stumble experiments where a nominal phase-based controller was unable to help the system recover, TRIP-RTD produced trajectories in under 101 ms that led to successful recoveries for all feasible solutions found. 下肢丧失的人（其中大多数使用被动假肢）每年的跌倒发生率很高。动力下肢假肢有可能通过主动帮助用户从绊倒中恢复来降低跌倒率，但人类反应的不可预测性使得设计确保成功恢复的控制器变得困难。本文提出了一种称为 TRIP-RTD（通过基于可达性的轨迹设计的假体行程恢复）的方法，用于在跌倒期间和之后对膝关节假体进行在线轨迹规划，该方法可以适应一组可能的人类行为预测。使用这组预测的人类行为，所提出的方法计算人体假肢系统的参数化可达轨迹集。为了确保运行时的安全，TRIP-RTD 为假肢选择一条轨迹，以保证着陆时人体假肢系统的所有可能状态都到达系统标称行为的吸引力盆地。在模拟故障实验中，标称基于相位的控制器无法帮助系统恢复，TRIP-RTD 在 101 毫秒内生成轨迹，从而成功恢复找到的所有可行解决方案。 本文提出一种基于可达集的轨迹设计方法TRIP-RTD，用于假肢膝关节在绊倒时的在线轨迹规划，通过预测人类运动的可能行为集实现安全恢复。 Shannon M. title: Dynamic Layer Customization for Noise Robust Speech Emotion Recognition in Heterogeneous Condition Training
title_zh: 异构条件训练中噪声鲁棒语音情感识别的动态层定制
abstract: Robustness to environmental noise is important to creating automatic speech emotion recognition systems that are deployable in the real world. Prior work on noise robustness has assumed that systems would not make use of sample-by-sample training noise conditions, or that they would have access to unlabelled testing data to generalize across noise conditions. We avoid these assumptions and introduce the resulting task as heterogeneous condition training. We show that with full knowledge of the test noise conditions, we can improve performance by dynamically routing samples to specialized feature encoders for each noise condition, and with partial knowledge, we can use known noise conditions and domain adaptation algorithms to train systems that generalize well to unseen noise conditions. We then extend these improvements to the multimodal setting by dynamically routing samples to maintain temporal ordering, resulting in significant improvements over approaches that do not specialize or generalize based on noise type.
summary: Robustness to environmental noise is important to creating automatic speech emotion recognition systems that are deployable in the real world. Prior work on noise robustness has assumed that systems would not make use of sample-by-sample training noise conditions, or that they would have access to unlabelled testing data to generalize across noise conditions. We avoid these assumptions and introduce the resulting task as heterogeneous condition training. We show that with full knowledge of the test noise conditions, we can improve performance by dynamically routing samples to specialized feature encoders for each noise condition, and with partial knowledge, we can use known noise conditions and domain adaptation algorithms to train systems that generalize well to unseen noise conditions. We then extend these improvements to the multimodal setting by dynamically routing samples to maintain temporal ordering, resulting in significant improvements over approaches that do not specialize or generalize based on noise type.
abstract_zh: 对环境噪声的鲁棒性对于创建可在现实世界中部署的自动语音情感识别系统非常重要。先前关于噪声鲁棒性的工作假设系统不会利用逐个样本的训练噪声条件，或者它们可以访问未标记的测试数据以在噪声条件下进行概括。我们避免这些假设，并将由此产生的任务引入异构条件训练。我们表明，在充分了解测试噪声条件的情况下，我们可以通过将样本动态路由到每个噪声条件的专用特征编码器来提高性能，并且在部分了解的情况下，我们可以使用已知的噪声条件和域自适应算法来训练能够很好地泛化到未见过的噪声条件的系统。然后，我们通过动态路由样本来维持时间顺序，将这些改进扩展到多模态设置，从而比不根据噪声类型进行专门化或泛化的方法进行显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态层定制方法，在异质条件训练下提升语音情感识别的抗噪能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖未标记测试数据或无法利用样本噪声条件，难以满足实际部署中噪声环境未知的场景需求。
AI.method: 通过动态路由样本至专用特征编码器（全知识场景）或结合领域自适应算法（部分知识场景），并扩展至多模态时序保持机制。
AI.result: 在完全/部分噪声条件先验下均取得性能提升，多模态方法较传统方法有显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 动态层定制策略有效增强噪声鲁棒性，为复杂环境下的语音情感识别提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Vladimir Mikulik,Grégoire Delétang,Tom McGrath,Tim Genewein,Miljan Martic,Shane Legg,Pedro A. Ortega
title: Meta-trained agents implement Bayes-optimal agents
title_zh: 元训练代理实现贝叶斯最优代理
comment: Published at 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Vancouver, Canada
comments: Published at 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Vancouver, Canada
abstract: Memory-based meta-learning is a powerful technique to build agents that adapt fast to any task within a target distribution. A previous theoretical study has argued that this remarkable performance is because the meta-training protocol incentivises agents to behave Bayes-optimally. We empirically investigate this claim on a number of prediction and bandit tasks. Inspired by ideas from theoretical computer science, we show that meta-learned and Bayes-optimal agents not only behave alike, but they even share a similar computational structure, in the sense that one agent system can approximately simulate the other. Furthermore, we show that Bayes-optimal agents are fixed points of the meta-learning dynamics. Our results suggest that memory-based meta-learning might serve as a general technique for numerically approximating Bayes-optimal agents - that is, even for task distributions for which we currently don't possess tractable models.
summary: Memory-based meta-learning is a powerful technique to build agents that adapt fast to any task within a target distribution. A previous theoretical study has argued that this remarkable performance is because the meta-training protocol incentivises agents to behave Bayes-optimally. We empirically investigate this claim on a number of prediction and bandit tasks. Inspired by ideas from theoretical computer science, we show that meta-learned and Bayes-optimal agents not only behave alike, but they even share a similar computational structure, in the sense that one agent system can approximately simulate the other. Furthermore, we show that Bayes-optimal agents are fixed points of the meta-learning dynamics. Our results suggest that memory-based meta-learning might serve as a general technique for numerically approximating Bayes-optimal agents - that is, even for task distributions for which we currently don't possess tractable models.
abstract_zh: 基于内存的元学习是一种强大的技术，可以构建快速适应目标分布中任何任务的代理。之前的一项理论研究认为，这种卓越的表现是因为元训练协议激励智能体以贝叶斯最优方式表现。我们在许多预测和老虎机任务中对这一主张进行了实证研究。受理论计算机科学思想的启发，我们证明元学习代理和贝叶斯最优代理不仅行为相似，而且甚至共享相似的计算结构，从某种意义上说，一个代理系统可以近似模拟另一个代理系统。此外，我们表明贝叶斯最优代理是元学习动态的固定点。我们的结果表明，基于记忆的元学习可以作为数值逼近贝叶斯最优代理的通用技术——也就是说，即使对于我们目前不具备可处理模型的任务分布也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究验证基于记忆的元学习代理是否实现贝叶斯最优代理，并探讨其计算结构相似性。
AI.motivation: 理论研究认为元学习的优异性能源于贝叶斯最优行为，但需实证支持该假设。
AI.method: 在预测和老虎机任务中进行实证分析，结合理论计算机科学方法比较代理行为与计算结构，并验证固定点性质。
AI.result: 元学习代理与贝叶斯最优代理行为高度相似且计算结构可互模拟，后者为元学习动力学的固定点。
AI.conclusion: 基于记忆的元学习可作为数值逼近贝叶斯最优代理的通用方法，适用于无解析模型的任务分布。

result: 元学习代理与贝叶斯最优代理行为高度相似且计算结构可互模拟，后者为元学习动力学的固定点。
conclusion: 基于记忆的元学习可作为数值逼近贝叶斯最优代理的通用方法，适用于无解析模型的任务分布。
search_text: Meta-trained agents implement Bayes-optimal agents 元训练代理实现贝叶斯最优代理 Memory-based meta-learning is a powerful technique to build agents that adapt fast to any task within a target distribution. A previous theoretical study has argued that this remarkable performance is because the meta-training protocol incentivises agents to behave Bayes-optimally. We empirically investigate this claim on a number of prediction and bandit tasks. Inspired by ideas from theoretical computer science, we show that meta-learned and Bayes-optimal agents not only behave alike, but they even share a similar computational structure, in the sense that one agent system can approximately simulate the other. Furthermore, we show that Bayes-optimal agents are fixed points of the meta-learning dynamics. Our results suggest that memory-based meta-learning might serve as a general technique for numerically approximating Bayes-optimal agents - that is, even for task distributions for which we currently don't possess tractable models. 基于内存的元学习是一种强大的技术，可以构建快速适应目标分布中任何任务的代理。之前的一项理论研究认为，这种卓越的表现是因为元训练协议激励智能体以贝叶斯最优方式表现。我们在许多预测和老虎机任务中对这一主张进行了实证研究。受理论计算机科学思想的启发，我们证明元学习代理和贝叶斯最优代理不仅行为相似，而且甚至共享相似的计算结构，从某种意义上说，一个代理系统可以近似模拟另一个代理系统。此外，我们表明贝叶斯最优代理是元学习动态的固定点。我们的结果表明，基于记忆的元学习可以作为数值逼近贝叶斯最优代理的通用技术——也就是说，即使对于我们目前不具备可处理模型的任务分布也是如此。 本文通过实证研究验证基于记忆的元学习代理是否实现贝叶斯最优代理，并探讨其计算结构相似性。 Vladimir Mikulik,Grégoire Delétang,Tom McGrath,Tim Genewein,Miljan Martic,Shane Legg,Pedro A. Ortega cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Jaejin Cho,Piotr Zelasko,Jesus Villalba,Shinji Watanabe,Najim Dehak
title: Learning Speaker Embedding from Text-to-Speech
title_zh: 学习从文本到语音的说话人嵌入
abstract: Zero-shot multi-speaker Text-to-Speech (TTS) generates target speaker voices given an input text and the corresponding speaker embedding. In this work, we investigate the effectiveness of the TTS reconstruction objective to improve representation learning for speaker verification. We jointly trained end-to-end Tacotron 2 TTS and speaker embedding networks in a self-supervised fashion. We hypothesize that the embeddings will contain minimal phonetic information since the TTS decoder will obtain that information from the textual input. TTS reconstruction can also be combined with speaker classification to enhance these embeddings further. Once trained, the speaker encoder computes representations for the speaker verification task, while the rest of the TTS blocks are discarded. We investigated training TTS from either manual or ASR-generated transcripts. The latter allows us to train embeddings on datasets without manual transcripts. We compared ASR transcripts and Kaldi phone alignments as TTS inputs, showing that the latter performed better due to their finer resolution. Unsupervised TTS embeddings improved EER by 2.06\% absolute with regard to i-vectors for the LibriTTS dataset. TTS with speaker classification loss improved EER by 0.28\% and 0.73\% absolutely from a model using only speaker classification loss in LibriTTS and Voxceleb1 respectively.
summary: Zero-shot multi-speaker Text-to-Speech (TTS) generates target speaker voices given an input text and the corresponding speaker embedding. In this work, we investigate the effectiveness of the TTS reconstruction objective to improve representation learning for speaker verification. We jointly trained end-to-end Tacotron 2 TTS and speaker embedding networks in a self-supervised fashion. We hypothesize that the embeddings will contain minimal phonetic information since the TTS decoder will obtain that information from the textual input. TTS reconstruction can also be combined with speaker classification to enhance these embeddings further. Once trained, the speaker encoder computes representations for the speaker verification task, while the rest of the TTS blocks are discarded. We investigated training TTS from either manual or ASR-generated transcripts. The latter allows us to train embeddings on datasets without manual transcripts. We compared ASR transcripts and Kaldi phone alignments as TTS inputs, showing that the latter performed better due to their finer resolution. Unsupervised TTS embeddings improved EER by 2.06\% absolute with regard to i-vectors for the LibriTTS dataset. TTS with speaker classification loss improved EER by 0.28\% and 0.73\% absolutely from a model using only speaker classification loss in LibriTTS and Voxceleb1 respectively.
abstract_zh: 零样本多说话人文本转语音 (TTS) 在给定输入文本和相应的说话人嵌入的情况下生成目标说话人的声音。在这项工作中，我们研究了 TTS 重建目标的有效性，以改进说话人验证的表示学习。我们以自我监督的方式联合训练了端到端 Tacotron 2 TTS 和扬声器嵌入网络。我们假设嵌入将包含最少的语音信息，因为 TTS 解码器将从文本输入中获取该信息。 TTS 重建还可以与说话人分类相结合，以进一步增强这些嵌入。经过训练后，说话人编码器将计算说话人验证任务的表示，而其余 TTS 块将被丢弃。我们研究了通过手动或 ASR 生成的转录本来训练 TTS。后者允许我们在数据集上训练嵌入，而无需手动转录。我们将 ASR 转录本和 Kaldi 音素对齐作为 TTS 输入进行比较，结果表明后者由于分辨率更高而表现更好。就 LibriTTS 数据集的 i 向量而言，无监督 TTS 嵌入将 EER 绝对提高了 2.06%。与 LibriTTS 和 Voxceleb1 中仅使用说话人分类损失的模型相比，具有说话人分类损失的 TTS 绝对将 EER 提高了 0.28% 和 0.73%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过文本到语音（TTS）重建目标改进说话人验证的表示学习，提出自监督训练TTS和说话人嵌入网络的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人验证依赖手动标注数据，成本高且不灵活。通过TTS重建目标可学习更鲁棒的说话人嵌入，且无需依赖手动转录文本，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 联合训练端到端Tacotron 2 TTS和说话人嵌入网络，利用自监督学习。对比手动转录与ASR生成文本，采用Kaldi音素对齐作为TTS输入，并结合说话人分类损失优化嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在LibriTTS数据集上，无监督TTS嵌入使EER绝对下降2.06%；结合分类损失后，LibriTTS和VoxCeleb1分别进一步降低0.28%和0.73% EER。
AI.conclusion: TTS重建目标能有效学习说话人嵌入，ASR生成文本与音素对齐输入提升性能，结合分类损失可进一步优化验证效果。

authors_text: Ha Thi Phuong Thao,Balamurali B. T.,Dorien Herremans,Gemma Roig
title: AttendAffectNet: Self-Attention based Networks for Predicting Affective Responses from Movies
title_zh: attendAffectNet：基于自注意力的网络，用于预测电影的情感反应
abstract: In this work, we propose different variants of the self-attention based network for emotion prediction from movies, which we call AttendAffectNet. We take both audio and video into account and incorporate the relation among multiple modalities by applying self-attention mechanism in a novel manner into the extracted features for emotion prediction. We compare it to the typically temporal integration of the self-attention based model, which in our case, allows to capture the relation of temporal representations of the movie while considering the sequential dependencies of emotion responses. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed architectures on the extended COGNIMUSE dataset [1], [2] and the MediaEval 2016 Emotional Impact of Movies Task [3], which consist of movies with emotion annotations. Our results show that applying the self-attention mechanism on the different audio-visual features, rather than in the time domain, is more effective for emotion prediction. Our approach is also proven to outperform many state-ofthe-art models for emotion prediction. The code to reproduce our results with the models' implementation is available at: https://github.com/ivyha010/AttendAffectNet.
summary: In this work, we propose different variants of the self-attention based network for emotion prediction from movies, which we call AttendAffectNet. We take both audio and video into account and incorporate the relation among multiple modalities by applying self-attention mechanism in a novel manner into the extracted features for emotion prediction. We compare it to the typically temporal integration of the self-attention based model, which in our case, allows to capture the relation of temporal representations of the movie while considering the sequential dependencies of emotion responses. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed architectures on the extended COGNIMUSE dataset [1], [2] and the MediaEval 2016 Emotional Impact of Movies Task [3], which consist of movies with emotion annotations. Our results show that applying the self-attention mechanism on the different audio-visual features, rather than in the time domain, is more effective for emotion prediction. Our approach is also proven to outperform many state-ofthe-art models for emotion prediction. The code to reproduce our results with the models' implementation is available at: https://github.com/ivyha010/AttendAffectNet.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了基于自注意力网络的不同变体，用于电影情感预测，我们称之为 attendAffectNet。我们同时考虑音频和视频，并通过以一种新颖的方式将自注意力机制应用到提取的情感预测特征中，从而将多种模态之间的关系结合起来。我们将其与基于自注意力的模型的典型时间集成进行比较，在我们的例子中，它允许捕获电影的时间表示的关系，同时考虑情绪反应的顺序依赖性。我们在扩展 COGNIMUSE 数据集 [1]、[2] 和 MediaEval 2016 电影情感影响任务 [3] 上证明了我们提出的架构的有效性，其中包含带有情感注释的电影。我们的结果表明，在不同的视听特征上应用自注意力机制，而不是在时域上，对于情绪预测更有效。我们的方法也被证明优于许多最先进的情绪预测模型。通过模型实现重现我们的结果的代码位于：https://github.com/ivyha010/AttendAffectNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自注意力机制的网络模型AttendAffectNet，用于从电影中预测情感反应，结合了音频和视频特征并采用新颖的多模态关系建模方法。
AI.motivation: 现有情感预测模型在处理多模态特征和时序依赖性时存在局限性，需探索更有效的自注意力机制以提升跨模态特征融合与情感时序建模能力。
AI.method: 设计多种自注意力网络变体，通过新颖方式将自注意力机制应用于提取的音频-视觉特征，同时比较其与传统时序集成方法在情感预测中的表现差异。
AI.result: 在COGNIMUSE和MediaEval 2016数据集上验证，证明在特征域应用自注意力机制优于时域方法，并超越多个现有最先进模型的情感预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 自注意力机制在跨模态特征融合与情感时序建模中的有效性得到验证，所提方法为电影情感预测提供了新思路。

search_text: AttendAffectNet: Self-Attention based Networks for Predicting Affective Responses from Movies attendAffectNet：基于自注意力的网络，用于预测电影的情感反应 In this work, we propose different variants of the self-attention based network for emotion prediction from movies, which we call AttendAffectNet. We take both audio and video into account and incorporate the relation among multiple modalities by applying self-attention mechanism in a novel manner into the extracted features for emotion prediction. Our results show that applying the self-attention mechanism on the different audio-visual features, rather than in the time domain, is more effective for emotion prediction. Our approach is also proven to outperform many state-ofthe-art models for emotion prediction. The code to reproduce our results with the models' implementation is available at: https://github.com/ivyha010/AttendAffectNet. 在这项工作中，我们提出了基于自注意力网络的不同变体，用于电影情感预测，我们称之为 attendAffectNet。我们同时考虑音频和视频，并通过以一种新颖的方式将自注意力机制应用到提取的情感预测特征中，从而将多种模态之间的关系结合起来。我们将其与基于自注意力的模型的典型时间集成进行比较，在我们的例子中，它允许捕获电影的时间表示的关系，同时考虑情绪反应的顺序依赖性。我们在扩展 COGNIMUSE 数据集 [1]、[2] 和 MediaEval 2016 电影情感影响任务 [3] 上证明了我们提出的架构的有效性，其中包含带有情感注释的电影。我们的结果表明，在不同的视听特征上应用自注意力机制，而不是在时域上，对于情绪预测更有效。我们的方法也被证明优于许多最先进的情绪预测模型。通过模型实现重现我们的结果的代码位于：https://github.com/ivyha010/AttendAffectNet。 本文提出了一种基于自注意力机制的网络模型AttendAffectNet，用于从电影中预测情感反应，结合了音频和视频特征并采用新颖的多模态关系建模方法。 Ha Thi Phuong Thao,Balamurali B. T.,Dorien Herremans,Gemma Roig cs.SD,cs.CV,eess.AS

title: Semantic Role Labeling as Syntactic Dependency Parsing
title_zh: 作为句法依存分析的语义角色标记
abstract: We reduce the task of (span-based) PropBank-style semantic role labeling (SRL) to syntactic dependency parsing. Our approach is motivated by our empirical analysis that shows three common syntactic patterns account for over 98% of the SRL annotations for both English and Chinese data. Based on this observation, we present a conversion scheme that packs SRL annotations into dependency tree representations through joint labels that permit highly accurate recovery back to the original format. This representation allows us to train statistical dependency parsers to tackle SRL and achieve competitive performance with the current state of the art. Our findings show the promise of syntactic dependency trees in encoding semantic role relations within their syntactic domain of locality, and point to potential further integration of syntactic methods into semantic role labeling in the future.
summary: We reduce the task of (span-based) PropBank-style semantic role labeling (SRL) to syntactic dependency parsing. Our approach is motivated by our empirical analysis that shows three common syntactic patterns account for over 98% of the SRL annotations for both English and Chinese data. Based on this observation, we present a conversion scheme that packs SRL annotations into dependency tree representations through joint labels that permit highly accurate recovery back to the original format. This representation allows us to train statistical dependency parsers to tackle SRL and achieve competitive performance with the current state of the art. Our findings show the promise of syntactic dependency trees in encoding semantic role relations within their syntactic domain of locality, and point to potential further integration of syntactic methods into semantic role labeling in the future.
abstract_zh: 我们将（基于跨度的）PropBank 式语义角色标记（SRL）的任务简化为句法依存解析。我们的方法是基于我们的实证分析，该分析显示三种常见的句法模式占英语和中文数据 SRL 注释的 98% 以上。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种转换方案，通过联合标签将 SRL 注释打包成依赖树表示，从而允许高度准确地恢复到原始格式。这种表示方式使我们能够训练统计依赖解析器来处理 SRL 并实现与当前技术水平相竞争的性能。我们的研究结果表明了句法依存树在局部句法域内编码语义角色关系的前景，并指出未来句法方法有可能进一步整合到语义角色标记中。

AI.tldr: 将基于span的PropBank风格语义角色标注（SRL）任务转化为句法依赖解析任务。
AI.motivation: 实证分析显示，三个常见句法模式覆盖了98%的SRL标注，表明句法结构可有效编码语义角色关系。
AI.method: 设计联合标签将SRL标注嵌入依赖树，训练统计依赖解析器实现SRL任务。
AI.result: 在英语和中文数据上达到与当前最先进方法相当的SRL性能。
AI.conclusion: 句法依赖树能有效编码语义角色关系，未来可进一步融合句法方法提升SRL效果。

title: Joint Blind Room Acoustic Characterization From Speech And Music Signals Using Convolutional Recurrent Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积循环神经网络对语音和音乐信号进行联合盲室声学表征
abstract: Acoustic environment characterization opens doors for sound reproduction innovations, smart EQing, speech enhancement, hearing aids, and forensics. Reverberation time, clarity, and direct-to-reverberant ratio are acoustic parameters that have been defined to describe reverberant environments. They are closely related to speech intelligibility and sound quality. As explained in the ISO3382 standard, they can be derived from a room measurement called the Room Impulse Response (RIR). However, measuring RIRs requires specific equipment and intrusive sound to be played. The recent audio combined with machine learning suggests that one could estimate those parameters blindly using speech or music signals. We follow these advances and propose a robust end-to-end method to achieve blind joint acoustic parameter estimation using speech and/or music signals. Our results indicate that convolutional recurrent neural networks perform best for this task, and including music in training also helps improve inference from speech.
summary: Acoustic environment characterization opens doors for sound reproduction innovations, smart EQing, speech enhancement, hearing aids, and forensics. Reverberation time, clarity, and direct-to-reverberant ratio are acoustic parameters that have been defined to describe reverberant environments. They are closely related to speech intelligibility and sound quality. As explained in the ISO3382 standard, they can be derived from a room measurement called the Room Impulse Response (RIR). However, measuring RIRs requires specific equipment and intrusive sound to be played. The recent audio combined with machine learning suggests that one could estimate those parameters blindly using speech or music signals. We follow these advances and propose a robust end-to-end method to achieve blind joint acoustic parameter estimation using speech and/or music signals. Our results indicate that convolutional recurrent neural networks perform best for this task, and including music in training also helps improve inference from speech.
abstract_zh: 声学环境表征为声音再现创新、智能均衡器、语音增强、助听器和取证打开了大门。混响时间、清晰度和直接混响比是为描述混响环境而定义的声学参数。它们与语音清晰度和音质密切相关。正如 ISO3382 标准中所解释的，它们可以从称为房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 的房间测量中得出。然而，测量 RIR 需要特定的设备和播放侵入性声音。最近的音频与机器学习相结合表明，人们可以使用语音或音乐信号盲目地估计这些参数。我们遵循这些进展并提出了一种鲁棒的端到端方法来使用语音和/或音乐信号实现盲联合声学参数估计。我们的结果表明，卷积循环神经网络在这项任务中表现最好，并且在训练中加入音乐也有助于提高语音推理能力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于卷积循环神经网络的盲联合声学参数估计方法，利用语音和/或音乐信号进行房间声学特征提取。
AI.motivation: 传统房间声学参数测量依赖专业设备和侵入式声源，而通过语音或音乐信号实现盲估计可提升实际应用的便捷性与可行性。
AI.method: 采用卷积循环神经网络（CRNN）构建端到端模型，结合语音和音乐信号进行联合训练，利用时序特征提取与分类实现参数估计。
AI.result: 实验表明CRNN在声学参数估计任务中表现最优，且训练数据中包含音乐信号可显著提升语音信号的推理性能。
AI.conclusion: CRNN架构有效解决了盲声学参数估计问题，音乐数据的引入增强了模型泛化能力，为无设备声学分析提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于卷积循环神经网络的盲联合声学参数估计方法，利用语音和/或音乐信号进行房间声学特征提取。

authors_text: Guy Meyer,Alan Wassyng,Mark Lawford,Kourosh Sabri,Shahram Shirani
title: Literature Review of Computer Tools for the Visually Impaired: a focus on Search Engines
title_zh: 视障人士计算机工具文献综述：关注搜索引擎
abstract: A sudden reliance on the internet has resulted in the global standardization of specific software and interfaces tailored for the average user. Whether it be web apps or dedicated software, the methods of interaction are seemingly similar. But when the computer tool is presented with unique users, specifically with a disability, the quality of interaction degrades, sometimes to a point of complete uselessness. This roots from one's focus on the average user rather than the development of a platform for all (a golden standard). This paper reviews published works and products that deal with providing accessibility to visually impaired online users. Due to the variety of tools that are available to computer users, the paper focuses on search engines as a primary tool for browsing the web. By analyzing the attributes discussed below, the reader is equipped with a set of references for existing applications, along with practical insight and recommendations for accessible design. Finally, the necessary considerations for future developments and summaries of important focal points are highlighted.
summary: A sudden reliance on the internet has resulted in the global standardization of specific software and interfaces tailored for the average user. Whether it be web apps or dedicated software, the methods of interaction are seemingly similar. But when the computer tool is presented with unique users, specifically with a disability, the quality of interaction degrades, sometimes to a point of complete uselessness. This roots from one's focus on the average user rather than the development of a platform for all (a golden standard). abstract_zh: 对互联网的突然依赖导致了为普通用户量身定制的特定软件和界面的全球标准化。无论是网络应用还是专用软件，交互方式看似相似。但是，当计算机工具呈现给独特的用户时，特别是残疾用户，交互质量就会下降，有时甚至达到完全无用的程度。这源于对普通用户的关注，而不是为所有人开发平台（黄金标准）。本文回顾了为视障在线用户提供无障碍服务的已发表作品和产品。由于计算机用户可以使用的工具多种多样，本文重点关注搜索引擎作为浏览网页的主要工具。通过分析下面讨论的属性，读者可以了解现有应用程序的一组参考资料，以及可访问设计的实用见解和建议。最后，强调了未来发展的必要考虑和重要焦点的总结。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了针对视障用户的计算机工具（特别是搜索引擎）的现有研究和产品，分析其可访问性并提出设计建议。
AI.motivation: 当前软件设计过度聚焦普通用户，导致视障用户难以有效使用互联网工具，亟需针对性改进。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分析现有研究及搜索引擎的可访问性设计属性，总结实践洞察与未来方向。
AI.result: 提供了现有辅助工具的参考文献、可访问性设计实践建议及未来开发需关注的关键技术焦点。
AI.conclusion: 需建立包容性设计标准，优化搜索引擎功能，以提升视障用户的互联网使用体验与自主性。

tldr: 本文综述了针对视障用户的计算机工具（特别是搜索引擎）的现有研究和产品，分析其可访问性并提出设计建议。
motivation: 当前软件设计过度聚焦普通用户，导致视障用户难以有效使用互联网工具，亟需针对性改进。
method: 通过文献综述方法，分析现有研究及搜索引擎的可访问性设计属性，总结实践洞察与未来方向。
result: 提供了现有辅助工具的参考文献、可访问性设计实践建议及未来开发需关注的关键技术焦点。
conclusion: 需建立包容性设计标准，优化搜索引擎功能，以提升视障用户的互联网使用体验与自主性。
search_text: Literature Review of Computer Tools for the Visually Impaired: a focus on Search Engines 视障人士计算机工具文献综述：关注搜索引擎 A sudden reliance on the internet has resulted in the global standardization of specific software and interfaces tailored for the average user. Whether it be web apps or dedicated software, the methods of interaction are seemingly similar. But when the computer tool is presented with unique users, specifically with a disability, the quality of interaction degrades, sometimes to a point of complete uselessness. This roots from one's focus on the average user rather than the development of a platform for all (a golden standard). This paper reviews published works and products that deal with providing accessibility to visually impaired online users. Due to the variety of tools that are available to computer users, the paper focuses on search engines as a primary tool for browsing the web. By analyzing the attributes discussed below, the reader is equipped with a set of references for existing applications, along with practical insight and recommendations for accessible design. Finally, the necessary considerations for future developments and summaries of important focal points are highlighted. 对互联网的突然依赖导致了为普通用户量身定制的特定软件和界面的全球标准化。无论是网络应用还是专用软件，交互方式看似相似。但是，当计算机工具呈现给独特的用户时，特别是残疾用户，交互质量就会下降，有时甚至达到完全无用的程度。这源于对普通用户的关注，而不是为所有人开发平台（黄金标准）。本文回顾了为视障在线用户提供无障碍服务的已发表作品和产品。由于计算机用户可以使用的工具多种多样，本文重点关注搜索引擎作为浏览网页的主要工具。通过分析下面讨论的属性，读者可以了解现有应用程序的一组参考资料，以及可访问设计的实用见解和建议。最后，强调了未来发展的必要考虑和重要焦点的总结。 本文综述了针对视障用户的计算机工具（特别是搜索引擎）的现有研究和产品，分析其可访问性并提出设计建议。 Guy Meyer,Alan Wassyng,Mark Lawford,Kourosh Sabri,Shahram Shirani cs.HC

title: In-the-wild Drowsiness Detection from Facial Expressions
title_zh: 通过面部表情进行野外睡意检测
comment: Paper from HSIM Workshop at IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2020 (IV2020)
comments: Paper from HSIM Workshop at IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2020 (IV2020)
abstract: Driving in a state of drowsiness is a major cause of road accidents, resulting in tremendous damage to life and property. Developing robust, automatic, real-time systems that can infer drowsiness states of drivers has the potential of making life-saving impact. However, developing drowsiness detection systems that work well in real-world scenarios is challenging because of the difficulties associated with collecting high-volume realistic drowsy data and modeling the complex temporal dynamics of evolving drowsy states. In this paper, we propose a data collection protocol that involves outfitting vehicles of overnight shift workers with camera kits that record their faces while driving. We develop a drowsiness annotation guideline to enable humans to label the collected videos into 4 levels of drowsiness: `alert', `slightly drowsy', `moderately drowsy' and `extremely drowsy'. We experiment with different convolutional and temporal neural network architectures to predict drowsiness states from pose, expression and emotion-based representation of the input video of the driver's face. Our best performing model achieves a macro ROC-AUC of 0.78, compared to 0.72 for a baseline model.
summary: Driving in a state of drowsiness is a major cause of road accidents, resulting in tremendous damage to life and property. Developing robust, automatic, real-time systems that can infer drowsiness states of drivers has the potential of making life-saving impact. However, developing drowsiness detection systems that work well in real-world scenarios is challenging because of the difficulties associated with collecting high-volume realistic drowsy data and modeling the complex temporal dynamics of evolving drowsy states. In this paper, we propose a data collection protocol that involves outfitting vehicles of overnight shift workers with camera kits that record their faces while driving. We develop a drowsiness annotation guideline to enable humans to label the collected videos into 4 levels of drowsiness: `alert', `slightly drowsy', `moderately drowsy' and `extremely drowsy'. We experiment with different convolutional and temporal neural network architectures to predict drowsiness states from pose, expression and emotion-based representation of the input video of the driver's face. Our best performing model achieves a macro ROC-AUC of 0.78, compared to 0.72 for a baseline model.
abstract_zh: 困倦驾驶是引发道路交通事故的一个重要原因，给生命和财产造成巨大损失。开发能够推断驾驶员困倦状态的强大、自动、实时系统有可能产生挽救生命的影响。然而，开发在现实场景中运行良好的睡意检测系统具有挑战性，因为收集大量真实的睡意数据和对不断变化的睡意状态的复杂时间动态进行建模存在困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种数据收集协议，其中涉及为夜班工人的车辆配备摄像头套件，以记录他们在驾驶时的脸部。我们开发了困倦注释指南，使人们能够将收集的视频标记为 4 个困倦级别：“警觉”、“轻微困倦”、“中度困倦”和“极度困倦”。我们尝试使用不同的卷积和时间神经网络架构，根据驾驶员面部输入视频的姿势、表情和基于情感的表示来预测睡意状态。我们表现​​最佳的模型的宏观 ROC-AUC 为 0.78，而基线模型为 0.72。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于面部表情的实时疲劳检测系统，用于在真实驾驶环境中识别司机的疲劳状态。
AI.motivation: 疲劳驾驶是导致交通事故的主要原因，但现有系统难以在真实场景中有效收集数据并建模复杂的疲劳状态动态变化。
AI.method: 通过为夜班司机车辆安装摄像头采集面部视频数据，制定4级疲劳标注规范，并采用卷积神经网络与时间序列模型结合的方法，从面部姿态、表情和情绪特征中预测疲劳状态。
AI.result: 最佳模型在宏观ROC-AUC指标上达到0.78，优于基线模型的0.72。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为真实场景下的疲劳检测提供了数据集和有效模型，对提升驾驶安全具有实际应用价值。

title: Improving the Iterative Closest Point Algorithm using Lie Algebra
title_zh: 使用李代数改进迭代最近点算法
comment: Final version published in the International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) workshop in October 2020
comments: Final version published in the International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) workshop in October 2020
abstract: Mapping algorithms that rely on registering point clouds inevitably suffer from local drift, both in localization and in the built map. Applications that require accurate maps, such as environmental monitoring, benefit from additional sensor modalities that reduce such drift. In our work, we target the family of mappers based on the Iterative Closest Point (ICP) algorithm which use additional orientation sources such as the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU). We introduce a new angular penalty term derived from Lie algebra. Our formulation avoids the need for tuning arbitrary parameters. Orientation covariance is used instead, and the resulting error term fits into the ICP cost function minimization problem. Experiments performed on our own real-world data and on the KITTI dataset show consistent behavior while suppressing the effect of outlying IMU measurements. We further discuss promising experiments, which should lead to optimal combination of all error terms in the ICP cost function minimization problem, allowing us to smoothly combine the geometric and inertial information provided by robot sensors.

Applications that require accurate maps, such as environmental monitoring, benefit from additional sensor modalities that reduce such drift. In our work, we target the family of mappers based on the Iterative Closest Point (ICP) algorithm which use additional orientation sources such as the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU). We introduce a new angular penalty term derived from Lie algebra. Our formulation avoids the need for tuning arbitrary parameters. Orientation covariance is used instead, and the resulting error term fits into the ICP cost function minimization problem. Experiments performed on our own real-world data and on the KITTI dataset show consistent behavior while suppressing the effect of outlying IMU measurements. We further discuss promising experiments, which should lead to optimal combination of all error terms in the ICP cost function minimization problem, allowing us to smoothly combine the geometric and inertial information provided by robot sensors.
abstract_zh: 依赖于配准点云的地图算法不可避免地会在定位和构建地图中遭受局部漂移。需要精确地图的应用（例如环境监测）可以受益于减少此类漂移的附加传感器模式。在我们的工作中，我们以基于迭代最近点 (ICP) 算法的映射器系列为目标，该算法使用额外的方向源，例如惯性测量单元 (IMU)。我们引入了一个源自李代数的新角罚项。我们的公式避免了调整任意参数的需要。相反，使用方向协方差，所得误差项适合 ICP 成本函数最小化问题。对我们自己的真实世界数据和 KITTI 数据集进行的实验显示出一致的行为，同时抑制了外围 IMU 测量的影响。我们进一步讨论了有前途的实验，这应该导致 ICP 成本函数最小化问题中所有误差项的最佳组合，使我们能够顺利地结合机器人传感器提供的几何和惯性信息。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于李代数的改进ICP算法，结合IMU数据减少地图构建中的局部漂移。
AI.motivation: 现有ICP算法在定位和地图构建中存在局部漂移，需结合IMU等传感器数据，但传统方法依赖参数调优，影响效果。
AI.method: 引入基于李代数的角度惩罚项，利用方向协方差替代参数调优，整合到ICP成本函数中。
AI.result: 实验显示有效抑制IMU异常值影响，且能平滑结合几何与惯性信息，提升地图准确性。
AI.conclusion: 改进的算法有效减少漂移，为几何与惯性信息的最优融合提供了可行方案。

title: 3D Meta Point Signature: Learning to Learn 3D Point Signature for 3D Dense Shape Correspondence
title_zh: 3D 元点签名：学习 3D 密集形状对应的 3D 点签名
abstract: Point signature, a representation describing the structural neighborhood of a point in 3D shapes, can be applied to establish correspondences between points in 3D shapes. Conventional methods apply a weight-sharing network, e.g., any kind of graph neural networks, across all neighborhoods to directly generate point signatures and gain the generalization ability by extensive training over a large amount of training samples from scratch. However, these methods lack the flexibility in rapidly adapting to unseen neighborhood structures and thus generalizes poorly on new point sets. In this paper, we propose a novel meta-learning based 3D point signature model, named 3Dmetapointsignature (MEPS) network, that is capable of learning robust point signatures in 3D shapes. By regarding each point signature learning process as a task, our method obtains an optimized model over the best performance on the distribution of all tasks, generating reliable signatures for new tasks, i.e., signatures of unseen point neighborhoods. Specifically, the MEPS consists of two modules: a base signature learner and a meta signature learner. During training, the base-learner is trained to perform specific signature learning tasks. In the meantime, the meta-learner is trained to update the base-learner with optimal parameters. During testing, the meta-learner that is learned with the distribution of all tasks can adaptively change parameters of the base-learner, accommodating to unseen local neighborhoods. We evaluate the MEPS model on two datasets, e.g., FAUST and TOSCA, for dense 3Dshape correspondence. Experimental results demonstrate that our method not only gains significant improvements over the baseline model and achieves state-of-the-art results, but also is capable of handling unseen 3D shapes.

In this paper, we propose a novel meta-learning based 3D point signature model, named 3Dmetapointsignature (MEPS) network, that is capable of learning robust point signatures in 3D shapes.
