Specifically, the MEPS consists of two modules: a base signature learner and a meta signature learner. During training, the base-learner is trained to perform specific signature learning tasks. In the meantime, the meta-learner is trained to update the base-learner with optimal parameters. During testing, the meta-learner that is learned with the distribution of all tasks can adaptively change parameters of the base-learner, accommodating to unseen local neighborhoods. We evaluate the MEPS model on two datasets, e.g., FAUST and TOSCA, for dense 3Dshape correspondence. Experimental results demonstrate that our method not only gains significant improvements over the baseline model and achieves state-of-the-art results, but also is capable of handling unseen 3D shapes.
abstract_zh: 点签名是描述 3D 形状中点的结构邻域的表示形式，可用于建立 3D 形状中点之间的对应关系。传统方法在所有邻域中应用权重共享网络（例如任何类型的图神经网络）来直接生成点签名，并通过从头开始对大量训练样本进行广泛训练来获得泛化能力。然而，这些方法缺乏快速适应看不见的邻域结构的灵活性，因此对新点集的泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于元学习的 3D 点签名模型，称为 3Dmetapointsignature (MEPS) 网络，它能够学习 3D 形状中的鲁棒点签名。通过将每个点签名学习过程视为一个任务，我们的方法获得了所有任务分布上最佳性能的优化模型，为新任务生成可靠的签名，即未见过的点邻域的签名。具体来说，MEPS 由两个模块组成：基础签名学习器和元签名学习器。在训练期间，基础学习器被训练来执行特定的签名学习任务。与此同时，元学习器经过训练，用最佳参数更新基础学习器。在测试过程中，通过所有任务的分布学习的元学习器可以自适应地改变基础学习器的参数，以适应看不见的局部邻域。我们在两个数据集（例如 FAUST 和 TOSCA）上评估 MEPS 模型的密集 3Dshape 对应。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅比基线模型获得了显着改进并实现了最先进的结果，而且还能够处理看不见的 3D 形状。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的3D点签名模型MEPS，用于解决3D密集形状对应问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过权重共享网络生成点签名，但缺乏对新邻域结构的快速适应能力，导致泛化性能不足。
AI.method: 设计包含基础签名学习器和元学习器的MEPS网络，训练时通过元学习器优化基础学习器参数，测试时动态适配新邻域结构。
AI.result: 在FAUST和TOSCA数据集上显著优于基线模型，达到SOTA性能，并能有效处理未见过的3D形状。
AI.conclusion: MEPS通过元学习机制提升了点签名学习的灵活性和泛化能力，为3D形状对应任务提供了新思路。

search_text: 3D Meta Point Signature: Learning to Learn 3D Point Signature for 3D Dense Shape Correspondence 3D 元点签名：学习 3D 密集形状对应的 3D 点签名 Point signature, a representation describing the structural neighborhood of a point in 3D shapes, can be applied to establish correspondences between points in 3D shapes. Conventional methods apply a weight-sharing network, e.g., any kind of graph neural networks, across all neighborhoods to directly generate point signatures and gain the generalization ability by extensive training over a large amount of training samples from scratch. However, these methods lack the flexibility in rapidly adapting to unseen neighborhood structures and thus generalizes poorly on new point sets. In this paper, we propose a novel meta-learning based 3D point signature model, named 3Dmetapointsignature (MEPS) network, that is capable of learning robust point signatures in 3D shapes. By regarding each point signature learning process as a task, our method obtains an optimized model over the best performance on the distribution of all tasks, generating reliable signatures for new tasks, i.e., signatures of unseen point neighborhoods. Specifically, the MEPS consists of two modules: a base signature learner and a meta signature learner. During training, the base-learner is trained to perform specific signature learning tasks. In the meantime, the meta-learner is trained to update the base-learner with optimal parameters. During testing, the meta-learner that is learned with the distribution of all tasks can adaptively change parameters of the base-learner, accommodating to unseen local neighborhoods. We evaluate the MEPS model on two datasets, e.g., FAUST and TOSCA, for dense 3Dshape correspondence. Experimental results demonstrate that our method not only gains significant improvements over the baseline model and achieves state-of-the-art results, but also is capable of handling unseen 3D shapes. 点签名是描述 3D 形状中点的结构邻域的表示形式，可用于建立 3D 形状中点之间的对应关系。传统方法在所有邻域中应用权重共享网络（例如任何类型的图神经网络）来直接生成点签名，并通过从头开始对大量训练样本进行广泛训练来获得泛化能力。然而，这些方法缺乏快速适应看不见的邻域结构的灵活性，因此对新点集的泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于元学习的 3D 点签名模型，称为 3Dmetapointsignature (MEPS) 网络，它能够学习 3D 形状中的鲁棒点签名。通过将每个点签名学习过程视为一个任务，我们的方法获得了所有任务分布上最佳性能的优化模型，为新任务生成可靠的签名，即未见过的点邻域的签名。具体来说，MEPS 由两个模块组成：基础签名学习器和元签名学习器。在训练期间，基础学习器被训练来执行特定的签名学习任务。与此同时，元学习器经过训练，用最佳参数更新基础学习器。在测试过程中，通过所有任务的分布学习的元学习器可以自适应地改变基础学习器的参数，以适应看不见的局部邻域。我们在两个数据集（例如 FAUST 和 TOSCA）上评估 MEPS 模型的密集 3Dshape 对应。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅比基线模型获得了显着改进并实现了最先进的结果，而且还能够处理看不见的 3D 形状。 本文提出一种基于元学习的3D点签名模型MEPS，用于解决3D密集形状对应问题。 Hao Huang,Lingjing Wang,Xiang Li,Yi Fang cs.CV

authors_text: Antonio Barbalau,Adrian Cosma,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Marius Popescu
title: Black-Box Ripper: Copying black-box models using generative evolutionary algorithms
title_zh: Black-Box Ripper：使用生成进化算法复制黑盒模型
abstract: We study the task of replicating the functionality of black-box neural models, for which we only know the output class probabilities provided for a set of input images. We assume back-propagation through the black-box model is not possible and its training images are not available, e.g. the model could be exposed only through an API. In this context, we present a teacher-student framework that can distill the black-box (teacher) model into a student model with minimal accuracy loss. To generate useful data samples for training the student, our framework (i) learns to generate images on a proxy data set (with images and classes different from those used to train the black-box) and (ii) applies an evolutionary strategy to make sure that each generated data sample exhibits a high response for a specific class when given as input to the black box. Our framework is compared with several baseline and state-of-the-art methods on three benchmark data sets. The empirical evidence indicates that our model is superior to the considered baselines. Although our method does not back-propagate through the black-box network, it generally surpasses state-of-the-art methods that regard the teacher as a glass-box model. Our code is available at: https://github.com/antoniobarbalau/black-box-ripper.
summary: We study the task of replicating the functionality of black-box neural models, for which we only know the output class probabilities provided for a set of input images. We assume back-propagation through the black-box model is not possible and its training images are not available, e.g. the model could be exposed only through an API. In this context, we present a teacher-student framework that can distill the black-box (teacher) model into a student model with minimal accuracy loss. To generate useful data samples for training the student, our framework (i) learns to generate images on a proxy data set (with images and classes different from those used to train the black-box) and (ii) applies an evolutionary strategy to make sure that each generated data sample exhibits a high response for a specific class when given as input to the black box. Our framework is compared with several baseline and state-of-the-art methods on three benchmark data sets. The empirical evidence indicates that our model is superior to the considered baselines. Although our method does not back-propagate through the black-box network, it generally surpasses state-of-the-art methods that regard the teacher as a glass-box model. Our code is available at: https://github.com/antoniobarbalau/black-box-ripper.
abstract_zh: 我们研究复制黑盒神经模型功能的任务，为此我们只知道为一组输入图像提供的输出类概率。我们假设通过黑盒模型进行反向传播是不可能的，并且其训练图像不可用，例如该模型只能通过 API 公开。在这种情况下，我们提出了一个师生框架，可以将黑盒（教师）模型提炼为学生模型，并且精度损失最小。为了生成用于训练学生的有用数据样本，我们的框架（i）学习在代理数据集上生成图像（图像和类与用于训练黑盒的图像和类不同），并且（ii）应用进化策略以确保每个生成的数据样本在作为黑盒的输入时对特定类表现出高响应。我们的框架在三个基准数据集上与几种基线和最先进的方法进行了比较。经验证据表明我们的模型优于所考虑的基线。尽管我们的方法不通过黑盒网络进行反向传播，但它总体上超越了将教师视为玻璃盒模型的最先进方法。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/antoniobarbalau/black-box-ripper。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需访问黑盒模型训练数据或反向传播的复制方法，通过生成对抗样本和进化策略训练学生模型。
AI.motivation: 黑盒模型常通过API提供服务，无法直接获取其训练数据或进行反向传播，需开发无需内部信息的模型复制技术。
AI.method: 采用教师-学生框架，结合生成对抗网络在代理数据集生成图像，并通过进化策略优化样本以触发黑盒模型特定类别高响应。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上优于现有基线方法和玻璃盒模型方法，且无需黑盒反向传播。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了在无黑盒内部信息前提下，通过生成优化样本仍可有效复制模型功能。

title: Logistic Q-Learning
title_zh: 物流Q学习
abstract: We propose a new reinforcement learning algorithm derived from a regularized linear-programming formulation of optimal control in MDPs. The method is closely related to the classic Relative Entropy Policy Search (REPS) algorithm of Peters et al. (2010), with the key difference that our method introduces a Q-function that enables efficient exact model-free implementation. The main feature of our algorithm (called QREPS) is a convex loss function for policy evaluation that serves as a theoretically sound alternative to the widely used squared Bellman error. We provide a practical saddle-point optimization method for minimizing this loss function and provide an error-propagation analysis that relates the quality of the individual updates to the performance of the output policy. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on a range of benchmark problems.
summary: We propose a new reinforcement learning algorithm derived from a regularized linear-programming formulation of optimal control in MDPs. The method is closely related to the classic Relative Entropy Policy Search (REPS) algorithm of Peters et al. (2010), with the key difference that our method introduces a Q-function that enables efficient exact model-free implementation. The main feature of our algorithm (called QREPS) is a convex loss function for policy evaluation that serves as a theoretically sound alternative to the widely used squared Bellman error. We provide a practical saddle-point optimization method for minimizing this loss function and provide an error-propagation analysis that relates the quality of the individual updates to the performance of the output policy. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on a range of benchmark problems.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的强化学习算法，该算法源自 MDP 中最优控制的正则化线性规划公式。该方法与Peters等人的经典相对熵策略搜索（REPS）算法密切相关。 （2010），主要区别在于我们的方法引入了 Q 函数，可以实现高效、精确的无模型实现。我们的算法（称为 QREPS）的主要特征是用于策略评估的凸损失函数，它可以作为广泛使用的平方贝尔曼误差的理论上合理的替代方案。我们提供了一种实用的鞍点优化方法来最小化该损失函数，并提供了一种误差传播分析，将各个更新的质量与输出策略的性能联系起来。最后，我们证明了我们的方法在一系列基准问题上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正则化线性规划的强化学习算法QREPS，通过引入Q函数和凸损失函数改进策略评估与优化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如REPS在模型无关实现上效率不足，且常用平方Bellman误差缺乏理论支撑，需更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于MDPs的正则化线性规划框架，结合Q函数设计凸损失函数，采用鞍点优化方法并进行误差传播分析。
AI.result: 在多个基准问题上验证了QREPS的有效性，展示了其在策略性能和更新质量上的优势。
AI.conclusion: QREPS通过理论严谨的凸损失函数和高效优化方法，为模型无关强化学习提供了改进的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于正则化线性规划的强化学习算法QREPS，通过引入Q函数和凸损失函数改进策略评估与优化。
motivation: 现有方法如REPS在模型无关实现上效率不足，且常用平方Bellman误差缺乏理论支撑，需更高效的替代方案。
method: 基于MDPs的正则化线性规划框架，结合Q函数设计凸损失函数，采用鞍点优化方法并进行误差传播分析。
result: 在多个基准问题上验证了QREPS的有效性，展示了其在策略性能和更新质量上的优势。
conclusion: QREPS通过理论严谨的凸损失函数和高效优化方法，为模型无关强化学习提供了改进的解决方案。
search_text: Logistic Q-Learning 物流Q学习 We propose a new reinforcement learning algorithm derived from a regularized linear-programming formulation of optimal control in MDPs. The method is closely related to the classic Relative Entropy Policy Search (REPS) algorithm of Peters et al. (2010), with the key difference that our method introduces a Q-function that enables efficient exact model-free implementation. The main feature of our algorithm (called QREPS) is a convex loss function for policy evaluation that serves as a theoretically sound alternative to the widely used squared Bellman error. We provide a practical saddle-point optimization method for minimizing this loss function and provide an error-propagation analysis that relates the quality of the individual updates to the performance of the output policy. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on a range of benchmark problems. 我们提出了一种新的强化学习算法，该算法源自 MDP 中最优控制的正则化线性规划公式。该方法与Peters等人的经典相对熵策略搜索（REPS）算法密切相关。 （2010），主要区别在于我们的方法引入了 Q 函数，可以实现高效、精确的无模型实现。我们的算法（称为 QREPS）的主要特征是用于策略评估的凸损失函数，它可以作为广泛使用的平方贝尔曼误差的理论上合理的替代方案。我们提供了一种实用的鞍点优化方法来最小化该损失函数，并提供了一种误差传播分析，将各个更新的质量与输出策略的性能联系起来。最后，我们证明了我们的方法在一系列基准问题上的有效性。 本文提出一种基于正则化线性规划的强化学习算法QREPS，通过引入Q函数和凸损失函数改进策略评估与优化。 Joan Bas-Serrano,Sebastian Curi,Andreas Krause,Gergely Neu cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Jiahui Yu,Chung-Cheng Chiu,Bo Li,Shuo-yiin Chang,Tara N. Sainath,Yanzhang He,Arun Narayanan,Wei Han,Anmol Gulati,Yonghui Wu,Ruoming Pang
title: FastEmit: Low-latency Streaming ASR with Sequence-level Emission Regularization
title_zh: FastEmit：具有序列级发射正则化的低延迟流式 ASR
abstract: Streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) aims to emit each hypothesized word as quickly and accurately as possible. However, emitting fast without degrading quality, as measured by word error rate (WER), is highly challenging. Existing approaches including Early and Late Penalties and Constrained Alignments penalize emission delay by manipulating per-token or per-frame probability prediction in sequence transducer models. While being successful in reducing delay, these approaches suffer from significant accuracy regression and also require additional word alignment information from an existing model. In this work, we propose a sequence-level emission regularization method, named FastEmit, that applies latency regularization directly on per-sequence probability in training transducer models, and does not require any alignment. We demonstrate that FastEmit is more suitable to the sequence-level optimization of transducer models for streaming ASR by applying it on various end-to-end streaming ASR networks including RNN-Transducer, Transformer-Transducer, ConvNet-Transducer and Conformer-Transducer. We achieve 150-300 ms latency reduction with significantly better accuracy over previous techniques on a Voice Search test set. FastEmit also improves streaming ASR accuracy from 4.4%/8.9% to 3.1%/7.5% WER, meanwhile reduces 90th percentile latency from 210 ms to only 30 ms on LibriSpeech.
summary: Streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) aims to emit each hypothesized word as quickly and accurately as possible. However, emitting fast without degrading quality, as measured by word error rate (WER), is highly challenging. Existing approaches including Early and Late Penalties and Constrained Alignments penalize emission delay by manipulating per-token or per-frame probability prediction in sequence transducer models. While being successful in reducing delay, these approaches suffer from significant accuracy regression and also require additional word alignment information from an existing model. In this work, we propose a sequence-level emission regularization method, named FastEmit, that applies latency regularization directly on per-sequence probability in training transducer models, and does not require any alignment. We demonstrate that FastEmit is more suitable to the sequence-level optimization of transducer models for streaming ASR by applying it on various end-to-end streaming ASR networks including RNN-Transducer, Transformer-Transducer, ConvNet-Transducer and Conformer-Transducer. We achieve 150-300 ms latency reduction with significantly better accuracy over previous techniques on a Voice Search test set. FastEmit also improves streaming ASR accuracy from 4.4%/8.9% to 3.1%/7.5% WER, meanwhile reduces 90th percentile latency from 210 ms to only 30 ms on LibriSpeech.
abstract_zh: 流式自动语音识别 (ASR) 旨在尽可能快速、准确地发出每个假设的单词。然而，在不降低质量（以字错误率 (WER) 衡量）的情况下快速发布是极具挑战性的。包括早期和晚期惩罚以及约束对齐在内的现有方法通过操纵序列传感器模型中的每个令牌或每帧概率预测来惩罚发射延迟。虽然成功地减少了延迟，但这些方法遭受了显着的准确性回归，并且还需要来自现有模型的额外字对齐信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 FastEmit 的序列级发射正则化方法，该方法直接对训练传感器模型中的每个序列概率应用延迟正则化，并且不需要任何对齐。我们通过将 FastEmit 应用于各种端到端流式 ASR 网络（包括 RNN-Transducer、Transformer-Transducer、ConvNet-Transducer 和 Conformer-Transducer）来证明 FastEmit 更适合流式 ASR 的传感器模型的序列级优化。我们在语音搜索测试集上实现了 150-300 毫秒的延迟减少，并且比以前的技术的准确性显着提高。 FastEmit 还将流媒体 ASR 准确率从 4.4%/8.9% 提高到 3.1%/7.5% WER，同时将 LibriSpeech 上的 90% 延迟从 210 毫秒减少到仅 30 毫秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FastEmit的序列级发射正则化方法，用于实现低延迟的流式自动语音识别（ASR）。
AI.motivation: 现有流式ASR方法在减少延迟时会导致准确性下降，并需要依赖预训练模型的对齐信息，存在显著缺陷。
AI.method: 通过在序列级概率上直接应用延迟正则化，无需对齐信息，优化Transducer模型的训练过程。
AI.result: 在Voice Search测试集上实现150-300ms延迟降低，LibriSpeech数据集上WER从4.4%/8.9%提升至3.1%/7.5%，90分位延迟从210ms降至30ms。
AI.conclusion: FastEmit有效解决了流式ASR的延迟与准确性矛盾，适用于多种端到端流式ASR网络结构。

We achieve 150-300 ms latency reduction with significantly better accuracy over previous techniques on a Voice Search test set. authors_text: Ling Wang,Cheng Zhang,Zejian Luo,Chenguang Liu,Jie Liu,Xi Zheng,Athanasios Vasilakos
title: Progressive Defense Against Adversarial Attacks for Deep Learning as a Service in Internet of Things
title_zh: 物联网深度学习即服务的对抗性攻击的渐进防御
abstract: Nowadays, Deep Learning as a service can be deployed in Internet of Things (IoT) to provide smart services and sensor data processing. However, recent research has revealed that some Deep Neural Networks (DNN) can be easily misled by adding relatively small but adversarial perturbations to the input (e.g., pixel mutation in input images). One challenge in defending DNN against these attacks is to efficiently identifying and filtering out the adversarial pixels. The state-of-the-art defense strategies with good robustness often require additional model training for specific attacks. To reduce the computational cost without loss of generality, we present a defense strategy called a progressive defense against adversarial attacks (PDAAA) for efficiently and effectively filtering out the adversarial pixel mutations, which could mislead the neural network towards erroneous outputs, without a-priori knowledge about the attack type. We evaluated our progressive defense strategy against various attack methods on two well-known datasets. The result shows it outperforms the state-of-the-art while reducing the cost of model training by 50% on average.
summary: Nowadays, Deep Learning as a service can be deployed in Internet of Things (IoT) to provide smart services and sensor data processing. However, recent research has revealed that some Deep Neural Networks (DNN) can be easily misled by adding relatively small but adversarial perturbations to the input (e.g., pixel mutation in input images). One challenge in defending DNN against these attacks is to efficiently identifying and filtering out the adversarial pixels. The state-of-the-art defense strategies with good robustness often require additional model training for specific attacks. To reduce the computational cost without loss of generality, we present a defense strategy called a progressive defense against adversarial attacks (PDAAA) for efficiently and effectively filtering out the adversarial pixel mutations, which could mislead the neural network towards erroneous outputs, without a-priori knowledge about the attack type. We evaluated our progressive defense strategy against various attack methods on two well-known datasets. The result shows it outperforms the state-of-the-art while reducing the cost of model training by 50% on average.
abstract_zh: 如今，深度学习即服务可以部署在物联网（IoT）中，以提供智能服务和传感器数据处理。然而，最近的研究表明，一些深度神经网络（DNN）很容易通过向输入添加相对较小但对抗性的扰动（例如输入图像中的像素突变）而被误导。防御 DNN 抵御这些攻击的一大挑战是有效识别和过滤掉对抗性像素。具有良好鲁棒性的最先进的防御策略通常需要针对特定​​攻击进行额外的模型训练。为了在不失一般性的情况下降低计算成本，我们提出了一种称为对抗性攻击渐进防御（PDAAA）的防御策略，用于高效且有效地过滤掉对抗性像素突变，这可能会在没有关于攻击类型的先验知识的情况下误导神经网络产生错误的输出。我们在两个著名的数据集上评估了针对各种攻击方法的渐进式防御策略。结果表明，它的性能优于最先进的技术，同时模型训练的成本平均降低了 50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需先验攻击知识即可高效过滤对抗样本的渐进式防御策略PDAAA，用于增强物联网中深度学习即服务的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击防御方法需针对特定攻击类型进行额外模型训练，导致计算成本高且通用性差，亟需更高效普适的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计渐进式防御框架PDAAA，通过分阶段过滤输入数据中的对抗性像素扰动，在无需攻击先验知识的前提下提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在两个标准数据集上实验表明，PDAAA在防御效果上优于现有方法，且平均降低50%的模型训练成本。
AI.conclusion: PDAAA为物联网场景下的深度学习即服务提供了计算高效且通用性强的对抗防御方案，有效平衡了安全性和资源消耗。

To reduce the computational cost without loss of generality, we present a defense strategy called a progressive defense against adversarial attacks (PDAAA) for efficiently and effectively filtering out the adversarial pixel mutations, which could mislead the neural network towards erroneous outputs, without a-priori knowledge about the attack type. We evaluated our progressive defense strategy against various attack methods on two well-known datasets. The result shows it outperforms the state-of-the-art while reducing the cost of model training by 50% on average. 如今，深度学习即服务可以部署在物联网（IoT）中，以提供智能服务和传感器数据处理。然而，最近的研究表明，一些深度神经网络（DNN）很容易通过向输入添加相对较小但对抗性的扰动（例如输入图像中的像素突变）而被误导。防御 DNN 抵御这些攻击的一大挑战是有效识别和过滤掉对抗性像素。具有良好鲁棒性的最先进的防御策略通常需要针对特定​​攻击进行额外的模型训练。为了在不失一般性的情况下降低计算成本，我们提出了一种称为对抗性攻击渐进防御（PDAAA）的防御策略，用于高效且有效地过滤掉对抗性像素突变，这可能会在没有关于攻击类型的先验知识的情况下误导神经网络产生错误的输出。我们在两个著名的数据集上评估了针对各种攻击方法的渐进式防御策略。结果表明，它的性能优于最先进的技术，同时模型训练的成本平均降低了 50%。 本文提出了一种无需先验攻击知识即可高效过滤对抗样本的渐进式防御策略PDAAA，用于增强物联网中深度学习即服务的安全性。 Ling Wang,Cheng Zhang,Zejian Luo,Chenguang Liu,Jie Liu,Xi Zheng,Athanasios Vasilakos cs.CR,cs.AI

title: A Simple and Efficient Multi-Task Learning Approach for Conditioned Dialogue Generation
title_zh: 一种简单高效的条件对话生成多任务学习方法
abstract: Conditioned dialogue generation suffers from the scarcity of labeled responses. In this work, we exploit labeled non-dialogue text data related to the condition, which are much easier to collect. We propose a multi-task learning approach to leverage both labeled dialogue and text data. The 3 tasks jointly optimize the same pre-trained Transformer -- conditioned dialogue generation task on the labeled dialogue data, conditioned language encoding task and conditioned language generation task on the labeled text data. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art models by leveraging the labeled texts, and it also obtains larger improvement in performance comparing to the previous methods to leverage text data.
summary: Conditioned dialogue generation suffers from the scarcity of labeled responses. In this work, we exploit labeled non-dialogue text data related to the condition, which are much easier to collect. We propose a multi-task learning approach to leverage both labeled dialogue and text data. The 3 tasks jointly optimize the same pre-trained Transformer -- conditioned dialogue generation task on the labeled dialogue data, conditioned language encoding task and conditioned language generation task on the labeled text data. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art models by leveraging the labeled texts, and it also obtains larger improvement in performance comparing to the previous methods to leverage text data.
abstract_zh: 条件对话的生成受到标记响应稀缺的影响。在这项工作中，我们利用与条件相关的标记的非对话文本数据，这些数据更容易收集。我们提出了一种多任务学习方法来利用标记对话和文本数据。这3个任务共同优化同一个预训练的Transformer——基于标记对话数据的条件对话生成任务、基于标记文本数据的条件语言编码任务和条件语言生成任务。实验结果表明，我们的方法通过利用标记文本优于最先进的模型，并且与以前利用文本数据的方法相比，它在性能上也获得了更大的改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多任务学习方法，利用标注的非对话文本数据提升条件对话生成效果
AI.motivation: 解决条件对话生成中标注响应数据稀缺的问题，利用更易获取的标注非对话文本数据提升模型性能
AI.method: 采用多任务学习框架，联合优化条件对话生成、条件语言编码和生成任务，共享同一预训练Transformer模型参数
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在利用标注文本数据方面优于现有模型，且性能提升显著超过之前方法
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习有效整合非对话文本数据，显著提升条件对话生成效果，验证了方法的有效性

title: Multi-Domain Dialogue State Tracking based on State Graph
title_zh: 基于状态图的多域对话状态跟踪
abstract: We investigate the problem of multi-domain Dialogue State Tracking (DST) with open vocabulary, which aims to extract the state from the dialogue. Existing approaches usually concatenate previous dialogue state with dialogue history as the input to a bi-directional Transformer encoder. They rely on the self-attention mechanism of Transformer to connect tokens in them. However, attention may be paid to spurious connections, leading to wrong inference. In this paper, we propose to construct a dialogue state graph in which domains, slots and values from the previous dialogue state are connected properly. Through training, the graph node and edge embeddings can encode co-occurrence relations between domain-domain, slot-slot and domain-slot, reflecting the strong transition paths in general dialogue. The state graph, encoded with relational-GCN, is fused into the Transformer encoder. Experimental results show that our approach achieves a new state of the art on the task while remaining efficient. It outperforms existing open-vocabulary DST approaches.
summary: We investigate the problem of multi-domain Dialogue State Tracking (DST) with open vocabulary, which aims to extract the state from the dialogue. Existing approaches usually concatenate previous dialogue state with dialogue history as the input to a bi-directional Transformer encoder. They rely on the self-attention mechanism of Transformer to connect tokens in them. However, attention may be paid to spurious connections, leading to wrong inference. In this paper, we propose to construct a dialogue state graph in which domains, slots and values from the previous dialogue state are connected properly. Through training, the graph node and edge embeddings can encode co-occurrence relations between domain-domain, slot-slot and domain-slot, reflecting the strong transition paths in general dialogue. The state graph, encoded with relational-GCN, is fused into the Transformer encoder. Experimental results show that our approach achieves a new state of the art on the task while remaining efficient. It outperforms existing open-vocabulary DST approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了具有开放词汇的多域对话状态跟踪（DST）问题，其目的是从对话中提取状态。现有方法通常将先前的对话状态与对话历史连接起来，作为双向 Transformer 编码器的输入。它们依靠 Transformer 的 self-attention 机制来连接其中的 token。然而，可能会注意到虚假连接，从而导致错误的推断。在本文中，我们建议构建一个对话状态图，其中来自先前对话状态的域、槽和值被正确连接。通过训练，图节点和边嵌入可以编码域-域、槽-槽和域-槽之间的共现关系，反映一般对话中的强过渡路径。使用关系 GCN 编码的状态图被融合到 Transformer 编码器中。实验结果表明，我们的方法在保持高效的同时，在任务上达到了新的最先进水平。它优于现有的开放词汇 DST 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于状态图的多领域对话状态跟踪方法，解决开放词汇场景下对话状态提取问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过Transformer自注意力机制连接对话历史和状态信息，易产生虚假关联导致错误推理，需更精准捕捉领域-槽位-值间的关联关系。
AI.method: 构建包含领域、槽位和值的对话状态图，利用关系图卷积网络（relational-GCN）编码节点与边的共现关系，将状态图嵌入Transformer编码器进行融合。
AI.result: 在多领域DST任务中达到新SOTA性能，优于现有开放词汇方法且保持计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 状态图结构结合relational-GCN能有效建模对话中的强转移路径，提升多领域对话状态跟踪的准确性和鲁棒性。

Existing approaches usually concatenate previous dialogue state with dialogue history as the input to a bi-directional Transformer encoder. authors_text: Daniel Li,Te I,Naveen Arivazhagan,Colin Cherry,Dirk Padfield
title: Sentence Boundary Augmentation For Neural Machine Translation Robustness
title_zh: 用于神经机器翻译鲁棒性的句子边界增强
abstract: Neural Machine Translation (NMT) models have demonstrated strong state of the art performance on translation tasks where well-formed training and evaluation data are provided, but they remain sensitive to inputs that include errors of various types. Specifically, in the context of long-form speech translation systems, where the input transcripts come from Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), the NMT models have to handle errors including phoneme substitutions, grammatical structure, and sentence boundaries, all of which pose challenges to NMT robustness. Through in-depth error analysis, we show that sentence boundary segmentation has the largest impact on quality, and we develop a simple data augmentation strategy to improve segmentation robustness.
summary: Neural Machine Translation (NMT) models have demonstrated strong state of the art performance on translation tasks where well-formed training and evaluation data are provided, but they remain sensitive to inputs that include errors of various types. Specifically, in the context of long-form speech translation systems, where the input transcripts come from Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), the NMT models have to handle errors including phoneme substitutions, grammatical structure, and sentence boundaries, all of which pose challenges to NMT robustness. Through in-depth error analysis, we show that sentence boundary segmentation has the largest impact on quality, and we develop a simple data augmentation strategy to improve segmentation robustness.
abstract_zh: 神经机器翻译 (NMT) 模型在提供格式良好的训练和评估数据的翻译任务中表现出了强大的最先进性能，但它们对包含各种类型错误的输入仍然敏感。具体来说，在长篇语音翻译系统中，输入文本来自自动语音识别（ASR），NMT 模型必须处理包括音素替换、语法结构和句子边界在内的错误，所有这些都对 NMT 的鲁棒性提出了挑战。通过深入的错误分析，我们表明句子边界分割对质量影响最大，并且我们开发了一种简单的数据增强策略来提高分割的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种句子边界数据增强方法，以提升神经机器翻译在处理语音识别错误时的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 神经机器翻译模型对输入错误敏感，尤其在语音翻译场景中，句子边界错误对翻译质量影响最大。
AI.method: 通过深入分析错误类型，设计简单数据增强策略，增加训练数据中句子边界变化的多样性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效提升了模型对句子边界错误的鲁棒性，改善了翻译质量。
AI.conclusion: 句子边界增强策略能显著提升NMT在存在输入错误时的稳定性与翻译准确性。

search_text: Sentence Boundary Augmentation For Neural Machine Translation Robustness 用于神经机器翻译鲁棒性的句子边界增强 Neural Machine Translation (NMT) models have demonstrated strong state of the art performance on translation tasks where well-formed training and evaluation data are provided, but they remain sensitive to inputs that include errors of various types. Specifically, in the context of long-form speech translation systems, where the input transcripts come from Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), the NMT models have to handle errors including phoneme substitutions, grammatical structure, and sentence boundaries, all of which pose challenges to NMT robustness. Through in-depth error analysis, we show that sentence boundary segmentation has the largest impact on quality, and we develop a simple data augmentation strategy to improve segmentation robustness. 神经机器翻译 (NMT) 模型在提供格式良好的训练和评估数据的翻译任务中表现出了强大的最先进性能，但它们对包含各种类型错误的输入仍然敏感。具体来说，在长篇语音翻译系统中，输入文本来自自动语音识别（ASR），NMT 模型必须处理包括音素替换、语法结构和句子边界在内的错误，所有这些都对 NMT 的鲁棒性提出了挑战。通过深入的错误分析，我们表明句子边界分割对质量影响最大，并且我们开发了一种简单的数据增强策略来提高分割的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种句子边界数据增强方法，以提升神经机器翻译在处理语音识别错误时的鲁棒性。 Daniel Li,Te I,Naveen Arivazhagan,Colin Cherry,Dirk Padfield cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Study of star clusters in the M83 galaxy with a convolutional neural network
title_zh: 利用卷积神经网络研究 M83 星系中的星团
abstract: We present a study of evolutionary and structural parameters of star cluster candidates in the spiral galaxy M83. For this we use a convolutional neural network trained on mock clusters and capable of fast identification and localization of star clusters, as well as inference of their parameters from multi-band images. We use this pipeline to detect 3,380 cluster candidates in Hubble Space Telescope observations. The sample of cluster candidates shows an age gradient across the galaxy's spiral arms, which is in good agreement with predictions of the density wave theory and other studies. As measured from the dust lanes of the spiral arms, the younger population of cluster candidates peaks at the distance of $\sim$0.4 kpc while the older candidates are more dispersed, but shifted towards $\gtrsim$0.7 kpc in the leading part of the spiral arms. We find high extinction cluster candidates positioned in the trailing part of the spiral arms, close to the dust lanes. We also find a large number of dense older clusters near the center of the galaxy and a slight increase of the typical cluster size further from the center.
summary: We present a study of evolutionary and structural parameters of star cluster candidates in the spiral galaxy M83. For this we use a convolutional neural network trained on mock clusters and capable of fast identification and localization of star clusters, as well as inference of their parameters from multi-band images. We use this pipeline to detect 3,380 cluster candidates in Hubble Space Telescope observations. The sample of cluster candidates shows an age gradient across the galaxy's spiral arms, which is in good agreement with predictions of the density wave theory and other studies. As measured from the dust lanes of the spiral arms, the younger population of cluster candidates peaks at the distance of $\sim$0.4 kpc while the older candidates are more dispersed, but shifted towards $\gtrsim$0.7 kpc in the leading part of the spiral arms. We find high extinction cluster candidates positioned in the trailing part of the spiral arms, close to the dust lanes. We also find a large number of dense older clusters near the center of the galaxy and a slight increase of the typical cluster size further from the center.
abstract_zh: 我们对螺旋星系 M83 中候选星团的演化和结构参数进行了研究。为此，我们使用在模拟星团上训练的卷积神经网络，能够快速识别和定位星团，并从多波段图像中推断其参数。我们使用此管道在哈勃太空望远镜观测中检测到 3,380 个候选星团。候选星团的样本显示了整个星系旋臂的年龄梯度，这与密度波理论和其他研究的预测非常一致。从旋臂的尘埃带测量，较年轻的簇候选者在 $\sim$0.4 kpc 的距离处达到峰值，而年长的候选者则更加分散，但在旋臂的前导部分向 $\gtrsim$0.7 kpc 移动。我们发现高消光星团候选者位于旋臂的尾部，靠近尘埃带。我们还在星系中心附近发现了大量密集的古老星团，并且远离中心的典型星团大小略有增加。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用卷积神经网络分析M83星系中的恒星团演化和结构参数，通过哈勃望远镜数据检测星团候选体并研究其分布特征。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在分析星系中大量星团时效率较低，需开发自动化工具以准确提取星团参数并验证恒星形成理论。
AI.method: 训练卷积神经网络识别模拟星团，利用多波段图像自动检测星团候选体，并分析其年龄、位置及消光等参数。
AI.result: 检测到3,380个星团候选体，发现年轻星团集中在距星系臂0.4kpc处，年长星团向0.7kpc外扩散；中心区域存在密集老星团，外围星团尺寸略有增大。
AI.conclusion: 卷积神经网络有效提升了星团分析效率，结果支持密度波理论，揭示了星系中星团年龄分布与螺旋臂结构的关联性。

authors_text: Amina Mardiyyah Rufai,Afolabi Abeeb,Esther Oduntan,Tayo Arulogun,Oluwabukola Adegboro,Daniel Ajisafe
title: Towards End-to-End Training of Automatic Speech Recognition for Nigerian Pidgin
title_zh: 尼日利亚洋泾浜语自动语音识别的端到端训练
comment: Updated empirical results, included additional architectures, and added a zero-shot baseline
comments: Updated empirical results, included additional architectures, and added a zero-shot baseline
abstract: The prevalence of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems in spoken language applications has increased significantly in recent years. Notably, many African languages lack sufficient linguistic resources to support the robustness of these systems. This paper focuses on the development of an end-to-end speech recognition system customized for Nigerian Pidgin English. We investigated and evaluated different pretrained state-of-the-art architectures on a new dataset. Our empirical results demonstrate a notable performance of the variant Wav2Vec2 XLSR-53 on our dataset, achieving a word error rate (WER) of 29.6% on the test set, surpassing other architectures such as NEMO QUARTZNET and Wav2Vec2.0 BASE-100H in quantitative assessments. Additionally, we demonstrate that pretrained state-of-the-art architectures do not work well out-of-the-box. We performed zero-shot evaluation using XLSR-English as the baseline, chosen for its similarity to Nigerian Pidgin. This yielded a higher WER of 73.7%. By adapting this architecture to nuances represented in our dataset, we reduce error by 59.84%. Our dataset comprises 4,288 recorded utterances from 10 native speakers, partitioned into training, validation, and test sets. This study underscores the potential for improving ASR systems for under-resourced languages like Nigerian Pidgin English, contributing to greater inclusion in speech technology applications. We publicly release our unique parallel dataset (speech-to-text) on Nigerian Pidgin, as well as the model weights on Hugging Face. Our code would be made available to foster future research from the community.

Additionally, we demonstrate that pretrained state-of-the-art architectures do not work well out-of-the-box. We performed zero-shot evaluation using XLSR-English as the baseline, chosen for its similarity to Nigerian Pidgin. This yielded a higher WER of 73.7%. By adapting this architecture to nuances represented in our dataset, we reduce error by 59.84%. Our dataset comprises 4,288 recorded utterances from 10 native speakers, partitioned into training, validation, and test sets. We publicly release our unique parallel dataset (speech-to-text) on Nigerian Pidgin, as well as the model weights on Hugging Face. Our code would be made available to foster future research from the community.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自动语音识别（ASR）系统在口语应用中的普及率显着增加。值得注意的是，许多非洲语言缺乏足够的语言资源来支持这些系统的稳健性。本文重点介绍为尼日利亚洋泾浜英语定制的端到端语音识别系统的开发。我们在新数据集上研究并评估了不同的预训练最先进架构。我们的实证结果表明，变体 Wav2Vec2 XLSR-53 在我们的数据集上表现出色，在测试集上实现了 29.6% 的字错误率 (WER)，在定量评估中超越了 NEMO QUARTZNET 和 Wav2Vec2.0 BASE-100H 等其他架构。此外，我们还证明了经过预训练的最先进架构并不能很好地开箱即用。我们使用 XLSR-English 作为基线进行零样本评估，之所以选择它是因为它与尼日利亚洋泾浜语相似。这产生了 73.7% 的更高 WER。通过调整此架构以适应数据集中呈现的细微差别，我们将错误减少了 59.84%。我们的数据集包含 10 位母语人士的 4,288 条录制的话语，分为训练集、验证集和测试集。这项研究强调了改进尼日利亚洋泾浜英语等资源匮乏语言的 ASR 系统的潜力，有助于更大程度地融入语音技术应用。我们在尼日利亚洋泾浜上公开发布了我们独特的并行数据集（语音到文本），以及 Hugging Face 上的模型权重。我们的代码将被提供以促进社区未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种端到端的自动语音识别（ASR）系统，专门针对尼日利亚皮钦语进行定制。
AI.motivation: 由于许多非洲语言缺乏足够的语言资源，现有的ASR系统难以支持这些语言的鲁棒性。尼日利亚皮钦语作为资源匮乏语言，亟需针对性的ASR解决方案以提升包容性。
AI.method: 在新数据集上评估了多种预训练的前沿架构（如Wav2Vec2 XLSR-53、NEMO QUARTZNET等），通过零样本测试（以XLSR-English为基线）和微调优化模型，最终发布数据集及模型权重。
AI.result: Wav2Vec2 XLSR-53在测试集上达到29.6%的词错误率（WER），优于其他架构；通过适配数据集，将零样本基线错误率降低59.84%。数据集包含4,288条母语者语音记录。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了预训练模型在资源匮乏语言中的潜力，通过数据集和模型的公开，为未来尼日利亚皮钦语及其他低资源语言的ASR研究提供了基础支持。

This study underscores the potential for improving ASR systems for under-resourced languages like Nigerian Pidgin English, contributing to greater inclusion in speech technology applications. We publicly release our unique parallel dataset (speech-to-text) on Nigerian Pidgin, as well as the model weights on Hugging Face. Our code would be made available to foster future research from the community. 近年来，自动语音识别（ASR）系统在口语应用中的普及率显着增加。值得注意的是，许多非洲语言缺乏足够的语言资源来支持这些系统的稳健性。本文重点介绍为尼日利亚洋泾浜英语定制的端到端语音识别系统的开发。我们在新数据集上研究并评估了不同的预训练最先进架构。我们的实证结果表明，变体 Wav2Vec2 XLSR-53 在我们的数据集上表现出色，在测试集上实现了 29.6% 的字错误率 (WER)，在定量评估中超越了 NEMO QUARTZNET 和 Wav2Vec2.0 BASE-100H 等其他架构。此外，我们还证明了经过预训练的最先进架构并不能很好地开箱即用。我们使用 XLSR-English 作为基线进行零样本评估，之所以选择它是因为它与尼日利亚洋泾浜语相似。这产生了 73.7% 的更高 WER。通过调整此架构以适应数据集中呈现的细微差别，我们将错误减少了 59.84%。我们的数据集包含 10 位母语人士的 4,288 条录制的话语，分为训练集、验证集和测试集。这项研究强调了改进尼日利亚洋泾浜英语等资源匮乏语言的 ASR 系统的潜力，有助于更大程度地融入语音技术应用。我们在尼日利亚洋泾浜上公开发布了我们独特的并行数据集（语音到文本），以及 Hugging Face 上的模型权重。我们的代码将被提供以促进社区未来的研究。 本文旨在开发一种端到端的自动语音识别（ASR）系统，专门针对尼日利亚皮钦语进行定制。 Amina Mardiyyah Rufai,Afolabi Abeeb,Esther Oduntan,Tayo Arulogun,Oluwabukola Adegboro,Daniel Ajisafe eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD

title: One Model to Reconstruct Them All: A Novel Way to Use the Stochastic Noise in StyleGAN
title_zh: 一个模型可以重建所有这些：一种在 StyleGAN 中使用随机噪声的新方法
comment: Code and Models are available at https://github.com/Bartzi/one-model-to-reconstruct-them-all
comments: Code and Models are available at https://github.com/Bartzi/one-model-to-reconstruct-them-all
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance for several image generation and manipulation tasks. Different works have improved the limited understanding of the latent space of GANs by embedding images into specific GAN architectures to reconstruct the original images. We present a novel StyleGAN-based autoencoder architecture, which can reconstruct images with very high quality across several data domains. We demonstrate a previously unknown grade of generalizablility by training the encoder and decoder independently and on different datasets. Furthermore, we provide new insights about the significance and capabilities of noise inputs of the well-known StyleGAN architecture. Our proposed architecture can handle up to 40 images per second on a single GPU, which is approximately 28x faster than previous approaches. Finally, our model also shows promising results, when compared to the state-of-the-art on the image denoising task, although it was not explicitly designed for this task.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance for several image generation and manipulation tasks. Different works have improved the limited understanding of the latent space of GANs by embedding images into specific GAN architectures to reconstruct the original images. We present a novel StyleGAN-based autoencoder architecture, which can reconstruct images with very high quality across several data domains. We demonstrate a previously unknown grade of generalizablility by training the encoder and decoder independently and on different datasets. Furthermore, we provide new insights about the significance and capabilities of noise inputs of the well-known StyleGAN architecture. Our proposed architecture can handle up to 40 images per second on a single GPU, which is approximately 28x faster than previous approaches. Finally, our model also shows promising results, when compared to the state-of-the-art on the image denoising task, although it was not explicitly designed for this task.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络 (GAN) 在多个图像生成和操作任务中取得了最先进的性能。不同的工作通过将图像嵌入到特定的 GAN 架构中来重建原始图像，改善了对 GAN 潜在空间的有限理解。我们提出了一种新颖的基于 StyleGAN 的自动编码器架构，它可以跨多个数据域重建高质量的图像。我们通过在不同的数据集上独立训练编码器和解码器来展示以前未知的通用性等级。此外，我们还提供了关于著名 StyleGAN 架构的噪声输入的重要性和功能的新见解。我们提出的架构可以在单个 GPU 上每秒处理多达 40 个图像，这比以前的方法快大约 28 倍。最后，与图像去噪任务的最新技术相比，我们的模型也显示出了有希望的结果，尽管它没有专门为该任务设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于StyleGAN的自编码器架构，能够跨多个数据域以高精度重建图像，并探索了StyleGAN中随机噪声的作用。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN模型对潜在空间的理解有限，且未充分利用StyleGAN的噪声输入能力，限制了其在图像重建和生成任务中的应用。
AI.method: 设计独立训练的编码器和解码器，分别在不同数据集上训练，结合StyleGAN的噪声输入机制，实现跨域图像重建。
AI.result: 模型在单GPU上实现每秒40张图像的重建速度（较之前方法快28倍），并在图像去噪任务中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为利用StyleGAN噪声提供了新视角，展示了模型在跨域重建和去噪任务中的广泛适用性。

authors_text: Weikai Tan,Dedong Zhang,Lingfei Ma,Ying Li,Lanying Wang,Jonathan Li
title: UAV LiDAR Point Cloud Segmentation of A Stack Interchange with Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 无人机 LiDAR 堆栈交换点云分割与深度神经网络
abstract: Stack interchanges are essential components of transportation systems. Mobile laser scanning (MLS) systems have been widely used in road infrastructure mapping, but accurate mapping of complicated multi-layer stack interchanges are still challenging. This study examined the point clouds collected by a new Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) system to perform the semantic segmentation task of a stack interchange. An end-to-end supervised 3D deep learning framework was proposed to classify the point clouds. The proposed method has proven to capture 3D features in complicated interchange scenarios with stacked convolution and the result achieved over 93% classification accuracy. In addition, the new low-cost semi-solid-state LiDAR sensor Livox Mid-40 featuring a incommensurable rosette scanning pattern has demonstrated its potential in high-definition urban mapping.
summary: Stack interchanges are essential components of transportation systems. Mobile laser scanning (MLS) systems have been widely used in road infrastructure mapping, but accurate mapping of complicated multi-layer stack interchanges are still challenging. This study examined the point clouds collected by a new Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) system to perform the semantic segmentation task of a stack interchange. An end-to-end supervised 3D deep learning framework was proposed to classify the point clouds. The proposed method has proven to capture 3D features in complicated interchange scenarios with stacked convolution and the result achieved over 93% classification accuracy. In addition, the new low-cost semi-solid-state LiDAR sensor Livox Mid-40 featuring a incommensurable rosette scanning pattern has demonstrated its potential in high-definition urban mapping.
abstract_zh: 堆栈交换站是运输系统的重要组成部分。移动激光扫描（MLS）系统已广泛应用于道路基础设施测绘，但复杂的多层堆栈交换的精确测绘仍然具有挑战性。本研究检查了新型无人机 (UAV) 光探测和测距 (LiDAR) 系统收集的点云，以执行堆栈交换的语义分割任务。提出了一种端到端监督 3D 深度学习框架来对点云进行分类。事实证明，所提出的方法可以通过堆叠卷积在复杂的交换场景中捕获 3D 特征，并且结果实现了超过 93% 的分类准确率。此外，新型低成本半固态激光雷达传感器Livox Mid-40具有不可通约的玫瑰花扫描模式，展示了其在高清城市测绘中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文利用无人机激光雷达点云数据和深度神经网络对复杂立交桥进行语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有移动激光扫描系统在映射复杂多层立交桥时存在挑战，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出端到端监督的3D深度学习框架，结合堆叠卷积网络处理点云数据。
AI.result: 分类准确率超过93%，验证了Livox Mid-40传感器在高精度城市测绘中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了复杂立交桥点云分割问题，低成半固态LiDAR传感器具备应用前景。

title: WaveTransformer: A Novel Architecture for Audio Captioning Based on Learning Temporal and Time-Frequency Information
title_zh: WaveTransformer：一种基于学习时间和时频信息的新型音频字幕架构
abstract: Automated audio captioning (AAC) is a novel task, where a method takes as an input an audio sample and outputs a textual description (i.e. a caption) of its contents. Most AAC methods are adapted from from image captioning of machine translation fields. In this work we present a novel AAC novel method, explicitly focused on the exploitation of the temporal and time-frequency patterns in audio. We employ three learnable processes for audio encoding, two for extracting the local and temporal information, and one to merge the output of the previous two processes. To generate the caption, we employ the widely used Transformer decoder. We assess our method utilizing the freely available splits of Clotho dataset. Our results increase previously reported highest SPIDEr to 17.3, from 16.2.
summary: Automated audio captioning (AAC) is a novel task, where a method takes as an input an audio sample and outputs a textual description (i.e. a caption) of its contents. Most AAC methods are adapted from from image captioning of machine translation fields. In this work we present a novel AAC novel method, explicitly focused on the exploitation of the temporal and time-frequency patterns in audio. We employ three learnable processes for audio encoding, two for extracting the local and temporal information, and one to merge the output of the previous two processes. To generate the caption, we employ the widely used Transformer decoder. We assess our method utilizing the freely available splits of Clotho dataset. Our results increase previously reported highest SPIDEr to 17.3, from 16.2.
abstract_zh: 自动音频字幕（AAC）是一项新颖的任务，其中一种方法将音频样本作为输入并输出其内容的文本描述（即字幕）。大多数 AAC 方法改编自机器翻译领域的图像字幕。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 AAC 新颖方法，明确关注音频中时间和时频模式的利用。我们采用三个可学习的过程进行音频编码，两个用于提取局部和时间信息，一个用于合并前两个过程的输出。为了生成标题，我们采用了广泛使用的 Transformer 解码器。我们利用 Clotho 数据集的免费可用分割来评估我们的方法。我们的结果将之前报告的最高 SPIDEr 从 16.2 提高到 17.3。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型音频字幕生成架构WaveTransformer，通过学习音频的时序和时频信息来生成文本描述。
AI.motivation: 现有音频字幕方法多借鉴图像字幕和机器翻译技术，未能充分挖掘音频特有的时序与时频特征，限制了生成效果。
AI.method: 采用三阶段可学习编码过程：分别提取局部与时序信息后融合特征，最终通过Transformer解码器生成字幕。
AI.result: 在Clotho数据集上将SPIDEr指标从16.2提升至17.3，达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模音频时序与时频特征，该方法有效提升了音频字幕生成质量。

motivation: 现有音频字幕方法多借鉴图像字幕和机器翻译技术，未能充分挖掘音频特有的时序与时频特征，限制了生成效果。
method: 采用三阶段可学习编码过程：分别提取局部与时序信息后融合特征，最终通过Transformer解码器生成字幕。
result: 在Clotho数据集上将SPIDEr指标从16.2提升至17.3，达到当时最优性能。
conclusion: 通过显式建模音频时序与时频特征，该方法有效提升了音频字幕生成质量。
search_text: WaveTransformer: A Novel Architecture for Audio Captioning Based on Learning Temporal and Time-Frequency Information WaveTransformer：一种基于学习时间和时频信息的新型音频字幕架构 Automated audio captioning (AAC) is a novel task, where a method takes as an input an audio sample and outputs a textual description (i.e. a caption) of its contents. Most AAC methods are adapted from from image captioning of machine translation fields. In this work we present a novel AAC novel method, explicitly focused on the exploitation of the temporal and time-frequency patterns in audio. We employ three learnable processes for audio encoding, two for extracting the local and temporal information, and one to merge the output of the previous two processes. To generate the caption, we employ the widely used Transformer decoder. We assess our method utilizing the freely available splits of Clotho dataset. Our results increase previously reported highest SPIDEr to 17.3, from 16.2. 自动音频字幕（AAC）是一项新颖的任务，其中一种方法将音频样本作为输入并输出其内容的文本描述（即字幕）。大多数 AAC 方法改编自机器翻译领域的图像字幕。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 AAC 新颖方法，明确关注音频中时间和时频模式的利用。我们采用三个可学习的过程进行音频编码，两个用于提取局部和时间信息，一个用于合并前两个过程的输出。为了生成标题，我们采用了广泛使用的 Transformer 解码器。我们利用 Clotho 数据集的免费可用分割来评估我们的方法。我们的结果将之前报告的最高 SPIDEr 从 16.2 提高到 17.3。 本文提出一种新型音频字幕生成架构WaveTransformer，通过学习音频的时序和时频信息来生成文本描述。 An Tran,Konstantinos Drossos,Tuomas Virtanen cs.SD,cs.LG,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Amr Alanwar,Victor Gassmann,Xingkang He,Hazem Said,Henrik Sandberg,Karl Henrik Johansson,Matthias Althoff
title: Privacy Preserving Set-Based Estimation Using Partially Homomorphic Encryption
title_zh: 使用部分同态加密的基于隐私保护集的估计
comment: This paper is accepted at the European Journal of Control
comments: This paper is accepted at the European Journal of Control
abstract: The set-based estimation has gained a lot of attention due to its ability to guarantee state enclosures for safety-critical systems. However, collecting measurements from distributed sensors often requires outsourcing the set-based operations to an aggregator node, raising many privacy concerns. To address this problem, we present set-based estimation protocols using partially homomorphic encryption that preserve the privacy of the measurements and sets bounding the estimates. We consider a linear discrete-time dynamical system with bounded modeling and measurement uncertainties. Sets are represented by zonotopes and constrained zonotopes as they can compactly represent high-dimensional sets and are closed under linear maps and Minkowski addition. By selectively encrypting parameters of the set representations, we establish the notion of encrypted sets and intersect sets in the encrypted domain, which enables guaranteed state estimation while ensuring privacy. In particular, we show that our protocols achieve computational privacy using the cryptographic notion of computational indistinguishability. We demonstrate the efficiency of our approach by localizing a real mobile quadcopter using ultra-wideband wireless devices.
summary: The set-based estimation has gained a lot of attention due to its ability to guarantee state enclosures for safety-critical systems. However, collecting measurements from distributed sensors often requires outsourcing the set-based operations to an aggregator node, raising many privacy concerns. To address this problem, we present set-based estimation protocols using partially homomorphic encryption that preserve the privacy of the measurements and sets bounding the estimates. We consider a linear discrete-time dynamical system with bounded modeling and measurement uncertainties. Sets are represented by zonotopes and constrained zonotopes as they can compactly represent high-dimensional sets and are closed under linear maps and Minkowski addition. By selectively encrypting parameters of the set representations, we establish the notion of encrypted sets and intersect sets in the encrypted domain, which enables guaranteed state estimation while ensuring privacy. In particular, we show that our protocols achieve computational privacy using the cryptographic notion of computational indistinguishability. We demonstrate the efficiency of our approach by localizing a real mobile quadcopter using ultra-wideband wireless devices.
abstract_zh: 基于集合的估计由于其能够保证安全关键系统的状态范围而受到广泛关注。然而，从分布式传感器收集测量结果通常需要将基于集合的操作外包给聚合器节点，从而引发许多隐私问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了使用部分同态加密的基于集合的估计协议，该协议可以保护测量的隐私和限制估计的集合。我们考虑具有有限建模和测量不确定性的线性离散时间动力系统。集合由区域同位素和约束区域同位素表示，因为它们可以紧凑地表示高维集合，并且在线性映射和闵可夫斯基加法下是封闭的。通过选择性地加密集合表示的参数，我们在加密域中建立了加密集合和相交集合的概念，这使得在保证隐私的同时能够保证状态估计。特别是，我们表明我们的协议使用计算不可区分性的加密概念来实现计算隐私。我们通过使用超宽带无线设备本地化真实的移动四轴飞行器来展示我们方法的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于部分同态加密的集合估计协议，以保护分布式传感器测量数据和估计集的隐私。
AI.motivation: 集合估计在安全关键系统中广泛应用，但需将操作外包给聚合节点时存在隐私泄露风险，亟需在保证估计精度的同时保护数据隐私。
AI.method: 采用部分同态加密技术，通过加密集合表示参数实现加密域内集合交集运算，利用zonotope和约束zonotope表示高维集合，确保计算过程隐私性。
AI.result: 在真实四旋翼无人机定位实验中验证了方法的有效性，证明其能实现隐私保护下的高效状态估计。
AI.conclusion: 该协议通过计算不可区分性保障隐私，为分布式安全关键系统提供了兼顾隐私与估计精度的解决方案。

authors_text: Michał Stypułkowski,Kacper Kania,Maciej Zamorski,Maciej Zięba,Tomasz Trzciński,Jan Chorowski
title: Representing Point Clouds with Generative Conditional Invertible Flow Networks
title_zh: 用生成条件可逆流网络表示点云
abstract: In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method to represent point clouds as sets of samples drawn from a cloud-specific probability distribution. This interpretation matches intrinsic characteristics of point clouds: the number of points and their ordering within a cloud is not important as all points are drawn from the proximity of the object boundary. We postulate to represent each cloud as a parameterized probability distribution defined by a generative neural network. Once trained, such a model provides a natural framework for point cloud manipulation operations, such as aligning a new cloud into a default spatial orientation. To exploit similarities between same-class objects and to improve model performance, we turn to weight sharing: networks that model densities of points belonging to objects in the same family share all parameters with the exception of a small, object-specific embedding vector. We show that these embedding vectors capture semantic relationships between objects. Our method leverages generative invertible flow networks to learn embeddings as well as to generate point clouds. Thanks to this formulation and contrary to similar approaches, we are able to train our model in an end-to-end fashion. As a result, our model offers competitive or superior quantitative results on benchmark datasets, while enabling unprecedented capabilities to perform cloud manipulation tasks, such as point cloud registration and regeneration, by a generative network.
summary: In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method to represent point clouds as sets of samples drawn from a cloud-specific probability distribution. This interpretation matches intrinsic characteristics of point clouds: the number of points and their ordering within a cloud is not important as all points are drawn from the proximity of the object boundary. We postulate to represent each cloud as a parameterized probability distribution defined by a generative neural network. Once trained, such a model provides a natural framework for point cloud manipulation operations, such as aligning a new cloud into a default spatial orientation. To exploit similarities between same-class objects and to improve model performance, we turn to weight sharing: networks that model densities of points belonging to objects in the same family share all parameters with the exception of a small, object-specific embedding vector. We show that these embedding vectors capture semantic relationships between objects. Our method leverages generative invertible flow networks to learn embeddings as well as to generate point clouds. Thanks to this formulation and contrary to similar approaches, we are able to train our model in an end-to-end fashion. As a result, our model offers competitive or superior quantitative results on benchmark datasets, while enabling unprecedented capabilities to perform cloud manipulation tasks, such as point cloud registration and regeneration, by a generative network.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，将点云表示为从特定于云的概率分布中抽取的样本集。这种解释符合点云的内在特征：云中点的数量及其顺序并不重要，因为所有点都是从对象边界附近绘制的。我们假设将每个云表示为由生成神经网络定义的参数化概率分布。一旦经过训练，这样的模型就为点云操作操作提供了一个自然的框架，例如将新的云对齐到默认的空间方向。为了利用同类对象之间的相似性并提高模型性能，我们转向权重共享：对属于同一族中的对象的点密度进行建模的网络共享所有参数，除了一个小的、特定于对象的嵌入向量之外。我们证明这些嵌入向量捕获对象之间的语义关系。我们的方法利用生成可逆流网络来学习嵌入并生成点云。由于这种表述并且与类似方法相反，我们能够以端到端的方式训练我们的模型。因此，我们的模型在基准数据集上提供了具有竞争力或卓越的定量结果，同时实现了前所未有的能力来执行云操作任务，例如通过生成网络进行点云注册和再生。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成式条件可逆流网络的点云表示方法，通过概率分布建模实现点云生成与操作。
AI.motivation: 传统点云处理方法难以有效捕捉点云的分布特性及语义关系，需开发能利用概率建模与参数共享的新型表示框架。
AI.method: 使用生成神经网络参数化点云概率分布，结合权重共享机制与对象特异性嵌入向量，通过可逆流网络实现端到端训练与点云生成。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上取得竞争性定量结果，支持点云配准、再生等复杂操作，嵌入向量有效捕捉物体语义关系。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为点云表示与操作提供了高效框架，在生成质量与功能灵活性上优于现有技术。

title: Adaptive Pixel-wise Structured Sparse Network for Efficient CNNs
title_zh: 用于高效 CNN 的自适应像素级结构化稀疏网络
abstract: To accelerate deep CNN models, this paper proposes a novel spatially adaptive framework that can dynamically generate pixel-wise sparsity according to the input image. The sparse scheme is pixel-wise refined, regional adaptive under a unified importance map, which makes it friendly to hardware implementation. A sparse controlling method is further presented to enable online adjustment for applications with different precision/latency requirements. The sparse model is applicable to a wide range of vision tasks. Experimental results show that this method efficiently improve the computing efficiency for both image classification using ResNet-18 and super resolution using SRResNet. On image classification task, our method can save 30%-70% MACs with a slightly drop in top-1 and top-5 accuracy. On super resolution task, our method can reduce more than 90% MACs while only causing around 0.1 dB and 0.01 decreasing in PSNR and SSIM. Hardware validation is also included.
summary: To accelerate deep CNN models, this paper proposes a novel spatially adaptive framework that can dynamically generate pixel-wise sparsity according to the input image. The sparse scheme is pixel-wise refined, regional adaptive under a unified importance map, which makes it friendly to hardware implementation. A sparse controlling method is further presented to enable online adjustment for applications with different precision/latency requirements. The sparse model is applicable to a wide range of vision tasks. Experimental results show that this method efficiently improve the computing efficiency for both image classification using ResNet-18 and super resolution using SRResNet. On image classification task, our method can save 30%-70% MACs with a slightly drop in top-1 and top-5 accuracy. On super resolution task, our method can reduce more than 90% MACs while only causing around 0.1 dB and 0.01 decreasing in PSNR and SSIM. Hardware validation is also included.
abstract_zh: 为了加速深度 CNN 模型，本文提出了一种新颖的空间自适应框架，可以根据输入图像动态生成像素稀疏性。稀疏方案在统一的重要性图下进行像素级细化、区域自适应，这使得它对硬件实现友好。进一步提出了稀疏控制方法，以便能够针对具有不同精度/延迟要求的应用进行在线调整。稀疏模型适用于广泛的视觉任务。实验结果表明，该方法有效提高了使用ResNet-18的图像分类和使用SRResNet的超分辨率的计算效率。在图像分类任务中，我们的方法可以节省 30%-70% 的 MAC，但 top-1 和 top-5 的准确率略有下降。在超分辨率任务中，我们的方法可以减少 90% 以上的 MAC，同时仅导致 PSNR 和 SSIM 下降约 0.1 dB 和 0.01。还包括硬件验证。

AI.motivation: 现有CNN模型计算量大，需在保持精度的前提下提升效率并适应不同硬件需求。
AI.method: 设计空间自适应框架生成像素级稀疏性，结合区域自适应重要性图，并引入在线调整的稀疏控制方法。
AI.result: 图像分类任务节省30%-70% MACs（精度微降），超分辨率任务减少超90% MACs（PSNR/SSIM下降约0.1dB/0.01），通过硬件验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升CNN计算效率，适用于多类视觉任务且具备硬件友好性。

search_text: Adaptive Pixel-wise Structured Sparse Network for Efficient CNNs 用于高效 CNN 的自适应像素级结构化稀疏网络 To accelerate deep CNN models, this paper proposes a novel spatially adaptive framework that can dynamically generate pixel-wise sparsity according to the input image. The sparse scheme is pixel-wise refined, regional adaptive under a unified importance map, which makes it friendly to hardware implementation. A sparse controlling method is further presented to enable online adjustment for applications with different precision/latency requirements. The sparse model is applicable to a wide range of vision tasks. Experimental results show that this method efficiently improve the computing efficiency for both image classification using ResNet-18 and super resolution using SRResNet. On image classification task, our method can save 30%-70% MACs with a slightly drop in top-1 and top-5 accuracy. On super resolution task, our method can reduce more than 90% MACs while only causing around 0.1 dB and 0.01 decreasing in PSNR and SSIM. Hardware validation is also included. 为了加速深度 CNN 模型，本文提出了一种新颖的空间自适应框架，可以根据输入图像动态生成像素稀疏性。稀疏方案在统一的重要性图下进行像素级细化、区域自适应，这使得它对硬件实现友好。进一步提出了稀疏控制方法，以便能够针对具有不同精度/延迟要求的应用进行在线调整。稀疏模型适用于广泛的视觉任务。实验结果表明，该方法有效提高了使用ResNet-18的图像分类和使用SRResNet的超分辨率的计算效率。在图像分类任务中，我们的方法可以节省 30%-70% 的 MAC，但 top-1 和 top-5 的准确率略有下降。在超分辨率任务中，我们的方法可以减少 90% 以上的 MAC，同时仅导致 PSNR 和 SSIM 下降约 0.1 dB 和 0.01。还包括硬件验证。 本文提出一种自适应像素级结构稀疏网络，通过动态生成像素稀疏性以加速深度CNN模型。 Chen Tang,Wenyu Sun,Zhuqing Yuan,Yongpan Liu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Haley G. Abramson,Dan M. Popescu,Rebecca Yu,Changxin Lai,Julie K. Shade,Katherine C. Wu,Mauro Maggioni,Natalia A. Trayanova
title: Anatomically-Informed Deep Learning on Contrast-Enhanced Cardiac MRI for Scar Segmentation and Clinical Feature Extraction
title_zh: 对比增强心脏 MRI 的解剖学深度学习用于疤痕分割和临床特征提取
comment: Haley G. Abramson and Dan M. Popescu contributed equally to this work
comments: Haley G. Abramson and Dan M. Popescu contributed equally to this work
abstract: Visualizing disease-induced scarring and fibrosis in the heart on cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) imaging with contrast enhancement (LGE) is paramount in characterizing disease progression and quantifying pathophysiological substrates of arrhythmias. However, segmentation and scar/fibrosis identification from LGE-CMR is an intensive manual process prone to large inter-observer variability. Here, we present a novel fully-automated anatomically-informed deep learning solution for left ventricle (LV) and scar/fibrosis segmentation and clinical feature extraction from LGE-CMR. The technology involves three cascading convolutional neural networks that segment myocardium and scar/fibrosis from raw LGE-CMR images and constrain these segmentations within anatomical guidelines, thus facilitating seamless derivation of clinically-significant parameters. In addition to available LGE-CMR images, training used "LGE-like" synthetically enhanced cine scans. Results show excellent agreement with those of trained experts in terms of segmentation (balanced accuracy of $96\%$ and $75\%$ for LV and scar segmentation), clinical features ($2\%$ difference in mean scar-to-LV wall volume fraction), and anatomical fidelity. Our segmentation technology is extendable to other computer vision medical applications and to problems requiring guidelines adherence of predicted outputs.
summary: Visualizing disease-induced scarring and fibrosis in the heart on cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) imaging with contrast enhancement (LGE) is paramount in characterizing disease progression and quantifying pathophysiological substrates of arrhythmias. However, segmentation and scar/fibrosis identification from LGE-CMR is an intensive manual process prone to large inter-observer variability. Here, we present a novel fully-automated anatomically-informed deep learning solution for left ventricle (LV) and scar/fibrosis segmentation and clinical feature extraction from LGE-CMR. The technology involves three cascading convolutional neural networks that segment myocardium and scar/fibrosis from raw LGE-CMR images and constrain these segmentations within anatomical guidelines, thus facilitating seamless derivation of clinically-significant parameters. In addition to available LGE-CMR images, training used "LGE-like" synthetically enhanced cine scans. Results show excellent agreement with those of trained experts in terms of segmentation (balanced accuracy of $96\%$ and $75\%$ for LV and scar segmentation), clinical features ($2\%$ difference in mean scar-to-LV wall volume fraction), and anatomical fidelity. Our segmentation technology is extendable to other computer vision medical applications and to problems requiring guidelines adherence of predicted outputs.
abstract_zh: 通过心脏磁共振 (CMR) 成像和对比增强 (LGE) 可视化疾病引起的心脏疤痕和纤维化对于表征疾病进展和量化心律失常的病理生理学基础至关重要。然而，LGE-CMR 的分割和疤痕/纤维化识别是一个密集的手动过程，容易出现较大的观察者间差异。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的全自动解剖学深度学习解决方案，用于左心室 (LV) 和疤痕/纤维化分割以及从 LGE-CMR 提取临床特征。该技术涉及三个级联卷积神经网络，可从原始 LGE-CMR 图像中分割心肌和疤痕/纤维化，并将这些分割限制在解剖指南内，从而促进临床重要参数的无缝推导。除了可用的 LGE-CMR 图像之外，训练还使用了“类似 LGE”的综合增强电影扫描。结果显示，在分割（左心室和疤痕分割的平衡准确度为 $96\%$ 和 $75\%$）、临床特征（平均疤痕与左心室壁体积分数的差异为 $2\%$）和解剖保真度方面，与训练有素的专家的结果非常一致。我们的分割技术可扩展到其他计算机视觉医学应用以及需要遵循预测输出指南的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于解剖学信息的深度学习方法，用于增强型心脏MRI的瘢痕分割和临床特征提取。
AI.motivation: 手动分割和识别增强型心脏MRI中的瘢痕/纤维化区域耗时且存在较大观察者间差异，需开发自动化解决方案以提高效率和一致性。
AI.method: 采用三个级联卷积神经网络（CNN）从原始增强MRI图像中分割心肌和瘢痕/纤维化区域，并通过解剖学约束确保分割准确性；训练数据包括实际LGE-CMR图像和合成的'LGE-like'动态扫描图像。
AI.result: 分割结果与专家标注达成高度一致（左心室分割平衡准确率96%，瘢痕分割75%），临床特征差异仅为2%（瘢痕与左心室壁体积比均值差异），解剖学保真度良好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在瘢痕分割和临床特征提取中表现优异，可扩展至其他医学计算机视觉任务及需遵循输出规范的场景。

title: SyDeBO: Symbolic-Decision-Embedded Bilevel Optimization for Long-Horizon Manipulation in Dynamic Environments
title_zh: SyDeBO：动态环境中长视野操纵的符号决策嵌入式双层优化
comment: 9 pages, 11 figures, submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: 9 pages, 11 figures, submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: This study proposes a Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) method with symbolic decisions embedded in a bilevel optimization. This TAMP method exploits the discrete structure of sequential manipulation for long-horizon and versatile tasks in dynamically changing environments. At the symbolic planning level, we propose a scalable decision-making method for long-horizon manipulation tasks using the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) with causal graph decomposition. At the motion planning level, we devise a trajectory optimization (TO) approach based on the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM), suitable for solving constrained, large-scale nonlinear optimization in a distributed manner. Distinct from conventional geometric motion planners, our approach generates highly dynamic manipulation motions by incorporating the full robot and object dynamics. Furthermore, in lieu of a hierarchical planning approach, we solve a holistically integrated bilevel optimization problem involving costs from both the low-level TO and the high-level search. Simulation and experimental results demonstrate dynamic manipulation for long-horizon object sorting tasks in clutter and on a moving conveyor belt.
summary: This study proposes a Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) method with symbolic decisions embedded in a bilevel optimization. This TAMP method exploits the discrete structure of sequential manipulation for long-horizon and versatile tasks in dynamically changing environments. At the symbolic planning level, we propose a scalable decision-making method for long-horizon manipulation tasks using the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) with causal graph decomposition. At the motion planning level, we devise a trajectory optimization (TO) approach based on the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM), suitable for solving constrained, large-scale nonlinear optimization in a distributed manner. Distinct from conventional geometric motion planners, our approach generates highly dynamic manipulation motions by incorporating the full robot and object dynamics. Furthermore, in lieu of a hierarchical planning approach, we solve a holistically integrated bilevel optimization problem involving costs from both the low-level TO and the high-level search. Simulation and experimental results demonstrate dynamic manipulation for long-horizon object sorting tasks in clutter and on a moving conveyor belt.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种任务和运动规划（TAMP）方法，该方法将符号决策嵌入双层优化中。这种 TAMP 方法利用顺序操作的离散结构，在动态变化的环境中执行长期和多功能任务。在符号规划层面，我们使用规划域定义语言（PDDL）和因果图分解，提出了一种用于长期操作任务的可扩展决策方法。在运动规划层面，我们设计了一种基于乘子交替方向法（ADMM）的轨迹优化（TO）方法，适用于以分布式方式求解受约束的大规模非线性优化。与传统的几何运动规划器不同，我们的方法通过结合完整的机器人和物体动力学来生成高度动态的操纵运动。此外，我们代替分层规划方法，解决了一个整体集成的双层优化问题，涉及低级 TO 和高级搜索的成本。仿真和实验结果证明了在杂乱和移动传送带上进行长视野物体分类任务的动态操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种嵌入符号决策的双层优化方法SyDeBO，用于解决动态环境中的长期操作任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效处理动态环境中的长期复杂任务，需整合符号规划与运动规划以应对约束和不确定性。
AI.method: 在符号规划层使用PDDL与因果图分解实现可扩展决策，在运动规划层采用ADMM轨迹优化，通过双层优化整合高低层成本。
AI.result: 仿真与实验验证了方法在杂乱环境及移动传送带上的长期物体排序任务中的动态操作有效性。
AI.conclusion: SyDeBO通过统一优化框架实现了符号决策与运动规划的高效协同，为动态环境长期任务提供新解决方案。

search_text: SyDeBO: Symbolic-Decision-Embedded Bilevel Optimization for Long-Horizon Manipulation in Dynamic Environments SyDeBO：动态环境中长视野操纵的符号决策嵌入式双层优化 This study proposes a Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) method with symbolic decisions embedded in a bilevel optimization. This TAMP method exploits the discrete structure of sequential manipulation for long-horizon and versatile tasks in dynamically changing environments. At the symbolic planning level, we propose a scalable decision-making method for long-horizon manipulation tasks using the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) with causal graph decomposition. At the motion planning level, we devise a trajectory optimization (TO) approach based on the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM), suitable for solving constrained, large-scale nonlinear optimization in a distributed manner. Distinct from conventional geometric motion planners, our approach generates highly dynamic manipulation motions by incorporating the full robot and object dynamics. Furthermore, in lieu of a hierarchical planning approach, we solve a holistically integrated bilevel optimization problem involving costs from both the low-level TO and the high-level search. Simulation and experimental results demonstrate dynamic manipulation for long-horizon object sorting tasks in clutter and on a moving conveyor belt. 本研究提出了一种任务和运动规划（TAMP）方法，该方法将符号决策嵌入双层优化中。这种 TAMP 方法利用顺序操作的离散结构，在动态变化的环境中执行长期和多功能任务。在符号规划层面，我们使用规划域定义语言（PDDL）和因果图分解，提出了一种用于长期操作任务的可扩展决策方法。在运动规划层面，我们设计了一种基于乘子交替方向法（ADMM）的轨迹优化（TO）方法，适用于以分布式方式求解受约束的大规模非线性优化。与传统的几何运动规划器不同，我们的方法通过结合完整的机器人和物体动力学来生成高度动态的操纵运动。此外，我们代替分层规划方法，解决了一个整体集成的双层优化问题，涉及低级 TO 和高级搜索的成本。仿真和实验结果证明了在杂乱和移动传送带上进行长视野物体分类任务的动态操作。 本文提出一种嵌入符号决策的双层优化方法SyDeBO，用于解决动态环境中的长期操作任务。 Zhigen Zhao,Ziyi Zhou,Michael Park,Ye Zhao cs.RO

title: Knowledge Distillation for Improved Accuracy in Spoken Question Answering
title_zh: 知识蒸馏提高口语问答的准确性
abstract: Spoken question answering (SQA) is a challenging task that requires the machine to fully understand the complex spoken documents. Automatic speech recognition (ASR) plays a significant role in the development of QA systems. However, the recent work shows that ASR systems generate highly noisy transcripts, which critically limit the capability of machine comprehension on the SQA task. To address the issue, we present a novel distillation framework. Specifically, we devise a training strategy to perform knowledge distillation (KD) from spoken documents and written counterparts. Our work makes a step towards distilling knowledge from the language model as a supervision signal to lead to better student accuracy by reducing the misalignment between automatic and manual transcriptions. Experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms several state-of-the-art language models on the Spoken-SQuAD dataset.
summary: Spoken question answering (SQA) is a challenging task that requires the machine to fully understand the complex spoken documents. Automatic speech recognition (ASR) plays a significant role in the development of QA systems. However, the recent work shows that ASR systems generate highly noisy transcripts, which critically limit the capability of machine comprehension on the SQA task. To address the issue, we present a novel distillation framework. Specifically, we devise a training strategy to perform knowledge distillation (KD) from spoken documents and written counterparts. Our work makes a step towards distilling knowledge from the language model as a supervision signal to lead to better student accuracy by reducing the misalignment between automatic and manual transcriptions. Experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms several state-of-the-art language models on the Spoken-SQuAD dataset.
abstract_zh: 语音问答（SQA）是一项具有挑战性的任务，要求机器完全理解复杂的语音文档。自动语音识别（ASR）在 QA 系统的开发中发挥着重要作用。然而，最近的研究表明，ASR 系统会生成高噪声转录本，这严重限制了机器理解 SQA 任务的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的蒸馏框架。具体来说，我们设计了一种训练策略，从口头文档和书面对应物中进行知识蒸馏（KD）。我们的工作朝着从语言模型中提取知识作为监督信号迈出了一步，通过减少自动和手动转录之间的不一致来提高学生的准确性。实验表明，我们的方法在 Spoken-SQuAD 数据集上优于几种最先进的语言模型。

AI.tldr: 通过知识蒸馏提升口语问答的准确性
AI.motivation: 自动语音识别（ASR）生成的转录文本存在大量噪声，导致机器在口语问答任务中的理解能力受限，需通过知识蒸馏减少这一问题
AI.method: 设计一种知识蒸馏框架，从口语文档及书面对应文本中提取知识，利用语言模型作为监督信号减少自动与人工转录间的不一致
AI.result: 在Spoken-SQuAD数据集上，该方法优于多个最先进的语言模型
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏有效提升了口语问答系统的准确性，为解决ASR噪声问题提供了新思路

title: Contextualized Attention-based Knowledge Transfer for Spoken Conversational Question Answering
title_zh: 用于口语对话问答的情境化基于注意力的知识转移
abstract: Spoken conversational question answering (SCQA) requires machines to model complex dialogue flow given the speech utterances and text corpora. Different from traditional text question answering (QA) tasks, SCQA involves audio signal processing, passage comprehension, and contextual understanding. However, ASR systems introduce unexpected noisy signals to the transcriptions, which result in performance degradation on SCQA. To overcome the problem, we propose CADNet, a novel contextualized attention-based distillation approach, which applies both cross-attention and self-attention to obtain ASR-robust contextualized embedding representations of the passage and dialogue history for performance improvements. We also introduce the spoken conventional knowledge distillation framework to distill the ASR-robust knowledge from the estimated probabilities of the teacher model to the student. We conduct extensive experiments on the Spoken-CoQA dataset and demonstrate that our approach achieves remarkable performance in this task.
summary: Spoken conversational question answering (SCQA) requires machines to model complex dialogue flow given the speech utterances and text corpora. Different from traditional text question answering (QA) tasks, SCQA involves audio signal processing, passage comprehension, and contextual understanding. However, ASR systems introduce unexpected noisy signals to the transcriptions, which result in performance degradation on SCQA. To overcome the problem, we propose CADNet, a novel contextualized attention-based distillation approach, which applies both cross-attention and self-attention to obtain ASR-robust contextualized embedding representations of the passage and dialogue history for performance improvements. We also introduce the spoken conventional knowledge distillation framework to distill the ASR-robust knowledge from the estimated probabilities of the teacher model to the student. We conduct extensive experiments on the Spoken-CoQA dataset and demonstrate that our approach achieves remarkable performance in this task.
abstract_zh: 口语对话问答 (SCQA) 要求机器根据语音话语和文本语料库对复杂的对话流进行建模。与传统的文本问答（QA）任务不同，SCQA 涉及音频信号处理、段落理解和上下文理解。然而，ASR 系统会向转录引入意外的噪声信号，从而导致 SCQA 的性能下降。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了 CADNet，一种新颖的基于上下文注意力的蒸馏方法，它应用交叉注意力和自注意力来获得段落和对话历史的 ASR 鲁棒上下文嵌入表示，以提高性能。我们还引入了口语传统知识蒸馏框架，从教师模型对学生的估计概率中蒸馏出 ASR 稳健的知识。我们在 Spoken-CoQA 数据集上进行了广泛的实验，并证明我们的方法在此任务中取得了显着的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文注意力的知识迁移方法CADNet，用于提升口语对话问答（SCQA）任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ASR系统产生的噪声会降低口语对话问答的准确性，需通过知识迁移技术增强模型对ASR错误的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计CADNet框架，结合交叉注意力与自注意力机制生成上下文感知的嵌入表示，并通过知识蒸馏框架将教师模型的ASR鲁棒知识传递至学生模型。
AI.result: 在Spoken-CoQA数据集上实验表明，该方法显著提升了口语对话问答任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于上下文注意力的知识迁移有效增强了模型对ASR噪声的鲁棒性，为口语对话问答提供了新思路。

title: Smoothed Analysis of Pareto Curves in Multiobjective Optimization
title_zh: 多目标优化中帕累托曲线的平滑分析
comment: Chapter 15 of the book Beyond the Worst-Case Analysis of Algorithms, edited by Tim Roughgarden and published by Cambridge University Press (2020)
comments: Chapter 15 of the book Beyond the Worst-Case Analysis of Algorithms, edited by Tim Roughgarden and published by Cambridge University Press (2020)
abstract: In a multiobjective optimization problem a solution is called Pareto-optimal if no criterion can be improved without deteriorating at least one of the other criteria. Computing the set of all Pareto-optimal solutions is a common task in multiobjective optimization to filter out unreasonable trade-offs. For most problems the number of Pareto-optimal solutions increases only moderately with the input size in applications. However, for virtually every multiobjective optimization problem there exist worst-case instances with an exponential number of Pareto-optimal solutions. In order to explain this discrepancy, we analyze a large class of multiobjective optimization problems in the model of smoothed analysis and prove a polynomial bound on the expected number of Pareto-optimal solutions. We also present algorithms for computing the set of Pareto-optimal solutions for different optimization problems and discuss related results on the smoothed complexity of optimization problems.
summary: In a multiobjective optimization problem a solution is called Pareto-optimal if no criterion can be improved without deteriorating at least one of the other criteria. Computing the set of all Pareto-optimal solutions is a common task in multiobjective optimization to filter out unreasonable trade-offs. For most problems the number of Pareto-optimal solutions increases only moderately with the input size in applications. However, for virtually every multiobjective optimization problem there exist worst-case instances with an exponential number of Pareto-optimal solutions. In order to explain this discrepancy, we analyze a large class of multiobjective optimization problems in the model of smoothed analysis and prove a polynomial bound on the expected number of Pareto-optimal solutions. We also present algorithms for computing the set of Pareto-optimal solutions for different optimization problems and discuss related results on the smoothed complexity of optimization problems.
abstract_zh: 在多目标优化问题中，如果在不恶化至少一个其他标准的情况下无法改进任何标准，则解决方案称为帕累托最优。计算所有帕累托最优解的集合是多目标优化中的一项常见任务，以过滤掉不合理的权衡。对于大多数问题，帕累托最优解的数量仅随着应用程序中输入大小的增加而适度增加。然而，对于几乎每个多目标优化问题，都存在具有指数数量的帕累托最优解的最坏情况实例。为了解释这种差异，我们在平滑分析模型中分析了大量多目标优化问题，并证明了帕累托最优解的预期数量的多项式界限。我们还提出了计算不同优化问题的帕累托最优解集的算法，并讨论了优化问题的平滑复杂度的相关结果。

AI.tldr: 本文通过平滑分析模型研究多目标优化问题中Pareto最优解的数量，证明其期望数量存在多项式界限，并提出相关算法。
AI.motivation: 尽管实际应用中Pareto最优解数量增长缓慢，但最坏情况下存在指数级解集，需解释这一理论与实际的差异。
AI.method: 采用平滑分析模型，分析多目标优化问题的Pareto最优解数量，设计算法计算解集并讨论平滑复杂度。
AI.result: 证明了Pareto最优解的期望数量具有多项式界限，提出了多种优化问题的算法，并分析了相关复杂度结果。
AI.conclusion: 平滑分析有效解释了实际问题与最坏情况的差异，为多目标优化提供了理论支持和实用算法。

search_text: Smoothed Analysis of Pareto Curves in Multiobjective Optimization 多目标优化中帕累托曲线的平滑分析 In a multiobjective optimization problem a solution is called Pareto-optimal if no criterion can be improved without deteriorating at least one of the other criteria. Computing the set of all Pareto-optimal solutions is a common task in multiobjective optimization to filter out unreasonable trade-offs. For most problems the number of Pareto-optimal solutions increases only moderately with the input size in applications. However, for virtually every multiobjective optimization problem there exist worst-case instances with an exponential number of Pareto-optimal solutions. In order to explain this discrepancy, we analyze a large class of multiobjective optimization problems in the model of smoothed analysis and prove a polynomial bound on the expected number of Pareto-optimal solutions. We also present algorithms for computing the set of Pareto-optimal solutions for different optimization problems and discuss related results on the smoothed complexity of optimization problems. 在多目标优化问题中，如果在不恶化至少一个其他标准的情况下无法改进任何标准，则解决方案称为帕累托最优。计算所有帕累托最优解的集合是多目标优化中的一项常见任务，以过滤掉不合理的权衡。对于大多数问题，帕累托最优解的数量仅随着应用程序中输入大小的增加而适度增加。然而，对于几乎每个多目标优化问题，都存在具有指数数量的帕累托最优解的最坏情况实例。为了解释这种差异，我们在平滑分析模型中分析了大量多目标优化问题，并证明了帕累托最优解的预期数量的多项式界限。我们还提出了计算不同优化问题的帕累托最优解集的算法，并讨论了优化问题的平滑复杂度的相关结果。 本文通过平滑分析模型研究多目标优化问题中Pareto最优解的数量，证明其期望数量存在多项式界限，并提出相关算法。 Heiko Röglin cs.DS

title: Safe planning and control under uncertainty for self-driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶不确定性下的安全规划与控制
abstract: Motion Planning under uncertainty is critical for safe self-driving. In this paper, we propose a unified obstacle avoidance framework that deals with 1) uncertainty in ego-vehicle motion; and 2) prediction uncertainty of dynamic obstacles from environment. A two-stage traffic participant trajectory predictor comprising short-term and long-term prediction is used in the planning layer to generate safe but not over-conservative trajectories for the ego vehicle. The prediction module cooperates well with existing planning approaches. Our work showcases its effectiveness in a Frenet frame planner. A robust controller using tube MPC guarantees safe execution of the trajectory in the presence of state noise and dynamic model uncertainty. A Gaussian process regression model is used for online identification of the uncertainty's bound. We demonstrate effectiveness, safety, and real-time performance of our framework in the CARLA simulator.
summary: Motion Planning under uncertainty is critical for safe self-driving. In this paper, we propose a unified obstacle avoidance framework that deals with 1) uncertainty in ego-vehicle motion; and 2) prediction uncertainty of dynamic obstacles from environment. A two-stage traffic participant trajectory predictor comprising short-term and long-term prediction is used in the planning layer to generate safe but not over-conservative trajectories for the ego vehicle. The prediction module cooperates well with existing planning approaches. Our work showcases its effectiveness in a Frenet frame planner. A robust controller using tube MPC guarantees safe execution of the trajectory in the presence of state noise and dynamic model uncertainty. A Gaussian process regression model is used for online identification of the uncertainty's bound. We demonstrate effectiveness, safety, and real-time performance of our framework in the CARLA simulator.
abstract_zh: 不确定性下的运动规划对于安全自动驾驶至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的避障框架，该框架处理：1）自我车辆运动的不确定性； 2）环境动态障碍物的预测不确定性。在规划层中使用由短期和长期预测组成的两阶段交通参与者轨迹预测器，为自我车辆生成安全但不过分保守的轨迹。预测模块与现有的规划方法配合良好。我们的工作展示了它在 Frenet 框架规划器中的有效性。使用管 MPC 的稳健控制器可确保在存在状态噪声和动态模型不确定性的情况下安全执行轨迹。高斯过程回归模型用于在线识别不确定性界限。我们在 CARLA 模拟器中展示了我们框架的有效性、安全性和实时性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在不确定性下实现自动驾驶安全规划与控制的统一避障框架。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需应对自身运动不确定性及动态障碍物预测不确定性，传统方法或过于保守或安全性不足。
AI.method: 采用两阶段轨迹预测器（短时/长时预测）生成安全轨迹，结合管状MPC控制器与高斯过程回归模型在线识别不确定性边界。
AI.result: 在CARLA仿真中验证了框架的有效性、安全性及实时性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能有效处理不确定性，平衡安全性与保守性，适用于实际自动驾驶场景。
