title: Deep Q-Network-based Adaptive Alert Threshold Selection Policy for Payment Fraud Systems in Retail Banking
title_zh: 基于深度Q网络的零售银行支付欺诈系统自适应警报阈值选择策略
abstract: Machine learning models have widely been used in fraud detection systems. Most of the research and development efforts have been concentrated on improving the performance of the fraud scoring models. Yet, the downstream fraud alert systems still have limited to no model adoption and rely on manual steps. Alert systems are pervasively used across all payment channels in retail banking and play an important role in the overall fraud detection process. Current fraud detection systems end up with large numbers of dropped alerts due to their inability to account for the alert processing capacity. Ideally, alert threshold selection enables the system to maximize the fraud detection while balancing the upstream fraud scores and the available bandwidth of the alert processing teams. However, in practice, fixed thresholds that are used for their simplicity do not have this ability. In this paper, we propose an enhanced threshold selection policy for fraud alert systems. The proposed approach formulates the threshold selection as a sequential decision making problem and uses Deep Q-Network based reinforcement learning. Experimental results show that this adaptive approach outperforms the current static solutions by reducing the fraud losses as well as improving the operational efficiency of the alert system.
summary: Machine learning models have widely been used in fraud detection systems. Most of the research and development efforts have been concentrated on improving the performance of the fraud scoring models. Yet, the downstream fraud alert systems still have limited to no model adoption and rely on manual steps. Alert systems are pervasively used across all payment channels in retail banking and play an important role in the overall fraud detection process. Current fraud detection systems end up with large numbers of dropped alerts due to their inability to account for the alert processing capacity. Ideally, alert threshold selection enables the system to maximize the fraud detection while balancing the upstream fraud scores and the available bandwidth of the alert processing teams. However, in practice, fixed thresholds that are used for their simplicity do not have this ability. In this paper, we propose an enhanced threshold selection policy for fraud alert systems. The proposed approach formulates the threshold selection as a sequential decision making problem and uses Deep Q-Network based reinforcement learning. Experimental results show that this adaptive approach outperforms the current static solutions by reducing the fraud losses as well as improving the operational efficiency of the alert system.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型已广泛应用于欺诈检测系统。大多数研究和开发工作都集中在提高欺诈评分模型的性能上。然而，下游欺诈警报系统仍然仅限于没有模型采用，并且依赖于手动步骤。警报系统广泛应用于零售银行的所有支付渠道，并在整个欺诈检测过程中发挥着重要作用。当前的欺诈检测系统由于无法考虑警报处理能力而最终导致大量丢弃警报。理想情况下，警报阈值选择使系统能够最大化欺诈检测，同时平衡上游欺诈分数和警报处理团队的可用带宽。然而，在实践中，为了简单起见而使用的固定阈值不具备这种能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于欺诈警报系统的增强阈值选择策略。所提出的方法将阈值选择制定为顺序决策问题，并使用基于深度 Q 网络的强化学习。实验结果表明，这种自适应方法通过减少欺诈损失并提高警报系统的运行效率，优于当前的静态解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度Q网络的自适应警报阈值选择策略，用于优化零售银行支付欺诈系统的欺诈检测效率。
AI.motivation: 现有欺诈警报系统依赖固定阈值，无法平衡欺诈检测需求与人工处理能力，导致大量警报被丢弃或处理效率低下。
AI.method: 将阈值选择建模为序贯决策问题，采用深度Q网络（DQN）强化学习方法动态调整警报阈值。
AI.result: 实验表明，该自适应策略相比静态阈值方法减少了欺诈损失，并提升了警报系统的操作效率。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度强化学习的自适应阈值策略能有效优化欺诈警报系统的性能，为实际应用提供可行方案。

However, in practice, fixed thresholds that are used for their simplicity do not have this ability. In this paper, we propose an enhanced threshold selection policy for fraud alert systems. The proposed approach formulates the threshold selection as a sequential decision making problem and uses Deep Q-Network based reinforcement learning. Experimental results show that this adaptive approach outperforms the current static solutions by reducing the fraud losses as well as improving the operational efficiency of the alert system. 机器学习模型已广泛应用于欺诈检测系统。大多数研究和开发工作都集中在提高欺诈评分模型的性能上。然而，下游欺诈警报系统仍然仅限于没有模型采用，并且依赖于手动步骤。警报系统广泛应用于零售银行的所有支付渠道，并在整个欺诈检测过程中发挥着重要作用。当前的欺诈检测系统由于无法考虑警报处理能力而最终导致大量丢弃警报。理想情况下，警报阈值选择使系统能够最大化欺诈检测，同时平衡上游欺诈分数和警报处理团队的可用带宽。然而，在实践中，为了简单起见而使用的固定阈值不具备这种能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于欺诈警报系统的增强阈值选择策略。所提出的方法将阈值选择制定为顺序决策问题，并使用基于深度 Q 网络的强化学习。实验结果表明，这种自适应方法通过减少欺诈损失并提高警报系统的运行效率，优于当前的静态解决方案。 本文提出一种基于深度Q网络的自适应警报阈值选择策略，用于优化零售银行支付欺诈系统的欺诈检测效率。 Hongda Shen,Eren Kurshan cs.LG,cs.AI

title: MADER: Trajectory Planner in Multi-Agent and Dynamic Environments
title_zh: MADER：多智能体和动态环境中的轨迹规划器
abstract: This paper presents MADER, a 3D decentralized and asynchronous trajectory planner for UAVs that generates collision-free trajectories in environments with static obstacles, dynamic obstacles, and other planning agents. Real-time collision avoidance with other dynamic obstacles or agents is done by performing outer polyhedral representations of every interval of the trajectories and then including the plane that separates each pair of polyhedra as a decision variable in the optimization problem. MADER uses our recently developed MINVO basis to obtain outer polyhedral representations with volumes 2.36 and 254.9 times, respectively, smaller than the Bernstein or B-Spline bases used extensively in the planning literature. Our decentralized and asynchronous algorithm guarantees safety with respect to other agents by including their committed trajectories as constraints in the optimization and then executing a collision check-recheck scheme. Finally, extensive simulations in challenging cluttered environments show up to a 33.9% reduction in the flight time, and a 88.8% reduction in the number of stops compared to the Bernstein and B-Spline bases, shorter flight distances than centralized approaches, and shorter total times on average than synchronous decentralized approaches.
summary: This paper presents MADER, a 3D decentralized and asynchronous trajectory planner for UAVs that generates collision-free trajectories in environments with static obstacles, dynamic obstacles, and other planning agents. Real-time collision avoidance with other dynamic obstacles or agents is done by performing outer polyhedral representations of every interval of the trajectories and then including the plane that separates each pair of polyhedra as a decision variable in the optimization problem. MADER uses our recently developed MINVO basis to obtain outer polyhedral representations with volumes 2.36 and 254.9 times, respectively, smaller than the Bernstein or B-Spline bases used extensively in the planning literature. Our decentralized and asynchronous algorithm guarantees safety with respect to other agents by including their committed trajectories as constraints in the optimization and then executing a collision check-recheck scheme. Finally, extensive simulations in challenging cluttered environments show up to a 33.9% reduction in the flight time, and a 88.8% reduction in the number of stops compared to the Bernstein and B-Spline bases, shorter flight distances than centralized approaches, and shorter total times on average than synchronous decentralized approaches.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 MADER，一种用于无人机的 3D 分散式异步轨迹规划器，可在具有静态障碍物、动态障碍物和其他规划代理的环境中生成无碰撞轨迹。通过对轨迹的每个间隔执行外部多面体表示，然后将分隔每对多面体的平面作为优化问题中的决策变量，来完成与其他动态障碍物或代理的实时碰撞避免。 MADER 使用我们最近开发的 MINVO 基础来获得体积分别为 2.36 倍和 254.9 倍的外部多面体表示，比规划文献中广泛使用的 Bernstein 或 B 样条基础小。我们的去中心化和异步算法通过将其他代理的承诺轨迹作为优化中的约束，然后执行碰撞检查-重新检查方案来保证其他代理的安全。最后，在具有挑战性的杂乱环境中进行的广泛模拟表明，与伯恩斯坦和 B 样条基地相比，飞行时间减少了 33.9%，经停次数减少了 88.8%，飞行距离比集中进场更短，平均总时间比同步分散进场更短。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MADER，一种用于无人机的三维去中心化异步轨迹规划器，能够在静态障碍物、动态障碍物和其他规划代理的环境中生成无碰撞轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹规划方法在动态多智能体环境中存在碰撞避免效率低、计算复杂度高及安全性不足的问题，需更高效且安全的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过外多面体表示轨迹区间，并将分离平面作为优化变量，结合MINVO基函数减少体积，采用去中心化异步算法并约束其他代理的承诺轨迹，通过碰撞检查-复检机制确保安全。
AI.result: 在复杂环境中飞行时间减少33.9%，停顿次数减少88.8%，飞行距离短于集中式方法，总时间优于同步去中心化方法。
AI.conclusion: MADER在安全性与效率上显著优于传统方法，适用于多无人机动态环境中的实时轨迹规划。

authors_text: Colin M. Gray,Jingle Chen,Shruthi Sai Chivukula,Liyang Qu
title: End User Accounts of Dark Patterns as Felt Manipulation
title_zh: 最终用户将深色图案视为毛毡操纵
abstract: Manipulation defines many of our experiences as a consumer, including subtle nudges and overt advertising campaigns that seek to gain our attention and money. With the advent of digital services that can continuously optimize online experiences to favor stakeholder requirements, increasingly designers and developers make use of "dark patterns"---forms of manipulation that prey on human psychology---to encourage certain behaviors and discourage others in ways that present unequal value to the end user. In this paper, we provide an account of end user perceptions of manipulation that builds on and extends notions of dark patterns. We report on the results of a survey of users conducted in English and Mandarin Chinese (n=169), including follow-up interviews from nine survey respondents. We used a card sorting method to support thematic analysis of responses from each cultural context, identifying both qualitatively-supported insights to describe end users' felt experiences of manipulative products, and a continuum of manipulation. We further support this analysis through a quantitative analysis of survey results and the presentation of vignettes from the interviews. We conclude with implications for future research, considerations for public policy, and guidance on how to further empower and give users autonomy in their experiences with digital services.
summary: Manipulation defines many of our experiences as a consumer, including subtle nudges and overt advertising campaigns that seek to gain our attention and money. With the advent of digital services that can continuously optimize online experiences to favor stakeholder requirements, increasingly designers and developers make use of "dark patterns"---forms of manipulation that prey on human psychology---to encourage certain behaviors and discourage others in ways that present unequal value to the end user. In this paper, we provide an account of end user perceptions of manipulation that builds on and extends notions of dark patterns. We report on the results of a survey of users conducted in English and Mandarin Chinese (n=169), including follow-up interviews from nine survey respondents. We used a card sorting method to support thematic analysis of responses from each cultural context, identifying both qualitatively-supported insights to describe end users' felt experiences of manipulative products, and a continuum of manipulation. We further support this analysis through a quantitative analysis of survey results and the presentation of vignettes from the interviews. We conclude with implications for future research, considerations for public policy, and guidance on how to further empower and give users autonomy in their experiences with digital services.
abstract_zh: 操纵定义了我们作为消费者的许多体验，包括微妙的推动和旨在吸引我们的注意力和金钱的公开广告活动。随着数字服务的出现，可以不断优化在线体验以满足利益相关者的要求，越来越多的设计师和开发人员利用“黑暗模式”（一种利用人类心理的操纵形式）来鼓励某些行为并阻止其他行为，从而为最终用户提供不平等的价值。在本文中，我们描述了最终用户对基于并扩展暗模式概念的操纵的看法。我们报告了以英语和普通话进行的用户调查 (n=169) 的结果，包括对 9 名调查受访者的后续采访。我们使用卡片分类方法来支持对每种文化背景的反应进行主题分析，确定描述最终用户对操纵产品的感受体验的定性支持的见解以及操纵的连续体。我们通过对调查结果的定量分析和采访中的小插曲进一步支持这一分析。最后，我们提出了对未来研究的影响、对公共政策的考虑，以及如何进一步赋予用户数字服务体验自主权的指导。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调查和访谈研究用户对数字服务中暗黑模式的感知，构建了操纵行为的连续体模型，并探讨了用户被操纵的主观体验。
AI.motivation: 随着数字服务通过暗黑模式持续优化用户体验，用户可能在不知情中被操纵，需深入理解用户对这种操纵的真实感受及影响。
AI.method: 采用中英文双语问卷调查（n=169）结合九名受访者的后续访谈，运用卡片分类法进行主题分析，并结合定量数据与访谈案例进行分析。
AI.result: 识别出用户对操纵性产品的主观体验特征，构建了操纵连续体模型，定量分析验证了文化差异对感知操纵的影响，并通过访谈案例具体呈现用户困境。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来研究需关注跨文化差异，政策制定应规范暗黑模式使用，同时需通过设计改进增强用户自主权与数字服务透明度。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过调查和访谈研究用户对数字服务中暗黑模式的感知，构建了操纵行为的连续体模型，并探讨了用户被操纵的主观体验。

title: Influence-Augmented Online Planning for Complex Environments
title_zh: 复杂环境影响力增强在线规划
comment: NeurIPS2020 - results have been updated after fixing minor bugs in the code
comments: NeurIPS2020 - results have been updated after fixing minor bugs in the code
abstract: How can we plan efficiently in real time to control an agent in a complex environment that may involve many other agents? While existing sample-based planners have enjoyed empirical success in large POMDPs, their performance heavily relies on a fast simulator. However, real-world scenarios are complex in nature and their simulators are often computationally demanding, which severely limits the performance of online planners. In this work, we propose influence-augmented online planning, a principled method to transform a factored simulator of the entire environment into a local simulator that samples only the state variables that are most relevant to the observation and reward of the planning agent and captures the incoming influence from the rest of the environment using machine learning methods. Our main experimental results show that planning on this less accurate but much faster local simulator with POMCP leads to higher real-time planning performance than planning on the simulator that models the entire environment.
summary: How can we plan efficiently in real time to control an agent in a complex environment that may involve many other agents? While existing sample-based planners have enjoyed empirical success in large POMDPs, their performance heavily relies on a fast simulator. However, real-world scenarios are complex in nature and their simulators are often computationally demanding, which severely limits the performance of online planners. In this work, we propose influence-augmented online planning, a principled method to transform a factored simulator of the entire environment into a local simulator that samples only the state variables that are most relevant to the observation and reward of the planning agent and captures the incoming influence from the rest of the environment using machine learning methods. Our main experimental results show that planning on this less accurate but much faster local simulator with POMCP leads to higher real-time planning performance than planning on the simulator that models the entire environment.
abstract_zh: 在可能涉及许多其他智能体的复杂环境中，我们如何实时高效地规划来控制一个智能体？虽然现有的基于样本的规划器在大型 POMDP 中取得了经验上的成功，但它们的性能在很大程度上依赖于快速模拟器。然而，现实世界的场景本质上是复杂的，其模拟器通常对计算要求很高，这严重限制了在线规划器的性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了影响增强在线规划，这是一种将整个环境的分解模拟器转换为局部模拟器的原理方法，该模拟器仅对与规划代理的观察和奖励最相关的状态变量进行采样，并使用机器学习方法捕获来自环境其余部分的传入影响。我们的主要实验结果表明，与在对整个环境进行建模的模拟器上进行规划相比，使用 POMCP 在这种精度较低但速度更快的本地模拟器上进行规划可带来更高的实时规划性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种影响增强的在线规划方法，通过局部模拟器提升复杂环境中的实时规划效率。
AI.motivation: 现有在线规划方法依赖全局模拟器，但现实场景中全局模拟器计算开销大，导致实时性不足。
AI.method: 将全局环境分解为局部模拟器，仅关注与规划目标相关的状态变量，并利用机器学习建模环境其余部分的影响。
AI.result: 基于局部模拟器的POMCP规划方法在实时性能上优于传统全局模拟器方法。
AI.conclusion: 局部模拟器结合机器学习能有效降低计算复杂度，提升复杂环境下的在线规划效率。

title: On Explaining Decision Trees
title_zh: 关于解释决策树
abstract: Decision trees (DTs) epitomize what have become to be known as interpretable machine learning (ML) models. This is informally motivated by paths in DTs being often much smaller than the total number of features. This paper shows that in some settings DTs can hardly be deemed interpretable, with paths in a DT being arbitrarily larger than a PI-explanation, i.e. a subset-minimal set of feature values that entails the prediction. As a result, the paper proposes a novel model for computing PI-explanations of DTs, which enables computing one PI-explanation in polynomial time. Moreover, it is shown that enumeration of PI-explanations can be reduced to the enumeration of minimal hitting sets. Experimental results were obtained on a wide range of publicly available datasets with well-known DT-learning tools, and confirm that in most cases DTs have paths that are proper supersets of PI-explanations.
summary: Decision trees (DTs) epitomize what have become to be known as interpretable machine learning (ML) models. This is informally motivated by paths in DTs being often much smaller than the total number of features. This paper shows that in some settings DTs can hardly be deemed interpretable, with paths in a DT being arbitrarily larger than a PI-explanation, i.e. a subset-minimal set of feature values that entails the prediction. As a result, the paper proposes a novel model for computing PI-explanations of DTs, which enables computing one PI-explanation in polynomial time. Moreover, it is shown that enumeration of PI-explanations can be reduced to the enumeration of minimal hitting sets. Experimental results were obtained on a wide range of publicly available datasets with well-known DT-learning tools, and confirm that in most cases DTs have paths that are proper supersets of PI-explanations.
abstract_zh: 决策树 (DT) 概括了所谓的可解释机器学习 (ML) 模型。这是非正式的动机，因为 DT 中的路径通常比特征总数小得多。本文表明，在某些设置中，DT 很难被认为是可解释的，DT 中的路径任意大于 PI 解释，即需要预测的特征值的最小子集集。因此，本文提出了一种计算 DT 的 PI 解释的新模型，该模型能够在多项式时间内计算一个 PI 解释。此外，结果表明，PI 解释的枚举可以简化为最小命中集的枚举。实验结果是使用著名的 DT 学习工具在广泛的公开数据集上获得的，并证实在大多数情况下 DT 的路径是 PI 解释的正确超集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究决策树的可解释性问题，提出一种高效计算PI解释的新方法，证明决策树路径可能远大于最小解释集。
AI.motivation: 传统认为决策树路径具有可解释性，但作者发现路径长度可能远超预测所需的最小特征子集（PI解释），导致实际可解释性存疑。
AI.method: 提出多项式时间算法计算PI解释，并将PI解释枚举问题转化为最小击中集问题，通过公开数据集与经典决策树工具验证方法。
AI.result: 实验表明多数情况下决策树路径是PI解释的超集，现有路径解释方式可能高估模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 需重新评估决策树的可解释性，应采用更精确的PI解释方法替代传统路径解释。

authors_text: Derek Hoiem,Tanmay Gupta,Zhizhong Li,Michal M. Shlapentokh-Rothman
title: Learning Curves for Analysis of Deep Networks
title_zh: 深度网络分析的学习曲线
comment: Improved text and figure organization, additional experiments on optimization
comments: Improved text and figure organization, additional experiments on optimization
abstract: Learning curves model a classifier's test error as a function of the number of training samples. Prior works show that learning curves can be used to select model parameters and extrapolate performance. We investigate how to use learning curves to evaluate design choices, such as pretraining, architecture, and data augmentation. We propose a method to robustly estimate learning curves, abstract their parameters into error and data-reliance, and evaluate the effectiveness of different parameterizations. Our experiments exemplify use of learning curves for analysis and yield several interesting observations.
summary: Learning curves model a classifier's test error as a function of the number of training samples. Prior works show that learning curves can be used to select model parameters and extrapolate performance. We investigate how to use learning curves to evaluate design choices, such as pretraining, architecture, and data augmentation. We propose a method to robustly estimate learning curves, abstract their parameters into error and data-reliance, and evaluate the effectiveness of different parameterizations. Our experiments exemplify use of learning curves for analysis and yield several interesting observations.
abstract_zh: 学习曲线将分类器的测试误差建模为训练样本数量的函数。先前的工作表明，学习曲线可用于选择模型参数并推断性能。我们研究如何使用学习曲线来评估设计选择，例如预训练、架构和数据增强。我们提出了一种稳健估计学习曲线的方法，将其参数抽象为误差和数据依赖性，并评估不同参数化的有效性。我们的实验举例说明了使用学习曲线进行分析，并产生了一些有趣的观察结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何使用学习曲线来评估深度网络的设计选择，如预训练、架构和数据增强。
AI.motivation: 学习曲线可以用来选择模型参数并外推性能，但如何利用它们评估不同的设计选择仍需进一步研究。
AI.method: 提出了一种稳健估计学习曲线的方法，将参数抽象为误差和数据依赖性，并评估了不同参数化的有效性。
AI.result: 实验展示了学习曲线在分析中的应用，并得出了几个有趣的观察结果。
AI.conclusion: 学习曲线可以有效评估深度网络的设计选择，为模型优化提供有价值的见解。

title: I-nteract 2.0: A Cyber-Physical System to Design 3D Models using Mixed Reality Technologies and Deep Learning for Additive Manufacturing
title_zh: I-interact 2.0：使用混合现实技术和深度学习进行增材制造设计 3D 模型的网络物理系统
abstract: I-nteract is a cyber-physical system that enables real-time interaction with both virtual and real artifacts to design 3D models for additive manufacturing by leveraging on mixed reality technologies. This paper presents novel advances in the development of the interaction platform I-nteract to generate 3D models using both constructive solid geometry and artificial intelligence. The system also enables the user to adjust the dimensions of the 3D models with respect to their physical workspace. The effectiveness of the system is demonstrated by generating 3D models of furniture (e.g., chairs and tables) and fitting them into the physical space in a mixed reality environment.
summary: I-nteract is a cyber-physical system that enables real-time interaction with both virtual and real artifacts to design 3D models for additive manufacturing by leveraging on mixed reality technologies. This paper presents novel advances in the development of the interaction platform I-nteract to generate 3D models using both constructive solid geometry and artificial intelligence. The system also enables the user to adjust the dimensions of the 3D models with respect to their physical workspace. The effectiveness of the system is demonstrated by generating 3D models of furniture (e.g., chairs and tables) and fitting them into the physical space in a mixed reality environment.
abstract_zh: I-interact 是一个网络物理系统，能够与虚拟和真实工件进行实时交互，从而利用混合现实技术设计用于增材制造的 3D 模型。本文介绍了交互平台 I-interact 开发的新进展，该平台使用构造实体几何和人工智能生成 3D 模型。该系统还允许用户根据其物理工作空间调整 3D 模型的尺寸。该系统的有效性通过生成家具（例如椅子和桌子）的 3D 模型并将其安装到混合现实环境中的物理空间中来证明。

AI.result: 成功生成椅子、桌子等家具模型，并在混合现实环境中验证其物理空间适配性。
AI.conclusion: I-nteract 2.0系统有效结合了混合现实与AI技术，为增材制造领域提供了更直观的3D设计解决方案。

search_text: I-nteract 2.0: A Cyber-Physical System to Design 3D Models using Mixed Reality Technologies and Deep Learning for Additive Manufacturing I-interact 2.0：使用混合现实技术和深度学习进行增材制造设计 3D 模型的网络物理系统 I-nteract is a cyber-physical system that enables real-time interaction with both virtual and real artifacts to design 3D models for additive manufacturing by leveraging on mixed reality technologies. This paper presents novel advances in the development of the interaction platform I-nteract to generate 3D models using both constructive solid geometry and artificial intelligence. The system also enables the user to adjust the dimensions of the 3D models with respect to their physical workspace. The effectiveness of the system is demonstrated by generating 3D models of furniture (e.g., chairs and tables) and fitting them into the physical space in a mixed reality environment. title: Addressing the Recitative Problem in Real-time Opera Tracking
title_zh: 解决实时歌剧跟踪中的宣叙调问题
comment: 12 pages, 1 figure, In Proceedings of the 25th International Symposium on Frontiers of Research in Speech and Music (FRSM 2020), Silchar, India
comments: 12 pages, 1 figure, In Proceedings of the 25th International Symposium on Frontiers of Research in Speech and Music (FRSM 2020), Silchar, India
abstract: Robust real-time opera tracking (score following) would be extremely useful for many processes surrounding live opera staging and streaming, including automatic lyrics displays, camera control, or live video cutting. Recent work has shown that, with some appropriate measures to account for common problems such as breaks and interruptions, spontaneous applause, various noises and interludes, current audio-to-audio alignment algorithms can be made to follow an entire opera from beginning to end, in a relatively robust way. However, they remain inaccurate when the textual content becomes prominent against the melody or music -- notably, during recitativo passages. In this paper, we address this specific problem by proposing to use two specialized trackers in parallel, one focusing on music-, the other on speech-sensitive features. We first carry out a systematic study on speech-related features, targeting the precise alignment of corresponding recitatives from different performances of the same opera. Then we propose different solutions, based on pre-trained music and speech classifiers, to combine the two trackers in order to improve the global accuracy over the course of the entire opera.
summary: Robust real-time opera tracking (score following) would be extremely useful for many processes surrounding live opera staging and streaming, including automatic lyrics displays, camera control, or live video cutting. Recent work has shown that, with some appropriate measures to account for common problems such as breaks and interruptions, spontaneous applause, various noises and interludes, current audio-to-audio alignment algorithms can be made to follow an entire opera from beginning to end, in a relatively robust way. However, they remain inaccurate when the textual content becomes prominent against the melody or music -- notably, during recitativo passages. In this paper, we address this specific problem by proposing to use two specialized trackers in parallel, one focusing on music-, the other on speech-sensitive features. We first carry out a systematic study on speech-related features, targeting the precise alignment of corresponding recitatives from different performances of the same opera. Then we propose different solutions, based on pre-trained music and speech classifiers, to combine the two trackers in order to improve the global accuracy over the course of the entire opera.
abstract_zh: 强大的实时歌剧跟踪（乐谱跟踪）对于现场歌剧舞台和流媒体的许多过程非常有用，包括自动歌词显示、摄像机控制或实时视频剪辑。最近的研究表明，通过采取一些适当的措施来解决常见问题，例如中断和中断、自发的掌声、各种噪音和间奏，当前的音频到音频对齐算法可以以相对稳健的方式从头到尾遵循整个歌剧。然而，当文本内容在旋律或音乐中变得突出时，它们仍然不准确——特别是在朗诵段落中。在本文中，我们通过建议并行使用两个专用跟踪器来解决这个特定问题，一个专注于音乐，另一个专注于语音敏感功能。我们首先对语音相关特征进行系统研究，目标是同一歌剧不同表演中相应宣叙调的精确对齐。然后，我们基于预先训练的音乐和语音分类器提出不同的解决方案，将两个跟踪器结合起来，以提高整个歌剧过程中的全局准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决实时歌剧跟踪中因宣叙调（recitativo）段落导致的对齐不准确问题，提出结合音乐和语音特征的双追踪器方法。
AI.motivation: 现有音频对齐算法在歌剧中的宣叙调部分（以文本为主、旋律为辅）表现不佳，影响了实时歌词显示、摄像机控制等应用的准确性。
AI.method: 设计两个并行追踪器：一个专注于音乐特征，另一个针对语音特征；通过预训练的音乐与语音分类器融合两者结果，提升整体对齐精度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法有效提高了整个歌剧过程中的对齐准确性，尤其在宣叙调段落表现显著优于单一追踪器。
AI.conclusion: 结合音乐与语音特征的双追踪器框架能有效解决宣叙调对齐难题，为实时歌剧跟踪系统提供更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: J. M. A. Sarr,T. Brochier,P. Brehmer,Y. Perrot,A. Bah,A. Sarré,M. A. Jeyid,M. Sidibeh,S. El Ayoub
title: Complex data labeling with deep learning methods: Lessons from fisheries acoustics
title_zh: 使用深度学习方法标记复杂数据：渔业声学的经验教训
abstract: Quantitative and qualitative analysis of acoustic backscattered signals from the seabed bottom to the sea surface is used worldwide for fish stocks assessment and marine ecosystem monitoring. Huge amounts of raw data are collected yet require tedious expert labeling. This paper focuses on a case study where the ground truth labels are non-obvious: echograms labeling, which is time-consuming and critical for the quality of fisheries and ecological analysis. We investigate how these tasks can benefit from supervised learning algorithms and demonstrate that convolutional neural networks trained with non-stationary datasets can be used to stress parts of a new dataset needing human expert correction. Further development of this approach paves the way toward a standardization of the labeling process in fisheries acoustics and is a good case study for non-obvious data labeling processes.
summary: Quantitative and qualitative analysis of acoustic backscattered signals from the seabed bottom to the sea surface is used worldwide for fish stocks assessment and marine ecosystem monitoring. Huge amounts of raw data are collected yet require tedious expert labeling. This paper focuses on a case study where the ground truth labels are non-obvious: echograms labeling, which is time-consuming and critical for the quality of fisheries and ecological analysis. We investigate how these tasks can benefit from supervised learning algorithms and demonstrate that convolutional neural networks trained with non-stationary datasets can be used to stress parts of a new dataset needing human expert correction. Further development of this approach paves the way toward a standardization of the labeling process in fisheries acoustics and is a good case study for non-obvious data labeling processes.
abstract_zh: 从海底底部到海面的声学反向散射信号的定量和定性分析在全世界范围内用于鱼类种群评估和海洋生态系统监测。收集了大量的原始数据，但需要繁琐的专家标记。本文重点关注真实标签不明显的案例研究：回波图标签，这对于渔业和生态分析的质量来说既耗时又至关重要。我们研究了这些任务如何从监督学习算法中受益，并证明使用非平稳数据集训练的卷积神经网络可用于对需要人类专家校正的新数据集的部分进行压力。这种方法的进一步发展为渔业声学标记过程的标准化铺平了道路，并且是非明显数据标记过程的一个很好的案例研究。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了利用深度学习方法改进渔业声学中复杂数据标注流程的可行性，并通过卷积神经网络辅助专家修正标注误差。
AI.motivation: 渔业声学数据标注依赖专家人工完成，但存在耗时、主观性强且难以标准化的问题，亟需自动化方法提升效率与一致性。
AI.method: 采用监督学习算法，特别是卷积神经网络（CNN），通过训练非平稳数据集识别需人工修正的标注异常区域。
AI.result: 证明CNN能有效定位需专家干预的标注问题区域，为渔业声学标注流程标准化提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂数据标注提供了可推广的案例，推动渔业声学领域向自动化标注方向发展。

search_text: Complex data labeling with deep learning methods: Lessons from fisheries acoustics 使用深度学习方法标记复杂数据：渔业声学的经验教训 Quantitative and qualitative analysis of acoustic backscattered signals from the seabed bottom to the sea surface is used worldwide for fish stocks assessment and marine ecosystem monitoring. Huge amounts of raw data are collected yet require tedious expert labeling. This paper focuses on a case study where the ground truth labels are non-obvious: echograms labeling, which is time-consuming and critical for the quality of fisheries and ecological analysis. We investigate how these tasks can benefit from supervised learning algorithms and demonstrate that convolutional neural networks trained with non-stationary datasets can be used to stress parts of a new dataset needing human expert correction. Further development of this approach paves the way toward a standardization of the labeling process in fisheries acoustics and is a good case study for non-obvious data labeling processes. 从海底底部到海面的声学反向散射信号的定量和定性分析在全世界范围内用于鱼类种群评估和海洋生态系统监测。收集了大量的原始数据，但需要繁琐的专家标记。本文重点关注真实标签不明显的案例研究：回波图标签，这对于渔业和生态分析的质量来说既耗时又至关重要。我们研究了这些任务如何从监督学习算法中受益，并证明使用非平稳数据集训练的卷积神经网络可用于对需要人类专家校正的新数据集的部分进行压力。这种方法的进一步发展为渔业声学标记过程的标准化铺平了道路，并且是非明显数据标记过程的一个很好的案例研究。 本文探讨了利用深度学习方法改进渔业声学中复杂数据标注流程的可行性，并通过卷积神经网络辅助专家修正标注误差。 J. M. A. Sarr,T. Brochier,P. Brehmer,Y. Perrot,A. Bah,A. Sarré,M. A. Jeyid,M. Sidibeh,S. El Ayoub cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: What is Wrong with Continual Learning in Medical Image Segmentation?
title_zh: 医学图像分割中的持续学习有什么问题？
abstract: Continual learning protocols are attracting increasing attention from the medical imaging community. In continual environments, datasets acquired under different conditions arrive sequentially; and each is only available for a limited period of time. Given the inherent privacy risks associated with medical data, this setup reflects the reality of deployment for deep learning diagnostic radiology systems. Many techniques exist to learn continuously for image classification, and several have been adapted to semantic segmentation. Yet most struggle to accumulate knowledge in a meaningful manner. Instead, they focus on preventing the problem of catastrophic forgetting, even when this reduces model plasticity and thereon burdens the training process. This puts into question whether the additional overhead of knowledge preservation is worth it - particularly for medical image segmentation, where computation requirements are already high - or if maintaining separate models would be a better solution. We propose UNEG, a simple and widely applicable multi-model benchmark that maintains separate segmentation and autoencoder networks for each training stage. The autoencoder is built from the same architecture as the segmentation network, which in our case is a full-resolution nnU-Net, to bypass any additional design decisions. During inference, the reconstruction error is used to select the most appropriate segmenter for each test image. Open this concept, we develop a fair evaluation scheme for different continual learning settings that moves beyond the prevention of catastrophic forgetting. Our results across three regions of interest (prostate, hippocampus, and right ventricle) show that UNEG outperforms several continual learning methods, reinforcing the need for strong baselines in continual learning research.
summary: Continual learning protocols are attracting increasing attention from the medical imaging community. In continual environments, datasets acquired under different conditions arrive sequentially; and each is only available for a limited period of time. Given the inherent privacy risks associated with medical data, this setup reflects the reality of deployment for deep learning diagnostic radiology systems. Many techniques exist to learn continuously for image classification, and several have been adapted to semantic segmentation. Yet most struggle to accumulate knowledge in a meaningful manner. Instead, they focus on preventing the problem of catastrophic forgetting, even when this reduces model plasticity and thereon burdens the training process. This puts into question whether the additional overhead of knowledge preservation is worth it - particularly for medical image segmentation, where computation requirements are already high - or if maintaining separate models would be a better solution. We propose UNEG, a simple and widely applicable multi-model benchmark that maintains separate segmentation and autoencoder networks for each training stage. The autoencoder is built from the same architecture as the segmentation network, which in our case is a full-resolution nnU-Net, to bypass any additional design decisions. During inference, the reconstruction error is used to select the most appropriate segmenter for each test image. Open this concept, we develop a fair evaluation scheme for different continual learning settings that moves beyond the prevention of catastrophic forgetting. Our results across three regions of interest (prostate, hippocampus, and right ventricle) show that UNEG outperforms several continual learning methods, reinforcing the need for strong baselines in continual learning research.
abstract_zh: 持续学习协议正在吸引医学成像界越来越多的关注。在连续环境中，不同条件下获取的数据集依次到达；并且每个都只能在有限的时间内使用。考虑到与医疗数据相关的固有隐私风险，这种设置反映了深度学习诊断放射学系统部署的现实。存在许多可以持续学习图像分类的技术，其中一些技术已适用于语义分割。然而，大多数人都在努力以有意义的方式积累知识。相反，他们专注于防止灾难性遗忘问题，即使这会降低模型的可塑性并因此增加训练过程的负担。这就让人质疑知识保存的额外开销是否值得——特别是对于计算要求已经很高的医学图像分割——或者维护单独的模型是否是更好的解决方案。我们提出 UNEG，一个简单且广泛适用的多模型基准，为每个训练阶段维护单独的分割和自动编码器网络。自动编码器采用与分割网络相同的架构构建，在我们的例子中是全分辨率 nnU-Net，以绕过任何额外的设计决策。在推理过程中，重建误差用于为每个测试图像选择最合适的分割器。打开这个概念，我们为不同的持续学习环境制定了一个公平的评估方案，其目的不仅仅是防止灾难性遗忘。我们对三个感兴趣区域（前列腺、海马体和右心室）的结果表明，UNEG 优于几种持续学习方法，这强化了持续学习研究中对强有力基线的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了持续学习在医学图像分割中的局限性，并提出了一种新的多模型基准UNEG以解决该问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据因隐私问题需分阶段处理，但现有持续学习方法过度关注防止灾难性遗忘，导致计算负担加重且效果有限，需寻找更高效方案。
AI.method: 提出UNEG方法，为每个训练阶段维护独立的分割网络和自编码器，利用重建误差选择最优分割模型，避免额外设计决策。
AI.result: 在前列腺、海马体和右心室三个区域的实验中，UNEG表现优于多种持续学习方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 持续学习在医学图像分割中需更可靠的基线方法，维护独立模型可能比知识保留更优。

title: Unsupervised Multiple Choices Question Answering: Start Learning from Basic Knowledge
title_zh: 无监督多项选择问答：从基础知识开始学习
abstract: In this paper, we study the possibility of almost unsupervised Multiple Choices Question Answering (MCQA). Starting from very basic knowledge, MCQA model knows that some choices have higher probabilities of being correct than the others. The information, though very noisy, guides the training of an MCQA model. The proposed method is shown to outperform the baseline approaches on RACE and even comparable with some supervised learning approaches on MC500.
summary: In this paper, we study the possibility of almost unsupervised Multiple Choices Question Answering (MCQA). Starting from very basic knowledge, MCQA model knows that some choices have higher probabilities of being correct than the others. The information, though very noisy, guides the training of an MCQA model. The proposed method is shown to outperform the baseline approaches on RACE and even comparable with some supervised learning approaches on MC500.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了几乎无监督的多项选择问答（MCQA）的可能性。从非常基础的知识开始，MCQA 模型知道某些选择比其他选择具有更高的正确概率。这些信息虽然非常嘈杂，但却指导着 MCQA 模型的训练。所提出的方法在 RACE 上表现优于基线方法，甚至可以与 MC500 上的一些监督学习方法相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在几乎无监督条件下进行多选题问答（MCQA）的可能性，通过利用基础知识中的选项概率信息指导模型训练。
AI.motivation: 传统MCQA方法依赖大量标注数据，而本文旨在减少对监督数据的依赖，探索从基础知识出发的无监督学习方法。
AI.method: 提出利用选项间的相对概率作为噪声指导信号，通过自监督方式训练模型，无需显式标注。
AI.result: 在RACE数据集上优于基线方法，在MC500数据集上效果与部分监督学习方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了无监督学习在MCQA任务中的有效性，为减少标注依赖提供了新思路。

authors_text: Aditya Kalyanpur,Or Biran,Tom Breloff,Jennifer Chu-Carroll,Ariel Diertani,Owen Rambow,Mark Sammons
title: Open-Domain Frame Semantic Parsing Using Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行开放域框架语义解析
abstract: Frame semantic parsing is a complex problem which includes multiple underlying subtasks. Recent approaches have employed joint learning of subtasks (such as predicate and argument detection), and multi-task learning of related tasks (such as syntactic and semantic parsing). In this paper, we explore multi-task learning of all subtasks with transformer-based models. We show that a purely generative encoder-decoder architecture handily beats the previous state of the art in FrameNet 1.7 parsing, and that a mixed decoding multi-task approach achieves even better performance. Finally, we show that the multi-task model also outperforms recent state of the art systems for PropBank SRL parsing on the CoNLL 2012 benchmark.
summary: Frame semantic parsing is a complex problem which includes multiple underlying subtasks. Recent approaches have employed joint learning of subtasks (such as predicate and argument detection), and multi-task learning of related tasks (such as syntactic and semantic parsing). In this paper, we explore multi-task learning of all subtasks with transformer-based models. We show that a purely generative encoder-decoder architecture handily beats the previous state of the art in FrameNet 1.7 parsing, and that a mixed decoding multi-task approach achieves even better performance. Finally, we show that the multi-task model also outperforms recent state of the art systems for PropBank SRL parsing on the CoNLL 2012 benchmark.
abstract_zh: 帧语义解析是一个复杂的问题，包括多个底层子任务。最近的方法采用了子任务的联合学习（例如谓词和参数检测）以及相关任务的多任务学习（例如句法和语义解析）。在本文中，我们利用基于变压器的模型探索所有子任务的多任务学习。我们表明，纯粹的生成式编码器-解码器架构轻松击败了 FrameNet 1.7 解析中的先前技术水平，并且混合解码多任务方法实现了更好的性能。最后，我们表明，在 CoNLL 2012 基准测试中，多任务模型的性能也优于最新的 PropBank SRL 解析系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的多任务学习框架，用于开放域帧语义解析任务，同时处理多个子任务并提升解析性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅联合学习部分子任务或单独优化相关任务，未能充分挖掘多任务间协同效应，限制了解析效果。
AI.method: 采用生成式编码器-解码器架构，结合混合解码策略，统一建模帧语义解析的多子任务（如谓词检测、论元识别等）。
AI.result: 在FrameNet 1.7数据集上超越先前最优结果，在CoNLL 2012 PropBank SRL基准测试中也取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习能有效提升帧语义解析效果，混合解码策略进一步优化模型表现，为复杂语义解析任务提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的多任务学习框架，用于开放域帧语义解析任务，同时处理多个子任务并提升解析性能。

ai_content.conclusion: 多任务学习能有效提升帧语义解析效果，混合解码策略进一步优化模型表现，为复杂语义解析任务提供新思路。

search_text: Open-Domain Frame Semantic Parsing Using Transformers 使用 Transformer 进行开放域框架语义解析 Frame semantic parsing is a complex problem which includes multiple underlying subtasks. Recent approaches have employed joint learning of subtasks (such as predicate and argument detection), and multi-task learning of related tasks (such as syntactic and semantic parsing). In this paper, we explore multi-task learning of all subtasks with transformer-based models. We show that a purely generative encoder-decoder architecture handily beats the previous state of the art in FrameNet 1.7 parsing, and that a mixed decoding multi-task approach achieves even better performance. Finally, we show that the multi-task model also outperforms recent state of the art systems for PropBank SRL parsing on the CoNLL 2012 benchmark. 帧语义解析是一个复杂的问题，包括多个底层子任务。最近的方法采用了子任务的联合学习（例如谓词和参数检测）以及相关任务的多任务学习（例如句法和语义解析）。在本文中，我们利用基于变压器的模型探索所有子任务的多任务学习。我们表明，纯粹的生成式编码器-解码器架构轻松击败了 FrameNet 1.7 解析中的先前技术水平，并且混合解码多任务方法实现了更好的性能。最后，我们表明，在 CoNLL 2012 基准测试中，多任务模型的性能也优于最新的 PropBank SRL 解析系统。 本文提出基于Transformer的多任务学习框架，用于开放域帧语义解析任务，同时处理多个子任务并提升解析性能。 Aditya Kalyanpur,Or Biran,Tom Breloff,Jennifer Chu-Carroll,Ariel Diertani,Owen Rambow,Mark Sammons cs.CL,cs.AI

title: A Neurochaos Learning Architecture for Genome Classification
title_zh: 用于基因组分类的神经混沌学习架构
abstract: There has been empirical evidence of presence of non-linearity and chaos at the level of single neurons in biological neural networks. The properties of chaotic neurons inspires us to employ them in artificial learning systems. Here, we propose a Neurochaos Learning (NL) architecture, where the neurons used to extract features from data are 1D chaotic maps. ChaosFEX+SVM, an instance of this NL architecture, is proposed as a hybrid combination of chaos and classical machine learning algorithm. We formally prove that a single layer of NL with a finite number of 1D chaotic neurons satisfies the Universal Approximation Theorem with an exact value for the number of chaotic neurons needed to approximate a discrete real valued function with finite support. This is made possible due to the topological transitivity property of chaos and the existence of uncountably infinite number of dense orbits for the chosen 1D chaotic map. The chaotic neurons in NL get activated under the presence of an input stimulus (data) and output a chaotic firing trajectory. From such chaotic firing trajectories of individual neurons of NL, we extract Firing Time, Firing Rate, Energy and Entropy that constitute ChaosFEX features. These ChaosFEX features are then fed to a Support Vector Machine with linear kernel for classification. The effectiveness of chaotic feature engineering performed by NL (ChaosFEX+SVM) is demonstrated for synthetic and real world datasets in the low and high training sample regimes. Specifically, we consider the problem of classification of genome sequences of SARS-CoV-2 from other coronaviruses (SARS-CoV-1, MERS-CoV and others). With just one training sample per class for 1000 random trials of training, we report an average macro F1-score > 0.99 for the classification of SARS-CoV-2 from SARS-CoV-1 genome sequences. Robustness of ChaosFEX features to additive noise is also demonstrated.

abstract_zh: 有经验证据表明生物神经网络中单个神经元水平存在非线性和混沌。混沌神经元的特性启发我们将它们应用于人工学习系统。在这里，我们提出了一种神经混沌学习（NL）架构，其中用于从数据中提取特征的神经元是一维混沌图。 ChaosFEX+SVM 是这种 NL 架构的一个实例，被提出作为混沌和经典机器学习算法的混合组合。我们正式证明，具有有限数量的一维混沌神经元的单层 NL 满足通用逼近定理，并且具有逼近具有有限支持的离散实值函数所需的混沌神经元数量的精确值。这是由于混沌的拓扑传递性以及所选一维混沌映射存在无数个密集轨道而成为可能的。 NL 中的混沌神经元在输入刺激（数据）的存在下被激活并输出混沌放电轨迹。从 NL 单个神经元的混沌放电轨迹中，我们提取构成 ChaosFEX 特征的放电时间、放电速率、能量和熵。然后将这些 ChaosFEX 特征输入到具有线性内核的支持向量机进行分类。 NL (ChaosFEX+SVM) 执行的混沌特征工程的有效性在低和高训练样本体系中的合成数据集和现实世界数据集上得到了证明。具体来说，我们考虑将 SARS-CoV-2 的基因组序列与其他冠状病毒（SARS-CoV-1、MERS-CoV 等）进行分类的问题。通过每类仅使用一个训练样本进行 1000 次随机训练试验，我们报告了从 SARS-CoV-1 基因组序列中分类 SARS-CoV-2 的平均宏观 F1 分数 > 0.99。还展示了 ChaosFEX 功能对加性噪声的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混沌神经元的新型机器学习架构NL（Neurochaos Learning），通过混沌特征提取（ChaosFEX）与支持向量机结合，实现对基因组序列（特别是SARS-CoV-2）的高效分类。
AI.motivation: 生物神经元存在混沌特性，这种非线性动力学行为可能赋予人工神经网络更强的函数逼近能力和特征表达能力，尤其在小样本场景下具有潜在优势。
AI.method: 设计单层混沌神经网络，使用1D混沌映射作为特征提取器，通过混沌神经元的激发轨迹提取时间、能量、熵等特征（ChaosFEX），输入线性核SVM进行分类。理论上证明该架构满足通用逼近定理。
AI.result: 在仅1个样本/类的极端小样本条件下，1000次随机试验中SARS-CoV-2与SARS-CoV-1分类的平均宏F1分数达0.99以上，且特征对加性噪声具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 混沌特征工程方法（ChaosFEX+SVM）在基因组分类任务中表现出显著优越性，尤其适用于样本稀缺场景，为生物序列分析提供新范式。

authors_text: L. Elisa Celis,Chris Hays,Anay Mehrotra,Nisheeth K. Vishnoi
title: The Effect of the Rooney Rule on Implicit Bias in the Long Term
title_zh: 鲁尼规则对隐性偏见的长期影响
comment: Abstract shortened to satisfy the 1920 character limit
comments: Abstract shortened to satisfy the 1920 character limit
abstract: A robust body of evidence demonstrates the adverse effects of implicit bias in various contexts--from hiring to health care. The Rooney Rule is an intervention developed to counter implicit bias and has been implemented in the private and public sectors. The Rooney Rule requires that a selection panel include at least one candidate from an underrepresented group in their shortlist of candidates. Recently, Kleinberg and Raghavan proposed a model of implicit bias and studied the effectiveness of the Rooney Rule when applied to a single selection decision. However, selection decisions often occur repeatedly over time. Further, it has been observed that, given consistent counterstereotypical feedback, implicit biases against underrepresented candidates can change. We consider a model of how a selection panel's implicit bias changes over time given their hiring decisions either with or without the Rooney Rule in place. Our main result is that, when the panel is constrained by the Rooney Rule, their implicit bias roughly reduces at a rate that is the inverse of the size of the shortlist--independent of the number of candidates, whereas without the Rooney Rule, the rate is inversely proportional to the number of candidates. Thus, when the number of candidates is much larger than the size of the shortlist, the Rooney Rule enables a faster reduction in implicit bias, providing an additional reason in favor of using it as a strategy to mitigate implicit bias. Towards empirically evaluating the long-term effect of the Rooney Rule in repeated selection decisions, we conduct an iterative candidate selection experiment on Amazon MTurk. We observe that, indeed, decision-makers subject to the Rooney Rule select more minority candidates in addition to those required by the rule itself than they would if no rule is in effect, and do so without considerably decreasing the utility of candidates selected.

The Rooney Rule is an intervention developed to counter implicit bias and has been implemented in the private and public sectors. The Rooney Rule requires that a selection panel include at least one candidate from an underrepresented group in their shortlist of candidates. Recently, Kleinberg and Raghavan proposed a model of implicit bias and studied the effectiveness of the Rooney Rule when applied to a single selection decision. However, selection decisions often occur repeatedly over time. Further, it has been observed that, given consistent counterstereotypical feedback, implicit biases against underrepresented candidates can change. We consider a model of how a selection panel's implicit bias changes over time given their hiring decisions either with or without the Rooney Rule in place. Our main result is that, when the panel is constrained by the Rooney Rule, their implicit bias roughly reduces at a rate that is the inverse of the size of the shortlist--independent of the number of candidates, whereas without the Rooney Rule, the rate is inversely proportional to the number of candidates. Thus, when the number of candidates is much larger than the size of the shortlist, the Rooney Rule enables a faster reduction in implicit bias, providing an additional reason in favor of using it as a strategy to mitigate implicit bias. Towards empirically evaluating the long-term effect of the Rooney Rule in repeated selection decisions, we conduct an iterative candidate selection experiment on Amazon MTurk. We observe that, indeed, decision-makers subject to the Rooney Rule select more minority candidates in addition to those required by the rule itself than they would if no rule is in effect, and do so without considerably decreasing the utility of candidates selected.
abstract_zh: 大量证据表明隐性偏见在各种情况下（从招聘到医疗保健）都会产生不利影响。鲁尼规则是一项旨在对抗隐性偏见的干预措施，已在私营和公共部门实施。鲁尼规则要求遴选小组在其候选名单中至少包括一名来自代表性不足群体的候选人。最近，Kleinberg 和 Raghavan 提出了隐性偏差模型，并研究了鲁尼规则应用于单个选择决策时的有效性。然而，随着时间的推移，选择决策往往会反复发生。此外，据观察，如果给予一致的反刻板印象反馈，针对代表性不足的候选人的隐性偏见可能会改变。我们考虑一个模型，该模型显示选择小组的隐性偏见如何随着时间的推移而变化，无论是否存在鲁尼规则。我们的主要结果是，当专家组受到鲁尼规则的约束时，他们的隐性偏见大致以入围名单规模的倒数减少——与候选人数量无关，而没有鲁尼规则，该比率与候选人数量成反比。因此，当候选人数量远大于入围名单的规模时，鲁尼规则可以更快地减少隐性偏见，为支持将其用作减轻隐性偏见的策略提供了额外的理由。为了凭经验评估鲁尼规则在重复选择决策中的长期影响，我们在 Amazon MTurk 上进行了迭代候选选择实验。我们观察到，事实上，与没有规则生效的情况相比，受鲁尼规则约束的决策者除了规则本身要求的候选人之外还选择了更多的少数族裔候选人，而且这样做并没有显着降低所选候选人的效用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Rooney规则在长期重复选拔决策中对隐性偏见的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注单次选拔决策中Rooney规则的效果，但实际中选拔决策常重复发生，且持续的反刻板印象反馈可能改变隐性偏见。需探讨规则在长期应用中的动态效果。
AI.method: 构建隐性偏见随时间变化的模型，分析有无Rooney规则下偏见减少速率差异；通过Amazon MTurk进行迭代候选人选拔实验验证理论结果。
AI.result: Rooney规则下偏见减少速率与短名单规模成反比，且独立于候选人总数；实验显示规则强制下决策者额外选择更多少数群体候选人，同时保持选拔质量。
AI.conclusion: Rooney规则能加速长期隐性偏见的减少，尤其当候选人数量远超短名单规模时效果显著，支持其作为缓解偏见的策略。

search_text: The Effect of the Rooney Rule on Implicit Bias in the Long Term 鲁尼规则对隐性偏见的长期影响 A robust body of evidence demonstrates the adverse effects of implicit bias in various contexts--from hiring to health care. The Rooney Rule is an intervention developed to counter implicit bias and has been implemented in the private and public sectors. The Rooney Rule requires that a selection panel include at least one candidate from an underrepresented group in their shortlist of candidates. Recently, Kleinberg and Raghavan proposed a model of implicit bias and studied the effectiveness of the Rooney Rule when applied to a single selection decision. However, selection decisions often occur repeatedly over time. Further, it has been observed that, given consistent counterstereotypical feedback, implicit biases against underrepresented candidates can change. We consider a model of how a selection panel's implicit bias changes over time given their hiring decisions either with or without the Rooney Rule in place. Our main result is that, when the panel is constrained by the Rooney Rule, their implicit bias roughly reduces at a rate that is the inverse of the size of the shortlist--independent of the number of candidates, whereas without the Rooney Rule, the rate is inversely proportional to the number of candidates. Thus, when the number of candidates is much larger than the size of the shortlist, the Rooney Rule enables a faster reduction in implicit bias, providing an additional reason in favor of using it as a strategy to mitigate implicit bias. Towards empirically evaluating the long-term effect of the Rooney Rule in repeated selection decisions, we conduct an iterative candidate selection experiment on Amazon MTurk. We observe that, indeed, decision-makers subject to the Rooney Rule select more minority candidates in addition to those required by the rule itself than they would if no rule is in effect, and do so without considerably decreasing the utility of candidates selected. 大量证据表明隐性偏见在各种情况下（从招聘到医疗保健）都会产生不利影响。鲁尼规则是一项旨在对抗隐性偏见的干预措施，已在私营和公共部门实施。鲁尼规则要求遴选小组在其候选名单中至少包括一名来自代表性不足群体的候选人。最近，Kleinberg 和 Raghavan 提出了隐性偏差模型，并研究了鲁尼规则应用于单个选择决策时的有效性。然而，随着时间的推移，选择决策往往会反复发生。此外，据观察，如果给予一致的反刻板印象反馈，针对代表性不足的候选人的隐性偏见可能会改变。我们考虑一个模型，该模型显示选择小组的隐性偏见如何随着时间的推移而变化，无论是否存在鲁尼规则。我们的主要结果是，当专家组受到鲁尼规则的约束时，他们的隐性偏见大致以入围名单规模的倒数减少——与候选人数量无关，而没有鲁尼规则，该比率与候选人数量成反比。因此，当候选人数量远大于入围名单的规模时，鲁尼规则可以更快地减少隐性偏见，为支持将其用作减轻隐性偏见的策略提供了额外的理由。为了凭经验评估鲁尼规则在重复选择决策中的长期影响，我们在 Amazon MTurk 上进行了迭代候选选择实验。我们观察到，事实上，与没有规则生效的情况相比，受鲁尼规则约束的决策者除了规则本身要求的候选人之外还选择了更多的少数族裔候选人，而且这样做并没有显着降低所选候选人的效用。 本文研究了Rooney规则在长期重复选拔决策中对隐性偏见的影响。 L. Elisa Celis,Chris Hays,Anay Mehrotra,Nisheeth K. Vishnoi cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.CO

title: Amnesiac Machine Learning
title_zh: 失忆的机器学习
abstract: The Right to be Forgotten is part of the recently enacted General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) law that affects any data holder that has data on European Union residents. It gives EU residents the ability to request deletion of their personal data, including training records used to train machine learning models. Unfortunately, Deep Neural Network models are vulnerable to information leaking attacks such as model inversion attacks which extract class information from a trained model and membership inference attacks which determine the presence of an example in a model's training data. If a malicious party can mount an attack and learn private information that was meant to be removed, then it implies that the model owner has not properly protected their user's rights and their models may not be compliant with the GDPR law. In this paper, we present two efficient methods that address this question of how a model owner or data holder may delete personal data from models in such a way that they may not be vulnerable to model inversion and membership inference attacks while maintaining model efficacy. We start by presenting a real-world threat model that shows that simply removing training data is insufficient to protect users. We follow that up with two data removal methods, namely Unlearning and Amnesiac Unlearning, that enable model owners to protect themselves against such attacks while being compliant with regulations. We provide extensive empirical analysis that show that these methods are indeed efficient, safe to apply, effectively remove learned information about sensitive data from trained models while maintaining model efficacy.
summary: The Right to be Forgotten is part of the recently enacted General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) law that affects any data holder that has data on European Union residents. It gives EU residents the ability to request deletion of their personal data, including training records used to train machine learning models. Unfortunately, Deep Neural Network models are vulnerable to information leaking attacks such as model inversion attacks which extract class information from a trained model and membership inference attacks which determine the presence of an example in a model's training data. If a malicious party can mount an attack and learn private information that was meant to be removed, then it implies that the model owner has not properly protected their user's rights and their models may not be compliant with the GDPR law. In this paper, we present two efficient methods that address this question of how a model owner or data holder may delete personal data from models in such a way that they may not be vulnerable to model inversion and membership inference attacks while maintaining model efficacy. We start by presenting a real-world threat model that shows that simply removing training data is insufficient to protect users. We follow that up with two data removal methods, namely Unlearning and Amnesiac Unlearning, that enable model owners to protect themselves against such attacks while being compliant with regulations. We provide extensive empirical analysis that show that these methods are indeed efficient, safe to apply, effectively remove learned information about sensitive data from trained models while maintaining model efficacy.
abstract_zh: 被遗忘权是最近颁布的《通用数据保护条例》(GDPR) 法律的一部分，该法律影响任何拥有欧盟居民数据的数据持有者。它使欧盟居民能够请求删除其个人数据，包括用于训练机器学习模型的训练记录。不幸的是，深度神经网络模型容易受到信息泄露攻击，例如从训练模型中提取类信息的模型反转攻击和确定模型训练数据中示例是否存在的成员推理攻击。如果恶意方可以发起攻击并获悉本应删除的私人信息，则意味着模型所有者没有适当保护其用户权利，并且他们的模型可能不符合 GDPR 法律。在本文中，我们提出了两种有效的方法来解决模型所有者或数据持有者如何从模型中删除个人数据的问题，以便他们在保持模型有效性的同时不易受到模型反转和成员推理攻击的影响。我们首先提出一个现实世界的威胁模型，该模型表明简单地删除训练数据不足以保护用户。我们随后采用了两种数据删除方法，即“Unlearning”和“Amnesiac Unlearning”，使模型所有者能够在遵守法规的同时保护自己免受此类攻击。我们提供了广泛的实证分析，表明这些方法确实高效、应用安全，可以有效地从训练模型中删除有关敏感数据的学习信息，同时保持模型功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种高效方法（Unlearning和Amnesiac Unlearning），帮助机器学习模型在符合GDPR法规的前提下删除用户数据，同时防止模型信息泄露攻击。
AI.motivation: GDPR赋予欧盟居民删除个人数据的权利，但深度学习模型易受模型逆向和成员推断攻击，单纯删除训练数据无法保障用户隐私和合规性。
AI.method: 构建现实威胁模型证明简单删除数据不足，提出两种数据删除方法：Unlearning通过重新训练模型实现数据遗忘，Amnesiac Unlearning则通过扰动模型参数实现更高效的数据移除。
AI.result: 实验表明两种方法在保持模型性能的同时，有效移除了敏感数据信息，并能抵御信息泄露攻击。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为模型所有者提供了兼顾GDPR合规性和模型安全性的数据删除方案，解决了隐私保护与模型效用之间的矛盾。

authors_text: Koichiro Niinuma,Itir Onal Ertugrul,Jeffrey F Cohn,László A Jeni
title: Synthetic Expressions are Better Than Real for Learning to Detect Facial Actions
title_zh: 合成表情比真实表情更适合学习检测面部动作
abstract: Critical obstacles in training classifiers to detect facial actions are the limited sizes of annotated video databases and the relatively low frequencies of occurrence of many actions. To address these problems, we propose an approach that makes use of facial expression generation. Our approach reconstructs the 3D shape of the face from each video frame, aligns the 3D mesh to a canonical view, and then trains a GAN-based network to synthesize novel images with facial action units of interest. To evaluate this approach, a deep neural network was trained on two separate datasets: One network was trained on video of synthesized facial expressions generated from FERA17; the other network was trained on unaltered video from the same database. Both networks used the same train and validation partitions and were tested on the test partition of actual video from FERA17. The network trained on synthesized facial expressions outperformed the one trained on actual facial expressions and surpassed current state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Critical obstacles in training classifiers to detect facial actions are the limited sizes of annotated video databases and the relatively low frequencies of occurrence of many actions. To address these problems, we propose an approach that makes use of facial expression generation. Our approach reconstructs the 3D shape of the face from each video frame, aligns the 3D mesh to a canonical view, and then trains a GAN-based network to synthesize novel images with facial action units of interest. To evaluate this approach, a deep neural network was trained on two separate datasets: One network was trained on video of synthesized facial expressions generated from FERA17; the other network was trained on unaltered video from the same database. Both networks used the same train and validation partitions and were tested on the test partition of actual video from FERA17. The network trained on synthesized facial expressions outperformed the one trained on actual facial expressions and surpassed current state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 训练分类器检测面部动作的关键障碍是带注释的视频数据库的大小有限以及许多动作发生的频率相对较低。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种利用面部表情生成的方法。我们的方法根据每个视频帧重建面部的 3D 形状，将 3D 网格与规范视图对齐，然后训练基于 GAN 的网络来合成具有感兴趣的面部动作单元的新颖图像。为了评估这种方法，我们在两个独立的数据集上训练了一个深度神经网络：一个网络使用 FERA17 生成的合成面部表情视频进行训练；另一个网络使用 FERA17 生成的合成面部表情视频进行训练；另一个网络使用 FERA17 生成的合成面部表情视频进行训练。另一个网络接受来自同一数据库的未更改视频的训练。两个网络都使用相同的训练和验证分区，并在 FERA17 的实际视频的测试分区上进行了测试。基于合成面部表情训练的网络优于基于实际面部表情训练的网络，并超越了当前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用生成的面部表情数据来提升面部动作检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有标注视频数据库规模有限且面部动作出现频率低，制约了分类器的训练效果。
AI.method: 通过三维面部重建与对齐，使用GAN生成目标面部动作单元的合成图像，并在FERA17数据集上训练对比实测数据与合成数据的检测网络。
AI.result: 基于合成表情训练的网络在FERA17测试集上表现优于真实数据训练网络及现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 合成面部表情数据能有效提升面部动作检测模型的性能，优于传统真实数据训练方法。

search_text: Synthetic Expressions are Better Than Real for Learning to Detect Facial Actions 合成表情比真实表情更适合学习检测面部动作 Critical obstacles in training classifiers to detect facial actions are the limited sizes of annotated video databases and the relatively low frequencies of occurrence of many actions. To address these problems, we propose an approach that makes use of facial expression generation. Our approach reconstructs the 3D shape of the face from each video frame, aligns the 3D mesh to a canonical view, and then trains a GAN-based network to synthesize novel images with facial action units of interest. To evaluate this approach, a deep neural network was trained on two separate datasets: One network was trained on video of synthesized facial expressions generated from FERA17; the other network was trained on unaltered video from the same database. Both networks used the same train and validation partitions and were tested on the test partition of actual video from FERA17. The network trained on synthesized facial expressions outperformed the one trained on actual facial expressions and surpassed current state-of-the-art approaches. 训练分类器检测面部动作的关键障碍是带注释的视频数据库的大小有限以及许多动作发生的频率相对较低。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种利用面部表情生成的方法。我们的方法根据每个视频帧重建面部的 3D 形状，将 3D 网格与规范视图对齐，然后训练基于 GAN 的网络来合成具有感兴趣的面部动作单元的新颖图像。为了评估这种方法，我们在两个独立的数据集上训练了一个深度神经网络：一个网络使用 FERA17 生成的合成面部表情视频进行训练；另一个网络使用 FERA17 生成的合成面部表情视频进行训练；另一个网络使用 FERA17 生成的合成面部表情视频进行训练。另一个网络接受来自同一数据库的未更改视频的训练。两个网络都使用相同的训练和验证分区，并在 FERA17 的实际视频的测试分区上进行了测试。基于合成面部表情训练的网络优于基于实际面部表情训练的网络，并超越了当前最先进的方法。 本文提出利用生成的面部表情数据来提升面部动作检测的性能。 Koichiro Niinuma,Itir Onal Ertugrul,Jeffrey F Cohn,László A Jeni cs.CV

authors_text: Huu Le,Christopher Zach,Edward Rosten,Oliver J. Woodford
title: Progressive Batching for Efficient Non-linear Least Squares
title_zh: 高效非线性最小二乘的渐进批处理
abstract: Non-linear least squares solvers are used across a broad range of offline and real-time model fitting problems. Most improvements of the basic Gauss-Newton algorithm tackle convergence guarantees or leverage the sparsity of the underlying problem structure for computational speedup. With the success of deep learning methods leveraging large datasets, stochastic optimization methods received recently a lot of attention. Our work borrows ideas from both stochastic machine learning and statistics, and we present an approach for non-linear least-squares that guarantees convergence while at the same time significantly reduces the required amount of computation. Empirical results show that our proposed method achieves competitive convergence rates compared to traditional second-order approaches on common computer vision problems, such as image alignment and essential matrix estimation, with very large numbers of residuals.
summary: Non-linear least squares solvers are used across a broad range of offline and real-time model fitting problems. Most improvements of the basic Gauss-Newton algorithm tackle convergence guarantees or leverage the sparsity of the underlying problem structure for computational speedup. With the success of deep learning methods leveraging large datasets, stochastic optimization methods received recently a lot of attention. Our work borrows ideas from both stochastic machine learning and statistics, and we present an approach for non-linear least-squares that guarantees convergence while at the same time significantly reduces the required amount of computation. Empirical results show that our proposed method achieves competitive convergence rates compared to traditional second-order approaches on common computer vision problems, such as image alignment and essential matrix estimation, with very large numbers of residuals.
abstract_zh: 非线性最小二乘求解器广泛用于离线和实时模型拟合问题。基本高斯-牛顿算法的大多数改进都解决了收敛保证或利用底层问题结构的稀疏性来加速计算。随着利用大型数据集的深度学习方法的成功，随机优化方法最近受到了广泛的关注。我们的工作借鉴了随机机器学习和统计学的思想，提出了一种非线性最小二乘方法，可以保证收敛，同时显着减少所需的计算量。经验结果表明，与传统的二阶方法相比，我们提出的方法在常见计算机视觉问题（例如图像对齐和基本矩阵估计）上实现了具有竞争力的收敛速度，并具有大量残差。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合随机优化和统计方法的渐进式批处理技术，用于高效求解非线性最小二乘问题，减少计算量并保证收敛。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在收敛性或计算效率上存在局限，需结合随机优化与统计方法以实现高效且可靠的非线性最小二乘求解。
AI.method: 渐进式批处理方法，结合随机优化与统计学思想，分阶段处理数据批次以减少计算量并确保收敛。
AI.result: 在图像对齐和基本矩阵估计等计算机视觉任务中，收敛速度与传统二阶方法相当，且在大规模残差情况下计算效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功结合随机优化与统计方法，为非线性最小二乘问题提供了高效且可靠的解决方案，适用于大规模数据场景。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种结合随机优化和统计方法的渐进式批处理技术，用于高效求解非线性最小二乘问题，减少计算量并保证收敛。

authors_text: Frederik Wiehr,Anke Hirsch,Florian Daiber,Antonio Kruger,Alisa Kovtunova,Stefan Borgwardt,Ernie Chang,Vera Demberg,Marcel Steinmetz,Hoffmann Jorg
title: Safe Handover in Mixed-Initiative Control for Cyber-Physical Systems
title_zh: 信息物理系统混合主动控制中的安全切换
comment: In Proceedings of Workshop at CHI
comments: In Proceedings of Workshop at CHI
abstract: For mixed-initiative control between cyber-physical systems (CPS) and its users, it is still an open question how machines can safely hand over control to humans. In this work, we propose a concept to provide technological support that uses formal methods from AI -- description logic (DL) and automated planning -- to predict more reliably when a hand-over is necessary, and to increase the advance notice for handovers by planning ahead of runtime. We combine this with methods from human-computer interaction (HCI) and natural language generation (NLG) to develop solutions for safe and smooth handovers and provide an example autonomous driving scenario. A study design is proposed with the assessment of qualitative feedback, cognitive load and trust in automation.
summary: For mixed-initiative control between cyber-physical systems (CPS) and its users, it is still an open question how machines can safely hand over control to humans. In this work, we propose a concept to provide technological support that uses formal methods from AI -- description logic (DL) and automated planning -- to predict more reliably when a hand-over is necessary, and to increase the advance notice for handovers by planning ahead of runtime. We combine this with methods from human-computer interaction (HCI) and natural language generation (NLG) to develop solutions for safe and smooth handovers and provide an example autonomous driving scenario. A study design is proposed with the assessment of qualitative feedback, cognitive load and trust in automation.
abstract_zh: 对于网络物理系统（CPS）及其用户之间的混合主动控制，机器如何安全地将控制权移交给人类仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个概念，使用人工智能的形式化方法——描述逻辑（DL）和自动规划——提供技术支持，以更可靠地预测何时需要移交，并通过提前规划来增加移交的提前通知。我们将其与人机交互（HCI）和自然语言生成（NLG）的方法相结合，开发安全平稳切换的解决方案，并提供自动驾驶场景示例。提出了一项研究设计，评估定性反馈、认知负荷和对自动化的信任。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决混合主动控制中，如何通过技术手段实现安全的人机控制交接问题。
AI.motivation: 当前在混合主动控制场景下，机器如何可靠地预测并提前通知人类进行控制交接仍缺乏有效解决方案。
AI.method: 结合人工智能的形式化方法（描述逻辑、自动规划）与人机交互技术（HCI、NLG），构建预测模型并设计交接流程，通过自动驾驶案例验证。
AI.result: 提出基于形式化方法的交接预测框架，结合HCI/NLG实现安全交接，并设计评估认知负荷与信任度的实验方案。
AI.conclusion: 融合AI与人机交互的方法可提升控制交接的安全性与流畅性，未来需通过实证研究进一步验证有效性。

title: Learning to Guide Local Feature Matches
title_zh: 学习引导局部特征匹配
abstract: We tackle the problem of finding accurate and robust keypoint correspondences between images. We propose a learning-based approach to guide local feature matches via a learned approximate image matching. Our approach can boost the results of SIFT to a level similar to state-of-the-art deep descriptors, such as Superpoint, ContextDesc, or D2-Net and can improve performance for these descriptors. We introduce and study different levels of supervision to learn coarse correspondences. In particular, we show that weak supervision from epipolar geometry leads to performances higher than the stronger but more biased point level supervision and is a clear improvement over weak image level supervision. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach in a variety of conditions by evaluating our guided keypoint correspondences for localization of internet images on the YFCC100M dataset and indoor images on theSUN3D dataset, for robust localization on the Aachen day-night benchmark and for 3D reconstruction in challenging conditions using the LTLL historical image data.
summary: We tackle the problem of finding accurate and robust keypoint correspondences between images. We propose a learning-based approach to guide local feature matches via a learned approximate image matching. Our approach can boost the results of SIFT to a level similar to state-of-the-art deep descriptors, such as Superpoint, ContextDesc, or D2-Net and can improve performance for these descriptors. We introduce and study different levels of supervision to learn coarse correspondences. In particular, we show that weak supervision from epipolar geometry leads to performances higher than the stronger but more biased point level supervision and is a clear improvement over weak image level supervision. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach in a variety of conditions by evaluating our guided keypoint correspondences for localization of internet images on the YFCC100M dataset and indoor images on theSUN3D dataset, for robust localization on the Aachen day-night benchmark and for 3D reconstruction in challenging conditions using the LTLL historical image data.
abstract_zh: 我们解决的问题是找到图像之间准确且可靠的关键点对应关系。我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，通过学习的近似图像匹配来指导局部特征匹配。我们的方法可以将 SIFT 的结果提升到与最先进的深度描述符（例如 Superpoint、ContextDesc 或 D2-Net）类似的水平，并且可以提高这些描述符的性能。我们引入并研究不同级别的监督来学习粗略的对应关系。特别是，我们表明，对极几何的弱监督导致的性能高于更强但更偏向的点级监督，并且比弱图像级监督有明显的改进。我们通过评估我们的引导关键点对应关系来证明我们的方法在各种条件下的优势，这些关键点对应关系用于 YFCC100M 数据集上的互联网图像和 SUN3D 数据集上的室内图像的本地化、亚琛昼夜基准上的稳健定位以及使用 LTLL 历史图像数据在具有挑战性的条件下进行 3D 重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的方法，通过近似图像匹配引导局部特征匹配，以提升关键点对应精度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有特征匹配方法（如SIFT）在复杂场景下精度不足，而深度学习描述符虽先进但需进一步优化，需探索更有效的监督策略以提升匹配鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出学习近似图像匹配模型，结合弱监督（如极线几何约束）与多级监督策略，引导传统特征匹配器（如SIFT）生成更准确的对应关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提升SIFT性能至接近Superpoint等深度描述符水平，在多个基准测试中（如YFCC100M、Aachen day-night）均取得优越的定位与重建效果。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督学习策略（如极线几何）在提升特征匹配鲁棒性方面优于强监督，所提方法在多种复杂场景下均能有效提升匹配精度与应用性能。

search_text: Learning to Guide Local Feature Matches 学习引导局部特征匹配 We tackle the problem of finding accurate and robust keypoint correspondences between images. We propose a learning-based approach to guide local feature matches via a learned approximate image matching. Our approach can boost the results of SIFT to a level similar to state-of-the-art deep descriptors, such as Superpoint, ContextDesc, or D2-Net and can improve performance for these descriptors. We introduce and study different levels of supervision to learn coarse correspondences. In particular, we show that weak supervision from epipolar geometry leads to performances higher than the stronger but more biased point level supervision and is a clear improvement over weak image level supervision. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach in a variety of conditions by evaluating our guided keypoint correspondences for localization of internet images on the YFCC100M dataset and indoor images on theSUN3D dataset, for robust localization on the Aachen day-night benchmark and for 3D reconstruction in challenging conditions using the LTLL historical image data. 我们解决的问题是找到图像之间准确且可靠的关键点对应关系。我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，通过学习的近似图像匹配来指导局部特征匹配。我们的方法可以将 SIFT 的结果提升到与最先进的深度描述符（例如 Superpoint、ContextDesc 或 D2-Net）类似的水平，并且可以提高这些描述符的性能。我们引入并研究不同级别的监督来学习粗略的对应关系。特别是，我们表明，对极几何的弱监督导致的性能高于更强但更偏向的点级监督，并且比弱图像级监督有明显的改进。我们通过评估我们的引导关键点对应关系来证明我们的方法在各种条件下的优势，这些关键点对应关系用于 YFCC100M 数据集上的互联网图像和 SUN3D 数据集上的室内图像的本地化、亚琛昼夜基准上的稳健定位以及使用 LTLL 历史图像数据在具有挑战性的条件下进行 3D 重建。 本文提出一种基于学习的方法，通过近似图像匹配引导局部特征匹配，以提升关键点对应精度与鲁棒性。 François Darmon,Mathieu Aubry,Pascal Monasse cs.CV

title: 2nd Place Solution to Instance Segmentation of IJCAI 3D AI Challenge 2020
title_zh: 2020 年 IJCAI 3D AI 挑战赛实例分割解决方案第二名
abstract: Compared with MS-COCO, the dataset for the competition has a larger proportion of large objects which area is greater than 96x96 pixels. As getting fine boundaries is vitally important for large object segmentation, Mask R-CNN with PointRend is selected as the base segmentation framework to output high-quality object boundaries. Besides, a better engine that integrates ResNeSt, FPN and DCNv2, and a range of effective tricks that including multi-scale training and test time augmentation are applied to improve segmentation performance. Our best performance is an ensemble of four models (three PointRend-based models and SOLOv2), which won the 2nd place in IJCAI-PRICAI 3D AI Challenge 2020: Instance Segmentation.
summary: Compared with MS-COCO, the dataset for the competition has a larger proportion of large objects which area is greater than 96x96 pixels. As getting fine boundaries is vitally important for large object segmentation, Mask R-CNN with PointRend is selected as the base segmentation framework to output high-quality object boundaries. Besides, a better engine that integrates ResNeSt, FPN and DCNv2, and a range of effective tricks that including multi-scale training and test time augmentation are applied to improve segmentation performance. Our best performance is an ensemble of four models (three PointRend-based models and SOLOv2), which won the 2nd place in IJCAI-PRICAI 3D AI Challenge 2020: Instance Segmentation.
abstract_zh: 与MS-COCO相比，竞赛数据集具有更大比例的面积大于96x96像素的大物体。由于获得精细边界对于大型对象分割至关重要，因此选择带有 PointRend 的 Mask R-CNN 作为基本分割框架，以输出高质量的对象边界。此外，还应用了集成 ResNeSt、FPN 和 DCNv2 的更好引擎，以及包括多尺度训练和测试时间增强在内的一系列有效技巧来提高分割性能。我们的最佳表现是四个模型的集成（三个基于 PointRend 的模型和 SOLOv2），在 IJCAI-PRICAI 3D AI Challenge 2020：实例分割中获得第二名。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在IJCAI 3D AI挑战赛2020实例分割任务中获得第二名的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 竞赛数据集包含更多大尺寸物体（面积大于96x96像素），精确分割边界对大物体分割至关重要。
AI.method: 基于Mask R-CNN与PointRend框架，结合ResNeSt、FPN、DCNv2优化网络，采用多尺度训练和测试时增强技术，最终集成四个模型（三个PointRend模型和一个SOLOv2）。
AI.result: 在IJCAI-PRICAI 3D AI挑战赛2020实例分割任务中获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: 通过PointRend提升边界质量并结合多模型集成，有效解决了大尺寸物体实例分割的挑战。

title: A Wigner-Eckart Theorem for Group Equivariant Convolution Kernels
title_zh: 群等变卷积核的维格纳-埃卡特定理
abstract: Group equivariant convolutional networks (GCNNs) endow classical convolutional networks with additional symmetry priors, which can lead to a considerably improved performance. Recent advances in the theoretical description of GCNNs revealed that such models can generally be understood as performing convolutions with G-steerable kernels, that is, kernels that satisfy an equivariance constraint themselves. While the G-steerability constraint has been derived, it has to date only been solved for specific use cases - a general characterization of G-steerable kernel spaces is still missing. This work provides such a characterization for the practically relevant case of G being any compact group. Our investigation is motivated by a striking analogy between the constraints underlying steerable kernels on the one hand and spherical tensor operators from quantum mechanics on the other hand. By generalizing the famous Wigner-Eckart theorem for spherical tensor operators, we prove that steerable kernel spaces are fully understood and parameterized in terms of 1) generalized reduced matrix elements, 2) Clebsch-Gordan coefficients, and 3) harmonic basis functions on homogeneous spaces.
summary: Group equivariant convolutional networks (GCNNs) endow classical convolutional networks with additional symmetry priors, which can lead to a considerably improved performance. Recent advances in the theoretical description of GCNNs revealed that such models can generally be understood as performing convolutions with G-steerable kernels, that is, kernels that satisfy an equivariance constraint themselves. While the G-steerability constraint has been derived, it has to date only been solved for specific use cases - a general characterization of G-steerable kernel spaces is still missing. This work provides such a characterization for the practically relevant case of G being any compact group. Our investigation is motivated by a striking analogy between the constraints underlying steerable kernels on the one hand and spherical tensor operators from quantum mechanics on the other hand. By generalizing the famous Wigner-Eckart theorem for spherical tensor operators, we prove that steerable kernel spaces are fully understood and parameterized in terms of 1) generalized reduced matrix elements, 2) Clebsch-Gordan coefficients, and 3) harmonic basis functions on homogeneous spaces.
abstract_zh: 组等变卷积网络（GCNN）赋予经典卷积网络额外的对称先验，这可以显着提高性能。 GCNN 理论描述的最新进展表明，此类模型通常可以理解为使用 G 可控内核（即本身满足等方差约束的内核）执行卷积。虽然已经导出了 G 可控性约束，但迄今为止它仅针对特定用例得到解决 - 仍然缺少 G 可控内核空间的一般特征。这项工作为 G 是任何紧群的实际相关情况提供了这样的表征。我们的研究的动机是一方面可操纵内核的约束与另一方面来自量子力学的球形张量算子之间的惊人类比。通过推广著名的球张量算子 Wigner-Eckart 定理，我们证明了可操纵核空间可以根据 1）广义简化矩阵元素、2）Clebsch-Gordan 系数和 3）齐次空间上的调和基函数来完全理解和参数化。

AI.tldr: 本文为群等变卷积核提供了一般性表征，通过推广Wigner-Eckart定理，利用约化矩阵元、Clebsch-Gordan系数和调和基函数参数化G-steerable核空间。
AI.motivation: 现有GCNNs的G-steerability约束缺乏通用表征，而量子力学中球张量算符的约束与之存在类比关系，需建立一般性理论框架。
AI.method: 推广量子力学Wigner-Eckart定理，结合约化矩阵元、Clebsch-Gordan系数及齐次空间调和基函数构建参数化模型。
AI.result: 实现了任意紧群G的G-steerable核空间的完整表征，证明其可由三项要素完全描述。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论推广，明确了群等变卷积核的参数化结构，为GCNNs的理论分析与应用提供了基础。

authors_text: Xuecheng Xu,Huan Yin,Zexi Chen,Yue Wang,Rong Xiong
title: DiSCO: Differentiable Scan Context with Orientation
title_zh: DisCO：具有方向的可微扫描上下文
abstract: Global localization is essential for robot navigation, of which the first step is to retrieve a query from the map database. This problem is called place recognition. In recent years, LiDAR scan based place recognition has drawn attention as it is robust against the appearance change. In this paper, we propose a LiDAR-based place recognition method, named Differentiable Scan Context with Orientation (DiSCO), which simultaneously finds the scan at a similar place and estimates their relative orientation. The orientation can further be used as the initial value for the down-stream local optimal metric pose estimation, improving the pose estimation especially when a large orientation between the current scan and retrieved scan exists. Our key idea is to transform the feature into the frequency domain. We utilize the magnitude of the spectrum as the place signature, which is theoretically rotation-invariant. In addition, based on the differentiable phase correlation, we can efficiently estimate the global optimal relative orientation using the spectrum. With such structural constraints, the network can be learned in an end-to-end manner, and the backbone is fully shared by the two tasks, achieving interpretability and light weight. Finally, DiSCO is validated on three datasets with long-term outdoor conditions, showing better performance than the compared methods.
summary: Global localization is essential for robot navigation, of which the first step is to retrieve a query from the map database. This problem is called place recognition. In recent years, LiDAR scan based place recognition has drawn attention as it is robust against the appearance change. In this paper, we propose a LiDAR-based place recognition method, named Differentiable Scan Context with Orientation (DiSCO), which simultaneously finds the scan at a similar place and estimates their relative orientation. The orientation can further be used as the initial value for the down-stream local optimal metric pose estimation, improving the pose estimation especially when a large orientation between the current scan and retrieved scan exists. Our key idea is to transform the feature into the frequency domain. We utilize the magnitude of the spectrum as the place signature, which is theoretically rotation-invariant. In addition, based on the differentiable phase correlation, we can efficiently estimate the global optimal relative orientation using the spectrum. With such structural constraints, the network can be learned in an end-to-end manner, and the backbone is fully shared by the two tasks, achieving interpretability and light weight. Finally, DiSCO is validated on three datasets with long-term outdoor conditions, showing better performance than the compared methods.
abstract_zh: 全局定位对于机器人导航至关重要，其第一步是从地图数据库中检索查询。这个问题称为地点识别。近年来，基于激光雷达扫描的位置识别因其对外观变化的鲁棒性而引起了人们的关注。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于激光雷达的位置识别方法，称为可微分扫描上下文与方向（DiSCO），该方法同时找到相似位置的扫描并估计它们的相对方向。该方向还可以用作下游局部最优度量姿态估计的初始值，从而改进姿态估计，尤其是当当前扫描和检索到的扫描之间存在大方向时。我们的关键思想是将特征转换到频域。我们利用频谱的幅度作为位置特征，理论上它是旋转不变的。此外，基于可微的相位相关性，我们可以利用频谱有效地估计全局最优相对方向。在这样的结构约束下，网络可以以端到端的方式进行学习，并且主干网由两个任务完全共享，实现可解释性和轻量级。最后，DiSCO 在长期户外条件下的三个数据集上进行了验证，显示出比比较方法更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LiDAR的地点识别方法DiSCO，通过频域特征和可微分相位相关性实现同时检索相似地点并估计相对方向，用于机器人导航的全局定位。
AI.motivation: 传统LiDAR地点识别方法在处理外观变化或大角度差异时存在局限，需改进方向估计以提升姿态优化效果。
AI.method: 将扫描特征转换至频域，利用频谱幅度构建旋转不变的地点签名；通过可微分相位相关性估计全局最优方向，共享主干网络实现端到端学习。
AI.result: 在三个长期户外数据集上验证，DiSCO在地点检索和方向估计任务中均优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: DiSCO通过频域特征与可微分方向估计有效提升了机器人导航的全局定位性能。
