title: The UPC Speaker Verification System Submitted to VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2020 (VoxSRC-20)
title_zh: UPC 说话人验证系统已提交至 2020 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 (VoxSRC-20)
abstract: This report describes the submission from Technical University of Catalonia (UPC) to the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge (VoxSRC-20) at Interspeech 2020. The final submission is a combination of three systems. System-1 is an autoencoder based approach which tries to reconstruct similar i-vectors, whereas System-2 and -3 are Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based siamese architectures. The siamese networks have two and three branches, respectively, where each branch is a CNN encoder. The double-branch siamese performs binary classification using cross entropy loss during training. Whereas, our triple-branch siamese is trained to learn speaker embeddings using triplet loss. We provide results of our systems on VoxCeleb-1 test, VoxSRC-20 validation and test sets.
summary: This report describes the submission from Technical University of Catalonia (UPC) to the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge (VoxSRC-20) at Interspeech 2020. The final submission is a combination of three systems. System-1 is an autoencoder based approach which tries to reconstruct similar i-vectors, whereas System-2 and -3 are Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based siamese architectures. The siamese networks have two and three branches, respectively, where each branch is a CNN encoder. The double-branch siamese performs binary classification using cross entropy loss during training. Whereas, our triple-branch siamese is trained to learn speaker embeddings using triplet loss. We provide results of our systems on VoxCeleb-1 test, VoxSRC-20 validation and test sets.
abstract_zh: 本报告介绍了加泰罗尼亚技术大学 (UPC) 在 Interspeech 2020 上向 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 (VoxSRC-20) 提交的内容。最终提交的内容是三个系统的组合。 System-1 是一种基于自动编码器的方法，尝试重建相似的 i 向量，而 System-2 和 -3 是基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的孪生架构。孪生网络分别有两个和三个分支，其中每个分支都是一个 CNN 编码器。双分支暹罗在训练期间使用交叉熵损失执行二元分类。然而，我们的三分支暹罗猫经过训练，可以使用三元组损失来学习说话人嵌入。我们提供我们的系统在 VoxCeleb-1 测试、VoxSRC-20 验证和测试集上的结果。

AI.tldr: 该论文描述了UPC团队在VoxSRC-20挑战赛中提交的说话人识别系统，结合了三种不同方法。
AI.motivation: 通过结合多种深度学习方法提升说话人识别系统的性能，以应对VoxCeleb数据集的挑战。
AI.method: 系统1基于自编码器重构i-vectors，系统2和3分别为双分支和三分支的卷积神经网络（CNN）孪生网络，分别使用交叉熵损失和三元组损失进行训练。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb-1测试集及VoxSRC-20验证集和测试集上展示了各系统的性能结果。
AI.conclusion: 多系统融合方法在说话人识别任务中表现出竞争力，不同网络结构对性能有显著影响。

authors_text: Jaewoong Choi,Sion Jang,Jaeyoung Kim,Jiho Lee,Janghyeok Yoona,Sungchul Choi
title: Deep learning-based citation recommendation system for patents
title_zh: 基于深度学习的专利引文推荐系统
abstract: In this study, we address the challenges in developing a deep learning-based automatic patent citation recommendation system. Although deep learning-based recommendation systems have exhibited outstanding performance in various domains (such as movies, products, and paper citations), their validity in patent citations has not been investigated, owing to the lack of a freely available high-quality dataset and relevant benchmark model. To solve these problems, we present a novel dataset called PatentNet that includes textual information and metadata for approximately 110,000 patents from the Google Big Query service. Further, we propose strong benchmark models considering the similarity of textual information and metadata (such as cooperative patent classification code). Compared with existing recommendation methods, the proposed benchmark method achieved a mean reciprocal rank of 0.2377 on the test set, whereas the existing state-of-the-art recommendation method achieved 0.2073.
summary: In this study, we address the challenges in developing a deep learning-based automatic patent citation recommendation system. Although deep learning-based recommendation systems have exhibited outstanding performance in various domains (such as movies, products, and paper citations), their validity in patent citations has not been investigated, owing to the lack of a freely available high-quality dataset and relevant benchmark model. To solve these problems, we present a novel dataset called PatentNet that includes textual information and metadata for approximately 110,000 patents from the Google Big Query service. Further, we propose strong benchmark models considering the similarity of textual information and metadata (such as cooperative patent classification code). Compared with existing recommendation methods, the proposed benchmark method achieved a mean reciprocal rank of 0.2377 on the test set, whereas the existing state-of-the-art recommendation method achieved 0.2073.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们解决了开发基于深度学习的自动专利引文推荐系统所面临的挑战。尽管基于深度学习的推荐系统在各个领域（例如电影、产品和论文引用）表现出了出色的性能，但由于缺乏免费提供的高质量数据集和相关基准模型，其在专利引用方面的有效性尚未得到研究。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个名为 PatentNet 的新颖数据集，其中包括来自 Google Big Query 服务的约 110,000 项专利的文本信息和元数据。此外，考虑到文本信息和元数据（例如合作专利分类代码）的相似性，我们提出了强大的基准模型。与现有的推荐方法相比，所提出的基准方法在测试集上的平均倒数排名为 0.2377，而现有的最先进的推荐方法达到了 0.2073。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的专利引用推荐系统，构建了名为PatentNet的新数据集，并设计了结合文本和元数据相似性的基准模型。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习推荐系统在专利引用领域缺乏验证，主要受限于高质量公开数据集和基准模型的缺失，需通过构建新数据集和模型填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 从Google Big Query获取约11万项专利数据构建PatentNet数据集，提出融合文本信息与元数据（如合作专利分类代码）相似性的基准推荐模型。
AI.result: 在测试集上，所提方法的平均倒数排名（MRR）达到0.2377，优于现有最先进的0.2073。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了深度学习在专利引用推荐中的有效性，提供的数据集和基准模型可推动相关领域进一步研究。

method: 从Google Big Query获取约11万项专利数据构建PatentNet数据集，提出融合文本信息与元数据（如合作专利分类代码）相似性的基准推荐模型。
result: 在测试集上，所提方法的平均倒数排名（MRR）达到0.2377，优于现有最先进的0.2073。
conclusion: 该研究验证了深度学习在专利引用推荐中的有效性，提供的数据集和基准模型可推动相关领域进一步研究。
search_text: Deep learning-based citation recommendation system for patents 基于深度学习的专利引文推荐系统 In this study, we address the challenges in developing a deep learning-based automatic patent citation recommendation system. Although deep learning-based recommendation systems have exhibited outstanding performance in various domains (such as movies, products, and paper citations), their validity in patent citations has not been investigated, owing to the lack of a freely available high-quality dataset and relevant benchmark model. To solve these problems, we present a novel dataset called PatentNet that includes textual information and metadata for approximately 110,000 patents from the Google Big Query service. Further, we propose strong benchmark models considering the similarity of textual information and metadata (such as cooperative patent classification code). Compared with existing recommendation methods, the proposed benchmark method achieved a mean reciprocal rank of 0.2377 on the test set, whereas the existing state-of-the-art recommendation method achieved 0.2073. 在这项研究中，我们解决了开发基于深度学习的自动专利引文推荐系统所面临的挑战。尽管基于深度学习的推荐系统在各个领域（例如电影、产品和论文引用）表现出了出色的性能，但由于缺乏免费提供的高质量数据集和相关基准模型，其在专利引用方面的有效性尚未得到研究。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个名为 PatentNet 的新颖数据集，其中包括来自 Google Big Query 服务的约 110,000 项专利的文本信息和元数据。此外，考虑到文本信息和元数据（例如合作专利分类代码）的相似性，我们提出了强大的基准模型。与现有的推荐方法相比，所提出的基准方法在测试集上的平均倒数排名为 0.2377，而现有的最先进的推荐方法达到了 0.2073。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的专利引用推荐系统，构建了名为PatentNet的新数据集，并设计了结合文本和元数据相似性的基准模型。 Jaewoong Choi,Sion Jang,Jaeyoung Kim,Jiho Lee,Janghyeok Yoona,Sungchul Choi cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Efficient Similarity-Preserving Unsupervised Learning using Modular Sparse Distributed Codes and Novelty-Contingent Noise
title_zh: 使用模块化稀疏分布式代码和新颖性相关噪声的高效保持相似性的无监督学习
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1701.07879
comments: 11 pages, 6 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1701.07879
abstract: There is increasing realization in neuroscience that information is represented in the brain, e.g., neocortex, hippocampus, in the form sparse distributed codes (SDCs), a kind of cell assembly. Two essential questions are: a) how are such codes formed on the basis of single trials, and how is similarity preserved during learning, i.e., how do more similar inputs get mapped to more similar SDCs. I describe a novel Modular Sparse Distributed Code (MSDC) that provides simple, neurally plausible answers to both questions. An MSDC coding field (CF) consists of Q WTA competitive modules (CMs), each comprised of K binary units (analogs of principal cells). The modular nature of the CF makes possible a single-trial, unsupervised learning algorithm that approximately preserves similarity and crucially, runs in fixed time, i.e., the number of steps needed to store an item remains constant as the number of stored items grows. Further, once items are stored as MSDCs in superposition and such that their intersection structure reflects input similarity, both fixed time best-match retrieval and fixed time belief update (updating the probabilities of all stored items) also become possible. The algorithm's core principle is simply to add noise into the process of choosing a code, i.e., choosing a winner in each CM, which is proportional to the novelty of the input. This causes the expected intersection of the code for an input, X, with the code of each previously stored input, Y, to be proportional to the similarity of X and Y. Results demonstrating these capabilities for spatial patterns are given in the appendix.
summary: There is increasing realization in neuroscience that information is represented in the brain, e.g., neocortex, hippocampus, in the form sparse distributed codes (SDCs), a kind of cell assembly. Two essential questions are: a) how are such codes formed on the basis of single trials, and how is similarity preserved during learning, i.e., how do more similar inputs get mapped to more similar SDCs. I describe a novel Modular Sparse Distributed Code (MSDC) that provides simple, neurally plausible answers to both questions. An MSDC coding field (CF) consists of Q WTA competitive modules (CMs), each comprised of K binary units (analogs of principal cells). The modular nature of the CF makes possible a single-trial, unsupervised learning algorithm that approximately preserves similarity and crucially, runs in fixed time, i.e., the number of steps needed to store an item remains constant as the number of stored items grows. Further, once items are stored as MSDCs in superposition and such that their intersection structure reflects input similarity, both fixed time best-match retrieval and fixed time belief update (updating the probabilities of all stored items) also become possible. The algorithm's core principle is simply to add noise into the process of choosing a code, i.e., choosing a winner in each CM, which is proportional to the novelty of the input. This causes the expected intersection of the code for an input, X, with the code of each previously stored input, Y, to be proportional to the similarity of X and Y. Results demonstrating these capabilities for spatial patterns are given in the appendix.
abstract_zh: 神经科学界越来越多地认识到，信息在大脑（例如新皮质、海马体）中以稀疏分布式代码（SDC）（一种细胞组装）的形式表示。两个基本问题是：a）如何在单次试验的基础上形成此类代码，以及在学习过程中如何保留相似性，即如何将更多相似的输入映射到更相似的 SDC。我描述了一种新颖的模块化稀疏分布式代码（MSDC），它为这两个问题提供了简单、神经上合理的答案。 MSDC 编码字段 (CF) 由 Q 个 WTA 竞争模块 (CM) 组成，每个模块由 K 个二进制单元（主细胞的类似物）组成。 CF 的模块化特性使得单次试验、无监督学习算法成为可能，该算法大致保留相似性，并且最重要的是，在固定时间内运行，即，随着存储项目数量的增长，存储项目所需的步骤数保持不变。此外，一旦项目以叠加方式存储为 MSDC，并且其交集结构反映输入相似性，固定时间最佳匹配检索和固定时间信念更新（更新所有存储项目的概率）也成为可能。该算法的核心原理很简单，就是在选择代码的过程中添加噪声，即在每个 CM 中选择一个获胜者，这与输入的新颖性成正比。这导致输入 X 的代码与每个先前存储的输入 Y 的代码的预期交集与 X 和 Y 的相似度成正比。附录中给出了证明空间模式的这些功能的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模块化稀疏分布式编码（MSDC）的无监督学习算法，通过新颖性相关的噪声机制实现相似性保持的高效学习。
AI.motivation: 神经科学发现大脑通过稀疏分布式编码（SDC）表征信息，但如何在单次试验中形成编码并保持输入相似性仍是核心问题。
AI.method: 设计包含Q个竞争模块的MSDC编码场，每个模块含K个二值单元，通过与输入新颖性成比例的噪声选择获胜单元，实现固定时间复杂度的相似性保持学习。
AI.result: 实验验证该算法能有效保持输入模式相似性，支持固定时间最佳匹配检索和概率更新，且存储时间不随数据量增长。
AI.conclusion: MSDC框架为神经科学提供了可解释的编码机制，同时实现了高效无监督学习，适用于大规模数据处理场景。

title: Attention-based scaling adaptation for target speech extraction
title_zh: 用于目标语音提取的基于注意力的缩放自适应
abstract: The target speech extraction has attracted widespread attention in recent years. In this work, we focus on investigating the dynamic interaction between different mixtures and the target speaker to exploit the discriminative target speaker clues. We propose a special attention mechanism without introducing any additional parameters in a scaling adaptation layer to better adapt the network towards extracting the target speech. Furthermore, by introducing a mixture embedding matrix pooling method, our proposed attention-based scaling adaptation (ASA) can exploit the target speaker clues in a more efficient way. Experimental results on the spatialized reverberant WSJ0 2-mix dataset demonstrate that the proposed method can improve the performance of the target speech extraction effectively. Furthermore, we find that under the same network configurations, the ASA in a single-channel condition can achieve competitive performance gains as that achieved from two-channel mixtures with inter-microphone phase difference (IPD) features.
summary: The target speech extraction has attracted widespread attention in recent years. In this work, we focus on investigating the dynamic interaction between different mixtures and the target speaker to exploit the discriminative target speaker clues. We propose a special attention mechanism without introducing any additional parameters in a scaling adaptation layer to better adapt the network towards extracting the target speech. Furthermore, by introducing a mixture embedding matrix pooling method, our proposed attention-based scaling adaptation (ASA) can exploit the target speaker clues in a more efficient way. Experimental results on the spatialized reverberant WSJ0 2-mix dataset demonstrate that the proposed method can improve the performance of the target speech extraction effectively. Furthermore, we find that under the same network configurations, the ASA in a single-channel condition can achieve competitive performance gains as that achieved from two-channel mixtures with inter-microphone phase difference (IPD) features.
abstract_zh: 目标语音提取近年来引起了广泛的关注。在这项工作中，我们重点研究不同混合物和目标说话人之间的动态交互，以利用有区别的目标说话人线索。我们提出了一种特殊的注意力机制，无需在缩放适应层中引入任何额外参数，以更好地适应网络以提取目标语音。此外，通过引入混合嵌入矩阵池方法，我们提出的基于注意力的缩放自适应（ASA）可以更有效地利用目标说话者线索。在空间化混响WSJ0 2-mix数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法可以有效提高目标语音提取的性能。此外，我们发现，在相同的网络配置下，单通道条件下的 ASA 可以实现与具有麦克风间相位差 (IPD) 功能的两通道混合所实现的竞争性性能增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的缩放自适应方法（ASA），用于提高目标语音提取的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态混合语音与目标说话人交互建模方面存在不足，需更高效利用目标说话人线索以提升提取效果。
AI.method: 设计无额外参数的注意力机制缩放自适应层，并引入混合嵌入矩阵池化方法，通过动态交互建模增强目标语音特征。
AI.result: 在WSJ0 2-mix数据集实验中，ASA方法在单通道条件下达到与双通道IPD特征相当的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: ASA方法通过注意力机制有效捕捉目标说话人线索，在保持网络简洁性的同时实现了竞争力的语音提取性能提升。

authors_text: Yafeng Chen,Wu Guo,Jingjing Shi,Jiajun Qi,Tan Liu
title: Multi-task Metric Learning for Text-independent Speaker Verification
title_zh: 用于与文本无关的说话人验证的多任务度量学习
comment: Not a particularly high-quality work, so we request withdrawal
comments: Not a particularly high-quality work, so we request withdrawal
abstract: In this work, we introduce metric learning (ML) to enhance the deep embedding learning for text-independent speaker verification (SV). Specifically, the deep speaker embedding network is trained with conventional cross entropy loss and auxiliary pair-based ML loss function. For the auxiliary ML task, training samples of a mini-batch are first arranged into pairs, then positive and negative pairs are selected and weighted through their own and relative similarities, and finally the auxiliary ML loss is calculated by the similarity of the selected pairs. To evaluate the proposed method, we conduct experiments on the Speaker in the Wild (SITW) dataset. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: In this work, we introduce metric learning (ML) to enhance the deep embedding learning for text-independent speaker verification (SV). Specifically, the deep speaker embedding network is trained with conventional cross entropy loss and auxiliary pair-based ML loss function. For the auxiliary ML task, training samples of a mini-batch are first arranged into pairs, then positive and negative pairs are selected and weighted through their own and relative similarities, and finally the auxiliary ML loss is calculated by the similarity of the selected pairs. To evaluate the proposed method, we conduct experiments on the Speaker in the Wild (SITW) dataset. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入了度量学习（ML）来增强与文本无关的说话人验证（SV）的深度嵌入学习。具体来说，深度说话人嵌入网络使用传统的交叉熵损失和基于辅助对的 ML 损失函数进行训练。对于辅助ML任务，首先将小批量的训练样本排列成对，然后通过它们自身和相对相似度来选择正负对并加权，最后根据所选对的相似度计算辅助ML损失。为了评估所提出的方法，我们在“Speaker in the Wild”（SITW）数据集上进行了实验。结果证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务度量学习方法，通过结合交叉熵损失与辅助度量损失，提升文本无关说话人验证的深度嵌入学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统交叉熵损失在文本无关场景下难以有效建模说话人相似性，需引入度量学习优化嵌入空间区分度。
AI.method: 在深度嵌入网络中联合优化交叉熵损失与辅助度量损失，通过构造正负样本对并基于相似性加权计算度量损失。
AI.result: 在SITW数据集实验中验证了所提方法的有效性，显著提升文本无关说话人验证性能。
AI.conclusion: 多任务度量学习能有效增强文本无关说话人验证模型的鲁棒性与准确性。

title: Contrastive Learning of General-Purpose Audio Representations
title_zh: 通用音频表示的对比学习
abstract: We introduce COLA, a self-supervised pre-training approach for learning a general-purpose representation of audio. Our approach is based on contrastive learning: it learns a representation which assigns high similarity to audio segments extracted from the same recording while assigning lower similarity to segments from different recordings. We build on top of recent advances in contrastive learning for computer vision and reinforcement learning to design a lightweight, easy-to-implement self-supervised model of audio. We pre-train embeddings on the large-scale Audioset database and transfer these representations to 9 diverse classification tasks, including speech, music, animal sounds, and acoustic scenes. We show that despite its simplicity, our method significantly outperforms previous self-supervised systems. We furthermore conduct ablation studies to identify key design choices and release a library to pre-train and fine-tune COLA models.
summary: We introduce COLA, a self-supervised pre-training approach for learning a general-purpose representation of audio. Our approach is based on contrastive learning: it learns a representation which assigns high similarity to audio segments extracted from the same recording while assigning lower similarity to segments from different recordings. We build on top of recent advances in contrastive learning for computer vision and reinforcement learning to design a lightweight, easy-to-implement self-supervised model of audio. We pre-train embeddings on the large-scale Audioset database and transfer these representations to 9 diverse classification tasks, including speech, music, animal sounds, and acoustic scenes. We show that despite its simplicity, our method significantly outperforms previous self-supervised systems. We furthermore conduct ablation studies to identify key design choices and release a library to pre-train and fine-tune COLA models.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 COLA，一种用于学习通用音频表示的自监督预训练方法。我们的方法基于对比学习：它学习一种表示，该表示为从同一录音中提取的音频片段分配高相似性，同时为来自不同录音的片段分配较低的相似性。我们基于计算机视觉对比学习和强化学习的最新进展，设计了一种轻量级、易于实现的自监督音频模型。我们在大型 Audioset 数据库上预训练嵌入，并将这些表示转移到 9 个不同的分类任务，包括语音、音乐、动物声音和声学场景。我们表明，尽管我们的方法很简单，但其性能明显优于以前的自我监督系统。我们还进行消融研究，以确定关键的设计选择，并发布一个库来预训练和微调 COLA 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COLA方法，通过对比学习实现通用音频表示的自监督预训练。
AI.motivation: 现有音频表示方法缺乏通用性与效率，需开发轻量级模型以适应多样化的音频分类任务。
AI.method: 基于对比学习框架，通过最大化同一录音音频段的相似度与最小化不同录音段的相似度，结合视觉与强化学习技术设计轻量模型。
AI.result: 在Audioset预训练后，COLA在9类音频分类任务中显著超越现有自监督方法，消融实验证明设计有效性。
AI.conclusion: COLA方法以简单结构实现高性能，开源库助力通用音频表示研究与应用。

title: Evolutionary Diversity Optimization and the Minimum Spanning Tree Problem
title_zh: 进化多样性优化和最小生成树问题
abstract: In the area of evolutionary computation the calculation of diverse sets of high-quality solutions to a given optimization problem has gained momentum in recent years under the term evolutionary diversity optimization. Theoretical insights into the working principles of baseline evolutionary algorithms for diversity optimization are still rare. In this paper we study the well-known Minimum Spanning Tree problem (MST) in the context of diversity optimization where population diversity is measured by the sum of pairwise edge overlaps. Theoretical results provide insights into the fitness landscape of the MST diversity optimization problem pointing out that even for a population of $μ=2$ fitness plateaus (of constant length) can be reached, but nevertheless diverse sets can be calculated in polynomial time. We supplement our theoretical results with a series of experiments for the unconstrained and constraint case where all solutions need to fulfill a minimal quality threshold. Our results show that a simple $(μ+1)$-EA can effectively compute a diversified population of spanning trees of high quality.
summary: In the area of evolutionary computation the calculation of diverse sets of high-quality solutions to a given optimization problem has gained momentum in recent years under the term evolutionary diversity optimization. Theoretical insights into the working principles of baseline evolutionary algorithms for diversity optimization are still rare. In this paper we study the well-known Minimum Spanning Tree problem (MST) in the context of diversity optimization where population diversity is measured by the sum of pairwise edge overlaps. Theoretical results provide insights into the fitness landscape of the MST diversity optimization problem pointing out that even for a population of $μ=2$ fitness plateaus (of constant length) can be reached, but nevertheless diverse sets can be calculated in polynomial time. We supplement our theoretical results with a series of experiments for the unconstrained and constraint case where all solutions need to fulfill a minimal quality threshold. Our results show that a simple $(μ+1)$-EA can effectively compute a diversified population of spanning trees of high quality.
abstract_zh: 在进化计算领域，近年来，在“进化多样性优化”这一术语下，对给定优化问题的不同高质量解集的计算得到了发展。对用于多样性优化的基线进化算法的工作原理的理论见解仍然很少。在本文中，我们在多样性优化的背景下研究了众所周知的最小生成树问题（MST），其中种群多样性是通过成对边缘重叠之和来衡量的。理论结果提供了对 MST 多样性优化问题的适应度景观的见解，指出即使对于 $μ=2$ 的群体，也可以达到适应度平台（长度恒定），但仍然可以在多项式时间内计算不同的集合。我们通过一系列针对无约束和约束情况的实验来补充我们的理论结果，其中所有解决方案都需要满足最低质量阈值。我们的结果表明，简单的 $(μ+1)$-EA 可以有效地计算高质量生成树的多样化群体。

AI.tldr: 研究在最小生成树问题中使用进化算法进行多样性优化的方法
AI.motivation: 进化多样性优化的理论研究不足，需探索其在经典组合优化问题中的可行性
AI.method: 结合理论分析与实验验证，通过适应度景观分析和(μ+1)-EA算法测试
AI.result: 证明μ=2时存在常数长度适应度高原，但多项式时间内可求解多样化解集，实验验证算法有效性
AI.conclusion: 理论分析与实验共同证实进化算法可有效解决MST多样性优化问题

title: Visual Navigation in Real-World Indoor Environments Using End-to-End Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用端到端深度强化学习在现实室内环境中进行视觉导航
abstract: Visual navigation is essential for many applications in robotics, from manipulation, through mobile robotics to automated driving. Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) provides an elegant map-free approach integrating image processing, localization, and planning in one module, which can be trained and therefore optimized for a given environment. However, to date, DRL-based visual navigation was validated exclusively in simulation, where the simulator provides information that is not available in the real world, e.g., the robot's position or image segmentation masks. This precludes the use of the learned policy on a real robot. Therefore, we propose a novel approach that enables a direct deployment of the trained policy on real robots. We have designed visual auxiliary tasks, a tailored reward scheme, and a new powerful simulator to facilitate domain randomization. The policy is fine-tuned on images collected from real-world environments. We have evaluated the method on a mobile robot in a real office environment. The training took ~30 hours on a single GPU. In 30 navigation experiments, the robot reached a 0.3-meter neighborhood of the goal in more than 86.7% of cases. This result makes the proposed method directly applicable to tasks like mobile manipulation.
summary: Visual navigation is essential for many applications in robotics, from manipulation, through mobile robotics to automated driving. Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) provides an elegant map-free approach integrating image processing, localization, and planning in one module, which can be trained and therefore optimized for a given environment. This precludes the use of the learned policy on a real robot. Therefore, we propose a novel approach that enables a direct deployment of the trained policy on real robots. We have designed visual auxiliary tasks, a tailored reward scheme, and a new powerful simulator to facilitate domain randomization. The policy is fine-tuned on images collected from real-world environments. We have evaluated the method on a mobile robot in a real office environment. The training took ~30 hours on a single GPU. In 30 navigation experiments, the robot reached a 0.3-meter neighborhood of the goal in more than 86.7% of cases. This result makes the proposed method directly applicable to tasks like mobile manipulation.
abstract_zh: 视觉导航对于机器人技术的许多应用至关重要，从操纵到移动机器人再到自动驾驶。深度强化学习 (DRL) 提供了一种优雅的无地图方法，将图像处理、定位和规划集成在一个模块中，可以对其进行训练，从而针对给定环境进行优化。然而，迄今为止，基于 DRL 的视觉导航仅在模拟中得到验证，其中模拟器提供现实世界中不可用的信息，例如机器人的位置或图像分割掩模。这妨碍了在真实机器人上使用学习到的策略。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以将经过训练的策略直接部署在真实的机器人上。我们设计了视觉辅助任务、量身定制的奖励方案和新的强大模拟器来促进域随机化。该策略根据从现实环境中收集的图像进行微调。我们在真实办公环境中的移动机器人上评估了该方法。在单个 GPU 上的训练大约需要 30 个小时。在 30 次导航实验中，机器人在超过 86.7% 的情况下到达了距离目标 0.3 米的邻域。这一结果使得所提出的方法直接适用于移动操作等任务。

AI.tldr: 提出一种端到端深度强化学习方法，使机器人能在真实室内环境中实现视觉导航。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度强化学习的视觉导航方法仅在仿真环境中验证，因仿真提供的机器人位置等信息在真实环境不可用，导致无法直接部署到实际机器人。
AI.method: 设计视觉辅助任务与定制奖励机制，开发新型模拟器进行领域随机化训练，并利用真实环境图像对策略进行微调。
AI.result: 在真实办公室环境中，机器人30次导航实验中有86.7%的案例成功进入目标0.3米范围内，训练耗时约30小时单GPU。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了深度强化学习策略在真实场景的可行性，可直接应用于移动操作等实际任务。

search_text: Visual Navigation in Real-World Indoor Environments Using End-to-End Deep Reinforcement Learning 使用端到端深度强化学习在现实室内环境中进行视觉导航 Visual navigation is essential for many applications in robotics, from manipulation, through mobile robotics to automated driving. Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) provides an elegant map-free approach integrating image processing, localization, and planning in one module, which can be trained and therefore optimized for a given environment. However, to date, DRL-based visual navigation was validated exclusively in simulation, where the simulator provides information that is not available in the real world, e.g., the robot's position or image segmentation masks. This precludes the use of the learned policy on a real robot. Therefore, we propose a novel approach that enables a direct deployment of the trained policy on real robots. We have designed visual auxiliary tasks, a tailored reward scheme, and a new powerful simulator to facilitate domain randomization. The policy is fine-tuned on images collected from real-world environments. We have evaluated the method on a mobile robot in a real office environment. The training took ~30 hours on a single GPU. In 30 navigation experiments, the robot reached a 0.3-meter neighborhood of the goal in more than 86.7% of cases. This result makes the proposed method directly applicable to tasks like mobile manipulation. 视觉导航对于机器人技术的许多应用至关重要，从操纵到移动机器人再到自动驾驶。深度强化学习 (DRL) 提供了一种优雅的无地图方法，将图像处理、定位和规划集成在一个模块中，可以对其进行训练，从而针对给定环境进行优化。然而，迄今为止，基于 DRL 的视觉导航仅在模拟中得到验证，其中模拟器提供现实世界中不可用的信息，例如机器人的位置或图像分割掩模。这妨碍了在真实机器人上使用学习到的策略。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以将经过训练的策略直接部署在真实的机器人上。我们设计了视觉辅助任务、量身定制的奖励方案和新的强大模拟器来促进域随机化。该策略根据从现实环境中收集的图像进行微调。我们在真实办公环境中的移动机器人上评估了该方法。在单个 GPU 上的训练大约需要 30 个小时。在 30 次导航实验中，机器人在超过 86.7% 的情况下到达了距离目标 0.3 米的邻域。这一结果使得所提出的方法直接适用于移动操作等任务。 提出一种端到端深度强化学习方法，使机器人能在真实室内环境中实现视觉导航。 Jonáš Kulhánek,Erik Derner,Robert Babuška cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Exploring Sequence-to-Sequence Models for SPARQL Pattern Composition
title_zh: 探索 SPARQL 模式组合的序列到序列模型
comment: Proceedings of the First Indo-American Knowledge Graph and Semantic Web Conference (KGSWC-India 2020)
comments: Proceedings of the First Indo-American Knowledge Graph and Semantic Web Conference (KGSWC-India 2020)
abstract: A booming amount of information is continuously added to the Internet as structured and unstructured data, feeding knowledge bases such as DBpedia and Wikidata with billions of statements describing millions of entities. The aim of Question Answering systems is to allow lay users to access such data using natural language without needing to write formal queries. However, users often submit questions that are complex and require a certain level of abstraction and reasoning to decompose them into basic graph patterns. In this short paper, we explore the use of architectures based on Neural Machine Translation called Neural SPARQL Machines to learn pattern compositions. We show that sequence-to-sequence models are a viable and promising option to transform long utterances into complex SPARQL queries.
summary: A booming amount of information is continuously added to the Internet as structured and unstructured data, feeding knowledge bases such as DBpedia and Wikidata with billions of statements describing millions of entities. The aim of Question Answering systems is to allow lay users to access such data using natural language without needing to write formal queries. However, users often submit questions that are complex and require a certain level of abstraction and reasoning to decompose them into basic graph patterns. In this short paper, we explore the use of architectures based on Neural Machine Translation called Neural SPARQL Machines to learn pattern compositions. We show that sequence-to-sequence models are a viable and promising option to transform long utterances into complex SPARQL queries.
abstract_zh: 大量信息以结构化和非结构化数据的形式不断添加到互联网中，为 DBpedia 和 Wikidata 等知识库提供了描述数百万个实体的数十亿条语句。问答系统的目的是允许非专业用户使用自然语言访问此类数据，而无需编写正式的查询。然而，用户经常提交复杂的问题，需要一定程度的抽象和推理才能将其分解为基本的图形模式。在这篇简短的论文中，我们探索了使用基于神经机器翻译（称为神经 SPARQL 机器）的架构来学习模式组合。我们证明，序列到序列模型是将长话语转换为复杂 SPARQL 查询的可行且有前景的选择。

AI.tldr: 探索使用序列到序列模型将自然语言问题转换为复杂SPARQL查询
AI.motivation: 用户需通过自然语言查询结构化数据，但手动编写SPARQL复杂且困难，需自动化方法
AI.method: 采用神经机器翻译架构（神经SPARQL机器），利用序列到序列模型学习自然语言到SPARQL模式的映射
AI.result: 实验表明序列到序列模型能有效将复杂自然语言问题转化为SPARQL查询，验证其可行性与潜力
AI.conclusion: 序列到序列模型为自然语言到SPARQL转换提供了可行且有前景的解决方案

authors_text: Théo Estienne,Maria Vakalopoulou,Enzo Battistella,Alexandre Carré,Théophraste Henry,Marvin Lerousseau,Charlotte Robert,Nikos Paragios,Eric Deutsch
title: Deep learning based registration using spatial gradients and noisy segmentation labels
title_zh: 使用空间梯度和噪声分割标签的基于深度学习的配准
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. Updated version after review modifications. Published to Segmentation, Classification, and Registration of Multi-modality Medical Imaging Data. MICCAI 2020. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 12587
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures. Updated version after review modifications. Published to Segmentation, Classification, and Registration of Multi-modality Medical Imaging Data. MICCAI 2020. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 12587
abstract: Image registration is one of the most challenging problems in medical image analysis. In the recent years, deep learning based approaches became quite popular, providing fast and performing registration strategies. In this short paper, we summarise our work presented on Learn2Reg challenge 2020. The main contributions of our work rely on (i) a symmetric formulation, predicting the transformations from source to target and from target to source simultaneously, enforcing the trained representations to be similar and (ii) integration of variety of publicly available datasets used both for pretraining and for augmenting segmentation labels. Our method reports a mean dice of $0.64$ for task 3 and $0.85$ for task 4 on the test sets, taking third place on the challenge. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/TheoEst/abdominal_registration and \https://github.com/TheoEst/hippocampus_registration.
summary: Image registration is one of the most challenging problems in medical image analysis. Our method reports a mean dice of $0.64$ for task 3 and $0.85$ for task 4 on the test sets, taking third place on the challenge. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/TheoEst/abdominal_registration and \https://github.com/TheoEst/hippocampus_registration.
abstract_zh: 图像配准是医学图像分析中最具挑战性的问题之一。近年来，基于深度学习的方法变得非常流行，提供快速且执行的注册策略。在这篇简短的论文中，我们总结了我们在 Learn2Reg 2020 挑战赛上提出的工作。我们工作的主要贡献依赖于 (i) 对称公式，同时预测从源到目标以及从目标到源的转换，强制训练后的表示相似，以及 (ii) 集成用于预训练和增强分割标签的各种公开可用数据集。我们的方法报告测试集上任务 3 的平均骰子为 0.64 美元，任务 4 的平均骰子为 0.85 美元，在挑战中获得第三名。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/TheoEst/abdominal_registration 和 \https://github.com/TheoEst/hippocampus_registration 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的医学图像配准方法，利用空间梯度和噪声分割标签提升配准效果。
AI.motivation: 医学图像配准是关键挑战，传统方法存在效率与精度问题，深度学习方法虽流行但需优化对称性与数据利用效率。
AI.method: 采用对称变换预测框架同时学习源到目标与目标到源的映射，并整合多公开数据集进行预训练及分割标签增强。
AI.result: 在Learn2Reg 2020挑战赛中，任务3和任务4测试集Dice系数分别达到0.64和0.85，位列第三。
AI.conclusion: 对称框架与多数据集策略有效提升配准性能，代码已开源供学术研究使用。

The main contributions of our work rely on (i) a symmetric formulation, predicting the transformations from source to target and from target to source simultaneously, enforcing the trained representations to be similar and (ii) integration of variety of publicly available datasets used both for pretraining and for augmenting segmentation labels. Our method reports a mean dice of $0.64$ for task 3 and $0.85$ for task 4 on the test sets, taking third place on the challenge. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/TheoEst/abdominal_registration and \https://github.com/TheoEst/hippocampus_registration. 图像配准是医学图像分析中最具挑战性的问题之一。近年来，基于深度学习的方法变得非常流行，提供快速且执行的注册策略。在这篇简短的论文中，我们总结了我们在 Learn2Reg 2020 挑战赛上提出的工作。我们工作的主要贡献依赖于 (i) 对称公式，同时预测从源到目标以及从目标到源的转换，强制训练后的表示相似，以及 (ii) 集成用于预训练和增强分割标签的各种公开可用数据集。我们的方法报告测试集上任务 3 的平均骰子为 0.64 美元，任务 4 的平均骰子为 0.85 美元，在挑战中获得第三名。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/TheoEst/abdominal_registration 和 \https://github.com/TheoEst/hippocampus_registration 公开获取。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的医学图像配准方法，利用空间梯度和噪声分割标签提升配准效果。 Théo Estienne,Maria Vakalopoulou,Enzo Battistella,Alexandre Carré,Théophraste Henry,Marvin Lerousseau,Charlotte Robert,Nikos Paragios,Eric Deutsch cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: BERT for Joint Multichannel Speech Dereverberation with Spatial-aware Tasks
title_zh: BERT 用于联合多通道语音去混响与空间感知任务
abstract: We propose a method for joint multichannel speech dereverberation with two spatial-aware tasks: direction-of-arrival (DOA) estimation and speech separation. The proposed method addresses involved tasks as a sequence to sequence mapping problem, which is general enough for a variety of front-end speech enhancement tasks. The proposed method is inspired by the excellent sequence modeling capability of bidirectional encoder representation from transformers (BERT). Instead of utilizing explicit representations from pretraining in a self-supervised manner, we utilizes transformer encoded hidden representations in a supervised manner. Both multichannel spectral magnitude and spectral phase information of varying length utterances are encoded. Experimental result demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: We propose a method for joint multichannel speech dereverberation with two spatial-aware tasks: direction-of-arrival (DOA) estimation and speech separation. The proposed method addresses involved tasks as a sequence to sequence mapping problem, which is general enough for a variety of front-end speech enhancement tasks. The proposed method is inspired by the excellent sequence modeling capability of bidirectional encoder representation from transformers (BERT). Instead of utilizing explicit representations from pretraining in a self-supervised manner, we utilizes transformer encoded hidden representations in a supervised manner. Both multichannel spectral magnitude and spectral phase information of varying length utterances are encoded. Experimental result demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种联合多通道语音去混响的方法，具有两个空间感知任务：到达方向（DOA）估计和语音分离。所提出的方法将所涉及的任务作为序列到序列映射问题来解决，这对于各种前端语音增强任务来说足够通用。所提出的方法受到变压器双向编码器表示（BERT）出色的序列建模能力的启发。我们不是以自监督的方式利用预训练的显式表示，而是以监督的方式利用变压器编码的隐藏表示。不同长度话语的多通道频谱幅度和频谱相位信息均被编码。实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于BERT的多通道语音去混响方法，结合方向-of-到达（DOA）估计和语音分离两个空间感知任务。
AI.motivation: 传统语音增强方法难以有效处理多通道信号中的混响问题，且现有模型对空间信息建模不足，而BERT的序列建模能力可提升多任务联合处理效果。
AI.method: 将多通道语音去混响与DOA估计、语音分离任务转化为序列到序列映射问题，利用BERT的Transformer编码器提取频谱幅度和相位特征，并采用监督学习方式进行训练。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了该方法在语音去混响和空间感知任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于BERT的监督学习方法可有效解决多通道语音去混响联合任务，为复杂声学环境下的语音增强提供了新思路。

title: Learning Integrodifferential Models for Image Denoising
title_zh: 学习图像去噪的积分微分模型
abstract: We introduce an integrodifferential extension of the edge-enhancing anisotropic diffusion model for image denoising. By accumulating weighted structural information on multiple scales, our model is the first to create anisotropy through multiscale integration. It follows the philosophy of combining the advantages of model-based and data-driven approaches within compact, insightful, and mathematically well-founded models with improved performance. We explore trained results of scale-adaptive weighting and contrast parameters to obtain an explicit modelling by smooth functions. This leads to a transparent model with only three parameters, without significantly decreasing its denoising performance. Experiments demonstrate that it outperforms its diffusion-based predecessors. We show that both multiscale information and anisotropy are crucial for its success.
summary: We introduce an integrodifferential extension of the edge-enhancing anisotropic diffusion model for image denoising. By accumulating weighted structural information on multiple scales, our model is the first to create anisotropy through multiscale integration. It follows the philosophy of combining the advantages of model-based and data-driven approaches within compact, insightful, and mathematically well-founded models with improved performance. We explore trained results of scale-adaptive weighting and contrast parameters to obtain an explicit modelling by smooth functions. This leads to a transparent model with only three parameters, without significantly decreasing its denoising performance. Experiments demonstrate that it outperforms its diffusion-based predecessors. We show that both multiscale information and anisotropy are crucial for its success.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了用于图像去噪的边缘增强各向异性扩散模型的积分微分扩展。通过在多个尺度上积累加权结构信息，我们的模型是第一个通过多尺度集成创建各向异性的模型。它遵循的理念是将基于模型和数据驱动的方法的优势结合到紧凑、富有洞察力和数学基础良好的模型中，并提高性能。我们探索尺度自适应加权和对比度参数的训练结果，以通过平滑函数获得显式建模。这导致了一个只有三个参数的透明模型，而不会显着降低其去噪性能。实验表明，它的性能优于基于扩散的前辈。我们表明，多尺度信息和各向异性对其成功至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于积分微分方程的图像去噪模型，通过多尺度结构信息整合实现各向异性扩散。
AI.motivation: 传统各向异性扩散模型在保持边缘细节时存在局限，需结合多尺度信息与数据驱动方法提升去噪效果。
AI.method: 设计多尺度积分算子整合结构信息，通过训练自适应权重与对比度参数构建仅含三个参数的显式模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在去噪性能上优于基于扩散的前序方法，验证了多尺度信息与各向异性的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度积分与各向异性机制的结合能有效提升图像去噪效果，为模型构建提供新思路。

title: Improved Runtime Results for Simple Randomised Search Heuristics on Linear Functions with a Uniform Constraint
title_zh: 具有均匀约束的线性函数的简单随机搜索启发式改进的运行时结果
comment: Journal version to appear in Algorithmica
comments: Journal version to appear in Algorithmica
abstract: In the last decade remarkable progress has been made in development of suitable proof techniques for analysing randomised search heuristics. The theoretical investigation of these algorithms on classes of functions is essential to the understanding of the underlying stochastic process. Linear functions have been traditionally studied in this area resulting in tight bounds on the expected optimisation time of simple randomised search algorithms for this class of problems. Recently, the constrained version of this problem has gained attention and some theoretical results have also been obtained on this class of problems. In this paper we study the class of linear functions under uniform constraint and investigate the expected optimisation time of Randomised Local Search (RLS) and a simple evolutionary algorithm called (1+1) EA. We prove a tight bound of $Θ(n^2)$ for RLS and improve the previously best known upper bound of (1+1) EA from $O(n^2 \log (Bw_{\max}))$ to $O(n^2\log B)$ in expectation and to $O(n^2 \log n)$ with high probability, where $w_{\max}$ and $B$ are the maximum weight of the linear objective function and the bound of the uniform constraint, respectively. Also, we obtain a tight bound of $O(n^2)$ for the (1+1) EA on a special class of instances. We complement our theoretical studies by experimental investigations that consider different values of $B$ and also higher mutation rates that reflect the fact that $2$-bit flips are crucial for dealing with the uniform constraint.
summary: In the last decade remarkable progress has been made in development of suitable proof techniques for analysing randomised search heuristics. The theoretical investigation of these algorithms on classes of functions is essential to the understanding of the underlying stochastic process. Linear functions have been traditionally studied in this area resulting in tight bounds on the expected optimisation time of simple randomised search algorithms for this class of problems. Recently, the constrained version of this problem has gained attention and some theoretical results have also been obtained on this class of problems. In this paper we study the class of linear functions under uniform constraint and investigate the expected optimisation time of Randomised Local Search (RLS) and a simple evolutionary algorithm called (1+1) EA. We prove a tight bound of $Θ(n^2)$ for RLS and improve the previously best known upper bound of (1+1) EA from $O(n^2 \log (Bw_{\max}))$ to $O(n^2\log B)$ in expectation and to $O(n^2 \log n)$ with high probability, where $w_{\max}$ and $B$ are the maximum weight of the linear objective function and the bound of the uniform constraint, respectively. Also, we obtain a tight bound of $O(n^2)$ for the (1+1) EA on a special class of instances. We complement our theoretical studies by experimental investigations that consider different values of $B$ and also higher mutation rates that reflect the fact that $2$-bit flips are crucial for dealing with the uniform constraint.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，在开发用于分析随机搜索启发式的合适证明技术方面取得了显着的进展。这些算法对函数类的理论研究对于理解潜在的随机过程至关重要。该领域传统上研究线性函数，导致此类问题的简单随机搜索算法的预期优化时间受到严格限制。最近，该问题的约束版本引起了人们的关注，并且在此类问题上也取得了一些理论成果。在本文中，我们研究了均匀约束下的线性函数类，并研究了随机局部搜索 (RLS) 和称为 (1+1) EA 的简单进化算法的预期优化时间。我们证明了 RLS 的 $θ(n^2)$ 紧界，并将先前已知的 (1+1) EA 上限从 $O(n^2 \log (Bw_{\max}))$ 提高到 $O(n^2\log B)$ 期望值，并以高概率提高到 $O(n^2 \log n)$，其中 $w_{\max}$ 和 $B$ 分别是线性目标函数的最大权重和均匀约束的界限。此外，我们在特殊实例类上获得 (1+1) EA 的 $O(n^2)$ 紧界。我们通过实验研究来补充我们的理论研究，实验研究考虑了不同的 $B$ 值以及更高的突变率，这反映了 $2$ 位翻转对于处理均匀约束至关重要的事实。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在统一约束条件下，随机局部搜索（RLS）和（1+1）EA算法对线性函数的期望优化时间，并改进了相关理论界。
AI.motivation: 线性函数是随机搜索启发式算法分析的经典问题，而约束条件的引入增加了问题复杂性。现有理论结果对约束情形的分析尚不完善，需进一步探索更精确的优化时间界。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明RLS和（1+1）EA的优化时间界，并结合实验验证不同约束参数和突变率对算法性能的影响。
AI.result: 证明RLS的紧界为Θ(n²)，将（1+1）EA的上界从O(n² log(Bw_max))改进为O(n² log B)（期望）和O(n² log n)（高概率），并在特定实例上获得O(n²)的紧界。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论与实验结合，揭示了统一约束下随机搜索算法的优化时间特性，为约束优化问题提供了更高效的算法分析框架。

search_text: Improved Runtime Results for Simple Randomised Search Heuristics on Linear Functions with a Uniform Constraint 具有均匀约束的线性函数的简单随机搜索启发式改进的运行时结果 In the last decade remarkable progress has been made in development of suitable proof techniques for analysing randomised search heuristics. The theoretical investigation of these algorithms on classes of functions is essential to the understanding of the underlying stochastic process. Linear functions have been traditionally studied in this area resulting in tight bounds on the expected optimisation time of simple randomised search algorithms for this class of problems. Recently, the constrained version of this problem has gained attention and some theoretical results have also been obtained on this class of problems. In this paper we study the class of linear functions under uniform constraint and investigate the expected optimisation time of Randomised Local Search (RLS) and a simple evolutionary algorithm called (1+1) EA. We prove a tight bound of $Θ(n^2)$ for RLS and improve the previously best known upper bound of (1+1) EA from $O(n^2 \log (Bw_{\max}))$ to $O(n^2\log B)$ in expectation and to $O(n^2 \log n)$ with high probability, where $w_{\max}$ and $B$ are the maximum weight of the linear objective function and the bound of the uniform constraint, respectively. Also, we obtain a tight bound of $O(n^2)$ for the (1+1) EA on a special class of instances. We complement our theoretical studies by experimental investigations that consider different values of $B$ and also higher mutation rates that reflect the fact that $2$-bit flips are crucial for dealing with the uniform constraint. 在过去的十年中，在开发用于分析随机搜索启发式的合适证明技术方面取得了显着的进展。这些算法对函数类的理论研究对于理解潜在的随机过程至关重要。该领域传统上研究线性函数，导致此类问题的简单随机搜索算法的预期优化时间受到严格限制。最近，该问题的约束版本引起了人们的关注，并且在此类问题上也取得了一些理论成果。在本文中，我们研究了均匀约束下的线性函数类，并研究了随机局部搜索 (RLS) 和称为 (1+1) EA 的简单进化算法的预期优化时间。我们证明了 RLS 的 $θ(n^2)$ 紧界，并将先前已知的 (1+1) EA 上限从 $O(n^2 \log (Bw_{\max}))$ 提高到 $O(n^2\log B)$ 期望值，并以高概率提高到 $O(n^2 \log n)$，其中 $w_{\max}$ 和 $B$ 分别是线性目标函数的最大权重和均匀约束的界限。此外，我们在特殊实例类上获得 (1+1) EA 的 $O(n^2)$ 紧界。我们通过实验研究来补充我们的理论研究，实验研究考虑了不同的 $B$ 值以及更高的突变率，这反映了 $2$ 位翻转对于处理均匀约束至关重要的事实。 本文研究了在统一约束条件下，随机局部搜索（RLS）和（1+1）EA算法对线性函数的期望优化时间，并改进了相关理论界。 Frank Neumann,Mojgan Pourhassan,Carsten Witt cs.NE,cs.AI

title: uARMSolver: A framework for Association Rule Mining
title_zh: uARMSolver：关联规则挖掘框架
abstract: The paper presents a novel software framework for Association Rule Mining named uARMSolver. The framework is written fully in C++ and runs on all platforms. It allows users to preprocess their data in a transaction database, to make discretization of data, to search for association rules and to guide a presentation/visualization of the best rules found using external tools. As opposed to the existing software packages or frameworks, this also supports numerical and real-valued types of attributes besides the categorical ones. Mining the association rules is defined as an optimization and solved using the nature-inspired algorithms that can be incorporated easily. Because the algorithms normally discover a huge amount of association rules, the framework enables a modular inclusion of so-called visual guiders for extracting the knowledge hidden in data, and visualize these using external tools.
summary: The paper presents a novel software framework for Association Rule Mining named uARMSolver. The framework is written fully in C++ and runs on all platforms. It allows users to preprocess their data in a transaction database, to make discretization of data, to search for association rules and to guide a presentation/visualization of the best rules found using external tools. As opposed to the existing software packages or frameworks, this also supports numerical and real-valued types of attributes besides the categorical ones. Mining the association rules is defined as an optimization and solved using the nature-inspired algorithms that can be incorporated easily. Because the algorithms normally discover a huge amount of association rules, the framework enables a modular inclusion of so-called visual guiders for extracting the knowledge hidden in data, and visualize these using external tools.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的关联规则挖掘软件框架，名为 uARMSolver。该框架完全用 C++ 编写，可在所有平台上运行。它允许用户预处理事务数据库中的数据，使数据离散化，搜索关联规则并指导使用外部工具找到的最佳规则的呈现/可视化。与现有的软件包或框架相反，除了分类属性之外，它还支持数字和实值类型的属性。挖掘关联规则被定义为一种优化，并使用易于合并的自然启发算法来解决。由于算法通常会发现大量关联规则，因此该框架可以模块化包含所谓的视觉引导器，用于提取隐藏在数据中的知识，并使用外部工具将这些知识可视化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为uARMSolver的关联规则挖掘框架，支持多种数据类型并采用优化算法进行挖掘。
AI.motivation: 现有软件包不支持数值/实值属性，且难以处理大量规则的可视化需求。
AI.method: 基于C++开发跨平台框架，集成数据预处理、离散化、自然启发优化算法及外部工具可视化模块。
AI.result: 框架成功实现对多类型数据的关联规则挖掘，并通过可视化工具辅助知识提取。
AI.conclusion: uARMSolver通过扩展数据类型支持与优化算法，提升了关联规则挖掘的效率与实用性。

title: Multi-Dimensional Randomized Response
title_zh: 多维随机响应
comment: IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering, to appear. (First version submitted on May 8, 2019 as TKDE-2019-05-0430; first revision submitted on July 13, 2020 as TKDE-2019-05-0430.R1; second revision submitted on Nov. 5, 2020 as TKDE-2019-05-0430.R2 and accepted without changes on Dec. 16, 2020)
comments: IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering, to appear. (First version submitted on May 8, 2019 as TKDE-2019-05-0430; first revision submitted on July 13, 2020 as TKDE-2019-05-0430.R1; second revision submitted on Nov. 5, 2020 as TKDE-2019-05-0430.R2 and accepted without changes on Dec. 16, 2020)
abstract: In our data world, a host of not necessarily trusted controllers gather data on individual subjects. To preserve her privacy and, more generally, her informational self-determination, the individual has to be empowered by giving her agency on her own data. Maximum agency is afforded by local anonymization, that allows each individual to anonymize her own data before handing them to the data controller. Randomized response (RR) is a local anonymization approach able to yield multi-dimensional full sets of anonymized microdata that are valid for exploratory analysis and machine learning. This is so because an unbiased estimate of the distribution of the true data of individuals can be obtained from their pooled randomized data. Furthermore, RR offers rigorous privacy guarantees. The main weakness of RR is the curse of dimensionality when applied to several attributes: as the number of attributes grows, the accuracy of the estimated true data distribution quickly degrades. We propose several complementary approaches to mitigate the dimensionality problem. First, we present two basic protocols, separate RR on each attribute and joint RR for all attributes, and discuss their limitations. Then we introduce an algorithm to form clusters of attributes so that attributes in different clusters can be viewed as independent and joint RR can be performed within each cluster. After that, we introduce an adjustment algorithm for the randomized data set that repairs some of the accuracy loss due to assuming independence between attributes when using RR separately on each attribute or due to assuming independence between clusters in cluster-wise RR. We also present empirical work to illustrate the proposed methods.
summary: In our data world, a host of not necessarily trusted controllers gather data on individual subjects. To preserve her privacy and, more generally, her informational self-determination, the individual has to be empowered by giving her agency on her own data. Maximum agency is afforded by local anonymization, that allows each individual to anonymize her own data before handing them to the data controller. Randomized response (RR) is a local anonymization approach able to yield multi-dimensional full sets of anonymized microdata that are valid for exploratory analysis and machine learning. This is so because an unbiased estimate of the distribution of the true data of individuals can be obtained from their pooled randomized data. Furthermore, RR offers rigorous privacy guarantees. The main weakness of RR is the curse of dimensionality when applied to several attributes: as the number of attributes grows, the accuracy of the estimated true data distribution quickly degrades. We propose several complementary approaches to mitigate the dimensionality problem. First, we present two basic protocols, separate RR on each attribute and joint RR for all attributes, and discuss their limitations. Then we introduce an algorithm to form clusters of attributes so that attributes in different clusters can be viewed as independent and joint RR can be performed within each cluster. After that, we introduce an adjustment algorithm for the randomized data set that repairs some of the accuracy loss due to assuming independence between attributes when using RR separately on each attribute or due to assuming independence between clusters in cluster-wise RR. We also present empirical work to illustrate the proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 在我们的数据世界中，许多不一定受信任的控制者收集有关各个主题的数据。为了保护她的隐私，更广泛地说，为了保护她的信息自决权，必须通过赋予她对自己数据的代理权来赋予她权力。本地匿名化提供了最大的代理权，允许每个人在将自己的数据交给数据控制者之前对其进行匿名化。随机响应 (RR) 是一种局部匿名方法，能够生成对探索性分析和机器学习有效的多维完整匿名微数据集。之所以如此，是因为可以从汇总的随机数据中获得对个体真实数据分布的无偏估计。此外，RR 还提供严格的隐私保证。 RR 的主要弱点是应用于多个属性时的维数灾难：随着属性数量的增加，估计的真实数据分布的准确性迅速下降。我们提出了几种补充方法来缓解维度问题。首先，我们提出两种基本协议，每个属性的单独 RR 和所有属性的联合 RR，并讨论它们的局限性。然后我们引入一种算法来形成属性簇，使得不同簇中的属性可以被视为独立的，并且可以在每个簇内进行联合RR。之后，我们引入了一种随机数据集的调整算法，该算法修复了由于在每个属性上单独使用 RR 时假设属性之间的独立性或由于在 cluster-wise RR 中假设集群之间的独立性而导致的一些精度损失。我们还提出了实证工作来说明所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多维随机响应技术，通过改进局部匿名化方法解决高维数据隐私保护与分析准确性之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 在数据收集过程中，个人需要自主控制数据隐私，但传统随机响应方法在高维数据场景下存在准确性快速下降的问题。
AI.method: 提出分离式属性随机响应与联合式多属性随机响应协议，结合属性聚类算法和误差修正机制，分层次处理高维数据的隐私保护与分布估计。
AI.result: 实验验证了聚类分组与误差修正算法能有效缓解维度灾难，提升高维数据下的分布估计精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过属性分组与算法优化，多维随机响应技术能够在保证隐私性的同时，显著提升高维数据的统计分析可靠性。

Then we introduce an algorithm to form clusters of attributes so that attributes in different clusters can be viewed as independent and joint RR can be performed within each cluster. After that, we introduce an adjustment algorithm for the randomized data set that repairs some of the accuracy loss due to assuming independence between attributes when using RR separately on each attribute or due to assuming independence between clusters in cluster-wise RR. We also present empirical work to illustrate the proposed methods. 在我们的数据世界中，许多不一定受信任的控制者收集有关各个主题的数据。为了保护她的隐私，更广泛地说，为了保护她的信息自决权，必须通过赋予她对自己数据的代理权来赋予她权力。本地匿名化提供了最大的代理权，允许每个人在将自己的数据交给数据控制者之前对其进行匿名化。随机响应 (RR) 是一种局部匿名方法，能够生成对探索性分析和机器学习有效的多维完整匿名微数据集。之所以如此，是因为可以从汇总的随机数据中获得对个体真实数据分布的无偏估计。此外，RR 还提供严格的隐私保证。 RR 的主要弱点是应用于多个属性时的维数灾难：随着属性数量的增加，估计的真实数据分布的准确性迅速下降。我们提出了几种补充方法来缓解维度问题。首先，我们提出两种基本协议，每个属性的单独 RR 和所有属性的联合 RR，并讨论它们的局限性。然后我们引入一种算法来形成属性簇，使得不同簇中的属性可以被视为独立的，并且可以在每个簇内进行联合RR。之后，我们引入了一种随机数据集的调整算法，该算法修复了由于在每个属性上单独使用 RR 时假设属性之间的独立性或由于在 cluster-wise RR 中假设集群之间的独立性而导致的一些精度损失。我们还提出了实证工作来说明所提出的方法。 本文提出多维随机响应技术，通过改进局部匿名化方法解决高维数据隐私保护与分析准确性之间的矛盾。 Josep Domingo-Ferrer,Jordi Soria-Comas cs.CR,cs.DS

title: Probabilistic Numeric Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 概率数值卷积神经网络
abstract: Continuous input signals like images and time series that are irregularly sampled or have missing values are challenging for existing deep learning methods. Coherently defined feature representations must depend on the values in unobserved regions of the input. Drawing from the work in probabilistic numerics, we propose Probabilistic Numeric Convolutional Neural Networks which represent features as Gaussian processes (GPs), providing a probabilistic description of discretization error. We then define a convolutional layer as the evolution of a PDE defined on this GP, followed by a nonlinearity. This approach also naturally admits steerable equivariant convolutions under e.g. the rotation group. In experiments we show that our approach yields a $3\times$ reduction of error from the previous state of the art on the SuperPixel-MNIST dataset and competitive performance on the medical time series dataset PhysioNet2012.
summary: Continuous input signals like images and time series that are irregularly sampled or have missing values are challenging for existing deep learning methods. Coherently defined feature representations must depend on the values in unobserved regions of the input. Drawing from the work in probabilistic numerics, we propose Probabilistic Numeric Convolutional Neural Networks which represent features as Gaussian processes (GPs), providing a probabilistic description of discretization error. We then define a convolutional layer as the evolution of a PDE defined on this GP, followed by a nonlinearity. This approach also naturally admits steerable equivariant convolutions under e.g. the rotation group. In experiments we show that our approach yields a $3\times$ reduction of error from the previous state of the art on the SuperPixel-MNIST dataset and competitive performance on the medical time series dataset PhysioNet2012.
abstract_zh: 图像和时间序列等连续输入信号不规则采样或具有缺失值，这对现有的深度学习方法来说是一个挑战。一致定义的特征表示必须取决于输入的未观察区域中的值。借鉴概率数值方面的工作，我们提出了概率数值卷积神经网络，它将特征表示为高斯过程（GP），提供离散化误差的概率描述。然后，我们将卷积层定义为在此 GP 上定义的 PDE 的演化，然后是非线性。这种方法自然也允许在例如以下情况下进行可操纵的等变卷积：轮换组。在实验中，我们表明，与之前的技术水平相比，我们的方法在 SuperPixel-MNIST 数据集上的误差减少了 3 倍，并且在医疗时间序列数据集 PhysioNet2012 上的表现也具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出概率数值卷积神经网络，用于处理不规则采样或存在缺失值的连续输入信号，如图像和时间序列。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以处理不规则采样和缺失值数据，导致特征表示不准确。需结合概率数值方法以量化离散化误差并提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将特征表示为高斯过程（GP），通过定义在GP上的偏微分方程（PDE）演化实现卷积层，并引入非线性激活，支持旋转等变卷积。
AI.result: 在SuperPixel-MNIST数据集上误差较之前方法减少3倍，在医疗时间序列数据集PhysioNet2012上表现具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过概率建模有效处理不规则数据，为复杂信号分析提供新思路，未来可拓展至更多应用场景。

title: TurnGPT: a Transformer-based Language Model for Predicting Turn-taking in Spoken Dialog
title_zh: TurnGPT：一种基于 Transformer 的语言模型，用于预测口语对话中的轮流
comment: Accepted to Findings of ACL: EMNLP 2020
comments: Accepted to Findings of ACL: EMNLP 2020
abstract: Syntactic and pragmatic completeness is known to be important for turn-taking prediction, but so far machine learning models of turn-taking have used such linguistic information in a limited way. In this paper, we introduce TurnGPT, a transformer-based language model for predicting turn-shifts in spoken dialog. The model has been trained and evaluated on a variety of written and spoken dialog datasets. We show that the model outperforms two baselines used in prior work. We also report on an ablation study, as well as attention and gradient analyses, which show that the model is able to utilize the dialog context and pragmatic completeness for turn-taking prediction. Finally, we explore the model's potential in not only detecting, but also projecting, turn-completions.
summary: Syntactic and pragmatic completeness is known to be important for turn-taking prediction, but so far machine learning models of turn-taking have used such linguistic information in a limited way. In this paper, we introduce TurnGPT, a transformer-based language model for predicting turn-shifts in spoken dialog. The model has been trained and evaluated on a variety of written and spoken dialog datasets. We show that the model outperforms two baselines used in prior work. We also report on an ablation study, as well as attention and gradient analyses, which show that the model is able to utilize the dialog context and pragmatic completeness for turn-taking prediction. Finally, we explore the model's potential in not only detecting, but also projecting, turn-completions.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，句法和语用完整性对于轮流预测很重要，但到目前为止，轮流的机器学习模型以有限的方式使用了此类语言信息。在本文中，我们介绍了 TurnGPT，这是一种基于 Transformer 的语言模型，用于预测口语对话中的轮换。该模型已经在各种书面和口头对话数据集上进行了训练和评估。我们证明该模型优于先前工作中使用的两个基线。我们还报告了消融研究以及注意力和梯度分析，这些分析表明该模型能够利用对话上下文和语用完整性来进行轮流预测。最后，我们探索该模型不仅在检测，而且在预测回合完成方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TurnGPT，一种基于Transformer的语言模型，用于预测口语对话中的轮流说话转换。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型在利用语法和语用完整性等语言信息进行轮流预测时存在局限性，需改进模型以更有效捕捉对话上下文和语用特征。
AI.method: 开发基于Transformer架构的TurnGPT模型，在多种书面和口语对话数据集上进行训练与评估，结合消融研究、注意力分析和梯度分析验证模型特性。
AI.result: TurnGPT在两个基线模型上表现更优，实验表明其能有效利用对话上下文和语用完整性进行预测，并具备检测与预测轮流完成的能力。
AI.conclusion: TurnGPT成功整合了对话语境与语用信息，为口语对话轮流预测提供了新方法，展示了在对话系统中的应用潜力。

title: Explaining black-box text classifiers for disease-treatment information extraction
title_zh: 解释用于疾病治疗信息提取的黑盒文本分类器
abstract: Deep neural networks and other intricate Artificial Intelligence (AI) models have reached high levels of accuracy on many biomedical natural language processing tasks. However, their applicability in real-world use cases may be limited due to their vague inner working and decision logic. A post-hoc explanation method can approximate the behavior of a black-box AI model by extracting relationships between feature values and outcomes. In this paper, we introduce a post-hoc explanation method that utilizes confident itemsets to approximate the behavior of black-box classifiers for medical information extraction. Incorporating medical concepts and semantics into the explanation process, our explanator finds semantic relations between inputs and outputs in different parts of the decision space of a black-box classifier. The experimental results show that our explanation method can outperform perturbation and decision set based explanators in terms of fidelity and interpretability of explanations produced for predictions on a disease-treatment information extraction task.
summary: Deep neural networks and other intricate Artificial Intelligence (AI) models have reached high levels of accuracy on many biomedical natural language processing tasks. However, their applicability in real-world use cases may be limited due to their vague inner working and decision logic. A post-hoc explanation method can approximate the behavior of a black-box AI model by extracting relationships between feature values and outcomes. In this paper, we introduce a post-hoc explanation method that utilizes confident itemsets to approximate the behavior of black-box classifiers for medical information extraction. Incorporating medical concepts and semantics into the explanation process, our explanator finds semantic relations between inputs and outputs in different parts of the decision space of a black-box classifier. The experimental results show that our explanation method can outperform perturbation and decision set based explanators in terms of fidelity and interpretability of explanations produced for predictions on a disease-treatment information extraction task.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络和其他复杂的人工智能 (AI) 模型在许多生物医学自然语言处理任务上已经达到了很高的准确性。然而，由于其模糊的内部工作和决策逻辑，它们在现实世界用例中的适用性可能会受到限制。事后解释方法可以通过提取特征值和结果之间的关系来近似黑盒人工智能模型的行为。在本文中，我们介绍了一种事后解释方法，该方法利用置信项集来近似用于医学信息提取的黑盒分类器的行为。将医学概念和语义纳入解释过程中，我们的解释器发现黑盒分类器决策空间不同部分的输入和输出之间的语义关系。实验结果表明，我们的解释方法在疾病治疗信息提取任务预测的解释的保真度和可解释性方面可以优于基于扰动和决策集的解释器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于置信项集的后验解释方法，用于解释黑盒分类器在疾病治疗信息提取任务中的决策逻辑。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在生物医学NLP任务中表现优异，但其决策过程缺乏可解释性，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 结合医学概念与语义，通过提取置信项集建立输入特征与输出结果间的语义关联关系。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保真度和可解释性指标上优于扰动法和决策集基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效提升黑盒模型在医疗信息抽取任务中的可解释性，为临床应用提供可信依据。

motivation: 深度学习模型在生物医学NLP任务中表现优异，但其决策过程缺乏可解释性，限制了实际应用。

search_text: Explaining black-box text classifiers for disease-treatment information extraction 解释用于疾病治疗信息提取的黑盒文本分类器 Deep neural networks and other intricate Artificial Intelligence (AI) models have reached high levels of accuracy on many biomedical natural language processing tasks. However, their applicability in real-world use cases may be limited due to their vague inner working and decision logic. A post-hoc explanation method can approximate the behavior of a black-box AI model by extracting relationships between feature values and outcomes. In this paper, we introduce a post-hoc explanation method that utilizes confident itemsets to approximate the behavior of black-box classifiers for medical information extraction. Incorporating medical concepts and semantics into the explanation process, our explanator finds semantic relations between inputs and outputs in different parts of the decision space of a black-box classifier. The experimental results show that our explanation method can outperform perturbation and decision set based explanators in terms of fidelity and interpretability of explanations produced for predictions on a disease-treatment information extraction task. 深度神经网络和其他复杂的人工智能 (AI) 模型在许多生物医学自然语言处理任务上已经达到了很高的准确性。然而，由于其模糊的内部工作和决策逻辑，它们在现实世界用例中的适用性可能会受到限制。事后解释方法可以通过提取特征值和结果之间的关系来近似黑盒人工智能模型的行为。在本文中，我们介绍了一种事后解释方法，该方法利用置信项集来近似用于医学信息提取的黑盒分类器的行为。将医学概念和语义纳入解释过程中，我们的解释器发现黑盒分类器决策空间不同部分的输入和输出之间的语义关系。实验结果表明，我们的解释方法在疾病治疗信息提取任务预测的解释的保真度和可解释性方面可以优于基于扰动和决策集的解释器。 本文提出一种基于置信项集的后验解释方法，用于解释黑盒分类器在疾病治疗信息提取任务中的决策逻辑。 Milad Moradi,Matthias Samwald cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Felix Taubner,Florian Tschopp,Tonci Novkovic,Roland Siegwart,Fadri Furrer
title: LCD -- Line Clustering and Description for Place Recognition
title_zh: LCD——用于位置识别的线聚类和描述
comment: Accepted for International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV) 2020
comments: Accepted for International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV) 2020
abstract: Current research on visual place recognition mostly focuses on aggregating local visual features of an image into a single vector representation. Therefore, high-level information such as the geometric arrangement of the features is typically lost. In this paper, we introduce a novel learning-based approach to place recognition, using RGB-D cameras and line clusters as visual and geometric features. We state the place recognition problem as a problem of recognizing clusters of lines instead of individual patches, thus maintaining structural information. In our work, line clusters are defined as lines that make up individual objects, hence our place recognition approach can be understood as object recognition. 3D line segments are detected in RGB-D images using state-of-the-art techniques. We present a neural network architecture based on the attention mechanism for frame-wise line clustering. A similar neural network is used for the description of these clusters with a compact embedding of 128 floating point numbers, trained with triplet loss on training data obtained from the InteriorNet dataset. We show experiments on a large number of indoor scenes and compare our method with the bag-of-words image-retrieval approach using SIFT and SuperPoint features and the global descriptor NetVLAD. Trained only on synthetic data, our approach generalizes well to real-world data captured with Kinect sensors, while also providing information about the geometric arrangement of instances.
summary: Current research on visual place recognition mostly focuses on aggregating local visual features of an image into a single vector representation. Therefore, high-level information such as the geometric arrangement of the features is typically lost. In this paper, we introduce a novel learning-based approach to place recognition, using RGB-D cameras and line clusters as visual and geometric features. We state the place recognition problem as a problem of recognizing clusters of lines instead of individual patches, thus maintaining structural information. In our work, line clusters are defined as lines that make up individual objects, hence our place recognition approach can be understood as object recognition. 3D line segments are detected in RGB-D images using state-of-the-art techniques. We present a neural network architecture based on the attention mechanism for frame-wise line clustering. A similar neural network is used for the description of these clusters with a compact embedding of 128 floating point numbers, trained with triplet loss on training data obtained from the InteriorNet dataset. We show experiments on a large number of indoor scenes and compare our method with the bag-of-words image-retrieval approach using SIFT and SuperPoint features and the global descriptor NetVLAD. Trained only on synthetic data, our approach generalizes well to real-world data captured with Kinect sensors, while also providing information about the geometric arrangement of instances.
abstract_zh: 当前视觉位置识别的研究主要集中在将图像的局部视觉特征聚合成单个向量表示。因此，诸如特征的几何排列之类的高级信息通常会丢失。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的基于学习的地点识别方法，使用 RGB-D 相机和线簇作为视觉和几何特征。我们将地点识别问题描述为识别线簇而不是单个块的问题，从而保持结构信息。在我们的工作中，线簇被定义为构成单个对象的线，因此我们的位置识别方法可以理解为对象识别。使用最先进的技术在 RGB-D 图像中检测 3D 线段。我们提出了一种基于注意力机制的神经网络架构，用于逐帧线聚类。类似的神经网络用于描述这些簇，其中紧凑地嵌入了 128 个浮点数，并在从 InteriorNet 数据集获得的训练数据上使用三元组损失进行训练。我们在大量室内场景上进行了实验，并将我们的方法与使用 SIFT 和 SuperPoint 特征以及全局描述符 NetVLAD 的词袋图像检索方法进行比较。我们的方法仅针对合成数据进行训练，可以很好地推广到使用 Kinect 传感器捕获的现实世界数据，同时还提供有关实例几何排列的信息。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于线簇聚类和描述的场所识别方法，利用RGB-D相机捕捉的几何信息提升识别性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法在聚合局部特征时丢失了结构信息，而利用线簇可以保留几何信息，提升场所识别的准确性
AI.method: 采用基于注意力机制的神经网络进行线簇聚类，生成紧凑的128维嵌入向量，并通过三元组损失训练模型
AI.result: 在多个室内场景实验中，方法在真实世界数据上表现良好，优于传统方法，且保留几何信息
AI.conclusion: 通过线簇聚类和几何特征描述，方法在场所识别中表现优异，验证了结构信息的重要性

authors_text: Lucas Smaira,João Carreira,Eric Noland,Ellen Clancy,Amy Wu,Andrew Zisserman
title: A Short Note on the Kinetics-700-2020 Human Action Dataset
title_zh: 关于 Kinetics-700-2020 人类行为数据集的简短说明
abstract: We describe the 2020 edition of the DeepMind Kinetics human action dataset, which replenishes and extends the Kinetics-700 dataset. In this new version, there are at least 700 video clips from different YouTube videos for each of the 700 classes. This paper details the changes introduced for this new release of the dataset and includes a comprehensive set of statistics as well as baseline results using the I3D network.
summary: We describe the 2020 edition of the DeepMind Kinetics human action dataset, which replenishes and extends the Kinetics-700 dataset. In this new version, there are at least 700 video clips from different YouTube videos for each of the 700 classes. This paper details the changes introduced for this new release of the dataset and includes a comprehensive set of statistics as well as baseline results using the I3D network.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了 2020 版 DeepMind Kinetics 人类动作数据集，该数据集补充并扩展了 Kinetics-700 数据集。在这个新版本中，700 个类别中的每个类别至少有 700 个来自不同 YouTube 视频的视频剪辑。本文详细介绍了新版本数据集引入的更改，包括一组全面的统计数据以及使用 I3D 网络的基线结果。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了DeepMind Kinetics数据集的2020版，该版本扩充了原有Kinetics-700数据集，并为每个类别提供了至少700个视频片段，同时提供了基线结果。
AI.motivation: 为提升人类动作识别研究的质量，通过增加更多视频样本以增强数据集的多样性和实用性。
AI.method: 更新数据集结构，确保每个类别包含至少700个YouTube视频片段，并采用I3D网络进行基线性能评估。
AI.result: 发布了包含详细统计数据的Kinetics-700-2020数据集，并展示了I3D网络在该数据集上的基准结果。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集为动作识别研究提供了更丰富的资源，同时为后续模型优化和评估奠定了基础。

title: Assembly Sequences Based on Multiple Criteria Against Products with Deformable Parts
title_zh: 针对具有可变形零件的产品基于多种标准的装配顺序
abstract: Aiming to generate easy-to-handle assembly sequences for robotic assembly, this study tackles assembly sequence generation by considering two tradeoff objectives: (1) insertion conditions and (2) degrees of constraints among assembled parts. We propose a multiobjective genetic algorithm to balance these two objectives for generating assembly sequences. Furthermore, the method of extracting part relation matrices including interference-free, insertion, and degree of constraint matrices is extended for application to 3D computer-aided design (CAD) models, including deformable parts. The interference of deformable parts with other parts can be easily investigated by scaling parts. A simulation experiment was conducted using the proposed method, and the results show the possibility of obtaining Pareto-optimal solutions of assembly sequences for a 3D CAD model with 33 parts including a deformable part. This approach can potentially be extended to handle various types of deformable parts and to explore graspable sequences during assembly operations.
summary: Aiming to generate easy-to-handle assembly sequences for robotic assembly, this study tackles assembly sequence generation by considering two tradeoff objectives: (1) insertion conditions and (2) degrees of constraints among assembled parts. We propose a multiobjective genetic algorithm to balance these two objectives for generating assembly sequences. Furthermore, the method of extracting part relation matrices including interference-free, insertion, and degree of constraint matrices is extended for application to 3D computer-aided design (CAD) models, including deformable parts. The interference of deformable parts with other parts can be easily investigated by scaling parts. A simulation experiment was conducted using the proposed method, and the results show the possibility of obtaining Pareto-optimal solutions of assembly sequences for a 3D CAD model with 33 parts including a deformable part. This approach can potentially be extended to handle various types of deformable parts and to explore graspable sequences during assembly operations.
abstract_zh: 为了生成易于处理的机器人装配装配序列，本研究通过考虑两个权衡目标来解决装配序列生成问题：(1) 插入条件和 (2) 装配零件之间的约束程度。我们提出了一种多目标遗传算法来平衡这两个目标以生成组装序列。此外，提取零件关系矩阵（包括无干扰矩阵、插入矩阵和约束度矩阵）的方法被扩展到应用于 3D 计算机辅助设计（CAD）模型，包括可变形零件。通过缩放零件可以轻松研究可变形零件与其他零件的干涉。使用所提出的方法进行了仿真实验，结果表明，对于具有 33 个零件（包括可变形零件）的 3D CAD 模型，可以获得装配序列的 Pareto 最优解。这种方法可以扩展到处理各种类型的可变形零件，并探索装配操作期间的可抓取序列。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为包含可变形部件的产品生成易于机器人操作的装配序列，通过平衡插入条件和部件约束度两个目标。
AI.motivation: 传统装配序列生成方法难以处理可变形部件的复杂约束关系，需兼顾装配可行性与操作便捷性。
AI.method: 提出多目标遗传算法，结合扩展的部件关系矩阵（含干涉自由度、插入性及约束度矩阵），并应用于包含可变形部件的3D CAD模型。
AI.result: 通过仿真验证，成功为包含33个部件（含1个可变形部件）的3D模型生成帕累托最优装配序列。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可扩展至多种可变形部件，并为装配过程中的可抓取序列探索提供支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在为包含可变形部件的产品生成易于机器人操作的装配序列，通过平衡插入条件和部件约束度两个目标。

search_text: Assembly Sequences Based on Multiple Criteria Against Products with Deformable Parts 针对具有可变形零件的产品基于多种标准的装配顺序 Aiming to generate easy-to-handle assembly sequences for robotic assembly, this study tackles assembly sequence generation by considering two tradeoff objectives: (1) insertion conditions and (2) degrees of constraints among assembled parts. We propose a multiobjective genetic algorithm to balance these two objectives for generating assembly sequences. Furthermore, the method of extracting part relation matrices including interference-free, insertion, and degree of constraint matrices is extended for application to 3D computer-aided design (CAD) models, including deformable parts. The interference of deformable parts with other parts can be easily investigated by scaling parts. A simulation experiment was conducted using the proposed method, and the results show the possibility of obtaining Pareto-optimal solutions of assembly sequences for a 3D CAD model with 33 parts including a deformable part. This approach can potentially be extended to handle various types of deformable parts and to explore graspable sequences during assembly operations. 为了生成易于处理的机器人装配装配序列，本研究通过考虑两个权衡目标来解决装配序列生成问题：(1) 插入条件和 (2) 装配零件之间的约束程度。我们提出了一种多目标遗传算法来平衡这两个目标以生成组装序列。此外，提取零件关系矩阵（包括无干扰矩阵、插入矩阵和约束度矩阵）的方法被扩展到应用于 3D 计算机辅助设计（CAD）模型，包括可变形零件。通过缩放零件可以轻松研究可变形零件与其他零件的干涉。使用所提出的方法进行了仿真实验，结果表明，对于具有 33 个零件（包括可变形零件）的 3D CAD 模型，可以获得装配序列的 Pareto 最优解。这种方法可以扩展到处理各种类型的可变形零件，并探索装配操作期间的可抓取序列。 本文旨在为包含可变形部件的产品生成易于机器人操作的装配序列，通过平衡插入条件和部件约束度两个目标。 Takuya Kiyokawa,Jun Takamatsu,Tsukasa Ogasawara cs.RO

title: Soft-Jig-Driven Assembly Operations
title_zh: 软夹具驱动的装配操作
abstract: To design a general-purpose assembly robot system that can handle objects of various shapes, we propose a soft jig that fits to the shapes of assembly parts. The functionality of the soft jig is based on a jamming gripper developed in the field of soft robotics. The soft jig has a bag covered with a malleable silicone membrane, which has high friction, elongation, and contraction rates for keeping parts fixed. The bag is filled with glass beads to achieve a jamming transition. We propose a method to configure parts-fixing on the soft jig based on contact relations, reachable directions, and the center of gravity of the parts that are fixed on the jig. The usability of the soft jig was evaluated in terms of the fixing performance and versatility for various shapes and postures of parts.
summary: To design a general-purpose assembly robot system that can handle objects of various shapes, we propose a soft jig that fits to the shapes of assembly parts. The functionality of the soft jig is based on a jamming gripper developed in the field of soft robotics. The soft jig has a bag covered with a malleable silicone membrane, which has high friction, elongation, and contraction rates for keeping parts fixed. The bag is filled with glass beads to achieve a jamming transition. We propose a method to configure parts-fixing on the soft jig based on contact relations, reachable directions, and the center of gravity of the parts that are fixed on the jig. The usability of the soft jig was evaluated in terms of the fixing performance and versatility for various shapes and postures of parts.
abstract_zh: 为了设计一个可以处理各种形状物体的通用装配机器人系统，我们提出了一种适合装配零件形状的软夹具。软夹具的功能基于软机器人领域开发的干扰夹具。软夹具有一个覆盖有延展性硅胶膜的袋子，该膜具有高摩擦力、伸长率和收缩率，可保持零件固定。袋子里装满了玻璃珠，以实现干扰过渡。我们提出了一种基于接触关系、可达方向和固定在夹具上的零件的重心来配置软夹具上的零件固定的方法。软夹具的可用性根据零件的各种形状和姿势的固定性能和通用性进行评估。

AI.tldr: 设计一种通用装配机器人系统，通过软夹具适应不同形状零件的装配需求。
AI.motivation: 传统装配机器人难以处理复杂形状或不规则姿态的零件，需开发更通用的夹持方案。
AI.method: 基于软体机器人阻塞夹持技术，使用硅胶膜包裹的可变形袋子填充玻璃珠，通过接触关系、可达方向和重心计算实现零件固定。
AI.result: 验证了软夹具对多种形状和姿态零件的固定性能及通用性，表现出良好适应性。
AI.conclusion: 软夹具为通用装配机器人提供了有效解决方案，可拓展应用于复杂工况的自动化装配。

title: MonoComb: A Sparse-to-Dense Combination Approach for Monocular Scene Flow
title_zh: MonoComb：单目场景流的稀疏到密集组合方法
abstract: Contrary to the ongoing trend in automotive applications towards usage of more diverse and more sensors, this work tries to solve the complex scene flow problem under a monocular camera setup, i.e. using a single sensor. Towards this end, we exploit the latest achievements in single image depth estimation, optical flow, and sparse-to-dense interpolation and propose a monocular combination approach (MonoComb) to compute dense scene flow. MonoComb uses optical flow to relate reconstructed 3D positions over time and interpolates occluded areas. This way, existing monocular methods are outperformed in dynamic foreground regions which leads to the second best result among the competitors on the challenging KITTI 2015 scene flow benchmark.
summary: Contrary to the ongoing trend in automotive applications towards usage of more diverse and more sensors, this work tries to solve the complex scene flow problem under a monocular camera setup, i.e. using a single sensor. Towards this end, we exploit the latest achievements in single image depth estimation, optical flow, and sparse-to-dense interpolation and propose a monocular combination approach (MonoComb) to compute dense scene flow. MonoComb uses optical flow to relate reconstructed 3D positions over time and interpolates occluded areas. This way, existing monocular methods are outperformed in dynamic foreground regions which leads to the second best result among the competitors on the challenging KITTI 2015 scene flow benchmark.
abstract_zh: 与汽车应用中使用更多样化和更多传感器的持续趋势相反，这项工作试图解决单目相机设置（即使用单个传感器）下的复杂场景流问题。为此，我们利用单图像深度估计、光流和稀疏到密集插值方面的最新成果，提出了一种单目组合方法（MonoComb）来计算密集场景流。 MonoComb 使用光流将重建的 3D 位置随时间关联起来，并对遮挡区域进行插值。这样，现有的单目方法在动态前景区域中表现优于现有的单目方法，从而在具有挑战性的 KITTI 2015 场景流基准测试中在竞争对手中获得第二好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种单目场景流计算方法MonoComb，通过结合深度估计、光流和稀疏到密集插值技术，在单目摄像头设置下实现高精度的密集场景流估计。
AI.motivation: 尽管汽车行业倾向于使用多传感器系统，但本文旨在探索单目摄像头在复杂场景流估计中的潜力，解决现有单目方法在动态区域精度不足的问题。
AI.method: MonoComb方法利用单图像深度估计获取三维信息，通过光流关联时序三维位置，并采用稀疏到密集插值技术填补遮挡区域，最终生成密集场景流。
AI.result: 在KITTI 2015场景流基准测试中，MonoComb在动态前景区域表现优异，仅次于最佳方法，优于现有单目技术。
AI.conclusion: MonoComb验证了单目设置下结合深度估计与插值技术的可行性，为低成本动态场景理解提供了有效方案。
