authors_text: Ran Long,Christian Rauch,Tianwei Zhang,Vladimir Ivan,Sethu Vijayakumar
title: RigidFusion: Robot Localisation and Mapping in Environments with Large Dynamic Rigid Objects
title_zh: RigidFusion：大型动态刚性物体环境中的机器人定位和建图
comment: 8 pages, 11 figures. IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (2021)
comments: 8 pages, 11 figures. IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (2021)
abstract: This work presents a novel RGB-D SLAM approach to simultaneously segment, track and reconstruct the static background and large dynamic rigid objects that can occlude major portions of the camera view. Previous approaches treat dynamic parts of a scene as outliers and are thus limited to a small amount of changes in the scene, or rely on prior information for all objects in the scene to enable robust camera tracking. Here, we propose to treat all dynamic parts as one rigid body and simultaneously segment and track both static and dynamic components. We, therefore, enable simultaneous localisation and reconstruction of both the static background and rigid dynamic components in environments where dynamic objects cause large occlusion. We evaluate our approach on multiple challenging scenes with large dynamic occlusion. The evaluation demonstrates that our approach achieves better motion segmentation, localisation and mapping without requiring prior knowledge of the dynamic object's shape and appearance.
summary: This work presents a novel RGB-D SLAM approach to simultaneously segment, track and reconstruct the static background and large dynamic rigid objects that can occlude major portions of the camera view. Previous approaches treat dynamic parts of a scene as outliers and are thus limited to a small amount of changes in the scene, or rely on prior information for all objects in the scene to enable robust camera tracking. Here, we propose to treat all dynamic parts as one rigid body and simultaneously segment and track both static and dynamic components. We, therefore, enable simultaneous localisation and reconstruction of both the static background and rigid dynamic components in environments where dynamic objects cause large occlusion. We evaluate our approach on multiple challenging scenes with large dynamic occlusion. The evaluation demonstrates that our approach achieves better motion segmentation, localisation and mapping without requiring prior knowledge of the dynamic object's shape and appearance.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种新颖的 RGB-D SLAM 方法，可以同时分割、跟踪和重建静态背景和可能遮挡相机视图主要部分的大型动态刚性物体。以前的方法将场景的动态部分视为异常值，因此仅限于场景中的少量变化，或者依赖场景中所有对象的先验信息来实现稳健的相机跟踪。在这里，我们建议将所有动态部件视为一个刚体，并同时分割和跟踪静态和动态部件。因此，我们能够在动态物体造成较大遮挡的环境中同时定位和重建静态背景和刚性动态组件。我们在具有大动态遮挡的多个具有挑战性的场景上评估我们的方法。评估表明，我们的方法可以实现更好的运动分割、定位和映射，而无需事先了解动态对象的形状和外观。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型RGB-D SLAM方法，在存在大型动态刚体物体的环境中，实现对静态背景和动态物体的同时分割、跟踪与重建。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将动态物体视为异常值或依赖先验信息，难以处理大范围动态遮挡场景，限制了机器人定位与建图的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将动态部分视为统一刚体，通过同时分割跟踪静态与动态组件，实现无需先验知识的大遮挡环境定位与重建。

AI.conclusion: RigidFusion方法有效解决了动态刚体遮挡下的SLAM问题，为复杂环境下的机器人自主导航提供了新思路。

search_text: RigidFusion: Robot Localisation and Mapping in Environments with Large Dynamic Rigid Objects RigidFusion：大型动态刚性物体环境中的机器人定位和建图 This work presents a novel RGB-D SLAM approach to simultaneously segment, track and reconstruct the static background and large dynamic rigid objects that can occlude major portions of the camera view. Previous approaches treat dynamic parts of a scene as outliers and are thus limited to a small amount of changes in the scene, or rely on prior information for all objects in the scene to enable robust camera tracking. Here, we propose to treat all dynamic parts as one rigid body and simultaneously segment and track both static and dynamic components. We, therefore, enable simultaneous localisation and reconstruction of both the static background and rigid dynamic components in environments where dynamic objects cause large occlusion. We evaluate our approach on multiple challenging scenes with large dynamic occlusion. The evaluation demonstrates that our approach achieves better motion segmentation, localisation and mapping without requiring prior knowledge of the dynamic object's shape and appearance. 这项工作提出了一种新颖的 RGB-D SLAM 方法，可以同时分割、跟踪和重建静态背景和可能遮挡相机视图主要部分的大型动态刚性物体。以前的方法将场景的动态部分视为异常值，因此仅限于场景中的少量变化，或者依赖场景中所有对象的先验信息来实现稳健的相机跟踪。在这里，我们建议将所有动态部件视为一个刚体，并同时分割和跟踪静态和动态部件。因此，我们能够在动态物体造成较大遮挡的环境中同时定位和重建静态背景和刚性动态组件。我们在具有大动态遮挡的多个具有挑战性的场景上评估我们的方法。评估表明，我们的方法可以实现更好的运动分割、定位和映射，而无需事先了解动态对象的形状和外观。 本文提出一种新型RGB-D SLAM方法，在存在大型动态刚体物体的环境中，实现对静态背景和动态物体的同时分割、跟踪与重建。 Ran Long,Christian Rauch,Tianwei Zhang,Vladimir Ivan,Sethu Vijayakumar cs.RO

title: ReSCo-CC: Unsupervised Identification of Key Disinformation Sentences
title_zh: ReSCo-CC：关键虚假信息句子的无监督识别
comment: The 22nd International Conference on Information Integration and Web-based Applications & Services (iiWAS '20), Chiang Mai, Thailand
comments: The 22nd International Conference on Information Integration and Web-based Applications & Services (iiWAS '20), Chiang Mai, Thailand
abstract: Disinformation is often presented in long textual articles, especially when it relates to domains such as health, often seen in relation to COVID-19. These articles are typically observed to have a number of trustworthy sentences among which core disinformation sentences are scattered. In this paper, we propose a novel unsupervised task of identifying sentences containing key disinformation within a document that is known to be untrustworthy. We design a three-phase statistical NLP solution for the task which starts with embedding sentences within a bespoke feature space designed for the task. Sentences represented using those features are then clustered, following which the key sentences are identified through proximity scoring. We also curate a new dataset with sentence level disinformation scorings to aid evaluation for this task; the dataset is being made publicly available to facilitate further research. Based on a comprehensive empirical evaluation against techniques from related tasks such as claim detection and summarization, as well as against simplified variants of our proposed approach, we illustrate that our method is able to identify core disinformation effectively.
summary: Disinformation is often presented in long textual articles, especially when it relates to domains such as health, often seen in relation to COVID-19. These articles are typically observed to have a number of trustworthy sentences among which core disinformation sentences are scattered. In this paper, we propose a novel unsupervised task of identifying sentences containing key disinformation within a document that is known to be untrustworthy. We design a three-phase statistical NLP solution for the task which starts with embedding sentences within a bespoke feature space designed for the task. Sentences represented using those features are then clustered, following which the key sentences are identified through proximity scoring. We also curate a new dataset with sentence level disinformation scorings to aid evaluation for this task; the dataset is being made publicly available to facilitate further research. Based on a comprehensive empirical evaluation against techniques from related tasks such as claim detection and summarization, as well as against simplified variants of our proposed approach, we illustrate that our method is able to identify core disinformation effectively.
abstract_zh: 虚假信息经常出现在长篇文字文章中，尤其是与健康等领域相关时，常见于与 COVID-19 相关的领域。通常观察到这些文章有许多值得信赖的句子，其中分散着核心的虚假信息句子。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督任务，用于识别已知不可信的文档中包含关键虚假信息的句子。我们为该任务设计了一个三阶段统计 NLP 解决方案，首先将句子嵌入到为该任务设计的定制特征空间中。然后对使用这些特征表示的句子进行聚类，然后通过邻近度评分来识别关键句子。我们还策划了一个新的数据集，其中包含句子级别的虚假信息评分，以帮助评估此任务；该数据集正在公开提供，以促进进一步的研究。基于对索赔检测和摘要等相关任务的技术以及我们提出的方法的简化变体的全面实证评估，我们证明我们的方法能够有效地识别核心虚假信息。

AI.tldr: 提出无监督方法识别文档中的关键虚假信息句子
AI.motivation: 解决长文本中混合可信与虚假信息的问题，需有效识别关键虚假信息以应对如新冠疫情等健康领域的信息挑战
AI.method: 三阶段统计NLP方法：定制特征空间嵌入、聚类及接近度评分识别关键句子，并构建句子级虚假信息评分数据集
AI.result: 实证评估显示方法在识别核心虚假信息上优于现有技术及简化版本
AI.conclusion: 提出有效无监督方法及公开数据集，推动虚假信息检测研究

authors_text: Victor J. Exposito Jimenez,Christian Schwarzl,Szilard Josvai
title: Radar detection rate comparison through a mobile robot platform at the ZalaZONE proving ground
title_zh: ZalaZONE 试验场移动机器人平台的雷达探测率比较
abstract: Since an automotive driving vehicle is controlled by Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems (ADAS) / Automated Driving (AD) functions, the selected sensors for the perception process become a key component of the system. Therefore, the necessity of ensuring precise data is crucial. But the correctness of the data is not the only part that has to be ensured, the limitations of the different technologies to accurately sense the reality must be checked for an error-free decision making according to the current scenario. In this context, this publication presents a comparison between two different automotive radars through our self-developed robot mobile platform called SPIDER, and how they can detect different kinds of objects in the tests carried out at the ZalaZONE proving ground.
summary: Since an automotive driving vehicle is controlled by Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems (ADAS) / Automated Driving (AD) functions, the selected sensors for the perception process become a key component of the system. Therefore, the necessity of ensuring precise data is crucial. But the correctness of the data is not the only part that has to be ensured, the limitations of the different technologies to accurately sense the reality must be checked for an error-free decision making according to the current scenario. In this context, this publication presents a comparison between two different automotive radars through our self-developed robot mobile platform called SPIDER, and how they can detect different kinds of objects in the tests carried out at the ZalaZONE proving ground.
abstract_zh: 由于自动驾驶车辆由高级驾驶辅助系统 (ADAS)/自动驾驶 (AD) 功能控制，因此用于感知过程的所选传感器成为系统的关键组件。因此，确保数据精确的必要性至关重要。但数据的正确性并不是唯一需要确保的部分，还必须检查不同技术准确感知现实的局限性，以便根据当前场景做出无错误的决策。在此背景下，本出版物通过我们自主开发的名为 SPIDER 的机器人移动平台对两种不同的汽车雷达进行了比较，以及它们如何在 ZalaZONE 试验场进行的测试中检测不同类型的物体。

AI.tldr: 本文通过自研的移动机器人平台SPIDER，在ZalaZONE试验场比较两种汽车雷达的探测率，评估其在不同场景下的感知性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统依赖传感器数据进行决策，需确保数据准确性并验证不同技术的感知局限性以避免错误决策。
AI.method: 使用自主开发的移动机器人平台SPIDER，在ZalaZONE试验场对两种汽车雷达进行多场景测试，分析其对不同物体的探测能力。
AI.result: 测试结果揭示了两种雷达在探测率上的差异，明确了各自在特定环境下的优势与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 通过对比实验，为自动驾驶系统中雷达传感器的选择与优化提供了数据支持和应用场景参考。

title: Improving Generalization in Reinforcement Learning with Mixture Regularization
title_zh: 通过混合正则化提高强化学习的泛化能力
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) agents trained in a limited set of environments tend to suffer overfitting and fail to generalize to unseen testing environments. To improve their generalizability, data augmentation approaches (e.g. cutout and random convolution) are previously explored to increase the data diversity. However, we find these approaches only locally perturb the observations regardless of the training environments, showing limited effectiveness on enhancing the data diversity and the generalization performance. In this work, we introduce a simple approach, named mixreg, which trains agents on a mixture of observations from different training environments and imposes linearity constraints on the observation interpolations and the supervision (e.g. associated reward) interpolations. Mixreg increases the data diversity more effectively and helps learn smoother policies. We verify its effectiveness on improving generalization by conducting extensive experiments on the large-scale Procgen benchmark. Results show mixreg outperforms the well-established baselines on unseen testing environments by a large margin. Mixreg is simple, effective and general. It can be applied to both policy-based and value-based RL algorithms. Code is available at https://github.com/kaixin96/mixreg .
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) agents trained in a limited set of environments tend to suffer overfitting and fail to generalize to unseen testing environments. To improve their generalizability, data augmentation approaches (e.g. cutout and random convolution) are previously explored to increase the data diversity. However, we find these approaches only locally perturb the observations regardless of the training environments, showing limited effectiveness on enhancing the data diversity and the generalization performance. In this work, we introduce a simple approach, named mixreg, which trains agents on a mixture of observations from different training environments and imposes linearity constraints on the observation interpolations and the supervision (e.g. associated reward) interpolations. Mixreg increases the data diversity more effectively and helps learn smoother policies. We verify its effectiveness on improving generalization by conducting extensive experiments on the large-scale Procgen benchmark. Results show mixreg outperforms the well-established baselines on unseen testing environments by a large margin. Mixreg is simple, effective and general. It can be applied to both policy-based and value-based RL algorithms. Code is available at https://github.com/kaixin96/mixreg .
abstract_zh: 在有限的环境中训练的深度强化学习（RL）代理往往会出现过度拟合，并且无法泛化到看不见的测试环境。为了提高其普遍性，之前探索了数据增强方法（例如剪切和随机卷积）来增加数据多样性。然而，我们发现无论训练环境如何，这些方法都只会局部扰乱观察结果，在增强数据多样性和泛化性能方面的效果有限。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种名为 mixreg 的简单方法，该方法根据来自不同训练环境的混合观察来训练代理，并对观察插值和监督（例如相关奖励）插值施加线性约束。 Mixreg更有效地增加数据多样性，有助于学习更流畅的策略。我们通过在大规模 Procgen 基准上进行大量实验来验证其在提高泛化方面的有效性。结果显示 mixreg 在未见过的测试环境中大大优于既定的基线。 Mixreg 简单、有效且通用。它可以应用于基于策略和基于值的强化学习算法。代码可在 https://github.com/kaixin96/mixreg 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为mixreg的混合正则化方法，通过混合不同训练环境的观察数据并施加线性约束，提升强化学习代理的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法仅局部扰动观察数据，难以有效提升数据多样性及强化学习模型在未见过环境中的泛化性能。
AI.method: mixreg通过混合不同训练环境的观察数据，并对观察插值和奖励插值施加线性约束，从而学习更平滑且泛化性更强的策略。
AI.result: 在Procgen基准测试中，mixreg显著优于现有基线方法，在未见过的测试环境中表现提升明显。
AI.conclusion: mixreg方法简单、有效且通用，适用于基于策略和基于价值的强化学习算法，能有效提升模型泛化能力。

search_text: Improving Generalization in Reinforcement Learning with Mixture Regularization 通过混合正则化提高强化学习的泛化能力 Deep reinforcement learning (RL) agents trained in a limited set of environments tend to suffer overfitting and fail to generalize to unseen testing environments. To improve their generalizability, data augmentation approaches (e.g. cutout and random convolution) are previously explored to increase the data diversity. However, we find these approaches only locally perturb the observations regardless of the training environments, showing limited effectiveness on enhancing the data diversity and the generalization performance. In this work, we introduce a simple approach, named mixreg, which trains agents on a mixture of observations from different training environments and imposes linearity constraints on the observation interpolations and the supervision (e.g. associated reward) interpolations. Mixreg increases the data diversity more effectively and helps learn smoother policies. We verify its effectiveness on improving generalization by conducting extensive experiments on the large-scale Procgen benchmark. Results show mixreg outperforms the well-established baselines on unseen testing environments by a large margin. Mixreg is simple, effective and general. It can be applied to both policy-based and value-based RL algorithms. title: Leveraging Touch Sensors to Improve Mobile Manipulation
title_zh: 利用触摸传感器改善移动操作
abstract: Despite many advances in service robotics, successful and secure object manipulation on mobile platforms is still a challenge. In order to come closer to human grasping performance, it is natural to provide robots with the same capability that humans have: the sense of touch. This abstract presents novel, tactile-equipped end-effectors for the service robot TIAGo that are currently being developed. Their primary goal is to improve reliability and success of mobile manipulation, but they also enable further research in related fields such as learning by human demonstration, object exploration and force control algorithms.
summary: Despite many advances in service robotics, successful and secure object manipulation on mobile platforms is still a challenge. In order to come closer to human grasping performance, it is natural to provide robots with the same capability that humans have: the sense of touch. This abstract presents novel, tactile-equipped end-effectors for the service robot TIAGo that are currently being developed. Their primary goal is to improve reliability and success of mobile manipulation, but they also enable further research in related fields such as learning by human demonstration, object exploration and force control algorithms.
abstract_zh: 尽管服务机器人技术取得了许多进步，但移动平台上成功且安全的对象操作仍然是一个挑战。为了更接近人类的抓取性能，自然要为机器人提供与人类相同的能力：触觉。本摘要介绍了目前正在开发的服务机器人 TIAGo 的新颖的、配备触觉的末端执行器。他们的主要目标是提高移动操纵的可靠性和成功率，但它们也使得相关领域的进一步研究成为可能，例如人类演示学习、物体探索和力控制算法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发配备触觉传感器的新型末端执行器，以提升移动机器人（TIAGo）在物体操作中的可靠性和成功率。
AI.motivation: 尽管服务机器人技术进步显著，但移动平台在安全可靠地操作物体方面仍面临挑战。人类依赖触觉实现精准抓取，因此为机器人赋予触觉能力是提升性能的关键。
AI.method: 设计并开发集成触觉传感器的末端执行器，结合力控制算法，用于改进移动机械臂的操作性能，并支持人类示范学习、物体探索等研究方向。
AI.result: 触觉传感器增强了移动操作的可靠性与成功率，同时为力控制、物体探索及学习示范等领域的进一步研究提供了技术基础。
AI.conclusion: 触觉传感器对提升移动机器人操作能力至关重要，未来需结合更多智能算法（如力控制与学习示范）推动该领域发展。

authors_text: Steffen Borgwardt,Cornelius Brand,Andreas Emil Feldmann,Martin Koutecký
title: A Note on the Approximability of Deepest-Descent Circuit Steps
title_zh: 关于最深下降电路步骤的近似性的注记
abstract: Linear programs (LPs) can be solved by polynomially many moves along the circuit direction improving the objective the most, so-called deepest-descent steps (dd-steps). Computing these steps is NP-hard (De Loera et al., arXiv, 2019), a consequence of the hardness of deciding the existence of an optimal circuit-neighbor (OCNP) on LPs with non-unique optima. We prove OCNP is easy under the promise of unique optima, but already $O(n^{1-\varepsilon})$-approximating dd-steps remains hard even for totally unimodular $n$-dimensional 0/1-LPs with a unique optimum. We provide a matching $n$-approximation.
summary: Linear programs (LPs) can be solved by polynomially many moves along the circuit direction improving the objective the most, so-called deepest-descent steps (dd-steps). Computing these steps is NP-hard (De Loera et al., arXiv, 2019), a consequence of the hardness of deciding the existence of an optimal circuit-neighbor (OCNP) on LPs with non-unique optima. We prove OCNP is easy under the promise of unique optima, but already $O(n^{1-\varepsilon})$-approximating dd-steps remains hard even for totally unimodular $n$-dimensional 0/1-LPs with a unique optimum. We provide a matching $n$-approximation.
abstract_zh: 线性规划 (LP) 可以通过沿着电路方向进行多项式多次移动来求解，最大限度地提高目标，即所谓的最深下降步骤 (dd-step)。计算这些步骤是 NP 困难的（De Loera 等人，arXiv，2019），这是决定具有非唯一最优的 LP 上是否存在最优电路邻居 (OCNP) 的困难的结果。我们证明 OCNP 在唯一最优值的承诺下是容易的，但即使对于具有唯一最优值的完全单模 $n$ 维 0/1-LP，$O(n^{1-\varepsilon})$ 近似 dd 步仍然很困难。我们提供匹配的 $n$ 近似值。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线性规划中使用最深下降电路步（dd-step）的近似性问题，证明了在特定条件下近似计算dd-step的难度，并提出了一个n-近似算法。
AI.motivation: 尽管最深下降电路步（dd-step）在理论上能有效求解线性规划（LP），但其计算复杂度为NP难。本文旨在探讨在唯一最优解的条件下，近似计算dd-step的可行性与难度。
AI.method: 通过分析OCNP（最优电路邻域存在性）问题的复杂性，证明在唯一最优解的承诺下OCNP易于解决，但近似计算dd-step仍保持困难。随后，针对完全单模的0/1-LP问题设计了一个n-近似算法。
AI.result: 证明了即使在完全单模的n维0/1-LP问题中，近似计算dd-step的复杂度仍为O(n^{1-ε})，并提出了一个匹配的n-近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明，即使在唯一最优解的条件下，近似计算dd-step仍具有固有难度，而提出的n-近似算法为该问题提供了理论上的最优保证。

result: 证明了即使在完全单模的n维0/1-LP问题中，近似计算dd-step的复杂度仍为O(n^{1-ε})，并提出了一个匹配的n-近似算法。
conclusion: 本文表明，即使在唯一最优解的条件下，近似计算dd-step仍具有固有难度，而提出的n-近似算法为该问题提供了理论上的最优保证。
search_text: A Note on the Approximability of Deepest-Descent Circuit Steps 关于最深下降电路步骤的近似性的注记 Linear programs (LPs) can be solved by polynomially many moves along the circuit direction improving the objective the most, so-called deepest-descent steps (dd-steps). Computing these steps is NP-hard (De Loera et al., arXiv, 2019), a consequence of the hardness of deciding the existence of an optimal circuit-neighbor (OCNP) on LPs with non-unique optima. We prove OCNP is easy under the promise of unique optima, but already $O(n^{1-\varepsilon})$-approximating dd-steps remains hard even for totally unimodular $n$-dimensional 0/1-LPs with a unique optimum. We provide a matching $n$-approximation. 线性规划 (LP) 可以通过沿着电路方向进行多项式多次移动来求解，最大限度地提高目标，即所谓的最深下降步骤 (dd-step)。计算这些步骤是 NP 困难的（De Loera 等人，arXiv，2019），这是决定具有非唯一最优的 LP 上是否存在最优电路邻居 (OCNP) 的困难的结果。我们证明 OCNP 在唯一最优值的承诺下是容易的，但即使对于具有唯一最优值的完全单模 $n$ 维 0/1-LP，$O(n^{1-\varepsilon})$ 近似 dd 步仍然很困难。我们提供匹配的 $n$ 近似值。 本文研究了在线性规划中使用最深下降电路步（dd-step）的近似性问题，证明了在特定条件下近似计算dd-step的难度，并提出了一个n-近似算法。 Steffen Borgwardt,Cornelius Brand,Andreas Emil Feldmann,Martin Koutecký math.OC,cs.DS

authors_text: Zhongzheng Ren,Zhiding Yu,Xiaodong Yang,Ming-Yu Liu,Alexander G. Schwing,Jan Kautz
title: UFO$^2$: A Unified Framework towards Omni-supervised Object Detection
title_zh: UFO$^2$：全监督目标检测的统一框架
abstract: Existing work on object detection often relies on a single form of annotation: the model is trained using either accurate yet costly bounding boxes or cheaper but less expressive image-level tags. However, real-world annotations are often diverse in form, which challenges these existing works. In this paper, we present UFO$^2$, a unified object detection framework that can handle different forms of supervision simultaneously. Specifically, UFO$^2$ incorporates strong supervision (e.g., boxes), various forms of partial supervision (e.g., class tags, points, and scribbles), and unlabeled data. Through rigorous evaluations, we demonstrate that each form of label can be utilized to either train a model from scratch or to further improve a pre-trained model. We also use UFO$^2$ to investigate budget-aware omni-supervised learning, i.e., various annotation policies are studied under a fixed annotation budget: we show that competitive performance needs no strong labels for all data. Finally, we demonstrate the generalization of UFO$^2$, detecting more than 1,000 different objects without bounding box annotations.
summary: Existing work on object detection often relies on a single form of annotation: the model is trained using either accurate yet costly bounding boxes or cheaper but less expressive image-level tags. However, real-world annotations are often diverse in form, which challenges these existing works. In this paper, we present UFO$^2$, a unified object detection framework that can handle different forms of supervision simultaneously. Specifically, UFO$^2$ incorporates strong supervision (e.g., boxes), various forms of partial supervision (e.g., class tags, points, and scribbles), and unlabeled data. Through rigorous evaluations, we demonstrate that each form of label can be utilized to either train a model from scratch or to further improve a pre-trained model. We also use UFO$^2$ to investigate budget-aware omni-supervised learning, i.e., various annotation policies are studied under a fixed annotation budget: we show that competitive performance needs no strong labels for all data. Finally, we demonstrate the generalization of UFO$^2$, detecting more than 1,000 different objects without bounding box annotations.
abstract_zh: 现有的对象检测工作通常依赖于单一形式的注释：使用准确但昂贵的边界框或更便宜但表达能力较差的图像级标签来训练模型。然而，现实世界的注释往往形式多样，这对这些现有的工作提出了挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 UFO$^2$，这是一个统一的目标检测框架，可以同时处理不同形式的监督。具体来说，UFO$^2$ 结合了强监督（例如，盒子）、各种形式的部分监督（例如，类标签、点和涂鸦）和未标记数据。通过严格的评估，我们证明每种形式的标签都可以用于从头开始训练模型或进一步改进预训练模型。我们还使用 UFO$^2$ 来研究预算感知的全监督学习，即在固定注释预算下研究各种注释策略：我们表明，有竞争力的表现不需要对所有数据进行强标签。最后，我们演示了 UFO$^2$ 的泛化，在没有边界框注释的情况下检测 1,000 多个不同的对象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UFO²框架，实现多形式监督下的统一目标检测，支持从强监督（如边界框）到弱监督（如类别标签、点、涂鸦）及无标签数据的联合利用。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测方法依赖单一标注形式（如精确边界框或低成本图像标签），难以应对现实场景中多样化的标注形式，限制了模型性能与应用灵活性。
AI.method: 设计UFO²框架，通过统一架构整合强监督、部分监督和无标签数据，支持从头训练或微调预训练模型，并研究预算约束下的多标注策略优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，UFO²在无需强标注情况下仍能实现竞争力性能，且可检测超1000种物体（无需边界框标注），验证了其泛化能力与标注效率优势。
AI.conclusion: UFO²通过统一处理多源监督，为现实场景中的目标检测提供了灵活高效的解决方案，推动了少样本与零样本检测的研究进展。

title: Trends at NIME -- Reflections on Editing "A NIME Reader"
title_zh: NIME 的趋势——对《A NIME Reader》编辑的思考
comment: 5 pages, 1 table. Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2016
comments: 5 pages, 1 table. Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2016
abstract: This paper provides an overview of the process of editing the forthcoming anthology "A NIME Reader - Fifteen Years of New Interfaces for Musical Expression." The selection process is presented, and we reflect on some of the trends we have observed in re-discovering the collection of more than 1200 NIME papers published throughout the 15-year long history of the conference. An anthology is necessarily selective, and ours is no exception. As we present in this paper, the aim has been to represent the wide range of artistic, scientific, and technological approaches that characterize the NIME conference. The anthology also includes critical discourse, and through acknowledgment of the strengths and weaknesses of the NIME community, we propose activities that could further diversify and strengthen the field.
summary: This paper provides an overview of the process of editing the forthcoming anthology "A NIME Reader - Fifteen Years of New Interfaces for Musical Expression." The selection process is presented, and we reflect on some of the trends we have observed in re-discovering the collection of more than 1200 NIME papers published throughout the 15-year long history of the conference. An anthology is necessarily selective, and ours is no exception. As we present in this paper, the aim has been to represent the wide range of artistic, scientific, and technological approaches that characterize the NIME conference. The anthology also includes critical discourse, and through acknowledgment of the strengths and weaknesses of the NIME community, we propose activities that could further diversify and strengthen the field.
abstract_zh: 本文概述了即将出版的选集《A NIME Reader - 十五年的音乐表达新界面》的编辑过程。介绍了评选过程，并反思了我们在重新发现该会议 15 年悠久历史中发表的 1200 多篇 NIME 论文集时观察到的一些趋势。选集必然是有选择性的，我们的选集也不例外。正如我们在本文中所介绍的，目的是代表 NIME 会议所特有的广泛的艺术、科学和技术方法。该选集还包括批判性论述，通过承认 NIME 社区的优势和劣势，我们提出了可以进一步多样化和加强该领域的活动。

AI.tldr: 概述编辑《NIME读者》合集的过程，并分析NIME会议15年来的发展趋势与多样性
AI.motivation: 通过遴选论文，呈现NIME社区在艺术、科学与技术领域的多样性，并反思其优缺点以促进领域发展
AI.method: 通过文献回顾与论文选编，分析15年间NIME会议论文，总结趋势并评估社区现状
AI.result: 呈现了NIME领域多样的研究方向，同时指出现有不足并提出多样化与发展的建议
AI.conclusion: 《NIME读者》合集为研究者提供了重要资源，同时建议通过批判性反思和多元化活动推动NIME领域进一步发展

title: Removing Bias in Multi-modal Classifiers: Regularization by Maximizing Functional Entropies
title_zh: 消除多模态分类器中的偏差：通过最大化函数熵进行正则化
abstract: Many recent datasets contain a variety of different data modalities, for instance, image, question, and answer data in visual question answering (VQA). When training deep net classifiers on those multi-modal datasets, the modalities get exploited at different scales, i.e., some modalities can more easily contribute to the classification results than others. This is suboptimal because the classifier is inherently biased towards a subset of the modalities. To alleviate this shortcoming, we propose a novel regularization term based on the functional entropy. Intuitively, this term encourages to balance the contribution of each modality to the classification result. However, regularization with the functional entropy is challenging. To address this, we develop a method based on the log-Sobolev inequality, which bounds the functional entropy with the functional-Fisher-information. Intuitively, this maximizes the amount of information that the modalities contribute. On the two challenging multi-modal datasets VQA-CPv2 and SocialIQ, we obtain state-of-the-art results while more uniformly exploiting the modalities. In addition, we demonstrate the efficacy of our method on Colored MNIST.
summary: Many recent datasets contain a variety of different data modalities, for instance, image, question, and answer data in visual question answering (VQA). When training deep net classifiers on those multi-modal datasets, the modalities get exploited at different scales, i.e., some modalities can more easily contribute to the classification results than others. This is suboptimal because the classifier is inherently biased towards a subset of the modalities. To alleviate this shortcoming, we propose a novel regularization term based on the functional entropy. Intuitively, this term encourages to balance the contribution of each modality to the classification result. However, regularization with the functional entropy is challenging. To address this, we develop a method based on the log-Sobolev inequality, which bounds the functional entropy with the functional-Fisher-information. Intuitively, this maximizes the amount of information that the modalities contribute. On the two challenging multi-modal datasets VQA-CPv2 and SocialIQ, we obtain state-of-the-art results while more uniformly exploiting the modalities. In addition, we demonstrate the efficacy of our method on Colored MNIST.
abstract_zh: 最近的许多数据集包含各种不同的数据模式，例如视觉问答（VQA）中的图像、问题和答案数据。在这些多模态数据集上训练深度网络分类器时，模态会在不同的尺度上得到利用，即某些模态比其他模态更容易对分类结果做出贡献。这是次优的，因为分类器本质上偏向于模态的子集。为了缓解这个缺点，我们提出了一种基于函数熵的新正则化项。直观上，该术语鼓励平衡每种模态对分类结果的贡献。然而，函数熵的正则化具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种基于对数索博列夫不等式的方法，它将函数熵与函数费舍尔信息结合起来。直观上，这最大化了模式贡献的信息量。在两个具有挑战性的多模态数据集 VQA-CPv2 和 SocialIQ 上，我们获得了最先进的结果，同时更均匀地利用模态。此外，我们还证明了我们的方法对彩色 MNIST 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过最大化函数熵的正则化方法，以减少多模态分类器中的模态偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态数据集中不同模态对分类结果的贡献不平衡，导致分类器偏向某些模态，影响模型性能与公平性。
AI.method: 设计基于函数熵的正则化项，并通过log-Sobolev不等式将其转化为函数费舍尔信息进行优化，以平衡各模态贡献。
AI.result: 在VQA-CPv2、SocialIQ和Colored MNIST数据集上取得最先进结果，且模态利用更均衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解多模态分类器的模态偏差问题，在提升性能的同时实现模态贡献的平衡。

search_text: Removing Bias in Multi-modal Classifiers: Regularization by Maximizing Functional Entropies 消除多模态分类器中的偏差：通过最大化函数熵进行正则化 Many recent datasets contain a variety of different data modalities, for instance, image, question, and answer data in visual question answering (VQA). When training deep net classifiers on those multi-modal datasets, the modalities get exploited at different scales, i.e., some modalities can more easily contribute to the classification results than others. This is suboptimal because the classifier is inherently biased towards a subset of the modalities. To alleviate this shortcoming, we propose a novel regularization term based on the functional entropy. Intuitively, this term encourages to balance the contribution of each modality to the classification result. However, regularization with the functional entropy is challenging. To address this, we develop a method based on the log-Sobolev inequality, which bounds the functional entropy with the functional-Fisher-information. Intuitively, this maximizes the amount of information that the modalities contribute. On the two challenging multi-modal datasets VQA-CPv2 and SocialIQ, we obtain state-of-the-art results while more uniformly exploiting the modalities. In addition, we demonstrate the efficacy of our method on Colored MNIST. 最近的许多数据集包含各种不同的数据模式，例如视觉问答（VQA）中的图像、问题和答案数据。在这些多模态数据集上训练深度网络分类器时，模态会在不同的尺度上得到利用，即某些模态比其他模态更容易对分类结果做出贡献。这是次优的，因为分类器本质上偏向于模态的子集。为了缓解这个缺点，我们提出了一种基于函数熵的新正则化项。直观上，该术语鼓励平衡每种模态对分类结果的贡献。然而，函数熵的正则化具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种基于对数索博列夫不等式的方法，它将函数熵与函数费舍尔信息结合起来。直观上，这最大化了模式贡献的信息量。在两个具有挑战性的多模态数据集 VQA-CPv2 和 SocialIQ 上，我们获得了最先进的结果，同时更均匀地利用模态。此外，我们还证明了我们的方法对彩色 MNIST 的有效性。 本文提出一种通过最大化函数熵的正则化方法，以减少多模态分类器中的模态偏差问题。 Itai Gat,Idan Schwartz,Alexander Schwing,Tamir Hazan cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Recurrent neural network-based volumetric fluorescence microscopy
title_zh: 基于循环神经网络的体积荧光显微镜
abstract: Volumetric imaging of samples using fluorescence microscopy plays an important role in various fields including physical, medical and life sciences. Here we report a deep learning-based volumetric image inference framework that uses 2D images that are sparsely captured by a standard wide-field fluorescence microscope at arbitrary axial positions within the sample volume. Through a recurrent convolutional neural network, which we term as Recurrent-MZ, 2D fluorescence information from a few axial planes within the sample is explicitly incorporated to digitally reconstruct the sample volume over an extended depth-of-field. Using experiments on C. Elegans and nanobead samples, Recurrent-MZ is demonstrated to increase the depth-of-field of a 63x/1.4NA objective lens by approximately 50-fold, also providing a 30-fold reduction in the number of axial scans required to image the same sample volume. We further illustrated the generalization of this recurrent network for 3D imaging by showing its resilience to varying imaging conditions, including e.g., different sequences of input images, covering various axial permutations and unknown axial positioning errors. Recurrent-MZ demonstrates the first application of recurrent neural networks in microscopic image reconstruction and provides a flexible and rapid volumetric imaging framework, overcoming the limitations of current 3D scanning microscopy tools.
summary: Volumetric imaging of samples using fluorescence microscopy plays an important role in various fields including physical, medical and life sciences. Here we report a deep learning-based volumetric image inference framework that uses 2D images that are sparsely captured by a standard wide-field fluorescence microscope at arbitrary axial positions within the sample volume. Through a recurrent convolutional neural network, which we term as Recurrent-MZ, 2D fluorescence information from a few axial planes within the sample is explicitly incorporated to digitally reconstruct the sample volume over an extended depth-of-field. Using experiments on C. Elegans and nanobead samples, Recurrent-MZ is demonstrated to increase the depth-of-field of a 63x/1.4NA objective lens by approximately 50-fold, also providing a 30-fold reduction in the number of axial scans required to image the same sample volume. We further illustrated the generalization of this recurrent network for 3D imaging by showing its resilience to varying imaging conditions, including e.g., different sequences of input images, covering various axial permutations and unknown axial positioning errors. Recurrent-MZ demonstrates the first application of recurrent neural networks in microscopic image reconstruction and provides a flexible and rapid volumetric imaging framework, overcoming the limitations of current 3D scanning microscopy tools.
abstract_zh: 使用荧光显微镜对样品进行体积成像在物理、医学和生命科学等各个领域发挥着重要作用。在这里，我们报告了一种基于深度学习的体积图像推理框架，该框架使用由标准宽视场荧光显微镜在样本体积内的任意轴向位置稀疏捕获的二维图像。通过循环卷积神经网络（我们称之为 Recurrent-MZ），来自样品内几个轴向平面的 2D 荧光信息被明确合并，以在扩展的景深上以数字方式重建样品体积。通过对线虫和纳米珠样品的实验，证明 Recurrent-MZ 可将 63x/1.4NA 物镜的景深增加约 50 倍，同时将相同样品体积成像所需的轴向扫描数量减少 30 倍。我们通过展示其对不同成像条件（包括不同的输入图像序列、涵盖各种轴​​向排列和未知的轴向定位误差）的恢复能力，进一步说明了该循环网络在 3D 成像中的泛化。 Recurrent-MZ 展示了循环神经网络在显微图像重建中的首次应用，并提供了灵活快速的体积成像框架，克服了当前 3D 扫描显微镜工具的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于循环神经网络的体积荧光显微成像方法，通过稀疏轴向平面的2D图像重建扩展景深的3D样本体积。
AI.motivation: 传统荧光显微镜在体积成像中存在景深有限和轴向扫描效率低的问题，需开发更高效的成像框架。
AI.method: 设计了一种名为Recurrent-MZ的循环卷积神经网络，利用少量轴向平面的2D荧光信息进行数字重建，扩展景深并减少扫描次数。
AI.result: 在C. Elegans和纳米珠样本实验中，该方法将63x/1.4NA物镜的景深提升约50倍，同时减少30倍的轴向扫描次数，并表现出对不同成像条件的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Recurrent-MZ首次将循环神经网络应用于显微图像重建，提供了灵活快速的体积成像框架，克服了现有3D扫描显微工具的局限性。

title: Dense Dual-Path Network for Real-time Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于实时语义分割的密集双路径网络
abstract: Semantic segmentation has achieved remarkable results with high computational cost and a large number of parameters. However, real-world applications require efficient inference speed on embedded devices. Most previous works address the challenge by reducing depth, width and layer capacity of network, which leads to poor performance. In this paper, we introduce a novel Dense Dual-Path Network (DDPNet) for real-time semantic segmentation under resource constraints. We design a light-weight and powerful backbone with dense connectivity to facilitate feature reuse throughout the whole network and the proposed Dual-Path module (DPM) to sufficiently aggregate multi-scale contexts. Meanwhile, a simple and effective framework is built with a skip architecture utilizing the high-resolution feature maps to refine the segmentation output and an upsampling module leveraging context information from the feature maps to refine the heatmaps. The proposed DDPNet shows an obvious advantage in balancing accuracy and speed. Specifically, on Cityscapes test dataset, DDPNet achieves 75.3% mIoU with 52.6 FPS for an input of 1024 X 2048 resolution on a single GTX 1080Ti card. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, DDPNet achieves a significant better accuracy with a comparable speed and fewer parameters.
summary: Semantic segmentation has achieved remarkable results with high computational cost and a large number of parameters. However, real-world applications require efficient inference speed on embedded devices. Most previous works address the challenge by reducing depth, width and layer capacity of network, which leads to poor performance. In this paper, we introduce a novel Dense Dual-Path Network (DDPNet) for real-time semantic segmentation under resource constraints. We design a light-weight and powerful backbone with dense connectivity to facilitate feature reuse throughout the whole network and the proposed Dual-Path module (DPM) to sufficiently aggregate multi-scale contexts. Meanwhile, a simple and effective framework is built with a skip architecture utilizing the high-resolution feature maps to refine the segmentation output and an upsampling module leveraging context information from the feature maps to refine the heatmaps. The proposed DDPNet shows an obvious advantage in balancing accuracy and speed. Specifically, on Cityscapes test dataset, DDPNet achieves 75.3% mIoU with 52.6 FPS for an input of 1024 X 2048 resolution on a single GTX 1080Ti card. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, DDPNet achieves a significant better accuracy with a comparable speed and fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 语义分割以较高的计算成本和大量的参数取得了显着的效果。然而，现实世界的应用程序需要嵌入式设备上高效的推理速度。之前的大多数工作都是通过减少网络的深度、宽度和层容量来解决这一挑战，这会导致性能不佳。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的密集双路径网络（DDPNet），用于资源限制下的实时语义分割。我们设计了一个轻量级且功能强大的骨干网，具有密集的连接性，以促进整个网络中的功能重用，并提出了双路径模块（DPM）以充分聚合多尺度上下文。同时，使用跳跃架构构建了一个简单而有效的框架，利用高分辨率特征图来细化分割输出，并使用上采样模块利用特征图中的上下文信息来细化热图。所提出的DDPNet在平衡精度和速度方面显示出明显的优势。具体来说，在 Cityscapes 测试数据集上，DDPNet 在单张 GTX 1080Ti 卡上输入 1024 X 2048 分辨率时，可实现 75.3% mIoU 和 52.6 FPS。与其他最先进的方法相比，DDPNet 以相当的速度和更少的参数实现了显着更高的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dense Dual-Path Network (DDPNet)的新型网络架构，用于在资源受限的嵌入式设备上实现高效实时语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割方法在嵌入式设备上运行时存在计算成本高、参数量大且效率与精度难以平衡的问题，传统减小网络规模的方法会导致性能下降。
AI.method: 设计轻量级密集连接主干网络以促进特征复用，并引入双路径模块（DPM）聚合多尺度上下文；通过跳过结构利用高分辨率特征图优化分割结果，结合上采样模块增强热图细节。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上，DDPNet以1024×2048输入分辨率实现75.3% mIoU和52.6 FPS，相比现有方法在保持速度的同时显著提升精度并减少参数量。
AI.conclusion: DDPNet通过密集连接与双路径设计有效平衡了实时性与分割精度，在资源受限场景下优于现有最先进的方法。

search_text: Dense Dual-Path Network for Real-time Semantic Segmentation 用于实时语义分割的密集双路径网络 Semantic segmentation has achieved remarkable results with high computational cost and a large number of parameters. However, real-world applications require efficient inference speed on embedded devices. Most previous works address the challenge by reducing depth, width and layer capacity of network, which leads to poor performance. In this paper, we introduce a novel Dense Dual-Path Network (DDPNet) for real-time semantic segmentation under resource constraints. We design a light-weight and powerful backbone with dense connectivity to facilitate feature reuse throughout the whole network and the proposed Dual-Path module (DPM) to sufficiently aggregate multi-scale contexts. Meanwhile, a simple and effective framework is built with a skip architecture utilizing the high-resolution feature maps to refine the segmentation output and an upsampling module leveraging context information from the feature maps to refine the heatmaps. The proposed DDPNet shows an obvious advantage in balancing accuracy and speed. Specifically, on Cityscapes test dataset, DDPNet achieves 75.3% mIoU with 52.6 FPS for an input of 1024 X 2048 resolution on a single GTX 1080Ti card. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, DDPNet achieves a significant better accuracy with a comparable speed and fewer parameters. 语义分割以较高的计算成本和大量的参数取得了显着的效果。然而，现实世界的应用程序需要嵌入式设备上高效的推理速度。之前的大多数工作都是通过减少网络的深度、宽度和层容量来解决这一挑战，这会导致性能不佳。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的密集双路径网络（DDPNet），用于资源限制下的实时语义分割。我们设计了一个轻量级且功能强大的骨干网，具有密集的连接性，以促进整个网络中的功能重用，并提出了双路径模块（DPM）以充分聚合多尺度上下文。同时，使用跳跃架构构建了一个简单而有效的框架，利用高分辨率特征图来细化分割输出，并使用上采样模块利用特征图中的上下文信息来细化热图。所提出的DDPNet在平衡精度和速度方面显示出明显的优势。具体来说，在 Cityscapes 测试数据集上，DDPNet 在单张 GTX 1080Ti 卡上输入 1024 X 2048 分辨率时，可实现 75.3% mIoU 和 52.6 FPS。与其他最先进的方法相比，DDPNet 以相当的速度和更少的参数实现了显着更高的精度。 本文提出了一种名为Dense Dual-Path Network (DDPNet)的新型网络架构，用于在资源受限的嵌入式设备上实现高效实时语义分割。 Xinneng Yang,Yan Wu,Junqiao Zhao,Feilin Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Shubhra Kanti Karmaker Santu,Md. Mahadi Hassan,Micah J. Smith,Lei Xu,ChengXiang Zhai,Kalyan Veeramachaneni
title: AutoML to Date and Beyond: Challenges and Opportunities
title_zh: AutoML 迄今为止及未来：挑战与机遇
abstract: As big data becomes ubiquitous across domains, and more and more stakeholders aspire to make the most of their data, demand for machine learning tools has spurred researchers to explore the possibilities of automated machine learning (AutoML). AutoML tools aim to make machine learning accessible for non-machine learning experts (domain experts), to improve the efficiency of machine learning, and to accelerate machine learning research. But although automation and efficiency are among AutoML's main selling points, the process still requires human involvement at a number of vital steps, including understanding the attributes of domain-specific data, defining prediction problems, creating a suitable training data set, and selecting a promising machine learning technique. These steps often require a prolonged back-and-forth that makes this process inefficient for domain experts and data scientists alike, and keeps so-called AutoML systems from being truly automatic. In this review article, we introduce a new classification system for AutoML systems, using a seven-tiered schematic to distinguish these systems based on their level of autonomy. We begin by describing what an end-to-end machine learning pipeline actually looks like, and which subtasks of the machine learning pipeline have been automated so far. We highlight those subtasks which are still done manually - generally by a data scientist - and explain how this limits domain experts' access to machine learning. Next, we introduce our novel level-based taxonomy for AutoML systems and define each level according to the scope of automation support provided. Finally, we lay out a roadmap for the future, pinpointing the research required to further automate the end-to-end machine learning pipeline and discussing important challenges that stand in the way of this ambitious goal.
summary: As big data becomes ubiquitous across domains, and more and more stakeholders aspire to make the most of their data, demand for machine learning tools has spurred researchers to explore the possibilities of automated machine learning (AutoML). AutoML tools aim to make machine learning accessible for non-machine learning experts (domain experts), to improve the efficiency of machine learning, and to accelerate machine learning research. But although automation and efficiency are among AutoML's main selling points, the process still requires human involvement at a number of vital steps, including understanding the attributes of domain-specific data, defining prediction problems, creating a suitable training data set, and selecting a promising machine learning technique. These steps often require a prolonged back-and-forth that makes this process inefficient for domain experts and data scientists alike, and keeps so-called AutoML systems from being truly automatic. In this review article, we introduce a new classification system for AutoML systems, using a seven-tiered schematic to distinguish these systems based on their level of autonomy. We begin by describing what an end-to-end machine learning pipeline actually looks like, and which subtasks of the machine learning pipeline have been automated so far. We highlight those subtasks which are still done manually - generally by a data scientist - and explain how this limits domain experts' access to machine learning. Next, we introduce our novel level-based taxonomy for AutoML systems and define each level according to the scope of automation support provided. Finally, we lay out a roadmap for the future, pinpointing the research required to further automate the end-to-end machine learning pipeline and discussing important challenges that stand in the way of this ambitious goal.
abstract_zh: 随着大数据在各个领域变得无处不在，并且越来越多的利益相关者渴望充分利用他们的数据，对机器学习工具的需求促使研究人员探索自动化机器学习（AutoML）的可能性。 AutoML工具旨在让非机器学习专家（领域专家）也能使用机器学习，提高机器学习效率，加速机器学习研究。但是，尽管自动化和效率是 AutoML 的主要卖点之一，但该过程仍然需要人类参与许多重要步骤，包括理解特定领域数据的属性、定义预测问题、创建合适的训练数据集以及选择有前途的机器学习技术。这些步骤通常需要长时间的来回，这使得这个过程对于领域专家和数据科学家来说效率低下，并且使所谓的 AutoML 系统无法真正实现自动化。在这篇评论文章中，我们介绍了一种新的 AutoML 系统分类系统，使用七层示意图根据自主级别来区分这些系统。我们首先描述端到端机器学习管道实际上是什么样子，以及机器学习管道的哪些子任务到目前为止已经自动化。我们重点介绍那些仍然由数据科学家手动完成的子任务，并解释这如何限制了领域专家对机器学习的访问。接下来，我们介绍针对 AutoML 系统的新颖的基于级别的分类法，并根据提供的自动化支持的范围定义每个级别。最后，我们制定了未来的路线图，明确了进一步自动化端到端机器学习管道所需的研究，并讨论了阻碍这一雄心勃勃的目标的重要挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了基于七级自主性分类的AutoML系统新分类体系，并探讨了当前自动化水平及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管AutoML旨在提升机器学习效率和可及性，但关键步骤仍需人工干预，限制了其真正自动化。
AI.method: 通过分析端到端机器学习流程的子任务自动化现状，提出基于自主性层级的分类体系，并制定未来研究路线图。
AI.result: 构建了七级AutoML系统分类框架，明确了当前自动化瓶颈及需进一步研究的领域。
AI.conclusion: 实现端到端自动化需解决领域数据理解、问题定义等核心挑战，需跨学科协作推进技术突破。

authors_text: Jia-Wei Yan,Ci-Siang Lin,Fu-En Yang,Yu-Jhe Li,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang
title: Semantics-Guided Representation Learning with Applications to Visual Synthesis
title_zh: 语义引导的表示学习及其在视觉合成中的应用
abstract: Learning interpretable and interpolatable latent representations has been an emerging research direction, allowing researchers to understand and utilize the derived latent space for further applications such as visual synthesis or recognition. While most existing approaches derive an interpolatable latent space and induces smooth transition in image appearance, it is still not clear how to observe desirable representations which would contain semantic information of interest. In this paper, we aim to learn meaningful representations and simultaneously perform semantic-oriented and visually-smooth interpolation. To this end, we propose an angular triplet-neighbor loss (ATNL) that enables learning a latent representation whose distribution matches the semantic information of interest. With the latent space guided by ATNL, we further utilize spherical semantic interpolation for generating semantic warping of images, allowing synthesis of desirable visual data. Experiments on MNIST and CMU Multi-PIE datasets qualitatively and quantitatively verify the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Learning interpretable and interpolatable latent representations has been an emerging research direction, allowing researchers to understand and utilize the derived latent space for further applications such as visual synthesis or recognition. While most existing approaches derive an interpolatable latent space and induces smooth transition in image appearance, it is still not clear how to observe desirable representations which would contain semantic information of interest. In this paper, we aim to learn meaningful representations and simultaneously perform semantic-oriented and visually-smooth interpolation. To this end, we propose an angular triplet-neighbor loss (ATNL) that enables learning a latent representation whose distribution matches the semantic information of interest. With the latent space guided by ATNL, we further utilize spherical semantic interpolation for generating semantic warping of images, allowing synthesis of desirable visual data. Experiments on MNIST and CMU Multi-PIE datasets qualitatively and quantitatively verify the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 学习可解释和可插值的潜在表示一直是一个新兴的研究方向，使研究人员能够理解和利用派生的潜在空间进行进一步的应用，例如视觉合成或识别。虽然大多数现有方法导出可插值的潜在空间并引起图像外观的平滑过渡，但仍不清楚如何观察包含感兴趣的语义信息的理想表示。在本文中，我们的目标是学习有意义的表示，同时执行面向语义和视觉平滑的插值。为此，我们提出了一种角度三元组邻居损失（ATNL），它能够学习其分布与感兴趣的语义信息相匹配的潜在表示。通过 ATNL 引导的潜在空间，我们进一步利用球形语义插值来生成图像的语义扭曲，从而可以合成所需的视觉数据。在 MNIST 和 CMU Multi-PIE 数据集上的实验定性和定量地验证了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种语义引导的表示学习方法，用于生成具有语义信息的视觉合成图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽能生成平滑过渡的图像，但难以在潜在空间中明确捕捉所需语义信息，导致表示缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 设计了角度三元组邻居损失（ATNL）以对齐潜在表示与语义分布，并结合球面语义插值实现图像语义变形。
AI.result: 在MNIST和CMU Multi-PIE数据集上，方法在定性和定量实验中均验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义引导的潜在空间学习，实现了视觉合成中语义可控与视觉平滑的双重目标。

Experiments on MNIST and CMU Multi-PIE datasets qualitatively and quantitatively verify the effectiveness of our method. 学习可解释和可插值的潜在表示一直是一个新兴的研究方向，使研究人员能够理解和利用派生的潜在空间进行进一步的应用，例如视觉合成或识别。虽然大多数现有方法导出可插值的潜在空间并引起图像外观的平滑过渡，但仍不清楚如何观察包含感兴趣的语义信息的理想表示。在本文中，我们的目标是学习有意义的表示，同时执行面向语义和视觉平滑的插值。为此，我们提出了一种角度三元组邻居损失（ATNL），它能够学习其分布与感兴趣的语义信息相匹配的潜在表示。通过 ATNL 引导的潜在空间，我们进一步利用球形语义插值来生成图像的语义扭曲，从而可以合成所需的视觉数据。在 MNIST 和 CMU Multi-PIE 数据集上的实验定性和定量地验证了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种语义引导的表示学习方法，用于生成具有语义信息的视觉合成图像。 Jia-Wei Yan,Ci-Siang Lin,Fu-En Yang,Yu-Jhe Li,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang cs.CV

title: Towards Real-time Drowsiness Detection for Elderly Care
title_zh: 为老年人护理提供实时睡意检测
comment: This unpublished paper was accepted by the Conference on Innovative Technologies in Intelligent Systems & Industrial Applications (CITISIA 2020) [https://ieee-citisia.org] and uploaded to ArXiv.org preprint server. The camera-ready copy with DOI should be available in IEEE Xplore sometimes after the conference presentation and copyright transfer to IEEE
comments: This unpublished paper was accepted by the Conference on Innovative Technologies in Intelligent Systems & Industrial Applications (CITISIA 2020) [https://ieee-citisia.org] and uploaded to ArXiv.org preprint server. The camera-ready copy with DOI should be available in IEEE Xplore sometimes after the conference presentation and copyright transfer to IEEE
abstract: The primary focus of this paper is to produce a proof of concept for extracting drowsiness information from videos to help elderly living on their own. To quantify yawning, eyelid and head movement over time, we extracted 3000 images from captured videos for training and testing of deep learning models integrated with OpenCV library. The achieved classification accuracy for eyelid and mouth open/close status were between 94.3%-97.2%. Visual inspection of head movement from videos with generated 3D coordinate overlays, indicated clear spatiotemporal patterns in collected data (yaw, roll and pitch). Extraction methodology of the drowsiness information as timeseries is applicable to other contexts including support for prior work in privacy-preserving augmented coaching, sport rehabilitation, and integration with big data platform in healthcare.
summary: The primary focus of this paper is to produce a proof of concept for extracting drowsiness information from videos to help elderly living on their own. To quantify yawning, eyelid and head movement over time, we extracted 3000 images from captured videos for training and testing of deep learning models integrated with OpenCV library. The achieved classification accuracy for eyelid and mouth open/close status were between 94.3%-97.2%. Visual inspection of head movement from videos with generated 3D coordinate overlays, indicated clear spatiotemporal patterns in collected data (yaw, roll and pitch). Extraction methodology of the drowsiness information as timeseries is applicable to other contexts including support for prior work in privacy-preserving augmented coaching, sport rehabilitation, and integration with big data platform in healthcare.
abstract_zh: 本文的主要重点是提出一个概念验证，从视频中提取睡意信息，以帮助老年人独立生活。为了量化打哈欠、眼睑和头部随时间的运动，我们从捕获的视频中提取了 3000 张图像，用于训练和测试与 OpenCV 库集成的深度学习模型。眼睑和嘴巴开/闭状态的分类准确率在 94.3%-97.2% 之间。通过生成的 3D 坐标叠加对视频中的头部运动进行目视检查，表明收集的数据中存在清晰的时空模式（偏航、滚动和俯仰）。以时间序列形式提取睡意信息的方法适用于其他环境，包括支持隐私保护增强训练、运动康复以及与医疗保健大数据平台集成的先前工作。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过视频分析实时检测独居老年人的嗜睡状态，以保障其安全。
AI.motivation: 独居老年人因嗜睡可能导致意外事故，需通过非接触式监测技术实现及时预警。
AI.method: 采集视频数据并提取3000张图像，结合OpenCV库训练深度学习模型，分析打哈欠、眼睑和头部运动特征。
AI.result: 眼睑和嘴巴开合状态分类准确率达94.3%-97.2%，头部运动呈现清晰时空模式。
AI.conclusion: 该时序数据提取方法可扩展至隐私保护教练、运动康复及医疗大数据平台等场景。

title: Reinforcement learning using Deep Q Networks and Q learning accurately localizes brain tumors on MRI with very small training sets
title_zh: 使用深度 Q 网络和 Q 学习的强化学习通过非常小的训练集在 MRI 上准确定位脑肿瘤
abstract: Purpose Supervised deep learning in radiology suffers from notorious inherent limitations: 1) It requires large, hand-annotated data sets, 2) It is non-generalizable, and 3) It lacks explainability and intuition. We have recently proposed Reinforcement Learning to address all threes. However, we applied it to images with radiologist eye tracking points, which limits the state-action space. Here we generalize the Deep-Q Learning to a gridworld-based environment, so that only the images and image masks are required. Materials and Methods We trained a Deep Q network on 30 two-dimensional image slices from the BraTS brain tumor database. Each image contained one lesion. We then tested the trained Deep Q network on a separate set of 30 testing set images. For comparison, we also trained and tested a keypoint detection supervised deep learning network for the same set of training / testing images. Results Whereas the supervised approach quickly overfit the training data, and predicably performed poorly on the testing set (11\% accuracy), the Deep-Q learning approach showed progressive improved generalizability to the testing set over training time, reaching 70\% accuracy. Conclusion We have shown a proof-of-principle application of reinforcement learning to radiological images, here using 2D contrast-enhanced MRI brain images with the goal of localizing brain tumors. This represents a generalization of recent work to a gridworld setting, naturally suitable for analyzing medical images.

Conclusion We have shown a proof-of-principle application of reinforcement learning to radiological images, here using 2D contrast-enhanced MRI brain images with the goal of localizing brain tumors. abstract_zh: 目的放射学中的监督深度学习存在着众所周知的固有局限性：1）它需要大量的手工注释数据集，2）它是不可泛化的，3）它缺乏可解释性和直觉。我们最近提出了强化学习来解决这三个问题。然而，我们将其应用于具有放射科医生眼睛跟踪点的图像，这限制了状态动作空间。在这里，我们将 Deep-Q Learning 推广到基于 gridworld 的环境，因此只需要图像和图像掩模。材料和方法 我们在 BraTS 脑肿瘤数据库的 30 个二维图像切片上训练了 Deep Q 网络。每张图像包含一个病变。然后，我们在一组单独的 30 个测试集图像上测试了经过训练的 Deep Q 网络。为了进行比较，我们还针对同一组训练/测试图像训练和测试了关键点检测监督深度学习网络。结果 尽管监督方法很快就过度拟合了训练数据，并且可以预见在测试集上表现不佳（准确率 11%），但 Deep-Q 学习方法在训练过程中显示出对测试集的泛化性逐步提高，准确率达到 70%。结论 我们展示了强化学习在放射图像上的原理验证应用，这里使用 2D 对比增强 MRI 脑图像，目标是定位脑肿瘤。这代表了最近工作对网格世界设置的概括，自然适合分析医学图像。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出使用深度Q网络（Deep Q Networks）和Q学习的强化学习方法，在仅有少量训练数据的情况下准确定位MRI中的脑肿瘤。
AI.motivation: 监督式深度学习在放射学领域面临数据需求大、泛化能力差和可解释性不足等限制，而强化学习可克服这些缺陷，但需解决状态-动作空间受限的问题。
AI.method: 在网格世界（gridworld）环境中训练深度Q网络，仅使用图像和图像掩码作为输入，对比传统监督学习的关节点检测方法。
AI.result: 监督方法在测试集准确率仅11%，而深度Q学习方法随训练时间提升泛化能力，最终测试准确率达70%。
AI.conclusion: 证明了强化学习在放射学图像分析中的可行性，尤其适用于小样本下的脑肿瘤定位任务。

authors_text: Yangyang Shi,Yongqiang Wang,Chunyang Wu,Ching-Feng Yeh,Julian Chan,Frank Zhang,Duc Le,Mike Seltzer
title: Emformer: Efficient Memory Transformer Based Acoustic Model For Low Latency Streaming Speech Recognition
title_zh: Emformer：基于高效内存变压器的声学模型，用于低延迟流式语音识别
abstract: This paper proposes an efficient memory transformer Emformer for low latency streaming speech recognition. In Emformer, the long-range history context is distilled into an augmented memory bank to reduce self-attention's computation complexity. A cache mechanism saves the computation for the key and value in self-attention for the left context. Emformer applies a parallelized block processing in training to support low latency models. We carry out experiments on benchmark LibriSpeech data. Under average latency of 960 ms, Emformer gets WER $2.50\%$ on test-clean and $5.62\%$ on test-other. Comparing with a strong baseline augmented memory transformer (AM-TRF), Emformer gets $4.6$ folds training speedup and $18\%$ relative real-time factor (RTF) reduction in decoding with relative WER reduction $17\%$ on test-clean and $9\%$ on test-other. For a low latency scenario with an average latency of 80 ms, Emformer achieves WER $3.01\%$ on test-clean and $7.09\%$ on test-other. Comparing with the LSTM baseline with the same latency and model size, Emformer gets relative WER reduction $9\%$ and $16\%$ on test-clean and test-other, respectively.
summary: This paper proposes an efficient memory transformer Emformer for low latency streaming speech recognition. In Emformer, the long-range history context is distilled into an augmented memory bank to reduce self-attention's computation complexity. We carry out experiments on benchmark LibriSpeech data. Under average latency of 960 ms, Emformer gets WER $2.50\%$ on test-clean and $5.62\%$ on test-other. Comparing with a strong baseline augmented memory transformer (AM-TRF), Emformer gets $4.6$ folds training speedup and $18\%$ relative real-time factor (RTF) reduction in decoding with relative WER reduction $17\%$ on test-clean and $9\%$ on test-other. For a low latency scenario with an average latency of 80 ms, Emformer achieves WER $3.01\%$ on test-clean and $7.09\%$ on test-other. Comparing with the LSTM baseline with the same latency and model size, Emformer gets relative WER reduction $9\%$ and $16\%$ on test-clean and test-other, respectively.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于低延迟流式语音识别的高效内存转换器 Emformer。在 Emformer 中，长期历史上下文被提炼到增强的记忆库中，以降低自注意力的计算复杂性。缓存机制将键和值的计算保存在左侧上下文的自注意力中。 Emformer 在训练中应用并行块处理来支持低延迟模型。我们对基准 LibriSpeech 数据进行了实验。在 960 毫秒的平均延迟下，Emformer 在 test-clean 上获得了 WER $2.50\%$，在 test-other 上获得了 $5.62\%$。与强大的基线增强记忆变压器 (AM-TRF) 相比，Emformer 获得了 4.6 美元的训练加速倍数和解码方面的相对实时因子 (RTF) 减少 18\%$，在测试清洁上相对 WER 减少了 $17\%$，在测试其他上相对 WER 减少了 $9\%$。对于平均延迟为 80 毫秒的低延迟场景，Emformer 在 test-clean 上实现了 $3.01\%$ WER，在 test-other 上实现了 $7.09\%$ WER。与具有相同延迟和模型大小的 LSTM 基线相比，Emformer 在 test-clean 和 test-other 上分别获得相对 WER 降低 $9\%$ 和 $16\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Emformer的高效内存Transformer模型，用于实现低延迟的流式语音识别。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer模型在处理长距离上下文时计算复杂度高，导致延迟较大，难以满足实时语音识别需求。
AI.method: 通过将长距离历史信息蒸馏到增强的内存银行中，结合缓存机制减少自注意力计算，并采用并行块处理训练策略以提升效率。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，Emformer在960ms平均延迟下达到2.50%（test-clean）和5.62%（test-other）的词错误率，相较基线模型训练加速4.6倍且解码效率提升18%。在80ms低延迟场景下，其词错误率分别为3.01%和7.09%，优于相同规模的LSTM模型。
AI.conclusion: Emformer在保持较高识别精度的同时显著降低了计算复杂度和延迟，为低延迟流式语音识别提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Emformer: Efficient Memory Transformer Based Acoustic Model For Low Latency Streaming Speech Recognition Emformer：基于高效内存变压器的声学模型，用于低延迟流式语音识别 This paper proposes an efficient memory transformer Emformer for low latency streaming speech recognition. In Emformer, the long-range history context is distilled into an augmented memory bank to reduce self-attention's computation complexity. A cache mechanism saves the computation for the key and value in self-attention for the left context. Emformer applies a parallelized block processing in training to support low latency models. We carry out experiments on benchmark LibriSpeech data. Under average latency of 960 ms, Emformer gets WER $2.50\%$ on test-clean and $5.62\%$ on test-other. Comparing with a strong baseline augmented memory transformer (AM-TRF), Emformer gets $4.6$ folds training speedup and $18\%$ relative real-time factor (RTF) reduction in decoding with relative WER reduction $17\%$ on test-clean and $9\%$ on test-other. For a low latency scenario with an average latency of 80 ms, Emformer achieves WER $3.01\%$ on test-clean and $7.09\%$ on test-other. Comparing with the LSTM baseline with the same latency and model size, Emformer gets relative WER reduction $9\%$ and $16\%$ on test-clean and test-other, respectively. 本文提出了一种用于低延迟流式语音识别的高效内存转换器 Emformer。在 Emformer 中，长期历史上下文被提炼到增强的记忆库中，以降低自注意力的计算复杂性。缓存机制将键和值的计算保存在左侧上下文的自注意力中。 Emformer 在训练中应用并行块处理来支持低延迟模型。我们对基准 LibriSpeech 数据进行了实验。在 960 毫秒的平均延迟下，Emformer 在 test-clean 上获得了 WER $2.50\%$，在 test-other 上获得了 $5.62\%$。与强大的基线增强记忆变压器 (AM-TRF) 相比，Emformer 获得了 4.6 美元的训练加速倍数和解码方面的相对实时因子 (RTF) 减少 18\%$，在测试清洁上相对 WER 减少了 $17\%$，在测试其他上相对 WER 减少了 $9\%$。对于平均延迟为 80 毫秒的低延迟场景，Emformer 在 test-clean 上实现了 $3.01\%$ WER，在 test-other 上实现了 $7.09\%$ WER。与具有相同延迟和模型大小的 LSTM 基线相比，Emformer 在 test-clean 和 test-other 上分别获得相对 WER 降低 $9\%$ 和 $16\%$。 本文提出了一种名为Emformer的高效内存Transformer模型，用于实现低延迟的流式语音识别。 Yangyang Shi,Yongqiang Wang,Chunyang Wu,Ching-Feng Yeh,Julian Chan,Frank Zhang,Duc Le,Mike Seltzer cs.SD,cs.CL,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Ran Xu,Chen-lin Zhang,Pengcheng Wang,Jayoung Lee,Subrata Mitra,Somali Chaterji,Yin Li,Saurabh Bagchi
title: ApproxDet: Content and Contention-Aware Approximate Object Detection for Mobiles
title_zh: ApproxDet：移动设备的内容和竞争感知近似对象检测
comment: Accepted to appear at the 18th ACM Conference on Embedded Networked Sensor Systems (SenSys), 2020
comments: Accepted to appear at the 18th ACM Conference on Embedded Networked Sensor Systems (SenSys), 2020
abstract: Advanced video analytic systems, including scene classification and object detection, have seen widespread success in various domains such as smart cities and autonomous transportation. With an ever-growing number of powerful client devices, there is incentive to move these heavy video analytics workloads from the cloud to mobile devices to achieve low latency and real-time processing and to preserve user privacy. However, most video analytic systems are heavyweight and are trained offline with some pre-defined latency or accuracy requirements. This makes them unable to adapt at runtime in the face of three types of dynamism -- the input video characteristics change, the amount of compute resources available on the node changes due to co-located applications, and the user's latency-accuracy requirements change. In this paper we introduce ApproxDet, an adaptive video object detection framework for mobile devices to meet accuracy-latency requirements in the face of changing content and resource contention scenarios. To achieve this, we introduce a multi-branch object detection kernel (layered on Faster R-CNN), which incorporates a data-driven modeling approach on the performance metrics, and a latency SLA-driven scheduler to pick the best execution branch at runtime. We couple this kernel with approximable video object tracking algorithms to create an end-to-end video object detection system. We evaluate ApproxDet on a large benchmark video dataset and compare quantitatively to AdaScale and YOLOv3. We find that ApproxDet is able to adapt to a wide variety of contention and content characteristics and outshines all baselines, e.g., it achieves 52% lower latency and 11.1% higher accuracy over YOLOv3.
summary: Advanced video analytic systems, including scene classification and object detection, have seen widespread success in various domains such as smart cities and autonomous transportation. With an ever-growing number of powerful client devices, there is incentive to move these heavy video analytics workloads from the cloud to mobile devices to achieve low latency and real-time processing and to preserve user privacy. However, most video analytic systems are heavyweight and are trained offline with some pre-defined latency or accuracy requirements. This makes them unable to adapt at runtime in the face of three types of dynamism -- the input video characteristics change, the amount of compute resources available on the node changes due to co-located applications, and the user's latency-accuracy requirements change. In this paper we introduce ApproxDet, an adaptive video object detection framework for mobile devices to meet accuracy-latency requirements in the face of changing content and resource contention scenarios. To achieve this, we introduce a multi-branch object detection kernel (layered on Faster R-CNN), which incorporates a data-driven modeling approach on the performance metrics, and a latency SLA-driven scheduler to pick the best execution branch at runtime. We couple this kernel with approximable video object tracking algorithms to create an end-to-end video object detection system. We evaluate ApproxDet on a large benchmark video dataset and compare quantitatively to AdaScale and YOLOv3. We find that ApproxDet is able to adapt to a wide variety of contention and content characteristics and outshines all baselines, e.g., it achieves 52% lower latency and 11.1% higher accuracy over YOLOv3.
abstract_zh: 先进的视频分析系统，包括场景分类和对象检测，在智慧城市和自动交通等各个领域取得了广泛的成功。随着功能强大的客户端设备数量不断增加，人们有动力将这些繁重的视频分析工作负载从云端转移到移动设备，以实现低延迟和实时处理并保护用户隐私。然而，大多数视频分析系统都是重量级的，并且是按照一些预定义的延迟或准确性要求进行离线训练的。这使得它们无法在运行时适应三种类型的动态——输入视频特性变化、节点上可用的计算资源量由于共置应用程序而变化，以及用户的延迟精度要求变化。在本文中，我们介绍了 ApproxDet，这是一种适用于移动设备的自适应视频对象检测框架，可在面对不断变化的内容和资源争用场景时满足准确性延迟要求。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了一个多分支对象检测内核（分层在 Faster R-CNN 上），它结合了性能指标上的数据驱动建模方法，以及延迟 SLA 驱动的调度程序，以在运行时选择最佳执行分支。我们将该内核与近似视频对象跟踪算法结合起来，以创建端到端视频对象检测系统。我们在大型基准视频数据集上评估 ApproxDet，并与 AdaScale 和 YOLOv3 进行定量比较。我们发现 ApproxDet 能够适应各种争用和内容特征，并且优于所有基线，例如，它比 YOLOv3 实现了 52% 的低延迟和 11.1% 的高准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ApproxDet的自适应视频目标检测框架，旨在满足移动设备在动态内容和资源竞争场景下的精度-延迟需求。
AI.motivation: 随着视频分析任务向移动设备迁移，现有系统无法适应运行时视频内容变化、计算资源波动及用户延迟-精度需求变化的挑战，亟需一种动态调整的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于Faster R-CNN设计多分支目标检测内核，结合数据驱动的性能建模与延迟SLA调度器，在运行时选择最佳执行分支，并整合近似视频目标跟踪算法构建端到端系统。
AI.result: 在大规模基准数据集上测试显示，ApproxDet相较YOLOv3实现52%的延迟降低和11.1%的精度提升，优于AdaScale等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ApproxDet通过动态分支选择和近似算法有效应对内容与资源变化，为移动设备上的实时视频分析提供了高效且灵活的解决方案。

title: Underwater Image Color Correction by Complementary Adaptation
title_zh: 通过互补适应进行水下图像颜色校正
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel approach for underwater image color correction based on a Tikhonov type optimization model in the CIELAB color space. It presents a new variational interpretation of the complementary adaptation theory in psychophysics, which establishes the connection between colorimetric notions and color constancy of the human visual system (HVS). Understood as a long-term adaptive process, our method effectively removes the underwater color cast and yields a balanced color distribution. For visualization purposes, we enhance the image contrast by properly rescaling both lightness and chroma without trespassing the CIELAB gamut. The magnitude of the enhancement is hue-selective and image-based, thus our method is robust for different underwater imaging environments. To improve the uniformity of CIELAB, we include an approximate hue-linearization as the pre-processing and an inverse transform of the Helmholtz-Kohlrausch effect as the post-processing. We analyze and validate the proposed model by various numerical experiments. Based on image quality metrics designed for underwater conditions, we compare with some state-of-art approaches to show that the proposed method has consistently superior performances.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel approach for underwater image color correction based on a Tikhonov type optimization model in the CIELAB color space. It presents a new variational interpretation of the complementary adaptation theory in psychophysics, which establishes the connection between colorimetric notions and color constancy of the human visual system (HVS). Understood as a long-term adaptive process, our method effectively removes the underwater color cast and yields a balanced color distribution. For visualization purposes, we enhance the image contrast by properly rescaling both lightness and chroma without trespassing the CIELAB gamut. The magnitude of the enhancement is hue-selective and image-based, thus our method is robust for different underwater imaging environments. To improve the uniformity of CIELAB, we include an approximate hue-linearization as the pre-processing and an inverse transform of the Helmholtz-Kohlrausch effect as the post-processing. We analyze and validate the proposed model by various numerical experiments. Based on image quality metrics designed for underwater conditions, we compare with some state-of-art approaches to show that the proposed method has consistently superior performances.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 CIELAB 色彩空间中的 Tikhonov 型优化模型的水下图像色彩校正的新方法。它提出了心理物理学中互补适应理论的新变分解释，该理论建立了比色概念和人类视觉系统（HVS）颜色恒常性之间的联系。我们的方法可以理解为一个长期的自适应过程，可以有效地消除水下色偏并产生平衡的颜色分布。出于可视化目的，我们通过适当重新调整亮度和色度来增强图像对比度，而无需侵入 CIELAB 色域。增强的幅度是色调选择性的并且基于图像，因此我们的方法对于不同的水下成像环境是稳健的。为了提高 CIELAB 的均匀性，我们将近似色调线性化作为预处理，将 Helmholtz-Kohlrausch 效应的逆变换作为后处理。我们通过各种数值实验分析和验证所提出的模型。基于为水下条件设计的图像质量指标，我们与一些最先进的方法进行比较，以表明所提出的方法具有始终如一的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CIELAB色彩空间的Tikhonov优化模型的水下图像色彩校正方法，通过互补适应理论实现色彩平衡。
AI.motivation: 水下图像常因光线吸收和散射导致色彩偏差，传统方法难以适应复杂环境，需建立更符合人眼视觉系统的色彩校正模型。
AI.method: 结合Tikhonov正则化框架与互补适应理论，通过CIELAB色彩空间进行色彩校正，包含预处理的色相线性化和后处理的赫尔姆霍兹-科赫鲁什效应逆变换。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在水下图像质量指标上优于现有算法，能有效消除色彩偏移并保持色彩分布平衡。
AI.conclusion: 基于心理物理学的互补适应理论与优化模型，使方法在不同水下环境中具有鲁棒性和优越的色彩校正性能。

title: Mutual-Supervised Feature Modulation Network for Occluded Pedestrian Detection
title_zh: 用于遮挡行人检测的相互监督特征调制网络
abstract: State-of-the-art pedestrian detectors have achieved significant progress on non-occluded pedestrians, yet they are still struggling under heavy occlusions. The recent occlusion handling strategy of popular two-stage approaches is to build a two-branch architecture with the help of additional visible body annotations. Nonetheless, these methods still have some weaknesses. Either the two branches are trained independently with only score-level fusion, which cannot guarantee the detectors to learn robust enough pedestrian features. Or the attention mechanisms are exploited to only emphasize on the visible body features. However, the visible body features of heavily occluded pedestrians are concentrated on a relatively small area, which will easily cause missing detections. To address the above issues, we propose in this paper a novel Mutual-Supervised Feature Modulation (MSFM) network, to better handle occluded pedestrian detection. The key MSFM module in our network calculates the similarity loss of full body boxes and visible body boxes corresponding to the same pedestrian so that the full-body detector could learn more complete and robust pedestrian features with the assist of contextual features from the occluding parts. To facilitate the MSFM module, we also propose a novel two-branch architecture, consisting of a standard full body detection branch and an extra visible body classification branch. These two branches are trained in a mutual-supervised way with full body annotations and visible body annotations, respectively. To verify the effectiveness of our proposed method, extensive experiments are conducted on two challenging pedestrian datasets: Caltech and CityPersons, and our approach achieves superior performance compared to other state-of-the-art methods on both datasets, especially in heavy occlusion case.
summary: State-of-the-art pedestrian detectors have achieved significant progress on non-occluded pedestrians, yet they are still struggling under heavy occlusions. The recent occlusion handling strategy of popular two-stage approaches is to build a two-branch architecture with the help of additional visible body annotations. Nonetheless, these methods still have some weaknesses. Either the two branches are trained independently with only score-level fusion, which cannot guarantee the detectors to learn robust enough pedestrian features. Or the attention mechanisms are exploited to only emphasize on the visible body features. However, the visible body features of heavily occluded pedestrians are concentrated on a relatively small area, which will easily cause missing detections. To address the above issues, we propose in this paper a novel Mutual-Supervised Feature Modulation (MSFM) network, to better handle occluded pedestrian detection. The key MSFM module in our network calculates the similarity loss of full body boxes and visible body boxes corresponding to the same pedestrian so that the full-body detector could learn more complete and robust pedestrian features with the assist of contextual features from the occluding parts. To facilitate the MSFM module, we also propose a novel two-branch architecture, consisting of a standard full body detection branch and an extra visible body classification branch. These two branches are trained in a mutual-supervised way with full body annotations and visible body annotations, respectively. To verify the effectiveness of our proposed method, extensive experiments are conducted on two challenging pedestrian datasets: Caltech and CityPersons, and our approach achieves superior performance compared to other state-of-the-art methods on both datasets, especially in heavy occlusion case.
abstract_zh: 最先进的行人探测器在检测非遮挡行人方面取得了重大进展，但在严重遮挡的情况下仍然举步维艰。最近流行的两阶段方法的遮挡处理策略是借助附加的可见身体注释来构建两分支架构。尽管如此，这些方法仍然存在一些弱点。要么两个分支独立训练，仅进行分数级融合，这不能保证检测器学习足够鲁棒的行人特征。或者利用注意力机制只强调可见的身体特征。然而，严重遮挡行人的可见身体特征集中在相对较小的区域，很容易造成漏检。为了解决上述问题，我们在本文中提出了一种新颖的相互监督特征调制（MSFM）网络，以更好地处理遮挡行人检测。我们网络中的关键 MSFM 模块计算对应于同一行人的全身框和可见人体框的相似性损失，以便全身检测器可以在遮挡部分的上下文特征的帮助下学习更完整和鲁棒的行人特征。为了方便 MSFM 模块，我们还提出了一种新颖的两分支架构，由标准全身检测分支和额外的可见人体分类分支组成。这两个分支分别以全身注释和可见身体注释的相互监督方式进行训练。为了验证我们提出的方法的有效性，在两个具有挑战性的行人数据集：Caltech 和 CityPersons 上进行了广泛的实验，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在这两个数据集上实现了卓越的性能，特别是在严重遮挡的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于遮挡行人检测的相互监督特征调制网络（MSFM），以解决现有方法在严重遮挡情况下检测效果不佳的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有两阶段方法依赖额外可见身体标注构建双分支架构，但存在分支独立训练导致特征鲁棒性不足、注意力机制仅强调可见区域而忽略遮挡部分上下文信息的问题。
AI.method: 设计MSFM模块通过计算全身体和可见身体框的相似性损失，利用遮挡区域的上下文特征增强全身体检测器。提出双分支架构（全身体检测分支+可见身体分类分支），采用相互监督方式联合训练。
AI.result: 在Caltech和CityPersons数据集上实验表明，该方法在严重遮挡场景下优于现有先进方法，尤其在遮挡率高的情况下检测性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过相互监督机制和特征调制模块，MSFM网络有效利用遮挡区域的上下文信息，显著提升了严重遮挡行人检测的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Safety Verification of Model Based Reinforcement Learning Controllers
title_zh: 基于模型的强化学习控制器的安全验证
abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a promising tool for developing controllers for real world systems (e.g., robotics, autonomous driving, etc.). However, real systems often have constraints imposed on their state space which must be satisfied to ensure the safety of the system and its environment. Developing a verification tool for RL algorithms is challenging because the non-linear structure of neural networks impedes analytical verification of such models or controllers. To this end, we present a novel safety verification framework for model-based RL controllers using reachable set analysis. The proposed frame-work can efficiently handle models and controllers which are represented using neural networks. Additionally, if a controller fails to satisfy the safety constraints in general, the proposed framework can also be used to identify the subset of initial states from which the controller can be safely executed.
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a promising tool for developing controllers for real world systems (e.g., robotics, autonomous driving, etc.). However, real systems often have constraints imposed on their state space which must be satisfied to ensure the safety of the system and its environment. Developing a verification tool for RL algorithms is challenging because the non-linear structure of neural networks impedes analytical verification of such models or controllers. To this end, we present a novel safety verification framework for model-based RL controllers using reachable set analysis. The proposed frame-work can efficiently handle models and controllers which are represented using neural networks. Additionally, if a controller fails to satisfy the safety constraints in general, the proposed framework can also be used to identify the subset of initial states from which the controller can be safely executed.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的强化学习 (RL) 已成为开发现实世界系统（例如机器人、自动驾驶等）控制器的有前途的工具。然而，实际系统通常对其状态空间施加约束，必须满足这些约束以确保系统及其环境的安全。开发 RL 算法的验证工具具有挑战性，因为神经网络的非线性结构阻碍了此类模型或控制器的分析验证。为此，我们使用可达集分析为基于模型的 RL 控制器提出了一种新颖的安全验证框架。所提出的框架可以有效地处理使用神经网络表示的模型和控制器。此外，如果控制器一般无法满足安全约束，所提出的框架还可以用于识别可以安全执行控制器的初始状态的子集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可达集分析的新型安全验证框架，用于验证模型基于强化学习（RL）控制器的安全性，确保其满足实际系统的状态空间约束。
AI.motivation: 现实系统存在状态空间约束，但神经网络的非线性特性使得现有方法难以有效验证RL控制器的安全性，亟需开发针对性的验证工具。
AI.method: 采用可达集分析方法，构建可处理神经网络表示模型的验证框架，并在控制器不满足安全约束时识别安全初始状态子集。
AI.result: 框架能够高效验证模型基于RL控制器的安全性，成功识别出控制器可安全执行的初始状态范围，实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为模型基于RL的控制器提供了系统化的安全验证方案，有助于提升实际应用中的安全性保障能力。
